authors_text: Jialin Wang,Hai-Ning Liang,Diego Monteiro,Wenge Xu,Hao Chen,Qiwen Chen
title: Real-Time Detection of Simulator Sickness in Virtual Reality Games Based on Players' Psychophysiological Data during Gameplay
title_zh: 基于玩家游戏过程中的心理生理数据实时检测虚拟现实游戏中的模拟器晕动症
comment: IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality (ISMAR)
comments: IEEE International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality (ISMAR)
abstract: Virtual Reality (VR) technology has been proliferating in the last decade, especially in the last few years. However, Simulator Sickness (SS) still represents a significant problem for its wider adoption. Currently, the most common way to detect SS is using the Simulator Sickness Questionnaire (SSQ). SSQ is a subjective measurement and is inadequate for real-time applications such as VR games. This research aims to investigate how to use machine learning techniques to detect SS based on in-game characters' and users' physiological data during gameplay in VR games. To achieve this, we designed an experiment to collect such data with three types of games. We trained a Long Short-Term Memory neural network with the dataset eye-tracking and character movement data to detect SS in real-time. Our results indicate that, in VR games, our model is an accurate and efficient way to detect SS in real-time.
summary: Virtual Reality (VR) technology has been proliferating in the last decade, especially in the last few years. However, Simulator Sickness (SS) still represents a significant problem for its wider adoption. Currently, the most common way to detect SS is using the Simulator Sickness Questionnaire (SSQ). SSQ is a subjective measurement and is inadequate for real-time applications such as VR games. This research aims to investigate how to use machine learning techniques to detect SS based on in-game characters' and users' physiological data during gameplay in VR games. To achieve this, we designed an experiment to collect such data with three types of games. We trained a Long Short-Term Memory neural network with the dataset eye-tracking and character movement data to detect SS in real-time. Our results indicate that, in VR games, our model is an accurate and efficient way to detect SS in real-time.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实（VR）技术在过去十年中不断激增，尤其是在过去几年中。然而，模拟器疾病（SS）仍然是其更广泛采用的一个重大问题。目前，检测 SS 最常见的方法是使用模拟器疾病问卷 (SSQ)。 SSQ 是一种主观测量，不适用于 VR 游戏等实时应用。本研究旨在研究如何使用机器学习技术根据 VR 游戏中游戏角色和用户的生理数据来检测 SS。为了实现这一目标，我们设计了一个实验，通过三种类型的游戏收集此类数据。我们使用眼动追踪数据集和角色运动数据训练了一个长短期记忆神经网络，以实时检测 SS。我们的结果表明，在 VR 游戏中，我们的模型是一种准确有效的实时检测 SS 的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过机器学习技术，利用玩家在虚拟现实游戏中的生理数据实时检测模拟器眩晕症（SS）。
AI.motivation: 传统SS检测方法依赖主观问卷（SSQ），难以满足VR游戏等实时应用场景的需求，亟需客观且高效的实时检测方案。
AI.method: 设计实验收集三种类型游戏中的眼动追踪和角色移动数据，训练长短期记忆神经网络（LSTM）模型进行实时SS检测。
AI.result: 模型在VR游戏中实现了对SS的高精度实时检测，验证了其有效性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 基于生理数据的机器学习方法为VR游戏中SS的实时检测提供了可行解决方案，有助于提升用户体验与安全。

title: Multi-layer Residual Sparsifying Transform (MARS) Model for Low-dose CT Image Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于低剂量 CT 图像重建的多层残差稀疏变换 (MARS) 模型
comment: 28 pages, 12 figures, accepted by Medical Physics. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2005.03825
comments: 28 pages, 12 figures, accepted by Medical Physics. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2005.03825
abstract: Signal models based on sparse representations have received considerable attention in recent years. On the other hand, deep models consisting of a cascade of functional layers, commonly known as deep neural networks, have been highly successful for the task of object classification and have been recently introduced to image reconstruction. In this work, we develop a new image reconstruction approach based on a novel multi-layer model learned in an unsupervised manner by combining both sparse representations and deep models. The proposed framework extends the classical sparsifying transform model for images to a Multi-lAyer Residual Sparsifying transform (MARS) model, wherein the transform domain data are jointly sparsified over layers. We investigate the application of MARS models learned from limited regular-dose images for low-dose CT reconstruction using Penalized Weighted Least Squares (PWLS) optimization. We propose new formulations for multi-layer transform learning and image reconstruction. We derive an efficient block coordinate descent algorithm to learn the transforms across layers, in an unsupervised manner from limited regular-dose images. The learned model is then incorporated into the low-dose image reconstruction phase. Low-dose CT experimental results with both the XCAT phantom and Mayo Clinic data show that the MARS model outperforms conventional methods such as FBP and PWLS methods based on the edge-preserving (EP) regularizer in terms of two numerical metrics (RMSE and SSIM) and noise suppression. Compared with the single-layer learned transform (ST) model, the MARS model performs better in maintaining some subtle details.
summary: Signal models based on sparse representations have received considerable attention in recent years. On the other hand, deep models consisting of a cascade of functional layers, commonly known as deep neural networks, have been highly successful for the task of object classification and have been recently introduced to image reconstruction. In this work, we develop a new image reconstruction approach based on a novel multi-layer model learned in an unsupervised manner by combining both sparse representations and deep models. The proposed framework extends the classical sparsifying transform model for images to a Multi-lAyer Residual Sparsifying transform (MARS) model, wherein the transform domain data are jointly sparsified over layers. We investigate the application of MARS models learned from limited regular-dose images for low-dose CT reconstruction using Penalized Weighted Least Squares (PWLS) optimization. We propose new formulations for multi-layer transform learning and image reconstruction. We derive an efficient block coordinate descent algorithm to learn the transforms across layers, in an unsupervised manner from limited regular-dose images. The learned model is then incorporated into the low-dose image reconstruction phase. Low-dose CT experimental results with both the XCAT phantom and Mayo Clinic data show that the MARS model outperforms conventional methods such as FBP and PWLS methods based on the edge-preserving (EP) regularizer in terms of two numerical metrics (RMSE and SSIM) and noise suppression. Compared with the single-layer learned transform (ST) model, the MARS model performs better in maintaining some subtle details.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于稀疏表示的信号模型受到了相当多的关注。另一方面，由级联功能层组成的深度模型（通常称为深度神经网络）在对象分类任务中取得了巨大成功，并且最近被引入到图像重建中。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新的图像重建方法，该方法基于一种新颖的多层模型，该模型通过结合稀疏表示和深度模型以无监督的方式学习。所提出的框架将图像的经典稀疏变换模型扩展到多层残差稀疏变换（MARS）模型，其中变换域数据在层上联合稀疏。我们研究了从有限常规剂量图像中学习到的 MARS 模型在使用惩罚加权最小二乘 (PWLS) 优化进行低剂量 CT 重建中的应用。我们提出了多层变换学习和图像重建的新公式。我们推导出一种有效的块坐标下降算法，以无监督的方式从有限的常规剂量图像中学习跨层变换。然后将学习到的模型纳入低剂量图像重建阶段。 XCAT体模和Mayo Clinic数据的低剂量CT实验结果表明，MARS模型在两个数值指标（RMSE和SSIM）和噪声抑制方面优于传统方法，例如基于边缘保留（EP）正则化器的FBP和PWLS方法。与单层学习变换（ST）模型相比，MARS 模型在保持一些细微细节方面表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多层残差稀疏化变换（MARS）模型的低剂量CT图像重建方法，结合稀疏表示与深度学习框架。
AI.motivation: 传统低剂量CT重建方法在噪声抑制与细节保留之间存在矛盾，需探索更有效的信号建模方式以提升图像质量。
AI.method: 设计多层残差稀疏化变换模型，通过无监督学习从常规剂量图像中学习跨层联合稀疏化变换，并结合加权惩罚最小二乘优化实现低剂量重建。
AI.result: 在XCAT仿真数据和梅奥诊所真实数据上，MARS模型在RMSE和SSIM指标上优于FBP、EP-PWLS等传统方法，且比单层模型更擅长保留细微结构。
AI.conclusion: MARS模型通过深度稀疏化建模有效平衡了低剂量CT的噪声抑制与细节保持，为医学影像重建提供了新思路。

On the other hand, deep models consisting of a cascade of functional layers, commonly known as deep neural networks, have been highly successful for the task of object classification and have been recently introduced to image reconstruction. authors_text: He Zhao,Thanh Nguyen,Trung Le,Paul Montague,Olivier De Vel,Tamas Abraham,Dinh Phung
title: Learning to Attack with Fewer Pixels: A Probabilistic Post-hoc Framework for Refining Arbitrary Dense Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 学习用更少的像素进行攻击：用于改进任意密集对抗攻击的概率事后框架
abstract: Deep neural network image classifiers are reported to be susceptible to adversarial evasion attacks, which use carefully crafted images created to mislead a classifier. Many adversarial attacks belong to the category of dense attacks, which generate adversarial examples by perturbing all the pixels of a natural image. To generate sparse perturbations, sparse attacks have been recently developed, which are usually independent attacks derived by modifying a dense attack's algorithm with sparsity regularisations, resulting in reduced attack efficiency. In this paper, we aim to tackle this task from a different perspective. We select the most effective perturbations from the ones generated from a dense attack, based on the fact we find that a considerable amount of the perturbations on an image generated by dense attacks may contribute little to attacking a classifier. Accordingly, we propose a probabilistic post-hoc framework that refines given dense attacks by significantly reducing the number of perturbed pixels but keeping their attack power, trained with mutual information maximisation. Given an arbitrary dense attack, the proposed model enjoys appealing compatibility for making its adversarial images more realistic and less detectable with fewer perturbations. Moreover, our framework performs adversarial attacks much faster than existing sparse attacks.
summary: Deep neural network image classifiers are reported to be susceptible to adversarial evasion attacks, which use carefully crafted images created to mislead a classifier. Many adversarial attacks belong to the category of dense attacks, which generate adversarial examples by perturbing all the pixels of a natural image. To generate sparse perturbations, sparse attacks have been recently developed, which are usually independent attacks derived by modifying a dense attack's algorithm with sparsity regularisations, resulting in reduced attack efficiency. In this paper, we aim to tackle this task from a different perspective. We select the most effective perturbations from the ones generated from a dense attack, based on the fact we find that a considerable amount of the perturbations on an image generated by dense attacks may contribute little to attacking a classifier. Accordingly, we propose a probabilistic post-hoc framework that refines given dense attacks by significantly reducing the number of perturbed pixels but keeping their attack power, trained with mutual information maximisation. Given an arbitrary dense attack, the proposed model enjoys appealing compatibility for making its adversarial images more realistic and less detectable with fewer perturbations. Moreover, our framework performs adversarial attacks much faster than existing sparse attacks.
abstract_zh: 据报道，深度神经网络图像分类器很容易受到对抗性规避攻击，这些攻击使用精心制作的图像来误导分类器。许多对抗性攻击属于密集攻击的范畴，它们通过扰乱自然图像的所有像素来生成对抗性示例。为了产生稀疏扰动，最近开发了稀疏攻击，这些攻击通常是通过稀疏正则化修改密集攻击算法而派生的独立攻击，导致攻击效率降低。在本文中，我们旨在从不同的角度解决这项任务。我们从密集攻击生成的扰动中选择最有效的扰动，因为我们发现密集攻击生成的图像上的大量扰动可能对攻击分类器几乎没有贡献。因此，我们提出了一种概率事后框架，通过显着减少扰动像素的数量但保持其攻击能力，并通过互信息最大化进行训练，来完善给定的密集攻击。考虑到任意密集攻击，所提出的模型具有吸引人的兼容性，使其对抗性图像更加真实，并且在扰动较少的情况下不易被检测到。此外，我们的框架执行对抗性攻击的速度比现有的稀疏攻击快得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种概率后处理框架，通过减少扰动像素数量来优化密集对抗攻击，同时保持攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏攻击方法通过修改密集攻击算法实现，但效率较低。本文发现密集攻击生成的许多扰动对攻击贡献有限，因此需更高效地筛选关键扰动。
AI.method: 基于互信息最大化训练概率后处理框架，从密集攻击生成的扰动中选择最有效的部分，显著减少扰动像素数量。
AI.result: 框架在保持攻击效果的同时，使对抗样本更真实、更难检测，并且攻击速度远超现有稀疏攻击方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为任意密集攻击提供高效优化方案，在攻击效率与隐蔽性之间取得平衡。

search_text: Learning to Attack with Fewer Pixels: A Probabilistic Post-hoc Framework for Refining Arbitrary Dense Adversarial Attacks 学习用更少的像素进行攻击：用于改进任意密集对抗攻击的概率事后框架 Deep neural network image classifiers are reported to be susceptible to adversarial evasion attacks, which use carefully crafted images created to mislead a classifier. Many adversarial attacks belong to the category of dense attacks, which generate adversarial examples by perturbing all the pixels of a natural image. To generate sparse perturbations, sparse attacks have been recently developed, which are usually independent attacks derived by modifying a dense attack's algorithm with sparsity regularisations, resulting in reduced attack efficiency. In this paper, we aim to tackle this task from a different perspective. We select the most effective perturbations from the ones generated from a dense attack, based on the fact we find that a considerable amount of the perturbations on an image generated by dense attacks may contribute little to attacking a classifier. Accordingly, we propose a probabilistic post-hoc framework that refines given dense attacks by significantly reducing the number of perturbed pixels but keeping their attack power, trained with mutual information maximisation. Given an arbitrary dense attack, the proposed model enjoys appealing compatibility for making its adversarial images more realistic and less detectable with fewer perturbations. Moreover, our framework performs adversarial attacks much faster than existing sparse attacks. 据报道，深度神经网络图像分类器很容易受到对抗性规避攻击，这些攻击使用精心制作的图像来误导分类器。许多对抗性攻击属于密集攻击的范畴，它们通过扰乱自然图像的所有像素来生成对抗性示例。为了产生稀疏扰动，最近开发了稀疏攻击，这些攻击通常是通过稀疏正则化修改密集攻击算法而派生的独立攻击，导致攻击效率降低。在本文中，我们旨在从不同的角度解决这项任务。我们从密集攻击生成的扰动中选择最有效的扰动，因为我们发现密集攻击生成的图像上的大量扰动可能对攻击分类器几乎没有贡献。因此，我们提出了一种概率事后框架，通过显着减少扰动像素的数量但保持其攻击能力，并通过互信息最大化进行训练，来完善给定的密集攻击。考虑到任意密集攻击，所提出的模型具有吸引人的兼容性，使其对抗性图像更加真实，并且在扰动较少的情况下不易被检测到。此外，我们的框架执行对抗性攻击的速度比现有的稀疏攻击快得多。 本文提出一种概率后处理框架，通过减少扰动像素数量来优化密集对抗攻击，同时保持攻击效果。 He Zhao,Thanh Nguyen,Trung Le,Paul Montague,Olivier De Vel,Tamas Abraham,Dinh Phung cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Qingyun Wang,Qi Zeng,Lifu Huang,Kevin Knight,Heng Ji,Nazneen Fatema Rajani
title: ReviewRobot: Explainable Paper Review Generation based on Knowledge Synthesis
title_zh: ReviewRobot：基于知识合成的可解释论文评论生成
comment: 14 pages. Accepted by The 14th International Conference on Natural Language Generation (INLG 2020) Code and resource is available at https://github.com/EagleW/ReviewRobot
comments: 14 pages. Accepted by The 14th International Conference on Natural Language Generation (INLG 2020) Code and resource is available at https://github.com/EagleW/ReviewRobot
abstract: To assist human review process, we build a novel ReviewRobot to automatically assign a review score and write comments for multiple categories such as novelty and meaningful comparison. A good review needs to be knowledgeable, namely that the comments should be constructive and informative to help improve the paper; and explainable by providing detailed evidence. ReviewRobot achieves these goals via three steps: (1) We perform domain-specific Information Extraction to construct a knowledge graph (KG) from the target paper under review, a related work KG from the papers cited by the target paper, and a background KG from a large collection of previous papers in the domain. (2) By comparing these three KGs, we predict a review score and detailed structured knowledge as evidence for each review category. (3) We carefully select and generalize human review sentences into templates, and apply these templates to transform the review scores and evidence into natural language comments. Experimental results show that our review score predictor reaches 71.4%-100% accuracy. Human assessment by domain experts shows that 41.7%-70.5% of the comments generated by ReviewRobot are valid and constructive, and better than human-written ones for 20% of the time. Thus, ReviewRobot can serve as an assistant for paper reviewers, program chairs and authors.
summary: To assist human review process, we build a novel ReviewRobot to automatically assign a review score and write comments for multiple categories such as novelty and meaningful comparison. A good review needs to be knowledgeable, namely that the comments should be constructive and informative to help improve the paper; and explainable by providing detailed evidence. ReviewRobot achieves these goals via three steps: (1) We perform domain-specific Information Extraction to construct a knowledge graph (KG) from the target paper under review, a related work KG from the papers cited by the target paper, and a background KG from a large collection of previous papers in the domain. (2) By comparing these three KGs, we predict a review score and detailed structured knowledge as evidence for each review category. (3) We carefully select and generalize human review sentences into templates, and apply these templates to transform the review scores and evidence into natural language comments. Experimental results show that our review score predictor reaches 71.4%-100% accuracy. Human assessment by domain experts shows that 41.7%-70.5% of the comments generated by ReviewRobot are valid and constructive, and better than human-written ones for 20% of the time. Thus, ReviewRobot can serve as an assistant for paper reviewers, program chairs and authors.
abstract_zh: 为了协助人工审阅过程，我们构建了一个新颖的 ReviewRobot 来自动分配审阅分数并为多个类别（例如新颖性和有意义的比较）撰写评论。好的审稿需要知识渊博，即评论应该是建设性的、信息丰富的，有助于改进论文；并通过提供详细证据进行解释。 ReviewRobot通过三个步骤实现这些目标：（1）我们执行特定领域的信息提取，从正在审查的目标论文中构建知识图（KG），从目标论文引用的论文中构建相关工作KG，以及从该领域的大量先前论文中构建背景KG。 （2）通过比较这三个知识图谱，我们预测评论分数和详细的结构化知识作为每个评论类别的证据。 （3）我们仔细选择人类评论句子并将其概括为模板，并应用这些模板将评论分数和证据转化为自然语言评论。实验结果表明，我们的评论评分预测器的准确率达到 71.4%-100%。领域专家的人工评估显示，ReviewRobot 生成的评论中有 41.7%-70.5% 是有效且有建设性的，并且有 20% 的时间优于人工撰写的评论。因此，ReviewRobot 可以充当论文审稿人、程序主席和作者的助手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReviewRobot系统，通过知识合成自动生成可解释的论文评审结果，包括评分和针对新颖性等维度的评论。
AI.motivation: 传统论文评审过程耗时且依赖审稿人主观判断，需构建能提供知识性、可解释性反馈的自动化工具以提升评审效率与质量。
AI.method: 通过领域特定信息抽取构建三类知识图谱（目标论文、相关工作、背景论文），比较图谱预测评审评分与结构化证据，并利用人类评审语句模板生成自然语言评论。
AI.result: 评分预测准确率达71.4%-100%，41.7%-70.5%的生成评论被专家认为有效且具建设性，20%情况下优于人类撰写评论。
AI.conclusion: ReviewRobot可作为评审助手，通过知识驱动的可解释性反馈提升学术论文评审的客观性与效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ReviewRobot系统，通过知识合成自动生成可解释的论文评审结果，包括评分和针对新颖性等维度的评论。

title: Map-Based Temporally Consistent Geolocalization through Learning Motion Trajectories
title_zh: 通过学习运动轨迹进行基于地图的时间一致地理定位
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel trajectory learning method that exploits motion trajectories on topological map using recurrent neural network for temporally consistent geolocalization of object. Inspired by human's ability to both be aware of distance and direction of self-motion in navigation, our trajectory learning method learns a pattern representation of trajectories encoded as a sequence of distances and turning angles to assist self-localization. We pose the learning process as a conditional sequence prediction problem in which each output locates the object on a traversable path in a map. Considering the prediction sequence ought to be topologically connected in the graph-structured map, we adopt two different hypotheses generation and elimination strategies to eliminate disconnected sequence prediction. We demonstrate our approach on the KITTI stereo visual odometry dataset which is a city-scale environment and can generate trajectory with metric information. The key benefits of our approach to geolocalization are that 1) we take advantage of powerful sequence modeling ability of recurrent neural network and its robustness to noisy input, 2) only require a map in the form of a graph and simply use an affordable sensor that generates motion trajectory and 3) do not need initial position. The experiments show that the motion trajectories can be learned by training an recurrent neural network, and temporally consistent geolocation can be predicted with both of the proposed strategies.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel trajectory learning method that exploits motion trajectories on topological map using recurrent neural network for temporally consistent geolocalization of object. Inspired by human's ability to both be aware of distance and direction of self-motion in navigation, our trajectory learning method learns a pattern representation of trajectories encoded as a sequence of distances and turning angles to assist self-localization. We pose the learning process as a conditional sequence prediction problem in which each output locates the object on a traversable path in a map. Considering the prediction sequence ought to be topologically connected in the graph-structured map, we adopt two different hypotheses generation and elimination strategies to eliminate disconnected sequence prediction. We demonstrate our approach on the KITTI stereo visual odometry dataset which is a city-scale environment and can generate trajectory with metric information. The key benefits of our approach to geolocalization are that 1) we take advantage of powerful sequence modeling ability of recurrent neural network and its robustness to noisy input, 2) only require a map in the form of a graph and simply use an affordable sensor that generates motion trajectory and 3) do not need initial position. The experiments show that the motion trajectories can be learned by training an recurrent neural network, and temporally consistent geolocation can be predicted with both of the proposed strategies.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的轨迹学习方法，该方法使用循环神经网络利用拓扑图上的运动轨迹来实现对象的时间一致地理定位。受到人类在导航中了解自我运动的距离和方向的能力的启发，我们的轨迹学习方法学习编码为距离和转向角度序列的轨迹的模式表示，以协助自我定位。我们将学习过程视为条件序列预测问题，其中每个输出将对象定位在地图中的可遍历路径上。考虑到预测序列在图结构图中应该是拓扑连接的，我们采用两种不同的假设生成和消除策略来消除不连续的序列预测。我们在 KITTI 立体视觉里程计数据集上展示了我们的方法，该数据集是一个城市规模的环境，可以使用度量信息生成轨迹。我们的地理定位方法的主要优点是：1）我们利用循环神经网络强大的序列建模能力及其对噪声输入的鲁棒性，2）只需要图形形式的地图，并且只需使用负担得起的传感器来生成运动轨迹，3）不需要初始位置。实验表明，可以通过训练循环神经网络来学习运动轨迹，并且可以使用所提出的两种策略来预测时间一致的地理位置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于循环神经网络的轨迹学习方法，通过拓扑地图实现时序一致的地理定位。
AI.motivation: 传统地理定位方法依赖初始位置或复杂传感器，而人类导航能力启发了利用运动轨迹序列建模以提升鲁棒性和简化需求。
AI.method: 将轨迹表示为距离和转向角度序列，采用RNN进行条件序列预测，并通过假设生成与消除策略确保拓扑连贯性。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上验证了方法有效性，证明RNN可学习轨迹且无需初始位置，仅需图结构地图和基础传感器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过序列建模和拓扑约束实现了高效、鲁棒的地理定位，适用于城市规模环境。

search_text: Map-Based Temporally Consistent Geolocalization through Learning Motion Trajectories 通过学习运动轨迹进行基于地图的时间一致地理定位 In this paper, we propose a novel trajectory learning method that exploits motion trajectories on topological map using recurrent neural network for temporally consistent geolocalization of object. Inspired by human's ability to both be aware of distance and direction of self-motion in navigation, our trajectory learning method learns a pattern representation of trajectories encoded as a sequence of distances and turning angles to assist self-localization. We pose the learning process as a conditional sequence prediction problem in which each output locates the object on a traversable path in a map. Considering the prediction sequence ought to be topologically connected in the graph-structured map, we adopt two different hypotheses generation and elimination strategies to eliminate disconnected sequence prediction. We demonstrate our approach on the KITTI stereo visual odometry dataset which is a city-scale environment and can generate trajectory with metric information. The key benefits of our approach to geolocalization are that 1) we take advantage of powerful sequence modeling ability of recurrent neural network and its robustness to noisy input, 2) only require a map in the form of a graph and simply use an affordable sensor that generates motion trajectory and 3) do not need initial position. The experiments show that the motion trajectories can be learned by training an recurrent neural network, and temporally consistent geolocation can be predicted with both of the proposed strategies. 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的轨迹学习方法，该方法使用循环神经网络利用拓扑图上的运动轨迹来实现对象的时间一致地理定位。受到人类在导航中了解自我运动的距离和方向的能力的启发，我们的轨迹学习方法学习编码为距离和转向角度序列的轨迹的模式表示，以协助自我定位。我们将学习过程视为条件序列预测问题，其中每个输出将对象定位在地图中的可遍历路径上。考虑到预测序列在图结构图中应该是拓扑连接的，我们采用两种不同的假设生成和消除策略来消除不连续的序列预测。我们在 KITTI 立体视觉里程计数据集上展示了我们的方法，该数据集是一个城市规模的环境，可以使用度量信息生成轨迹。我们的地理定位方法的主要优点是：1）我们利用循环神经网络强大的序列建模能力及其对噪声输入的鲁棒性，2）只需要图形形式的地图，并且只需使用负担得起的传感器来生成运动轨迹，3）不需要初始位置。实验表明，可以通过训练循环神经网络来学习运动轨迹，并且可以使用所提出的两种策略来预测时间一致的地理位置。 本文提出一种基于循环神经网络的轨迹学习方法，通过拓扑地图实现时序一致的地理定位。 Bing Zha,Alper Yilmaz cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Mass Estimation in Manipulation Tasks of Domestic Service Robots using Fault Reconstruction Techniques
title_zh: 使用故障重构技术的家庭服务机器人操作任务质量估计
comment: Files to reproduce results can be found in https://github.com/RobotJustina/RCF-MathWorks-2020-14/
comments: Files to reproduce results can be found in https://github.com/RobotJustina/RCF-MathWorks-2020-14/
abstract: Manipulation is a key capability in domestic service robots, as can be seen in the rulebooks of last Robocup@Home editions. Currently, object recognition is performed based mostly on visual information. Some robots use also 3D information such as point clouds or laser scans but, to the knowledge of authors, robots don't use physical properties to improve object recognition. Estimation of an object's weight during a manipulation task is something new in the @Home league and such ability can improve performance of domestic service robots. In this work we propose to estimate the weight of the grasped object using Sliding Mode Observers. If we consider the manipulator without load as the nominal system and object's weight as a fault signal, we can estimate such weight by an appropriate filtering of the output error injection term of the sliding mode observer. To implement our proposal we used MATLAB and Simulink Robotics System Toolbox, ROS Toolbox and Simscape. To improve computation time we exported all algorithms to standalone ROS nodes from Simulink models. Tests were performed using two platforms: Justina's left manipulator (a robot developed at Biorobotics Laboratory, UNAM) and Neuronics Katana manipulators. We present results in simulation and discuss the performance of the proposed system and the possible sources of error. Finally we present our conclusions and state the future work.
summary: Manipulation is a key capability in domestic service robots, as can be seen in the rulebooks of last Robocup@Home editions. Currently, object recognition is performed based mostly on visual information. Some robots use also 3D information such as point clouds or laser scans but, to the knowledge of authors, robots don't use physical properties to improve object recognition. Estimation of an object's weight during a manipulation task is something new in the @Home league and such ability can improve performance of domestic service robots. In this work we propose to estimate the weight of the grasped object using Sliding Mode Observers. If we consider the manipulator without load as the nominal system and object's weight as a fault signal, we can estimate such weight by an appropriate filtering of the output error injection term of the sliding mode observer. To implement our proposal we used MATLAB and Simulink Robotics System Toolbox, ROS Toolbox and Simscape. To improve computation time we exported all algorithms to standalone ROS nodes from Simulink models. Tests were performed using two platforms: Justina's left manipulator (a robot developed at Biorobotics Laboratory, UNAM) and Neuronics Katana manipulators. We present results in simulation and discuss the performance of the proposed system and the possible sources of error. Finally we present our conclusions and state the future work.
abstract_zh: 从上一届 Robocup@Home 版本的规则手册中可以看出，操控是家庭服务机器人的一项关键能力。目前，物体识别主要基于视觉信息进行。一些机器人还使用点云或激光扫描等 3D 信息，但据作者所知，机器人不使用物理属性来提高对象识别能力。在操作任务期间估计物体的重量是 @Home 联盟中的一项新功能，这种能力可以提高家庭服务机器人的性能。在这项工作中，我们建议使用滑动模式观察器来估计所抓取物体的重量。如果我们将没有负载的机械臂视为标称系统，将物体的重量视为故障信号，我们可以通过对滑模观测器的输出误差注入项进行适当的滤波来估计该重量。为了实施我们的建议，我们使用了 MATLAB 和 Simulink Robotics System Toolbox、ROS Toolbox 和 Simscape。为了缩短计算时间，我们将所有算法从 Simulink 模型导出到独立 ROS 节点。测试使用两个平台进行：Justina 的左操纵器（UNAM 生物机器人实验室开发的机器人）和 Neuronics Katana 操纵器。我们展示了仿真结果，并讨论了所提出系统的性能和可能的误差来源。最后我们提出我们的结论并阐述未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用滑模观测器在家庭服务机器人操作任务中估计抓取物体的质量，通过将负载视为故障信号进行滤波处理。
AI.motivation: 当前家庭服务机器人主要依赖视觉和3D信息进行物体识别，但未利用物理特性（如重量）提升识别性能，而质量估计可增强操作任务表现。
AI.method: 采用滑模观测器技术，将无负载机械臂作为基准系统，将物体重量视为故障信号，通过滤波输出误差注入项进行质量估计，并使用MATLAB/Simulink、ROS等工具实现算法验证。
AI.result: 在Justina和Neuronics Katana平台进行仿真测试，验证了系统性能并分析了误差来源，为实际应用提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了操作过程中物体质量的估计，未来需进一步优化算法鲁棒性并拓展至实际场景测试。

authors_text: Shubham Sharma,Alan H. Gee,David Paydarfar,Joydeep Ghosh
title: FaiR-N: Fair and Robust Neural Networks for Structured Data
title_zh: FaiR-N：用于结构化数据的公平且鲁棒的神经网络
abstract: Fairness in machine learning is crucial when individuals are subject to automated decisions made by models in high-stake domains. Organizations that employ these models may also need to satisfy regulations that promote responsible and ethical A.I. While fairness metrics relying on comparing model error rates across subpopulations have been widely investigated for the detection and mitigation of bias, fairness in terms of the equalized ability to achieve recourse for different protected attribute groups has been relatively unexplored. We present a novel formulation for training neural networks that considers the distance of data points to the decision boundary such that the new objective: (1) reduces the average distance to the decision boundary between two groups for individuals subject to a negative outcome in each group, i.e. the network is more fair with respect to the ability to obtain recourse, and (2) increases the average distance of data points to the boundary to promote adversarial robustness. We demonstrate that training with this loss yields more fair and robust neural networks with similar accuracies to models trained without it. Moreover, we qualitatively motivate and empirically show that reducing recourse disparity across groups also improves fairness measures that rely on error rates. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that recourse capabilities across groups are considered to train fairer neural networks, and a relation between error rates based fairness and recourse based fairness is investigated.
summary: Fairness in machine learning is crucial when individuals are subject to automated decisions made by models in high-stake domains. Organizations that employ these models may also need to satisfy regulations that promote responsible and ethical A.I. While fairness metrics relying on comparing model error rates across subpopulations have been widely investigated for the detection and mitigation of bias, fairness in terms of the equalized ability to achieve recourse for different protected attribute groups has been relatively unexplored. We present a novel formulation for training neural networks that considers the distance of data points to the decision boundary such that the new objective: (1) reduces the average distance to the decision boundary between two groups for individuals subject to a negative outcome in each group, i.e. the network is more fair with respect to the ability to obtain recourse, and (2) increases the average distance of data points to the boundary to promote adversarial robustness. We demonstrate that training with this loss yields more fair and robust neural networks with similar accuracies to models trained without it. Moreover, we qualitatively motivate and empirically show that reducing recourse disparity across groups also improves fairness measures that rely on error rates. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that recourse capabilities across groups are considered to train fairer neural networks, and a relation between error rates based fairness and recourse based fairness is investigated.
abstract_zh: 当个人受到高风险领域模型自动决策的影响时，机器学习的公平性至关重要。采用这些模型的组织可能还需要满足促进负责任和道德的人工智能的法规。虽然依赖于比较不同子群体的模型错误率的公平性指标已被广泛研究，以检测和减轻偏差，但相对而言，尚未对实现不同受保护属性组的追索权的均衡能力方面的公平性进行探索。我们提出了一种新的训练神经网络的公式，该公式考虑了数据点到决策边界的距离，以便新的目标：（1）减少每组中遭受负面结果的个体到两组之间的决策边界的平均距离，即网络在获得追索权的能力方面更加公平，（2）增加数据点到边界的平均距离以提高对抗性鲁棒性。我们证明，使用这种损失进行训练可以产生更公平、更稳健的神经网络，其准确度与没有使用这种损失训练的模型相似。此外，我们定性地激励并实证地表明，减少群体之间的资源差异也可以改善依赖错误率的公平措施。据我们所知，这是第一次考虑跨群体的追索能力来训练更公平的神经网络，并且研究了基于错误率的公平性和基于追索性的公平性之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经网络训练方法FaiR-N，通过考虑数据点到决策边界的距离，同时提升模型的公平性（ recourse公平）和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性研究主要关注误差率差异，但对不同群体获得补救（recourse）能力的公平性研究不足，且需满足AI伦理法规要求。
AI.method: 设计新损失函数：1) 缩小负样本组间到决策边界的平均距离以提升recourse公平性；2) 增大所有样本到边界的距离以增强对抗鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在保持相似精度的同时更公平且鲁棒，且减少recourse差异可提升误差率公平性指标。
AI.conclusion: 首次将群体间recourse能力纳入公平性训练，揭示了基于误差率与基于recourse的公平性之间的关联。

ai_content.motivation: 现有公平性研究主要关注误差率差异，但对不同群体获得补救（recourse）能力的公平性研究不足，且需满足AI伦理法规要求。

search_text: FaiR-N: Fair and Robust Neural Networks for Structured Data FaiR-N：用于结构化数据的公平且鲁棒的神经网络 Fairness in machine learning is crucial when individuals are subject to automated decisions made by models in high-stake domains. Organizations that employ these models may also need to satisfy regulations that promote responsible and ethical A.I. While fairness metrics relying on comparing model error rates across subpopulations have been widely investigated for the detection and mitigation of bias, fairness in terms of the equalized ability to achieve recourse for different protected attribute groups has been relatively unexplored. We present a novel formulation for training neural networks that considers the distance of data points to the decision boundary such that the new objective: (1) reduces the average distance to the decision boundary between two groups for individuals subject to a negative outcome in each group, i.e. the network is more fair with respect to the ability to obtain recourse, and (2) increases the average distance of data points to the boundary to promote adversarial robustness. We demonstrate that training with this loss yields more fair and robust neural networks with similar accuracies to models trained without it. Moreover, we qualitatively motivate and empirically show that reducing recourse disparity across groups also improves fairness measures that rely on error rates. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that recourse capabilities across groups are considered to train fairer neural networks, and a relation between error rates based fairness and recourse based fairness is investigated. 当个人受到高风险领域模型自动决策的影响时，机器学习的公平性至关重要。采用这些模型的组织可能还需要满足促进负责任和道德的人工智能的法规。虽然依赖于比较不同子群体的模型错误率的公平性指标已被广泛研究，以检测和减轻偏差，但相对而言，尚未对实现不同受保护属性组的追索权的均衡能力方面的公平性进行探索。我们提出了一种新的训练神经网络的公式，该公式考虑了数据点到决策边界的距离，以便新的目标：（1）减少每组中遭受负面结果的个体到两组之间的决策边界的平均距离，即网络在获得追索权的能力方面更加公平，（2）增加数据点到边界的平均距离以提高对抗性鲁棒性。我们证明，使用这种损失进行训练可以产生更公平、更稳健的神经网络，其准确度与没有使用这种损失训练的模型相似。此外，我们定性地激励并实证地表明，减少群体之间的资源差异也可以改善依赖错误率的公平措施。据我们所知，这是第一次考虑跨群体的追索能力来训练更公平的神经网络，并且研究了基于错误率的公平性和基于追索性的公平性之间的关系。 本文提出一种新型神经网络训练方法FaiR-N，通过考虑数据点到决策边界的距离，同时提升模型的公平性（ recourse公平）和鲁棒性。 Shubham Sharma,Alan H. Gee,David Paydarfar,Joydeep Ghosh cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaoman Zhang,Shixiang Feng,Yuhang Zhou,Ya Zhang,Yanfeng Wang
title: SAR: Scale-Aware Restoration Learning for 3D Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: SAR：3D 肿瘤分割的尺度感知恢复学习
abstract: Automatic and accurate tumor segmentation on medical images is in high demand to assist physicians with diagnosis and treatment. However, it is difficult to obtain massive amounts of annotated training data required by the deep-learning models as the manual delineation process is often tedious and expertise required. Although self-supervised learning (SSL) scheme has been widely adopted to address this problem, most SSL methods focus only on global structure information, ignoring the key distinguishing features of tumor regions: local intensity variation and large size distribution. In this paper, we propose Scale-Aware Restoration (SAR), a SSL method for 3D tumor segmentation. Specifically, a novel proxy task, i.e. scale discrimination, is formulated to pre-train the 3D neural network combined with the self-restoration task. Thus, the pre-trained model learns multi-level local representations through multi-scale inputs. Moreover, an adversarial learning module is further introduced to learn modality invariant representations from multiple unlabeled source datasets. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods on two downstream tasks: i) Brain tumor segmentation, ii) Pancreas tumor segmentation. Compared with the state-of-the-art 3D SSL methods, our proposed approach can significantly improve the segmentation accuracy. Besides, we analyze its advantages from multiple perspectives such as data efficiency, performance, and convergence speed.
summary: Automatic and accurate tumor segmentation on medical images is in high demand to assist physicians with diagnosis and treatment. However, it is difficult to obtain massive amounts of annotated training data required by the deep-learning models as the manual delineation process is often tedious and expertise required. Although self-supervised learning (SSL) scheme has been widely adopted to address this problem, most SSL methods focus only on global structure information, ignoring the key distinguishing features of tumor regions: local intensity variation and large size distribution. In this paper, we propose Scale-Aware Restoration (SAR), a SSL method for 3D tumor segmentation. Specifically, a novel proxy task, i.e. scale discrimination, is formulated to pre-train the 3D neural network combined with the self-restoration task. Thus, the pre-trained model learns multi-level local representations through multi-scale inputs. Moreover, an adversarial learning module is further introduced to learn modality invariant representations from multiple unlabeled source datasets. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our methods on two downstream tasks: i) Brain tumor segmentation, ii) Pancreas tumor segmentation. Compared with the state-of-the-art 3D SSL methods, our proposed approach can significantly improve the segmentation accuracy. Besides, we analyze its advantages from multiple perspectives such as data efficiency, performance, and convergence speed.
abstract_zh: 医学图像上自动、准确的肿瘤分割对于协助医生诊断和治疗有着很高的要求。然而，由于手动描绘过程通常很繁琐并且需要专业知识，因此很难获得深度学习模型所需的大量带注释的训练数据。尽管自监督学习（SSL）方案已被广泛采用来解决这个问题，但大多数 SSL 方法仅关注全局结构信息，忽略了肿瘤区域的关键区别特征：局部强度变化和大尺寸分布。在本文中，我们提出了尺度感知恢复（SAR），这是一种用于 3D 肿瘤分割的 SSL 方法。具体来说，制定了一种新颖的代理任务，即尺度判别，以结合自我恢复任务来预训练 3D 神经网络。因此，预训练模型通过多尺度输入学习多层次局部表示。此外，还引入了对抗性学习模块来从多个未标记的源数据集中学习模态不变表示。我们证明了我们的方法在两个下游任务上的有效性：i）脑肿瘤分割，ii）胰腺肿瘤分割。与最先进的 3D SSL 方法相比，我们提出的方法可以显着提高分割精度。此外，我们还从数据效率、性能、收敛速度等多个角度分析其优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的3D肿瘤分割方法SAR，通过关注局部强度变化和尺寸分布提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法仅关注全局结构信息，忽视了肿瘤区域的关键区分特征：局部强度变化和大尺寸分布，导致分割效果受限。
AI.method: 设计尺度感知修复（SAR）框架，结合尺度判别代理任务与自修复任务，利用多尺度输入学习多级局部表示，并引入对抗学习模块学习多模态不变表示。
AI.result: 在脑肿瘤和胰腺肿瘤分割任务中，SAR方法相比现有3D自监督学习方法显著提升分割准确率，且在数据效率、性能和收敛速度上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: SAR通过融合局部特征与尺寸分布信息，有效解决了3D肿瘤分割中标注数据不足的问题，为医学图像分析提供了更高效的方法。

title: Invariant Representation Learning for Infant Pose Estimation with Small Data
title_zh: 小数据婴儿姿势估计的不变表示学习
abstract: Infant motion analysis is a topic with critical importance in early childhood development studies. However, while the applications of human pose estimation have become more and more broad, models trained on large-scale adult pose datasets are barely successful in estimating infant poses due to the significant differences in their body ratio and the versatility of their poses. Moreover, the privacy and security considerations hinder the availability of adequate infant pose data required for training of a robust model from scratch. To address this problem, this paper presents (1) building and publicly releasing a hybrid synthetic and real infant pose (SyRIP) dataset with small yet diverse real infant images as well as generated synthetic infant poses and (2) a multi-stage invariant representation learning strategy that could transfer the knowledge from the adjacent domains of adult poses and synthetic infant images into our fine-tuned domain-adapted infant pose (FiDIP) estimation model. In our ablation study, with identical network structure, models trained on SyRIP dataset show noticeable improvement over the ones trained on the only other public infant pose datasets. Integrated with pose estimation backbone networks with varying complexity, FiDIP performs consistently better than the fine-tuned versions of those models. One of our best infant pose estimation performers on the state-of-the-art DarkPose model shows mean average precision (mAP) of 93.6.
summary: Infant motion analysis is a topic with critical importance in early childhood development studies. However, while the applications of human pose estimation have become more and more broad, models trained on large-scale adult pose datasets are barely successful in estimating infant poses due to the significant differences in their body ratio and the versatility of their poses. Moreover, the privacy and security considerations hinder the availability of adequate infant pose data required for training of a robust model from scratch. To address this problem, this paper presents (1) building and publicly releasing a hybrid synthetic and real infant pose (SyRIP) dataset with small yet diverse real infant images as well as generated synthetic infant poses and (2) a multi-stage invariant representation learning strategy that could transfer the knowledge from the adjacent domains of adult poses and synthetic infant images into our fine-tuned domain-adapted infant pose (FiDIP) estimation model. In our ablation study, with identical network structure, models trained on SyRIP dataset show noticeable improvement over the ones trained on the only other public infant pose datasets. Integrated with pose estimation backbone networks with varying complexity, FiDIP performs consistently better than the fine-tuned versions of those models. One of our best infant pose estimation performers on the state-of-the-art DarkPose model shows mean average precision (mAP) of 93.6.
abstract_zh: 婴儿运动分析是幼儿发展研究中至关重要的课题。然而，虽然人体姿势估计的应用变得越来越广泛，但由于婴儿的身体比例和姿势的多样性存在显着差异，在大规模成人姿势数据集上训练的模型在估计婴儿姿势方面几乎没有成功。此外，隐私和安全考虑阻碍了从头开始训练稳健模型所需的足够婴儿姿势数据的可用性。为了解决这个问题，本文提出（1）构建并公开发布一个混合合成和真实婴儿姿势（SyRIP）数据集，其中包含小而多样的真实婴儿图像以及生成的合成婴儿姿势；（2）一种多阶段不变表示学习策略，可以将来自成人姿势和合成婴儿图像的相邻域的知识转移到我们的微调域适应婴儿姿势（FiDIP）估计模型中。在我们的消融研究中，具有相同的网络结构，在 SyRIP 数据集上训练的模型比在其他公共婴儿姿势数据集上训练的模型显示出显着的改进。 FiDIP 与具有不同复杂度的姿态估计骨干网络集成，其性能始终优于这些模型的微调版本。我们在最先进的 DarkPose 模型上表现最好的婴儿姿势估计器之一的平均精度 (mAP) 为 93.6。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于小样本数据的婴儿姿态估计方法，通过构建混合合成与真实数据集及多阶段不变表示学习策略解决婴儿姿态估计难题。
AI.motivation: 现有成人姿态估计模型因婴儿身体比例差异及姿态多样性难以准确估计婴儿姿态，且隐私问题导致婴儿姿态数据稀缺，制约了模型训练。
AI.method: 构建包含真实婴儿图像与合成姿态的SyRIP数据集，并设计多阶段不变表示学习策略，通过迁移成人姿态和合成婴儿图像领域的知识优化域适应模型FiDIP。
AI.result: 在相同网络结构下，SyRIP数据集训练模型显著优于其他公开婴儿姿态数据集；FiDIP在不同复杂度的骨干网络中均优于微调模型，DarkPose模型达到93.6 mAP。
AI.conclusion: 通过合成数据增强与域适应学习策略，本文方法在小样本场景下有效提升了婴儿姿态估计性能，为数据受限领域的模型训练提供了可行方案。

ai_content_json.method: 构建包含真实婴儿图像与合成姿态的SyRIP数据集，并设计多阶段不变表示学习策略，通过迁移成人姿态和合成婴儿图像领域的知识优化域适应模型FiDIP。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过合成数据增强与域适应学习策略，本文方法在小样本场景下有效提升了婴儿姿态估计性能，为数据受限领域的模型训练提供了可行方案。

search_text: Invariant Representation Learning for Infant Pose Estimation with Small Data 小数据婴儿姿势估计的不变表示学习 Infant motion analysis is a topic with critical importance in early childhood development studies. However, while the applications of human pose estimation have become more and more broad, models trained on large-scale adult pose datasets are barely successful in estimating infant poses due to the significant differences in their body ratio and the versatility of their poses. Moreover, the privacy and security considerations hinder the availability of adequate infant pose data required for training of a robust model from scratch. To address this problem, this paper presents (1) building and publicly releasing a hybrid synthetic and real infant pose (SyRIP) dataset with small yet diverse real infant images as well as generated synthetic infant poses and (2) a multi-stage invariant representation learning strategy that could transfer the knowledge from the adjacent domains of adult poses and synthetic infant images into our fine-tuned domain-adapted infant pose (FiDIP) estimation model. In our ablation study, with identical network structure, models trained on SyRIP dataset show noticeable improvement over the ones trained on the only other public infant pose datasets. Integrated with pose estimation backbone networks with varying complexity, FiDIP performs consistently better than the fine-tuned versions of those models. One of our best infant pose estimation performers on the state-of-the-art DarkPose model shows mean average precision (mAP) of 93.6. 婴儿运动分析是幼儿发展研究中至关重要的课题。然而，虽然人体姿势估计的应用变得越来越广泛，但由于婴儿的身体比例和姿势的多样性存在显着差异，在大规模成人姿势数据集上训练的模型在估计婴儿姿势方面几乎没有成功。此外，隐私和安全考虑阻碍了从头开始训练稳健模型所需的足够婴儿姿势数据的可用性。为了解决这个问题，本文提出（1）构建并公开发布一个混合合成和真实婴儿姿势（SyRIP）数据集，其中包含小而多样的真实婴儿图像以及生成的合成婴儿姿势；（2）一种多阶段不变表示学习策略，可以将来自成人姿势和合成婴儿图像的相邻域的知识转移到我们的微调域适应婴儿姿势（FiDIP）估计模型中。在我们的消融研究中，具有相同的网络结构，在 SyRIP 数据集上训练的模型比在其他公共婴儿姿势数据集上训练的模型显示出显着的改进。 FiDIP 与具有不同复杂度的姿态估计骨干网络集成，其性能始终优于这些模型的微调版本。我们在最先进的 DarkPose 模型上表现最好的婴儿姿势估计器之一的平均精度 (mAP) 为 93.6。 本文提出了一种基于小样本数据的婴儿姿态估计方法，通过构建混合合成与真实数据集及多阶段不变表示学习策略解决婴儿姿态估计难题。 Xiaofei Huang,Nihang Fu,Shuangjun Liu,Sarah Ostadabbas cs.CV

title: Similarity Based Stratified Splitting: an approach to train better classifiers
title_zh: 基于相似性的分层分割：一种训练更好分类器的方法
abstract: We propose a Similarity-Based Stratified Splitting (SBSS) technique, which uses both the output and input space information to split the data. The splits are generated using similarity functions among samples to place similar samples in different splits. This approach allows for a better representation of the data in the training phase. This strategy leads to a more realistic performance estimation when used in real-world applications. We evaluate our proposal in twenty-two benchmark datasets with classifiers such as Multi-Layer Perceptron, Support Vector Machine, Random Forest and K-Nearest Neighbors, and five similarity functions Cityblock, Chebyshev, Cosine, Correlation, and Euclidean. According to the Wilcoxon Sign-Rank test, our approach consistently outperformed ordinary stratified 10-fold cross-validation in 75\% of the assessed scenarios.
summary: We propose a Similarity-Based Stratified Splitting (SBSS) technique, which uses both the output and input space information to split the data. The splits are generated using similarity functions among samples to place similar samples in different splits. This approach allows for a better representation of the data in the training phase. This strategy leads to a more realistic performance estimation when used in real-world applications. We evaluate our proposal in twenty-two benchmark datasets with classifiers such as Multi-Layer Perceptron, Support Vector Machine, Random Forest and K-Nearest Neighbors, and five similarity functions Cityblock, Chebyshev, Cosine, Correlation, and Euclidean. According to the Wilcoxon Sign-Rank test, our approach consistently outperformed ordinary stratified 10-fold cross-validation in 75\% of the assessed scenarios.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于相似性的分层分割（SBSS）技术，该技术使用输出和输入空间信息来分割数据。分割是使用样本之间的相似性函数生成的，以将相似的样本放置在不同的分割中。这种方法可以更好地表示训练阶段的数据。在实际应用中使用时，该策略可以实现更真实的性能估计。我们使用多层感知器、支持向量机、随机森林和 K 最近邻等分类器以及 Cityblock、Chebyshev、Cosine、Correlation 和 Euclidean 等五个相似函数来评估我们的建议。根据 Wilcoxon Sign-Rank 测试，我们的方法在 75% 的评估场景中始终优于普通分层 10 倍交叉验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相似性的分层分割技术（SBSS），通过结合输入输出空间信息优化数据分割，以提升分类器的训练效果和性能评估准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统分层交叉验证可能无法有效保留数据分布特性，导致分类器性能评估不够真实，需探索更符合实际场景的数据分割方法。
AI.method: 利用相似性函数（如欧氏距离、余弦相似度等）将相似样本分配至不同数据分割中，同时结合输入输出空间信息生成更均衡的训练/测试集。
AI.result: 在22个基准数据集上，SBSS方法在75%的场景中通过Wilcoxon检验显著优于传统分层10折交叉验证。
AI.conclusion: SBSS通过更合理的数据分割策略有效提升了分类器性能，为实际应用中的模型评估提供了改进方案。

title: Gradient Descent Ascent for Minimax Problems on Riemannian Manifolds
title_zh: 黎曼流形上极小极大问题的梯度下降上升
comment: This paper was accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
comments: This paper was accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
abstract: In the paper, we study a class of useful minimax problems on Riemanian manifolds and propose a class of effective Riemanian gradient-based methods to solve these minimax problems. Specifically, we propose an effective Riemannian gradient descent ascent (RGDA) algorithm for the deterministic minimax optimization. Moreover, we prove that our RGDA has a sample complexity of $O(κ^2ε^{-2})$ for finding an $ε$-stationary solution of the Geodesically-Nonconvex Strongly-Concave (GNSC) minimax problems, where $κ$ denotes the condition number. At the same time, we present an effective Riemannian stochastic gradient descent ascent (RSGDA) algorithm for the stochastic minimax optimization, which has a sample complexity of $O(κ^4ε^{-4})$ for finding an $ε$-stationary solution. To further reduce the sample complexity, we propose an accelerated Riemannian stochastic gradient descent ascent (Acc-RSGDA) algorithm based on the momentum-based variance-reduced technique. We prove that our Acc-RSGDA algorithm achieves a lower sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(κ^{4}ε^{-3})$ in searching for an $ε$-stationary solution of the GNSC minimax problems. Extensive experimental results on the robust distributional optimization and robust Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) training over Stiefel manifold demonstrate efficiency of our algorithms.
summary: In the paper, we study a class of useful minimax problems on Riemanian manifolds and propose a class of effective Riemanian gradient-based methods to solve these minimax problems. Specifically, we propose an effective Riemannian gradient descent ascent (RGDA) algorithm for the deterministic minimax optimization. Moreover, we prove that our RGDA has a sample complexity of $O(κ^2ε^{-2})$ for finding an $ε$-stationary solution of the Geodesically-Nonconvex Strongly-Concave (GNSC) minimax problems, where $κ$ denotes the condition number. At the same time, we present an effective Riemannian stochastic gradient descent ascent (RSGDA) algorithm for the stochastic minimax optimization, which has a sample complexity of $O(κ^4ε^{-4})$ for finding an $ε$-stationary solution. To further reduce the sample complexity, we propose an accelerated Riemannian stochastic gradient descent ascent (Acc-RSGDA) algorithm based on the momentum-based variance-reduced technique. We prove that our Acc-RSGDA algorithm achieves a lower sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(κ^{4}ε^{-3})$ in searching for an $ε$-stationary solution of the GNSC minimax problems. Extensive experimental results on the robust distributional optimization and robust Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) training over Stiefel manifold demonstrate efficiency of our algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了黎曼流形上的一类有用的极小极大问题，并提出了一类有效的基于黎曼梯度的方法来解决这些极小极大问题。具体来说，我们提出了一种有效的黎曼梯度下降上升（RGDA）算法，用于确定性极小极大优化。此外，我们证明了 RGDA 的样本复杂度为 $O(κ^2ε^{-2})$，用于寻找测地非凸强凹 (GNSC) 极小极大问题的 $ε$ 平稳解，其中 $κ$ 表示条件数。同时，我们提出了一种用于随机极小极大优化的有效黎曼随机梯度下降上升（RSGDA）算法，其样本复杂度为$O(κ^4ε^{-4})$，用于找到$ε$-平稳解。为了进一步降低样本复杂度，我们提出了一种基于动量方差减少技术的加速黎曼随机梯度下降上升（Acc-RSGDA）算法。我们证明，我们的 Acc-RSGDA 算法在搜索 GNSC 极小极大问题的 $ε$ 平稳解时实现了 $\tilde{O}(κ^{4}ε^{-3})$ 的较低样本复杂度。在 Stiefel 流形上进行鲁棒分布优化和鲁棒深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练的大量实验结果证明了我们算法的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了黎曼流形上的最小最大问题，提出了一系列基于黎曼梯度的算法，并分析了其样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理黎曼流形上的最小最大优化问题时存在效率不足，需设计适应几何结构的算法以提升性能。
AI.method: 提出黎曼梯度下降上升（RGDA）、黎曼随机梯度下降上升（RSGDA）及加速版（Acc-RSGDA）算法，结合动量技术降低样本复杂度。
AI.result: RGDA的样本复杂度为O(κ²ε⁻²)，RSGDA为O(κ⁴ε⁻⁴)，Acc-RSGDA优化至Õ(κ⁴ε⁻³)；实验验证了算法在鲁棒分布优化和Stiefel流形DNN训练中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在理论分析与实验中均表现出对黎曼流形最小最大问题的高效求解能力，尤其Acc-RSGDA在复杂度上取得改进。

To further reduce the sample complexity, we propose an accelerated Riemannian stochastic gradient descent ascent (Acc-RSGDA) algorithm based on the momentum-based variance-reduced technique. We prove that our Acc-RSGDA algorithm achieves a lower sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(κ^{4}ε^{-3})$ in searching for an $ε$-stationary solution of the GNSC minimax problems. Extensive experimental results on the robust distributional optimization and robust Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) training over Stiefel manifold demonstrate efficiency of our algorithms. 在本文中，我们研究了黎曼流形上的一类有用的极小极大问题，并提出了一类有效的基于黎曼梯度的方法来解决这些极小极大问题。具体来说，我们提出了一种有效的黎曼梯度下降上升（RGDA）算法，用于确定性极小极大优化。此外，我们证明了 RGDA 的样本复杂度为 $O(κ^2ε^{-2})$，用于寻找测地非凸强凹 (GNSC) 极小极大问题的 $ε$ 平稳解，其中 $κ$ 表示条件数。同时，我们提出了一种用于随机极小极大优化的有效黎曼随机梯度下降上升（RSGDA）算法，其样本复杂度为$O(κ^4ε^{-4})$，用于找到$ε$-平稳解。为了进一步降低样本复杂度，我们提出了一种基于动量方差减少技术的加速黎曼随机梯度下降上升（Acc-RSGDA）算法。我们证明，我们的 Acc-RSGDA 算法在搜索 GNSC 极小极大问题的 $ε$ 平稳解时实现了 $\tilde{O}(κ^{4}ε^{-3})$ 的较低样本复杂度。在 Stiefel 流形上进行鲁棒分布优化和鲁棒深度神经网络 (DNN) 训练的大量实验结果证明了我们算法的效率。 本文研究了黎曼流形上的最小最大问题，提出了一系列基于黎曼梯度的算法，并分析了其样本复杂度。 Feihu Huang,Shangqian Gao cs.LG,cs.CV,math.OC

title: Attn-HybridNet: Improving Discriminability of Hybrid Features with Attention Fusion
title_zh: Attn-HybridNet：通过注意力融合提高混合特征的可辨别性
comment: Under minor review at IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics
comments: Under minor review at IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics
abstract: The principal component analysis network (PCANet) is an unsupervised parsimonious deep network, utilizing principal components as filters in its convolution layers. Albeit powerful, the PCANet consists of basic operations such as principal components and spatial pooling, which suffers from two fundamental problems. First, the principal components obtain information by transforming it to column vectors (which we call the amalgamated view), which incurs the loss of the spatial information in the data. Second, the generalized spatial pooling utilized in the PCANet induces feature redundancy and also fails to accommodate spatial statistics of natural images. In this research, we first propose a tensor-factorization based deep network called the Tensor Factorization Network (TFNet). The TFNet extracts features from the spatial structure of the data (which we call the minutiae view). We then show that the information obtained by the PCANet and the TFNet are distinctive and non-trivial but individually insufficient. This phenomenon necessitates the development of proposed HybridNet, which integrates the information discovery with the two views of the data. To enhance the discriminability of hybrid features, we propose Attn-HybridNet, which alleviates the feature redundancy by performing attention-based feature fusion. The significance of our proposed Attn-HybridNet is demonstrated on multiple real-world datasets where the features obtained with Attn-HybridNet achieves better classification performance over other popular baseline methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed technique.
summary: The principal component analysis network (PCANet) is an unsupervised parsimonious deep network, utilizing principal components as filters in its convolution layers. Albeit powerful, the PCANet consists of basic operations such as principal components and spatial pooling, which suffers from two fundamental problems. First, the principal components obtain information by transforming it to column vectors (which we call the amalgamated view), which incurs the loss of the spatial information in the data. Second, the generalized spatial pooling utilized in the PCANet induces feature redundancy and also fails to accommodate spatial statistics of natural images. In this research, we first propose a tensor-factorization based deep network called the Tensor Factorization Network (TFNet). The TFNet extracts features from the spatial structure of the data (which we call the minutiae view). We then show that the information obtained by the PCANet and the TFNet are distinctive and non-trivial but individually insufficient. This phenomenon necessitates the development of proposed HybridNet, which integrates the information discovery with the two views of the data. To enhance the discriminability of hybrid features, we propose Attn-HybridNet, which alleviates the feature redundancy by performing attention-based feature fusion. The significance of our proposed Attn-HybridNet is demonstrated on multiple real-world datasets where the features obtained with Attn-HybridNet achieves better classification performance over other popular baseline methods, demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed technique.
abstract_zh: 主成分分析网络（PCANet）是一种无监督的简约深度网络，利用主成分作为其卷积层中的滤波器。尽管功能强大，PCANet 由主成分和空间池等基本操作组成，但存在两个基本问题。首先，主成分通过将其转换为列向量（我们称之为合并视图）来获取信息，这会导致数据中空间信息的丢失。其次，PCANet 中使用的广义空间池会导致特征冗余，并且也无法适应自然图像的空间统计。在这项研究中，我们首先提出了一种基于张量分解的深度网络，称为张量分解网络（TFNet）。 TFNet 从数据的空间结构中提取特征（我们称之为细节视图）。然后我们证明 PCANet 和 TFNet 获得的信息是独特且重要的，但单独而言是不够的。这种现象需要开发所提出的混合网络，它将信息发现与数据的两种视图相结合。为了增强混合特征的可辨别性，我们提出了 Attn-HybridNet，它通过执行基于注意力的特征融合来减轻特征冗余。我们提出的 Attn-HybridNet 的重要性在多个现实世界数据集上得到了证明，其中使用 Attn-HybridNet 获得的特征比其他流行的基线方法实现了更好的分类性能，证明了所提出技术的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Attn-HybridNet，通过注意力机制融合两种视角的特征，提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: PCANet因信息聚合方式导致空间信息丢失，TFNet虽提取空间结构但单独使用效果不足，需融合多视角信息以提升特征判别力。
AI.method: 设计TFNet提取空间细节特征，结合PCANet与TFNet的互补信息构建HybridNet，并引入注意力机制进行特征加权融合。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上，Attn-HybridNet分类准确率优于主流基线方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 注意力驱动的多视角特征融合能有效提升特征判别性，为图像分类提供新思路。

authors_text: Yash Kant,Abhinav Moudgil,Dhruv Batra,Devi Parikh,Harsh Agrawal
title: Contrast and Classify: Training Robust VQA Models
title_zh: 对比和分类：训练稳健的 VQA 模型
abstract: Recent Visual Question Answering (VQA) models have shown impressive performance on the VQA benchmark but remain sensitive to small linguistic variations in input questions. Existing approaches address this by augmenting the dataset with question paraphrases from visual question generation models or adversarial perturbations. These approaches use the combined data to learn an answer classifier by minimizing the standard cross-entropy loss. To more effectively leverage augmented data, we build on the recent success in contrastive learning. We propose a novel training paradigm (ConClaT) that optimizes both cross-entropy and contrastive losses. The contrastive loss encourages representations to be robust to linguistic variations in questions while the cross-entropy loss preserves the discriminative power of representations for answer prediction. We find that optimizing both losses -- either alternately or jointly -- is key to effective training. On the VQA-Rephrasings benchmark, which measures the VQA model's answer consistency across human paraphrases of a question, ConClaT improves Consensus Score by 1 .63% over an improved baseline. In addition, on the standard VQA 2.0 benchmark, we improve the VQA accuracy by 0.78% overall. We also show that ConClaT is agnostic to the type of data-augmentation strategy used.
summary: Recent Visual Question Answering (VQA) models have shown impressive performance on the VQA benchmark but remain sensitive to small linguistic variations in input questions. Existing approaches address this by augmenting the dataset with question paraphrases from visual question generation models or adversarial perturbations. These approaches use the combined data to learn an answer classifier by minimizing the standard cross-entropy loss. To more effectively leverage augmented data, we build on the recent success in contrastive learning. We propose a novel training paradigm (ConClaT) that optimizes both cross-entropy and contrastive losses. The contrastive loss encourages representations to be robust to linguistic variations in questions while the cross-entropy loss preserves the discriminative power of representations for answer prediction. We find that optimizing both losses -- either alternately or jointly -- is key to effective training. On the VQA-Rephrasings benchmark, which measures the VQA model's answer consistency across human paraphrases of a question, ConClaT improves Consensus Score by 1 .63% over an improved baseline. In addition, on the standard VQA 2.0 benchmark, we improve the VQA accuracy by 0.78% overall. We also show that ConClaT is agnostic to the type of data-augmentation strategy used.
abstract_zh: 最近的视觉问答 (VQA) 模型在 VQA 基准上显示出令人印象深刻的性能，但对输入问题中的微小语言变化仍然敏感。现有的方法通过使用来自视觉问题生成模型或对抗性扰动的问题释义来扩充数据集来解决这个问题。这些方法使用组合数据通过最小化标准交叉熵损失来学习答案分类器。为了更有效地利用增强数据，我们以对比学习最近取得的成功为基础。我们提出了一种新颖的训练范式（ConClaT），它可以优化交叉熵和对比损失。对比损失鼓励表示对问题中的语言变化具有鲁棒性，而交叉熵损失则保留了表示对答案预测的区分能力。我们发现，交替或联合优化这两种损失是有效训练的关键。 VQA-Rephrasings 基准衡量 VQA 模型在人类对问题的释义中的答案一致性，ConClaT 将共识分数比改进的基线提高了 1 .63%。此外，在标准 VQA 2.0 基准上，我们将 VQA 准确率总体提高了 0.78%。我们还表明，ConClaT 与所使用的数据增强策略的类型无关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型训练范式ConClaT，通过结合交叉熵损失和对比损失，提升视觉问答（VQA）模型对输入问题语言变化的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA模型对问题中的微小语言变化敏感，传统数据增强方法（如生成问题重述或对抗扰动）仅通过最小化交叉熵损失训练分类器，未能充分挖掘增强数据的潜力。
AI.method: 设计ConClaT框架，联合优化交叉熵损失（保持答案预测判别力）与对比损失（增强对语言变化的鲁棒性），支持交替或联合优化两种损失函数。
AI.result: 在VQA-Rephrasings基准测试中，ConClaT使共识分数提升1.63%；在VQA 2.0基准中整体准确率提升0.78%，且方法对数据增强策略类型无依赖性。
AI.conclusion: ConClaT通过双损失联合优化有效提升了VQA模型的鲁棒性与性能，为利用增强数据训练提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

title: Accelerating the Development of Multimodal, Integrative-AI Systems with Platform for Situated Intelligence
title_zh: 通过情景智能平台加速多模式、集成人工智能系统的开发
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure. Submitted to the 2020 AAAI Fall Symposium: Trust and Explainability in Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure. Submitted to the 2020 AAAI Fall Symposium: Trust and Explainability in Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction
abstract: We describe Platform for Situated Intelligence, an open-source framework for multimodal, integrative-AI systems. The framework provides infrastructure, tools, and components that enable and accelerate the development of applications that process multimodal streams of data and in which timing is critical. The framework is particularly well-suited for developing physically situated interactive systems that perceive and reason about their surroundings in order to better interact with people, such as social robots, virtual assistants, smart meeting rooms, etc. In this paper, we provide a brief, high-level overview of the framework and its main affordances, and discuss its implications for HRI.
summary: We describe Platform for Situated Intelligence, an open-source framework for multimodal, integrative-AI systems. The framework provides infrastructure, tools, and components that enable and accelerate the development of applications that process multimodal streams of data and in which timing is critical. The framework is particularly well-suited for developing physically situated interactive systems that perceive and reason about their surroundings in order to better interact with people, such as social robots, virtual assistants, smart meeting rooms, etc. In this paper, we provide a brief, high-level overview of the framework and its main affordances, and discuss its implications for HRI.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了情景智能平台，这是一个用于多模式、集成人工智能系统的开源框架。该框架提供了基础设施、工具和组件，支持并加速处理多模式数据流且时间至关重要的应用程序的开发。该框架特别适合开发物理位置的交互系统，这些系统可以感知和推理周围环境，以便更好地与人交互，例如社交机器人、虚拟助理、智能会议室等。在本文中，我们对该框架及其主要功能进行了简要的高级概述，并讨论了它对 HRI 的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Platform for Situated Intelligence的开源框架，旨在加速多模态整合AI系统的开发，特别是物理情境下的交互系统。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在处理多模态数据和实时交互时面临开发复杂性和整合困难，需统一平台支持。
AI.method: 通过构建开源框架，提供基础设施、工具和组件，支持多模态数据处理和实时交互系统开发。
AI.result: 框架成功实现并应用于社交机器人、虚拟助手等场景，验证了其在多模态处理和实时交互中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为HRI提供了有效工具，推动了多模态整合AI系统在物理情境下的应用与发展。

title: Preliminary Development of a Wearable Device to Help Children with Unilateral Cerebral Palsy Increase Their Consciousness of Their Upper Extremity
title_zh: 初步开发可穿戴设备帮助单侧脑瘫儿童增强上肢意识
comment: ef:Rehabilitation Engineering Society of North America (now Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America Conference (RESNA), 2020
comments: ef:Rehabilitation Engineering Society of North America (now Rehabilitation Engineering and Assistive Technology Society of North America Conference (RESNA), 2020
abstract: Children with unilateral cerebral palsy have movement impairments that are predominant to one of their upper extremities (UE) and are prone to a phenomenon named "developmental disregard", which is characterized by the neglect of their most affected UE because of their altered perception or consciousness of this limb. This can cause them not to use their most affected hand to its full capacity in their day-to-day life. This paper presents a prototype of a wearable technology with the appearance of a smartwatch, which delivers haptic feedback to remind children with unilateral cerebral palsy to use their most affected limb, and which increase sensory afferents to possibly influence brain plasticity. The prototype consists of an accelerometer, a vibration motor and a microcontroller with an algorithm that detects movement of the limb. After a given period of inactivity, the watch starts vibrating to alert the user.
summary: Children with unilateral cerebral palsy have movement impairments that are predominant to one of their upper extremities (UE) and are prone to a phenomenon named "developmental disregard", which is characterized by the neglect of their most affected UE because of their altered perception or consciousness of this limb. This can cause them not to use their most affected hand to its full capacity in their day-to-day life. This paper presents a prototype of a wearable technology with the appearance of a smartwatch, which delivers haptic feedback to remind children with unilateral cerebral palsy to use their most affected limb, and which increase sensory afferents to possibly influence brain plasticity. The prototype consists of an accelerometer, a vibration motor and a microcontroller with an algorithm that detects movement of the limb. After a given period of inactivity, the watch starts vibrating to alert the user.
abstract_zh: 单侧脑瘫儿童的运动障碍主要集中在一侧上肢（UE），并且容易出现一种称为“发育忽视”的现象，其特点是由于他们对该肢体的感知或意识改变而忽视了受影响最严重的 UE。这可能会导致他们在日常生活中无法充分利用受影响最严重的手。本文提出了一种具有智能手表外观的可穿戴技术原型，该技术可提供触觉反馈，提醒单侧脑瘫儿童使用受影响最严重的肢体，并增加感觉传入，可能影响大脑可塑性。该原型由加速度计、振动电机和带有检测肢体运动算法的微控制器组成。在指定的不活动时间后，手表开始振动以提醒用户。

AI.tldr: 开发一种可穿戴设备帮助单侧脑瘫儿童提高对受影响上肢的意识。
AI.motivation: 单侧脑瘫儿童因'发育忽视'现象常忽视患侧上肢，导致手部功能未被充分使用，需通过外部干预增强其肢体意识。
AI.method: 设计智能手表原型，集成加速度计、振动马达和微控制器，通过检测肢体活动状态，在长时间静止后触发振动提醒。
AI.result: 完成设备原型开发，验证了基于运动检测的振动提醒功能实现。
AI.conclusion: 该设备可作为辅助工具促进患侧上肢使用，未来需进一步测试其对大脑可塑性的长期影响。

authors_text: Diego Monteiro,Hai-Ning Liang,Hongji Li,Yu Fu,Xian Wang
title: Evaluating the Effect of Audience in a Virtual Reality Presentation Training Tool
title_zh: 评估虚拟现实演示培训工具中观众的效果
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 33rd International Conference on Computer Animation and Social Agents
comments: 9 pages, 3 figures, 33rd International Conference on Computer Animation and Social Agents
abstract: Public speaking is an essential skill in everyone's professional or academic career. Nevertheless, honing this skill is often tricky because training in front of a mirror does not give feedback or inspire the same anxiety as present-ing in front of an audience. Further, most people do not always have access to the place where the presentation will happen. In this research, we developed a Virtual Reality (VR) environment to assist in improving people's presentation skills. Our system uses 3D scanned people to create more realistic scenarios. We conducted a study with twelve participants who had no prior experience with VR. We validated our virtual environment by analyzing whether it was preferred to no VR system and accepted regardless of the existence of a virtual audience. Our results show that users overwhelmingly prefer to use the VR system as a tool to help them improve their public speaking skills than training in an empty environment. However, the preference for an audience is mixed.
summary: Public speaking is an essential skill in everyone's professional or academic career. Nevertheless, honing this skill is often tricky because training in front of a mirror does not give feedback or inspire the same anxiety as present-ing in front of an audience. Further, most people do not always have access to the place where the presentation will happen. In this research, we developed a Virtual Reality (VR) environment to assist in improving people's presentation skills. Our system uses 3D scanned people to create more realistic scenarios. We conducted a study with twelve participants who had no prior experience with VR. We validated our virtual environment by analyzing whether it was preferred to no VR system and accepted regardless of the existence of a virtual audience. Our results show that users overwhelmingly prefer to use the VR system as a tool to help them improve their public speaking skills than training in an empty environment. However, the preference for an audience is mixed.
abstract_zh: 公开演讲是每个人职业或学术生涯中的一项基本技能。然而，磨练这项技能通常很棘手，因为在镜子前训练不会提供反馈，也不会引起与在观众面前展示相同的焦虑。此外，大多数人并不总是能够到达进行演示的地点。在这项研究中，我们开发了虚拟现实 (VR) 环境来帮助提高人们的演示技能。我们的系统使用 3D 扫描人物来创建更真实的场景。我们对 12 名没有 VR 经验的参与者进行了一项研究。我们通过分析虚拟环境是否比没有 VR 系统更受欢迎以及无论虚拟观众是否存在而被接受来验证我们的虚拟环境。我们的结果表明，绝大多数用户更喜欢使用 VR 系统作为帮助他们提高公开演讲技能的工具，而不是在空旷的环境中进行训练。然而，观众的偏好参差不齐。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了虚拟现实（VR）演示训练工具中观众效果的影响，通过对比VR环境与无观众环境的用户偏好，验证其在提升公众演讲能力中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 公开演讲是重要的职业技能，但传统训练方法（如对镜练习）缺乏反馈且无法模拟真实场景的紧张感，而VR技术可提供沉浸式训练环境。
AI.method: 开发基于3D扫描人物的VR系统，招募12名无VR经验的参与者，通过实验对比VR环境（含/不含虚拟观众）与无VR环境的用户偏好及接受度。
AI.result: 用户普遍偏好使用VR系统进行训练，但对虚拟观众的存在态度存在分歧，部分用户认为其有助于提升表现，部分则认为干扰较大。
AI.conclusion: VR系统可有效作为演讲训练工具，但虚拟观众的设计需进一步优化以平衡真实感与用户舒适度。

We validated our virtual environment by analyzing whether it was preferred to no VR system and accepted regardless of the existence of a virtual audience. However, the preference for an audience is mixed. 公开演讲是每个人职业或学术生涯中的一项基本技能。然而，磨练这项技能通常很棘手，因为在镜子前训练不会提供反馈，也不会引起与在观众面前展示相同的焦虑。此外，大多数人并不总是能够到达进行演示的地点。在这项研究中，我们开发了虚拟现实 (VR) 环境来帮助提高人们的演示技能。我们的系统使用 3D 扫描人物来创建更真实的场景。我们对 12 名没有 VR 经验的参与者进行了一项研究。我们通过分析虚拟环境是否比没有 VR 系统更受欢迎以及无论虚拟观众是否存在而被接受来验证我们的虚拟环境。我们的结果表明，绝大多数用户更喜欢使用 VR 系统作为帮助他们提高公开演讲技能的工具，而不是在空旷的环境中进行训练。然而，观众的偏好参差不齐。 本文评估了虚拟现实（VR）演示训练工具中观众效果的影响，通过对比VR环境与无观众环境的用户偏好，验证其在提升公众演讲能力中的有效性。 Diego Monteiro,Hai-Ning Liang,Hongji Li,Yu Fu,Xian Wang cs.HC

authors_text: Daniel Bashir,George D. Montanez,Sonia Sehra,Pedro Sandoval Segura,Julius Lauw
title: An Information-Theoretic Perspective on Overfitting and Underfitting
title_zh: 关于过拟合和欠拟合的信息论视角
comment: Accepted for presentation at The 33rd Australasian Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AJCAI 2020), November 29-30, 2020
comments: Accepted for presentation at The 33rd Australasian Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AJCAI 2020), November 29-30, 2020
abstract: We present an information-theoretic framework for understanding overfitting and underfitting in machine learning and prove the formal undecidability of determining whether an arbitrary classification algorithm will overfit a dataset. Measuring algorithm capacity via the information transferred from datasets to models, we consider mismatches between algorithm capacities and datasets to provide a signature for when a model can overfit or underfit a dataset. We present results upper-bounding algorithm capacity, establish its relationship to quantities in the algorithmic search framework for machine learning, and relate our work to recent information-theoretic approaches to generalization.
summary: We present an information-theoretic framework for understanding overfitting and underfitting in machine learning and prove the formal undecidability of determining whether an arbitrary classification algorithm will overfit a dataset. Measuring algorithm capacity via the information transferred from datasets to models, we consider mismatches between algorithm capacities and datasets to provide a signature for when a model can overfit or underfit a dataset. We present results upper-bounding algorithm capacity, establish its relationship to quantities in the algorithmic search framework for machine learning, and relate our work to recent information-theoretic approaches to generalization.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个信息论框架，用于理解机器学习中的过度拟合和欠拟合，并证明确定任意分类算法是否会过度拟合数据集的形式不确定性。通过从数据集传输到模型的信息来测量算法容量，我们考虑算法容量和数据集之间的不匹配，以便为模型何时过度拟合或欠拟合数据集提供签名。我们提出了算法能力上限的结果，建立了其与机器学习算法搜索框架中数量的关系，并将我们的工作与最近的信息论泛化方法联系起来。

AI.tldr: 提出信息论框架分析机器学习中的过拟合和欠拟合现象，探讨算法容量与数据集不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以全面解释过拟合和欠拟合，需从信息论角度提供新框架。
AI.method: 通过信息转移度量算法容量，分析算法容量与数据集的不匹配，并结合算法搜索框架和现有信息论方法。
AI.result: 证明过拟合判定的不可判定性，建立算法容量上界，并关联到算法搜索框架。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解模型泛化提供了理论基础，有助于设计更鲁棒的算法。

title: A catalog of broad morphology of Pan-STARRS galaxies based on deep learning
title_zh: 基于深度学习的泛STARRS星系广泛形态目录
abstract: Autonomous digital sky surveys such as Pan-STARRS have the ability to image a very large number of galactic and extra-galactic objects, and the large and complex nature of the image data reinforces the use of automation. Here we describe the design and implementation of a data analysis process for automatic broad morphology annotation of galaxies, and applied it to the data of Pan-STARRS DR1. The process is based on filters followed by a two-step convolutional neural network (CNN) classification. Training samples are generated by using an augmented and balanced set of manually classified galaxies. Results are evaluated for accuracy by comparison to the annotation of Pan-STARRS included in a previous broad morphology catalog of SDSS galaxies. Our analysis shows that a CNN combined with several filters is an effective approach for annotating the galaxies and removing unclean images. The catalog contains morphology labels for 1,662,190 galaxies with ~95% accuracy. The accuracy can be further improved by selecting labels above certain confidence thresholds. The catalog is publicly available.
summary: Autonomous digital sky surveys such as Pan-STARRS have the ability to image a very large number of galactic and extra-galactic objects, and the large and complex nature of the image data reinforces the use of automation. Here we describe the design and implementation of a data analysis process for automatic broad morphology annotation of galaxies, and applied it to the data of Pan-STARRS DR1. The process is based on filters followed by a two-step convolutional neural network (CNN) classification. Training samples are generated by using an augmented and balanced set of manually classified galaxies. Results are evaluated for accuracy by comparison to the annotation of Pan-STARRS included in a previous broad morphology catalog of SDSS galaxies. Our analysis shows that a CNN combined with several filters is an effective approach for annotating the galaxies and removing unclean images. The catalog contains morphology labels for 1,662,190 galaxies with ~95% accuracy. The accuracy can be further improved by selecting labels above certain confidence thresholds. The catalog is publicly available.
abstract_zh: Pan-STARRS 等自主数字巡天能够对大量银河系和银河系外物体进行成像，图像数据的庞大和复杂性加强了自动化的使用。在这里，我们描述了用于星系自动广泛形态注释的数据分析过程的设计和实现，并将其应用于 Pan-STARRS DR1 的数据。该过程基于过滤器和两步卷积神经网络 (CNN) 分类。训练样本是通过使用一组增强且平衡的手动分类星系来生成的。通过与之前的 SDSS 星系广泛形态目录中包含的 Pan-STARRS 注释进行比较，评估结果的准确性。我们的分析表明，CNN 与多个滤波器相结合是注释星系和去除不干净图像的有效方法。该目录包含 1,662,190 个星系的形态标签，准确度约为 95%。通过选择高于特定置信度阈值的标签可以进一步提高准确性。该目录是公开的。

AI.tldr: 基于深度学习方法对Pan-STARRS巡天数据中的星系进行广义形态自动标注，生成高精度形态分类目录。
AI.motivation: Pan-STARRS等自动化巡天项目产生海量天体图像数据，传统人工分类效率低，需开发自动化方法实现大规模星系形态分类。
AI.method: 设计两阶段卷积神经网络（CNN）分类流程，结合图像滤波预处理与增强平衡的手动标注训练集进行模型训练。
AI.result: 生成包含166.2万个星系的形态分类目录，总体准确率达95%，通过置信度筛选可进一步提升精度，目录已公开共享。
AI.conclusion: CNN结合图像滤波能有效实现星系自动分类与低质量图像过滤，未来可通过优化网络结构提升分类性能。

title: Zero-shot Entity Linking with Efficient Long Range Sequence Modeling
title_zh: 零样本实体链接与高效的远程序列建模
abstract: This paper considers the problem of zero-shot entity linking, in which a link in the test time may not present in training. Following the prevailing BERT-based research efforts, we find a simple yet effective way is to expand the long-range sequence modeling. Unlike many previous methods, our method does not require expensive pre-training of BERT with long position embedding. Instead, we propose an efficient position embeddings initialization method called Embedding-repeat, which initializes larger position embeddings based on BERT-Base. On Wikia's zero-shot EL dataset, our method improves the SOTA from 76.06% to 79.08%, and for its long data, the corresponding improvement is from 74.57% to 82.14%. Our experiments suggest the effectiveness of long-range sequence modeling without retraining the BERT model.
summary: This paper considers the problem of zero-shot entity linking, in which a link in the test time may not present in training. Following the prevailing BERT-based research efforts, we find a simple yet effective way is to expand the long-range sequence modeling. Unlike many previous methods, our method does not require expensive pre-training of BERT with long position embedding. Instead, we propose an efficient position embeddings initialization method called Embedding-repeat, which initializes larger position embeddings based on BERT-Base. On Wikia's zero-shot EL dataset, our method improves the SOTA from 76.06% to 79.08%, and for its long data, the corresponding improvement is from 74.57% to 82.14%. Our experiments suggest the effectiveness of long-range sequence modeling without retraining the BERT model.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑零样本实体链接问题，其中测试时的链接可能在训练中不存在。继当前基于 BERT 的研究工作之后，我们发现一个简单而有效的方法是扩展长程序列建模。与许多以前的方法不同，我们的方法不需要对具有长位置嵌入的 BERT 进行昂贵的预训练。相反，我们提出了一种名为 Embedding-repeat 的高效位置嵌入初始化方法，该方法基于 BERT-Base 初始化更大的位置嵌入。在 Wikia 的零样本 EL 数据集上，我们的方法将 SOTA 从 76.06% 提高到 79.08%，对于长数据，相应的提高从 74.57% 到 82.14%。我们的实验表明，无需重新训练 BERT 模型即可进行远程序列建模的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究零样本实体链接问题，提出了一种无需重新预训练BERT模型的高效长距离序列建模方法。
AI.motivation: 现有BERT-based方法在处理零样本实体链接时需依赖昂贵的长位置嵌入预训练，而本文旨在寻找更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 提出Embedding-repeat方法，通过重复扩展BERT-Base的位置嵌入初始化更长序列的位置编码，避免重新预训练模型。
AI.result: 在Wikia零样本EL数据集上，将SOTA指标从76.06%提升至79.08%，长数据指标从74.57%提升至82.14%。
AI.conclusion: 无需重新训练BERT模型即可有效实现长距离序列建模，证明了该方法在零样本实体链接任务中的有效性与高效性。

Our experiments suggest the effectiveness of long-range sequence modeling without retraining the BERT model. 本文考虑零样本实体链接问题，其中测试时的链接可能在训练中不存在。继当前基于 BERT 的研究工作之后，我们发现一个简单而有效的方法是扩展长程序列建模。与许多以前的方法不同，我们的方法不需要对具有长位置嵌入的 BERT 进行昂贵的预训练。相反，我们提出了一种名为 Embedding-repeat 的高效位置嵌入初始化方法，该方法基于 BERT-Base 初始化更大的位置嵌入。在 Wikia 的零样本 EL 数据集上，我们的方法将 SOTA 从 76.06% 提高到 79.08%，对于长数据，相应的提高从 74.57% 到 82.14%。我们的实验表明，无需重新训练 BERT 模型即可进行远程序列建模的有效性。 本文研究零样本实体链接问题，提出了一种无需重新预训练BERT模型的高效长距离序列建模方法。 Zonghai Yao,Liangliang Cao,Huapu Pan cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Sonia Baee,Mark Rucker,Anna Baglione,Mawulolo K. Ameko,Laura Barnes
title: A Framework for Addressing the Risks and Opportunities In AI-Supported Virtual Health Coaches
title_zh: 应对人工智能支持的虚拟健康教练的风险和机遇的框架
abstract: Virtual coaching has rapidly evolved into a foundational component of modern clinical practice. At a time when healthcare professionals are in short supply and the demand for low-cost treatments is ever-increasing, virtual health coaches (VHCs) offer intervention-on-demand for those limited by finances or geographic access to care. More recently, AI-powered virtual coaches have become a viable complement to human coaches. However, the push for AI-powered coaching systems raises several important issues for researchers, designers, clinicians, and patients. In this paper, we present a novel framework to guide the design and development of virtual coaching systems. This framework augments a traditional data science pipeline with four key guiding goals: reliability, fairness, engagement, and ethics.
summary: Virtual coaching has rapidly evolved into a foundational component of modern clinical practice. At a time when healthcare professionals are in short supply and the demand for low-cost treatments is ever-increasing, virtual health coaches (VHCs) offer intervention-on-demand for those limited by finances or geographic access to care. More recently, AI-powered virtual coaches have become a viable complement to human coaches. However, the push for AI-powered coaching systems raises several important issues for researchers, designers, clinicians, and patients. In this paper, we present a novel framework to guide the design and development of virtual coaching systems. This framework augments a traditional data science pipeline with four key guiding goals: reliability, fairness, engagement, and ethics.
abstract_zh: 虚拟辅导已迅速发展成为现代临床实践的基本组成部分。在医疗保健专业人员供不应求且对低成本治疗的需求不断增加的情况下，虚拟健康教练 (VHC) 为那些因财务或地理护理机会而受到限制的人提供按需干预。最近，人工智能驱动的虚拟教练已成为人类教练的可行补充。然而，人工智能辅导系统的发展给研究人员、设计师、临床医生和患者带来了几个重要问题。在本文中，我们提出了一个新颖的框架来指导虚拟教练系统的设计和开发。该框架增强了传统数据科学管道的四个关键指导目标：可靠性、公平性、参与性和道德。

AI.tldr: 提出一个框架，以应对AI支持的虚拟健康教练的风险与机遇，指导其设计与开发
AI.motivation: 由于医疗资源短缺和低成本治疗需求增加，AI虚拟教练成为补充方案，但其设计和应用面临可靠性、公平性、参与度和伦理等关键问题，需系统性框架指导
AI.method: 通过将传统数据科学流程与四个核心目标（可靠性、公平性、参与度、伦理）结合，构建系统性设计框架
AI.result: 提出并验证了包含四个关键目标的框架，为AI虚拟教练的设计提供理论指导
AI.conclusion: 该框架有助于平衡AI虚拟教练的技术潜力与伦理风险，确保其在临床实践中的有效性与可接受性
