authors_text: Yangsibo Huang,Zhao Song,Danqi Chen,Kai Li,Sanjeev Arora
title: TextHide: Tackling Data Privacy in Language Understanding Tasks
title_zh: TextHide：解决语言理解任务中的数据隐私问题
abstract: An unsolved challenge in distributed or federated learning is to effectively mitigate privacy risks without slowing down training or reducing accuracy. In this paper, we propose TextHide aiming at addressing this challenge for natural language understanding tasks. It requires all participants to add a simple encryption step to prevent an eavesdropping attacker from recovering private text data. Such an encryption step is efficient and only affects the task performance slightly. In addition, TextHide fits well with the popular framework of fine-tuning pre-trained language models (e.g., BERT) for any sentence or sentence-pair task. We evaluate TextHide on the GLUE benchmark, and our experiments show that TextHide can effectively defend attacks on shared gradients or representations and the averaged accuracy reduction is only $1.9\%$. We also present an analysis of the security of TextHide using a conjecture about the computational intractability of a mathematical problem. Our code is available at https://github.com/Hazelsuko07/TextHide
summary: An unsolved challenge in distributed or federated learning is to effectively mitigate privacy risks without slowing down training or reducing accuracy. In this paper, we propose TextHide aiming at addressing this challenge for natural language understanding tasks. It requires all participants to add a simple encryption step to prevent an eavesdropping attacker from recovering private text data. Such an encryption step is efficient and only affects the task performance slightly. In addition, TextHide fits well with the popular framework of fine-tuning pre-trained language models (e.g., BERT) for any sentence or sentence-pair task. We evaluate TextHide on the GLUE benchmark, and our experiments show that TextHide can effectively defend attacks on shared gradients or representations and the averaged accuracy reduction is only $1.9\%$. We also present an analysis of the security of TextHide using a conjecture about the computational intractability of a mathematical problem. Our code is available at https://github.com/Hazelsuko07/TextHide
abstract_zh: 分布式或联合学习中尚未解决的挑战是在不减慢训练或降低准确性的情况下有效降低隐私风险。在本文中，我们提出 TextHide 旨在解决自然语言理解任务的这一挑战。它要求所有参与者添加一个简单的加密步骤，以防止窃听攻击者恢复私人文本数据。这样的加密步骤是高效的并且仅对任务性能产生轻微影响。此外，TextHide 非常适合针对任何句子或句子对任务微调预训练语言模型（例如 BERT）的流行框架。我们在 GLUE 基准上评估 TextHide，我们的实验表明 TextHide 可以有效防御对共享梯度或表示的攻击，平均准确度降低仅为 $1.9\%$。我们还使用关于数学问题的计算难解性的猜想对 TextHide 的安全性进行了分析。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/Hazelsuko07/TextHide

AI.tldr: 本文提出TextHide方法，在分布式语言理解任务中通过加密步骤保护数据隐私，同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 分布式或联邦学习中存在隐私风险，现有方法难以在不降低训练效率或模型精度的前提下有效保护数据隐私。
AI.method: 在预训练语言模型（如BERT）微调框架中引入轻量级加密步骤，通过扰动梯度或表征防止隐私泄露，且兼容各类句子或句对任务。
AI.result: 在GLUE基准测试中，TextHide将平均准确率下降控制在1.9%以内，有效防御梯度/表征攻击，并基于数学难题计算不可行性进行安全性分析。
AI.conclusion: TextHide通过高效加密机制在隐私保护与模型性能间取得平衡，为语言理解任务提供了可行的隐私保护方案。

title: Implementation of a neural network for non-linearities estimation in a tail-sitter aircraft
title_zh: 用于尾座飞机非线性估计的神经网络的实现
abstract: The control of a tail-sitter aircraft is a challenging task, especially during transition maneuver where the lift and drag forces are highly nonlinear. In this work, we implement a Neural Network (NN) capable of estimate such nonlinearities. Once they are estimated, one can propose a control scheme where these forces can correctly feed-forwarded. Our implementation of the NN has been programmed in C++ on the PX4 Autopilot an open-source autopilot for drones. To ensure that this implementation does not considerably affect the autopilot's performance, the coded NN must be of a light computational load. With the aim to test our approach, we have carried out a series of realistic simulations in the Software in The Loop (SITL) using the PX4 Autopilot. These experiments demonstrate that the implemented NN can be used to estimate the tail-sitter aerodynamic forces, and can be used to improve the control algorithms during all the flight phases of the tail-sitter aircraft: hover, cruise flight, and transition.
summary: The control of a tail-sitter aircraft is a challenging task, especially during transition maneuver where the lift and drag forces are highly nonlinear. In this work, we implement a Neural Network (NN) capable of estimate such nonlinearities. Once they are estimated, one can propose a control scheme where these forces can correctly feed-forwarded. Our implementation of the NN has been programmed in C++ on the PX4 Autopilot an open-source autopilot for drones. To ensure that this implementation does not considerably affect the autopilot's performance, the coded NN must be of a light computational load. With the aim to test our approach, we have carried out a series of realistic simulations in the Software in The Loop (SITL) using the PX4 Autopilot. These experiments demonstrate that the implemented NN can be used to estimate the tail-sitter aerodynamic forces, and can be used to improve the control algorithms during all the flight phases of the tail-sitter aircraft: hover, cruise flight, and transition.
abstract_zh: 尾座飞机的控制是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是在升力和阻力高度非线性的过渡机动过程中。在这项工作中，我们实现了一个能够估计这种非线性的神经网络（NN）。一旦对它们进行估计，人们就可以提出一种控制方案，其中这些力可以正确前馈。我们的神经网络实现是在 PX4 Autopilot（无人机的开源自动驾驶仪）上用 C++ 进行编程的。为了确保此实现不会显着影响自动驾驶仪的性能，编码的神经网络必须具有较轻的计算负载。为了测试我们的方法，我们使用 PX4 Autopilot 在软件在环 (SITL) 中进行了一系列真实模拟。这些实验表明，所实现的神经网络可用于估计尾座空气动力，并可用于改进尾座飞机所有飞行阶段的控制算法：悬停、巡航飞行和过渡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经网络方法，用于估计尾座飞机在转换飞行阶段的非线性气动特性，以改进控制算法。
AI.motivation: 尾座飞机在转换飞行时的升力和阻力呈现高度非线性特征，传统控制方法难以准确建模，导致控制效果下降。
AI.method: 基于C++在PX4自动驾驶系统中实现轻量级神经网络，通过软件在环（SITL）仿真验证其在悬停、巡航和转换阶段的估计能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该神经网络能有效估计尾座飞机气动参数，并提升各飞行阶段的控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络可作为轻量级解决方案，用于实时估计尾座飞机非线性特性，为控制算法提供数据支持。

search_text: Implementation of a neural network for non-linearities estimation in a tail-sitter aircraft 用于尾座飞机非线性估计的神经网络的实现 The control of a tail-sitter aircraft is a challenging task, especially during transition maneuver where the lift and drag forces are highly nonlinear. In this work, we implement a Neural Network (NN) capable of estimate such nonlinearities. Once they are estimated, one can propose a control scheme where these forces can correctly feed-forwarded. Our implementation of the NN has been programmed in C++ on the PX4 Autopilot an open-source autopilot for drones. To ensure that this implementation does not considerably affect the autopilot's performance, the coded NN must be of a light computational load. With the aim to test our approach, we have carried out a series of realistic simulations in the Software in The Loop (SITL) using the PX4 Autopilot. These experiments demonstrate that the implemented NN can be used to estimate the tail-sitter aerodynamic forces, and can be used to improve the control algorithms during all the flight phases of the tail-sitter aircraft: hover, cruise flight, and transition. 尾座飞机的控制是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是在升力和阻力高度非线性的过渡机动过程中。在这项工作中，我们实现了一个能够估计这种非线性的神经网络（NN）。一旦对它们进行估计，人们就可以提出一种控制方案，其中这些力可以正确前馈。我们的神经网络实现是在 PX4 Autopilot（无人机的开源自动驾驶仪）上用 C++ 进行编程的。为了确保此实现不会显着影响自动驾驶仪的性能，编码的神经网络必须具有较轻的计算负载。为了测试我们的方法，我们使用 PX4 Autopilot 在软件在环 (SITL) 中进行了一系列真实模拟。这些实验表明，所实现的神经网络可用于估计尾座空气动力，并可用于改进尾座飞机所有飞行阶段的控制算法：悬停、巡航飞行和过渡。 本文提出一种神经网络方法，用于估计尾座飞机在转换飞行阶段的非线性气动特性，以改进控制算法。 A. Flores,G. Flores cs.AI

authors_text: Sofia de la Fuente Garcia,Craig Ritchie,Saturnino Luz
title: Artificial Intelligence, speech and language processing approaches to monitoring Alzheimer's Disease: a systematic review
title_zh: 监测阿尔茨海默病的人工智能、语音和语言处理方法：系统评价
comment: Pre-print submitted to the Journal of Alzheimer's Disease
comments: Pre-print submitted to the Journal of Alzheimer's Disease
abstract: Language is a valuable source of clinical information in Alzheimer's Disease, as it declines concurrently with neurodegeneration. Consequently, speech and language data have been extensively studied in connection with its diagnosis. This paper summarises current findings on the use of artificial intelligence, speech and language processing to predict cognitive decline in the context of Alzheimer's Disease, detailing current research procedures, highlighting their limitations and suggesting strategies to address them. We conducted a systematic review of original research between 2000 and 2019, registered in PROSPERO (reference CRD42018116606). An interdisciplinary search covered six databases on engineering (ACM and IEEE), psychology (PsycINFO), medicine (PubMed and Embase) and Web of Science. Bibliographies of relevant papers were screened until December 2019. From 3,654 search results 51 articles were selected against the eligibility criteria. Four tables summarise their findings: study details (aim, population, interventions, comparisons, methods and outcomes), data details (size, type, modalities, annotation, balance, availability and language of study), methodology (pre-processing, feature generation, machine learning, evaluation and results) and clinical applicability (research implications, clinical potential, risk of bias and strengths/limitations). While promising results are reported across nearly all 51 studies, very few have been implemented in clinical research or practice. We concluded that the main limitations of the field are poor standardisation, limited comparability of results, and a degree of disconnect between study aims and clinical applications. Attempts to close these gaps should support translation of future research into clinical practice.

While promising results are reported across nearly all 51 studies, very few have been implemented in clinical research or practice. abstract_zh: 语言是阿尔茨海默病临床信息的宝贵来源，因为它的衰退与神经退行性疾病同时发生。因此，语音和语言数据及其诊断已被广泛研究。本文总结了目前使用人工智能、语音和语言处理来预测阿尔茨海默氏病认知能力下降的研究结果，详细介绍了当前的研究程序，强调了它们的局限性，并提出了解决这些问题的策略。我们对 2000 年至 2019 年间在 PROSPERO 注册的原始研究进行了系统回顾（参考号 CRD42018116606）。跨学科搜索涵盖了工程（ACM 和 IEEE）、心理学（PsycINFO）、医学（PubMed 和 Embase）和 Web of Science 的六个数据库。截至 2019 年 12 月，对相关论文的参考书目进行了筛选。从 3,654 条搜索结果中，根据资格标准选出了 51 篇文章。四个表格总结了他们的发现：研究细节（目标、人群、干预措施、比较、方法和结果）、数据细节（规模、类型、模式、注释、平衡、可用性和研究语言）、方法论（预处理、特征生成、机器学习、评估和结果）和临床适用性（研究意义、临床潜力、偏倚风险和优势/局限性）。虽然几乎所有 51 项研究都报告了有希望的结果，但很少有研究在临床研究或实践中得到实施。我们的结论是，该领域的主要局限性是标准化差、结果的可比性有限以及研究目标和临床应用之间存在一定程度的脱节。缩小这些差距的尝试应该支持未来研究转化为临床实践。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能和语音语言处理技术在监测阿尔茨海默病中的应用，总结了相关研究的方法、数据及临床适用性。
AI.motivation: 语言能力下降与阿尔茨海默病神经退行性病变同步，语音语言数据可作为临床信息来源，但现有研究与临床实践之间存在差距。
AI.method: 通过系统综述方法，筛选2000-2019年间注册于PROSPERO的51篇研究，涵盖工程、心理学、医学等领域的六大数据库，分析研究细节、数据特征及方法学。
AI.result: 51项研究均显示一定潜力，但极少应用于临床；主要局限包括标准化不足、结果可比性低及研究目标与临床需求脱节。
AI.conclusion: 未来需加强标准化和临床转化策略，以弥合研究与实践间的鸿沟。

authors_text: Thomas Vandal,Daniel McDuff,Weile Wang,Andrew Michaelis,Ramakrishna Nemani
title: Spectral Synthesis for Satellite-to-Satellite Translation
title_zh: 用于卫星到卫星翻译的光谱合成
abstract: Earth observing satellites carrying multi-spectral sensors are widely used to monitor the physical and biological states of the atmosphere, land, and oceans. These satellites have different vantage points above the earth and different spectral imaging bands resulting in inconsistent imagery from one to another. This presents challenges in building downstream applications. What if we could generate synthetic bands for existing satellites from the union of all domains? We tackle the problem of generating synthetic spectral imagery for multispectral sensors as an unsupervised image-to-image translation problem with partial labels and introduce a novel shared spectral reconstruction loss. Simulated experiments performed by dropping one or more spectral bands show that cross-domain reconstruction outperforms measurements obtained from a second vantage point. On a downstream cloud detection task, we show that generating synthetic bands with our model improves segmentation performance beyond our baseline. Our proposed approach enables synchronization of multispectral data and provides a basis for more homogeneous remote sensing datasets.
summary: Earth observing satellites carrying multi-spectral sensors are widely used to monitor the physical and biological states of the atmosphere, land, and oceans. These satellites have different vantage points above the earth and different spectral imaging bands resulting in inconsistent imagery from one to another. This presents challenges in building downstream applications. What if we could generate synthetic bands for existing satellites from the union of all domains? We tackle the problem of generating synthetic spectral imagery for multispectral sensors as an unsupervised image-to-image translation problem with partial labels and introduce a novel shared spectral reconstruction loss. Simulated experiments performed by dropping one or more spectral bands show that cross-domain reconstruction outperforms measurements obtained from a second vantage point. On a downstream cloud detection task, we show that generating synthetic bands with our model improves segmentation performance beyond our baseline. Our proposed approach enables synchronization of multispectral data and provides a basis for more homogeneous remote sensing datasets.
abstract_zh: 携带多光谱传感器的地球观测卫星广泛用于监测大气、陆地和海洋的物理和生物状态。这些卫星在地球上方具有不同的有利位置和不同的光谱成像波段，导致一颗与另一颗卫星的图像不一致。这给构建下游应用程序带来了挑战。如果我们可以通过所有域的联合为现有卫星生成合成频段会怎么样？我们解决了为多光谱传感器生成合成光谱图像的问题，将其作为具有部分标签的无监督图像到图像转换问题，并引入了一种新颖的共享光谱重建损失。通过删除一个或多个光谱带进行的模拟实验表明，跨域重建优于从第二个有利位置获得的测量结果。在下游云检测任务中，我们表明使用我们的模型生成合成带可以提高分割性能，使其超出我们的基线。我们提出的方法可以实现多光谱数据的同步，并为更均匀的遥感数据集提供基础。

AI.tldr: 解决多光谱卫星图像因视角和波段差异导致的不一致性问题，通过生成合成波段实现跨卫星图像转换。
AI.motivation: 不同卫星的视角和光谱波段差异导致图像不一致，影响下游应用，需同步数据以提升分析一致性。
AI.method: 采用无监督图像到图像转换方法，结合部分标签和共享光谱重建损失，生成合成光谱波段。
AI.result: 实验表明跨域重建效果优于其他方法，云检测任务中分割性能超越基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效同步多光谱数据，为构建更均匀的遥感数据集奠定基础。

Our proposed approach enables synchronization of multispectral data and provides a basis for more homogeneous remote sensing datasets. 携带多光谱传感器的地球观测卫星广泛用于监测大气、陆地和海洋的物理和生物状态。这些卫星在地球上方具有不同的有利位置和不同的光谱成像波段，导致一颗与另一颗卫星的图像不一致。这给构建下游应用程序带来了挑战。如果我们可以通过所有域的联合为现有卫星生成合成频段会怎么样？我们解决了为多光谱传感器生成合成光谱图像的问题，将其作为具有部分标签的无监督图像到图像转换问题，并引入了一种新颖的共享光谱重建损失。通过删除一个或多个光谱带进行的模拟实验表明，跨域重建优于从第二个有利位置获得的测量结果。在下游云检测任务中，我们表明使用我们的模型生成合成带可以提高分割性能，使其超出我们的基线。我们提出的方法可以实现多光谱数据的同步，并为更均匀的遥感数据集提供基础。 解决多光谱卫星图像因视角和波段差异导致的不一致性问题，通过生成合成波段实现跨卫星图像转换。 Thomas Vandal,Daniel McDuff,Weile Wang,Andrew Michaelis,Ramakrishna Nemani cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Mingzhi Zheng,Dinghan Shen,Yelong Shen,Weizhu Chen,Lin Xiao
title: Improving Self-supervised Pre-training via a Fully-Explored Masked Language Model
title_zh: 通过充分探索的屏蔽语言模型改进自监督预训练
abstract: Masked Language Model (MLM) framework has been widely adopted for self-supervised language pre-training. In this paper, we argue that randomly sampled masks in MLM would lead to undesirably large gradient variance. Thus, we theoretically quantify the gradient variance via correlating the gradient covariance with the Hamming distance between two different masks (given a certain text sequence). To reduce the variance due to the sampling of masks, we propose a fully-explored masking strategy, where a text sequence is divided into a certain number of non-overlapping segments. Thereafter, the tokens within one segment are masked for training. We prove, from a theoretical perspective, that the gradients derived from this new masking schema have a smaller variance and can lead to more efficient self-supervised training. We conduct extensive experiments on both continual pre-training and general pre-training from scratch. Empirical results confirm that this new masking strategy can consistently outperform standard random masking. Detailed efficiency analysis and ablation studies further validate the advantages of our fully-explored masking strategy under the MLM framework.
summary: Masked Language Model (MLM) framework has been widely adopted for self-supervised language pre-training. In this paper, we argue that randomly sampled masks in MLM would lead to undesirably large gradient variance. Thus, we theoretically quantify the gradient variance via correlating the gradient covariance with the Hamming distance between two different masks (given a certain text sequence). To reduce the variance due to the sampling of masks, we propose a fully-explored masking strategy, where a text sequence is divided into a certain number of non-overlapping segments. Thereafter, the tokens within one segment are masked for training. We prove, from a theoretical perspective, that the gradients derived from this new masking schema have a smaller variance and can lead to more efficient self-supervised training. We conduct extensive experiments on both continual pre-training and general pre-training from scratch. Empirical results confirm that this new masking strategy can consistently outperform standard random masking. Detailed efficiency analysis and ablation studies further validate the advantages of our fully-explored masking strategy under the MLM framework.
abstract_zh: 掩码语言模型（MLM）框架已广泛用于自监督语言预训练。在本文中，我们认为 MLM 中的随机采样掩模会导致不期望的大梯度方差。因此，我们理论上通过将梯度协方差与两个不同掩码之间的汉明距离相关联来量化梯度方差（给定特定的文本序列）。为了减少由于掩码采样而产生的方差，我们提出了一种充分探索的掩码策略，其中将文本序列分为一定数量的非重叠片段。此后，一段内的标记被屏蔽以进行训练。我们从理论角度证明，从这种新的掩蔽模式导出的梯度具有更小的方差，并且可以导致更有效的自监督训练。我们从头开始对持续预训练和一般预训练进行了广泛的实验。经验结果证实，这种新的掩蔽策略可以始终优于标准随机掩蔽。详细的效率分析和消融研究进一步验证了我们在 MLM 框架下充分探索的掩蔽策略的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全探索掩码语言模型（Fully-Explored MLM）策略，通过优化掩码方式降低梯度方差以提升自监督预训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统随机掩码导致梯度方差过大，影响预训练稳定性与效率，需通过理论分析与新掩码策略解决该问题。
AI.method: 将文本分割为非重叠段落，对单个段落内所有token进行掩码，理论证明该策略能降低梯度方差并提升训练效率。
AI.result: 实验表明新掩码策略在持续预训练和从头预训练中均优于标准随机掩码，效率分析与消融实验验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 全探索掩码策略通过减少梯度方差显著提升MLM框架下的自监督预训练效果，为模型优化提供新方向。

title: Streaming enumeration on nested documents
title_zh: 嵌套文档上的流式枚举
abstract: Some of the most relevant document schemas used online, such as XML and JSON, have a nested format. In the last decade, the task of extracting data from nested documents over streams has become especially relevant. We focus on the streaming evaluation of queries with outputs of varied sizes over nested documents. We model queries of this kind as Visibly Pushdown Transducers (VPT), a computational model that extends visibly pushdown automata with outputs and has the same expressive power as MSO over nested documents. Since processing a document through a VPT can generate a massive number of results, we are interested in reading the input in a streaming fashion and enumerating the outputs one after another as efficiently as possible, namely, with constant-delay. This paper presents an algorithm that enumerates these elements with constant-delay after processing the document stream in a single pass. Furthermore, we show that this algorithm is worst-case optimal in terms of update-time per symbol and memory usage.
summary: Some of the most relevant document schemas used online, such as XML and JSON, have a nested format. In the last decade, the task of extracting data from nested documents over streams has become especially relevant. We focus on the streaming evaluation of queries with outputs of varied sizes over nested documents. We model queries of this kind as Visibly Pushdown Transducers (VPT), a computational model that extends visibly pushdown automata with outputs and has the same expressive power as MSO over nested documents. Since processing a document through a VPT can generate a massive number of results, we are interested in reading the input in a streaming fashion and enumerating the outputs one after another as efficiently as possible, namely, with constant-delay. This paper presents an algorithm that enumerates these elements with constant-delay after processing the document stream in a single pass. Furthermore, we show that this algorithm is worst-case optimal in terms of update-time per symbol and memory usage.
abstract_zh: 一些在线使用的最相关的文档模式（例如 XML 和 JSON）具有嵌套格式。在过去的十年中，通过流从嵌套文档中提取数据的任务变得尤为重要。我们专注于对嵌套文档上具有不同大小输出的查询进行流式评估。我们将此类查询建模为可见下推转换器 (VPT)，这是一种通过输出扩展可见下推自动机的计算模型，并且具有与嵌套文档上的 MSO 相同的表达能力。由于通过 VPT 处理文档可以生成大量结果，因此我们有兴趣以流式方式读取输入，并尽可能高效地（即恒定延迟）逐个枚举输出。本文提出了一种算法，该算法在单次处理文档流后以恒定延迟枚举这些元素。此外，我们表明该算法在每个符号的更新时间和内存使用方面是最坏情况下的最优算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在流式处理嵌套文档时，使用可见下推转换器（VPT）实现常数延迟输出枚举的算法。
AI.motivation: 随着XML、JSON等嵌套文档格式的广泛应用，如何高效处理流式数据中的复杂查询成为关键问题，尤其需要应对输出规模不一的挑战。
AI.method: 通过将查询建模为可见下推转换器（VPT），设计单次遍历文档流的算法，在保证输出枚举常数延迟的同时优化更新时间和内存使用。
AI.result: 实现了流式处理下嵌套文档查询的常数延迟枚举，并证明该算法在更新时间与内存使用上达到最坏情况下的最优性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为流式嵌套文档查询提供了高效且最优的解决方案，平衡了处理速度与资源消耗，适用于大规模实时数据处理场景。

authors_text: Jaylin Herskovitz,Jason Wu,Samuel White,Amy Pavel,Gabriel Reyes,Anhong Guo,Jeffrey P. Bigham
title: Making Mobile Augmented Reality Applications Accessible
title_zh: 让移动增强现实应用程序变得易于访问
comment: 14 pages. 6 figures. Published in The 22nd International ACM SIGACCESS Conference on Computers and Accessibility (ASSETS '20)
comments: 14 pages. 6 figures. Published in The 22nd International ACM SIGACCESS Conference on Computers and Accessibility (ASSETS '20)
abstract: Augmented Reality (AR) technology creates new immersive experiences in entertainment, games, education, retail, and social media. AR content is often primarily visual and it is challenging to enable access to it non-visually due to the mix of virtual and real-world content. In this paper, we identify common constituent tasks in AR by analyzing existing mobile AR applications for iOS, and characterize the design space of tasks that require accessible alternatives. For each of the major task categories, we create prototype accessible alternatives that we evaluate in a study with 10 blind participants to explore their perceptions of accessible AR. Our study demonstrates that these prototypes make AR possible to use for blind users and reveals a number of insights to move forward. We believe our work sets forth not only exemplars for developers to create accessible AR applications, but also a roadmap for future research to make AR comprehensively accessible.
summary: Augmented Reality (AR) technology creates new immersive experiences in entertainment, games, education, retail, and social media. AR content is often primarily visual and it is challenging to enable access to it non-visually due to the mix of virtual and real-world content. In this paper, we identify common constituent tasks in AR by analyzing existing mobile AR applications for iOS, and characterize the design space of tasks that require accessible alternatives. For each of the major task categories, we create prototype accessible alternatives that we evaluate in a study with 10 blind participants to explore their perceptions of accessible AR. Our study demonstrates that these prototypes make AR possible to use for blind users and reveals a number of insights to move forward. We believe our work sets forth not only exemplars for developers to create accessible AR applications, but also a roadmap for future research to make AR comprehensively accessible.
abstract_zh: 增强现实 (AR) 技术在娱乐、游戏、教育、零售和社交媒体领域创造了全新的沉浸式体验。 AR 内容通常主要是视觉内容，由于虚拟和现实世界内容的混合，以非视觉方式访问它具有挑战性。在本文中，我们通过分析现有的 iOS 移动 AR 应用程序来确定 AR 中的常见组成任务，并描述需要可访问替代方案的任务的设计空间。对于每个主要任务类别，我们创建了原型无障碍替代方案，并在 10 名盲人参与者的研究中对其进行评估，以探索他们对无障碍 AR 的看法。我们的研究表明，这些原型使 AR 能够为盲人用户使用，并揭示了许多值得前进的见解。我们相信，我们的工作不仅为开发人员创建可访问的 AR 应用程序提供了范例，而且还为未来研究使 AR 全面无障碍提供了路线图。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析现有移动AR应用的任务类别，设计并评估可访问性原型，使盲人用户能够使用AR技术。
AI.motivation: AR内容以视觉为主，盲人等非视觉用户难以访问，需探索无障碍AR解决方案以扩大其应用范围。
AI.method: 分析iOS平台AR应用的任务构成，构建可访问性原型，并邀请10名盲人用户参与实验评估。

AI.conclusion: 本文为创建无障碍AR应用提供范例与研究路线图，推动AR技术的全面可访问性发展。

search_text: Making Mobile Augmented Reality Applications Accessible 让移动增强现实应用程序变得易于访问 Augmented Reality (AR) technology creates new immersive experiences in entertainment, games, education, retail, and social media. AR content is often primarily visual and it is challenging to enable access to it non-visually due to the mix of virtual and real-world content. In this paper, we identify common constituent tasks in AR by analyzing existing mobile AR applications for iOS, and characterize the design space of tasks that require accessible alternatives. For each of the major task categories, we create prototype accessible alternatives that we evaluate in a study with 10 blind participants to explore their perceptions of accessible AR. Our study demonstrates that these prototypes make AR possible to use for blind users and reveals a number of insights to move forward. We believe our work sets forth not only exemplars for developers to create accessible AR applications, but also a roadmap for future research to make AR comprehensively accessible. 增强现实 (AR) 技术在娱乐、游戏、教育、零售和社交媒体领域创造了全新的沉浸式体验。 AR 内容通常主要是视觉内容，由于虚拟和现实世界内容的混合，以非视觉方式访问它具有挑战性。在本文中，我们通过分析现有的 iOS 移动 AR 应用程序来确定 AR 中的常见组成任务，并描述需要可访问替代方案的任务的设计空间。对于每个主要任务类别，我们创建了原型无障碍替代方案，并在 10 名盲人参与者的研究中对其进行评估，以探索他们对无障碍 AR 的看法。我们的研究表明，这些原型使 AR 能够为盲人用户使用，并揭示了许多值得前进的见解。我们相信，我们的工作不仅为开发人员创建可访问的 AR 应用程序提供了范例，而且还为未来研究使 AR 全面无障碍提供了路线图。 本文通过分析现有移动AR应用的任务类别，设计并评估可访问性原型，使盲人用户能够使用AR技术。 Jaylin Herskovitz,Jason Wu,Samuel White,Amy Pavel,Gabriel Reyes,Anhong Guo,Jeffrey P. Bigham cs.HC

authors_text: Sharib Ali,Mariia Dmitrieva,Noha Ghatwary,Sophia Bano,Gorkem Polat,Alptekin Temizel,Adrian Krenzer,Amar Hekalo,Yun Bo Guo,Bogdan Matuszewski,Mourad Gridach,Irina Voiculescu,Vishnusai Yoganand,Arnav Chavan,Aryan Raj,Nhan T. Nguyen,Dat Q. Tran,Le Duy Huynh,Nicolas Boutry,Shahadate Rezvy,Haijian Chen,Yoon Ho Choi,Anand Subramanian,Velmurugan Balasubramanian,Xiaohong W. Gao, et al. (12 additional authors not shown)
title: Deep learning for detection and segmentation of artefact and disease instances in gastrointestinal endoscopy
title_zh: 用于检测和分割胃肠道内窥镜检查中的伪影和疾病实例的深度学习
abstract: The Endoscopy Computer Vision Challenge (EndoCV) is a crowd-sourcing initiative to address eminent problems in developing reliable computer aided detection and diagnosis endoscopy systems and suggest a pathway for clinical translation of technologies. Whilst endoscopy is a widely used diagnostic and treatment tool for hollow-organs, there are several core challenges often faced by endoscopists, mainly: 1) presence of multi-class artefacts that hinder their visual interpretation, and 2) difficulty in identifying subtle precancerous precursors and cancer abnormalities. Artefacts often affect the robustness of deep learning methods applied to the gastrointestinal tract organs as they can be confused with tissue of interest. EndoCV2020 challenges are designed to address research questions in these remits. In this paper, we present a summary of methods developed by the top 17 teams and provide an objective comparison of state-of-the-art methods and methods designed by the participants for two sub-challenges: i) artefact detection and segmentation (EAD2020), and ii) disease detection and segmentation (EDD2020). Multi-center, multi-organ, multi-class, and multi-modal clinical endoscopy datasets were compiled for both EAD2020 and EDD2020 sub-challenges. The out-of-sample generalization ability of detection algorithms was also evaluated. Whilst most teams focused on accuracy improvements, only a few methods hold credibility for clinical usability. The best performing teams provided solutions to tackle class imbalance, and variabilities in size, origin, modality and occurrences by exploring data augmentation, data fusion, and optimal class thresholding techniques.
summary: The Endoscopy Computer Vision Challenge (EndoCV) is a crowd-sourcing initiative to address eminent problems in developing reliable computer aided detection and diagnosis endoscopy systems and suggest a pathway for clinical translation of technologies. Whilst endoscopy is a widely used diagnostic and treatment tool for hollow-organs, there are several core challenges often faced by endoscopists, mainly: 1) presence of multi-class artefacts that hinder their visual interpretation, and 2) difficulty in identifying subtle precancerous precursors and cancer abnormalities. Artefacts often affect the robustness of deep learning methods applied to the gastrointestinal tract organs as they can be confused with tissue of interest. EndoCV2020 challenges are designed to address research questions in these remits. In this paper, we present a summary of methods developed by the top 17 teams and provide an objective comparison of state-of-the-art methods and methods designed by the participants for two sub-challenges: i) artefact detection and segmentation (EAD2020), and ii) disease detection and segmentation (EDD2020). Multi-center, multi-organ, multi-class, and multi-modal clinical endoscopy datasets were compiled for both EAD2020 and EDD2020 sub-challenges. The out-of-sample generalization ability of detection algorithms was also evaluated. Whilst most teams focused on accuracy improvements, only a few methods hold credibility for clinical usability. The best performing teams provided solutions to tackle class imbalance, and variabilities in size, origin, modality and occurrences by exploring data augmentation, data fusion, and optimal class thresholding techniques.
abstract_zh: 内窥镜计算机视觉挑战赛 (EndoCV) 是一项众包计划，旨在解决开发可靠的计算机辅助检测和诊断内窥镜系统中的突出问题，并为技术的临床转化提出一条途径。虽然内窥镜检查是一种广泛使用的中空器官诊断和治疗工具，但内窥镜医师经常面临几个核心挑战，主要是：1）存在多种伪影，阻碍了他们的视觉解释；2）难以识别微妙的癌前病变和癌症异常。伪影通常会影响应用于胃肠道器官的深度学习方法的鲁棒性，因为它们可能与感兴趣的组织混淆。 EndoCV2020 挑战赛旨在解决这些领域的研究问题。在本文中，我们总结了排名前 17 的团队开发的方法，并对最先进的方法和参与者为两个子挑战设计的方法进行了客观比较：i）伪影检测和分割（EAD2020），以及 ii）疾病检测和分割（EDD2020）。为EAD2020和EDD2020子挑战编制了多中心、多器官、多类别、多模式的临床内窥镜数据集。还评估了检测算法的样本外泛化能力。虽然大多数团队专注于准确性的提高，但只有少数方法具有临床可用性的可信度。表现最好的团队通过探索数据增强、数据融合和最佳类别阈值技术，提供解决方案来解决类别不平衡以及大小、起源、模式和事件的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文总结了EndoCV2020挑战赛中针对胃肠道内镜下伪影检测分割（EAD2020）和疾病检测分割（EDD2020）的17支顶尖团队方法，并进行客观比较。
AI.motivation: 内镜检查面临伪影干扰和早期癌变识别困难等核心挑战，影响深度学习方法的鲁棒性，需通过标准化竞赛推动可靠计算机辅助诊断系统的发展。
AI.method: 整合多中心、多器官、多模态临床内镜数据集，评估算法泛化能力；参赛团队采用数据增强、数据融合及类别阈值优化等技术应对类别不平衡和数据变异性问题。
AI.result: 多数团队侧重准确率提升，但临床可用性有限；最佳团队通过数据增强和融合技术有效缓解类别不平衡及数据变异带来的影响。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在特定场景表现优异，但临床实用化仍需解决数据变异性、类别不平衡等挑战，未来需加强算法鲁棒性和实际应用场景适配性研究。

authors_text: Jiahui Yu,Wei Han,Anmol Gulati,Chung-Cheng Chiu,Bo Li,Tara N. Sainath,Yonghui Wu,Ruoming Pang
title: Dual-mode ASR: Unify and Improve Streaming ASR with Full-context Modeling
title_zh: 双模式 ASR：通过全上下文建模统一和改进流式 ASR
abstract: Streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) aims to emit each hypothesized word as quickly and accurately as possible, while full-context ASR waits for the completion of a full speech utterance before emitting completed hypotheses. In this work, we propose a unified framework, Dual-mode ASR, to train a single end-to-end ASR model with shared weights for both streaming and full-context speech recognition. We show that the latency and accuracy of streaming ASR significantly benefit from weight sharing and joint training of full-context ASR, especially with inplace knowledge distillation during the training. The Dual-mode ASR framework can be applied to recent state-of-the-art convolution-based and transformer-based ASR networks. We present extensive experiments with two state-of-the-art ASR networks, ContextNet and Conformer, on two datasets, a widely used public dataset LibriSpeech and a large-scale dataset MultiDomain. Experiments and ablation studies demonstrate that Dual-mode ASR not only simplifies the workflow of training and deploying streaming and full-context ASR models, but also significantly improves both emission latency and recognition accuracy of streaming ASR. With Dual-mode ASR, we achieve new state-of-the-art streaming ASR results on both LibriSpeech and MultiDomain in terms of accuracy and latency.
summary: Streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) aims to emit each hypothesized word as quickly and accurately as possible, while full-context ASR waits for the completion of a full speech utterance before emitting completed hypotheses. In this work, we propose a unified framework, Dual-mode ASR, to train a single end-to-end ASR model with shared weights for both streaming and full-context speech recognition. We show that the latency and accuracy of streaming ASR significantly benefit from weight sharing and joint training of full-context ASR, especially with inplace knowledge distillation during the training. The Dual-mode ASR framework can be applied to recent state-of-the-art convolution-based and transformer-based ASR networks. We present extensive experiments with two state-of-the-art ASR networks, ContextNet and Conformer, on two datasets, a widely used public dataset LibriSpeech and a large-scale dataset MultiDomain. Experiments and ablation studies demonstrate that Dual-mode ASR not only simplifies the workflow of training and deploying streaming and full-context ASR models, but also significantly improves both emission latency and recognition accuracy of streaming ASR. With Dual-mode ASR, we achieve new state-of-the-art streaming ASR results on both LibriSpeech and MultiDomain in terms of accuracy and latency.
abstract_zh: 流式自动语音识别 (ASR) 旨在尽可能快速、准确地发出每个假设单词，而全上下文 ASR 则等待完整语音话语完成后再发出完整的假设。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，即双模式 ASR，来训练具有共享权重的单一端到端 ASR 模型，用于流式和全上下文语音识别。我们表明，流式 ASR 的延迟和准确性显着受益于全上下文 ASR 的权重共享和联合训练，尤其是在训练期间进行就地知识蒸馏。双模 ASR 框架可应用于最新的基于卷积和基于变压器的 ASR 网络。我们在两个数据集（广泛使用的公共数据集 LibriSpeech 和大型数据集 MultiDomain）上使用两个最先进的 ASR 网络 ContextNet 和 Conformer 进行了广泛的实验。实验和消融研究表明，双模式 ASR 不仅简化了训练和部署流式和全上下文 ASR 模型的工作流程，而且还显着提高了流式 ASR 的发射延迟和识别精度。借助双模式 ASR，我们在 LibriSpeech 和 MultiDomain 上在准确性和延迟方面实现了最先进的流式 ASR 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的端到端ASR框架Dual-mode ASR，通过共享权重和联合训练，同时优化流式和全上下文语音识别任务。
AI.motivation: 传统流式ASR与全上下文ASR需分别训练模型，存在效率低、性能受限的问题，且流式ASR在延迟与准确率间难以平衡。
AI.method: 设计共享权重的统一框架，联合训练流式与全上下文任务，并引入inplace知识蒸馏技术，适配卷积和Transformer类先进网络结构。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech和MultiDomain数据集上，Dual-mode ASR显著提升流式ASR的准确率与延迟表现，达到两项任务的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过权重共享与联合训练有效简化模型训练部署流程，同时实现流式ASR性能的突破性提升。

search_text: Dual-mode ASR: Unify and Improve Streaming ASR with Full-context Modeling 双模式 ASR：通过全上下文建模统一和改进流式 ASR Streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) aims to emit each hypothesized word as quickly and accurately as possible, while full-context ASR waits for the completion of a full speech utterance before emitting completed hypotheses. In this work, we propose a unified framework, Dual-mode ASR, to train a single end-to-end ASR model with shared weights for both streaming and full-context speech recognition. We show that the latency and accuracy of streaming ASR significantly benefit from weight sharing and joint training of full-context ASR, especially with inplace knowledge distillation during the training. The Dual-mode ASR framework can be applied to recent state-of-the-art convolution-based and transformer-based ASR networks. We present extensive experiments with two state-of-the-art ASR networks, ContextNet and Conformer, on two datasets, a widely used public dataset LibriSpeech and a large-scale dataset MultiDomain. Experiments and ablation studies demonstrate that Dual-mode ASR not only simplifies the workflow of training and deploying streaming and full-context ASR models, but also significantly improves both emission latency and recognition accuracy of streaming ASR. With Dual-mode ASR, we achieve new state-of-the-art streaming ASR results on both LibriSpeech and MultiDomain in terms of accuracy and latency. 流式自动语音识别 (ASR) 旨在尽可能快速、准确地发出每个假设单词，而全上下文 ASR 则等待完整语音话语完成后再发出完整的假设。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，即双模式 ASR，来训练具有共享权重的单一端到端 ASR 模型，用于流式和全上下文语音识别。我们表明，流式 ASR 的延迟和准确性显着受益于全上下文 ASR 的权重共享和联合训练，尤其是在训练期间进行就地知识蒸馏。双模 ASR 框架可应用于最新的基于卷积和基于变压器的 ASR 网络。我们在两个数据集（广泛使用的公共数据集 LibriSpeech 和大型数据集 MultiDomain）上使用两个最先进的 ASR 网络 ContextNet 和 Conformer 进行了广泛的实验。实验和消融研究表明，双模式 ASR 不仅简化了训练和部署流式和全上下文 ASR 模型的工作流程，而且还显着提高了流式 ASR 的发射延迟和识别精度。借助双模式 ASR，我们在 LibriSpeech 和 MultiDomain 上在准确性和延迟方面实现了最先进的流式 ASR 结果。 本文提出了一种统一的端到端ASR框架Dual-mode ASR，通过共享权重和联合训练，同时优化流式和全上下文语音识别任务。 Jiahui Yu,Wei Han,Anmol Gulati,Chung-Cheng Chiu,Bo Li,Tara N. Sainath,Yonghui Wu,Ruoming Pang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Assessing Lesion Segmentation Bias of Neural Networks on Motion Corrupted Brain MRI
title_zh: 评估运动损坏脑 MRI 神经网络的病变分割偏差
comment: First two authors contributed equally. Accepted at MICCAI BrainLes 2020
comments: First two authors contributed equally. Accepted at MICCAI BrainLes 2020
abstract: Patient motion during the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) acquisition process results in motion artifacts, which limits the ability of radiologists to provide a quantitative assessment of a condition visualized. Often times, radiologists either "see through" the artifacts with reduced diagnostic confidence, or the MR scans are rejected and patients are asked to be recalled and re-scanned. Presently, there are many published approaches that focus on MRI artifact detection and correction. However, the key question of the bias exhibited by these algorithms on motion corrupted MRI images is still unanswered. In this paper, we seek to quantify the bias in terms of the impact that different levels of motion artifacts have on the performance of neural networks engaged in a lesion segmentation task. Additionally, we explore the effect of a different learning strategy, curriculum learning, on the segmentation performance. Our results suggest that a network trained using curriculum learning is effective at compensating for different levels of motion artifacts, and improved the segmentation performance by ~9%-15% (p < 0.05) when compared against a conventional shuffled learning strategy on the same motion data. Within each motion category, it either improved or maintained the dice score. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to quantitatively assess the segmentation bias on various levels of motion artifacts present in a brain MRI image.
summary: Patient motion during the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) acquisition process results in motion artifacts, which limits the ability of radiologists to provide a quantitative assessment of a condition visualized. Often times, radiologists either "see through" the artifacts with reduced diagnostic confidence, or the MR scans are rejected and patients are asked to be recalled and re-scanned. Presently, there are many published approaches that focus on MRI artifact detection and correction. However, the key question of the bias exhibited by these algorithms on motion corrupted MRI images is still unanswered. In this paper, we seek to quantify the bias in terms of the impact that different levels of motion artifacts have on the performance of neural networks engaged in a lesion segmentation task. Additionally, we explore the effect of a different learning strategy, curriculum learning, on the segmentation performance. Our results suggest that a network trained using curriculum learning is effective at compensating for different levels of motion artifacts, and improved the segmentation performance by ~9%-15% (p < 0.05) when compared against a conventional shuffled learning strategy on the same motion data. Within each motion category, it either improved or maintained the dice score. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to quantitatively assess the segmentation bias on various levels of motion artifacts present in a brain MRI image.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 采集过程中患者的运动会导致运动伪影，这限制了放射科医生对可视化状况进行定量评估的能力。很多时候，放射科医生要么“看穿”伪影而降低了诊断信心，要么拒绝 MR 扫描并要求召回患者并重新扫描。目前，有许多已发表的方法专注于 MRI 伪影检测和校正。然而，这些算法在运动损坏的 MRI 图像上表现出的偏差这一关键问题仍然没有得到解答。在本文中，我们试图量化不同级别的运动伪影对参与病变分割任务的神经网络性能的影响的偏差。此外，我们还探讨了不同的学习策略（课程学习）对细分性能的影响。我们的结果表明，使用课程学习训练的网络可以有效地补偿不同级别的运动伪影，并且与相同运动数据上的传统混洗学习策略相比，分割性能提高了约 9%-15% (p < 0.05)。在每个运动类别中，它要么提高要么保持骰子得分。据我们所知，我们是第一个定量评估大脑 MRI 图像中存在的各种运动伪影水平的分割偏差的人。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在量化不同运动伪影水平对神经网络在脑部MRI病变分割任务中的偏差影响，并探索课程学习策略对分割性能的提升效果。
AI.motivation: 患者在MRI扫描过程中的运动会导致伪影，影响放射科医生的定量诊断。现有算法未明确回答其在运动伪影下的分割偏差问题，需量化评估并寻找改进方法。
AI.method: 通过对比传统随机学习策略与课程学习策略，分析不同运动伪影水平下神经网络的分割性能，使用Dice分数作为评估指标。
AI.result: 课程学习策略在运动伪影数据上提升了9%-15%的分割性能（p<0.05），且在各运动类别中均未降低Dice分数。首次实现对脑MRI运动伪影分割偏差的定量评估。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习能有效补偿运动伪影带来的分割偏差，为处理运动污染MRI数据提供了一种改进的训练策略。

title: The Cone of Silence: Speech Separation by Localization
title_zh: 沉默之锥：通过本地化进行语音分离
comment: 9 pages + references + supplementary. Oral presentation at NeurIPS 2020
comments: 9 pages + references + supplementary. Oral presentation at NeurIPS 2020
abstract: Given a multi-microphone recording of an unknown number of speakers talking concurrently, we simultaneously localize the sources and separate the individual speakers. At the core of our method is a deep network, in the waveform domain, which isolates sources within an angular region $θ\pm w/2$, given an angle of interest $θ$ and angular window size $w$. By exponentially decreasing $w$, we can perform a binary search to localize and separate all sources in logarithmic time. Our algorithm allows for an arbitrary number of potentially moving speakers at test time, including more speakers than seen during training. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance for both source separation and source localization, particularly in high levels of background noise.
summary: Given a multi-microphone recording of an unknown number of speakers talking concurrently, we simultaneously localize the sources and separate the individual speakers. At the core of our method is a deep network, in the waveform domain, which isolates sources within an angular region $θ\pm w/2$, given an angle of interest $θ$ and angular window size $w$. By exponentially decreasing $w$, we can perform a binary search to localize and separate all sources in logarithmic time. Our algorithm allows for an arbitrary number of potentially moving speakers at test time, including more speakers than seen during training. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance for both source separation and source localization, particularly in high levels of background noise.
abstract_zh: 考虑到未知数量的发言者同时讲话的多麦克风录音，我们同时定位源并分离各个发言者。我们方法的核心是波形域中的深层网络，在给定感兴趣角度 $θ$ 和角度窗口大小 $w$ 的情况下，它隔离角度区域 $θ\pm w/2$ 内的源。通过指数减少 $w$，我们可以执行二分搜索来在对数时间内定位和分离所有源。我们的算法允许在测试时使用任意数量的潜在移动扬声器，包括比训练期间看到的更多的扬声器。实验证明了源分离和源定位的最先进的性能，特别是在高背景噪声的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度网络的语音分离方法，通过定位声源角度实现多说话人分离。
AI.motivation: 解决多麦克风环境下未知数量说话人（含移动场景）的语音分离与定位问题，尤其在高噪声场景下提升分离效果。
AI.method: 设计波形域深度网络，根据目标角度θ和角度窗口w分离特定扇区声源，通过指数级缩小窗口进行二分查找定位所有声源。
AI.result: 在噪声环境下实现语音分离与定位的最先进性能，支持训练时未见的说话人数目和移动场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过角度约束与二分搜索实现高效分离，为复杂声学场景下的多说话人处理提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度网络的语音分离方法，通过定位声源角度实现多说话人分离。
motivation: 解决多麦克风环境下未知数量说话人（含移动场景）的语音分离与定位问题，尤其在高噪声场景下提升分离效果。
method: 设计波形域深度网络，根据目标角度θ和角度窗口w分离特定扇区声源，通过指数级缩小窗口进行二分查找定位所有声源。
result: 在噪声环境下实现语音分离与定位的最先进性能，支持训练时未见的说话人数目和移动场景。
conclusion: 该方法通过角度约束与二分搜索实现高效分离，为复杂声学场景下的多说话人处理提供了新思路。
search_text: The Cone of Silence: Speech Separation by Localization 沉默之锥：通过本地化进行语音分离 Given a multi-microphone recording of an unknown number of speakers talking concurrently, we simultaneously localize the sources and separate the individual speakers. At the core of our method is a deep network, in the waveform domain, which isolates sources within an angular region $θ\pm w/2$, given an angle of interest $θ$ and angular window size $w$. By exponentially decreasing $w$, we can perform a binary search to localize and separate all sources in logarithmic time. Our algorithm allows for an arbitrary number of potentially moving speakers at test time, including more speakers than seen during training. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance for both source separation and source localization, particularly in high levels of background noise. 考虑到未知数量的发言者同时讲话的多麦克风录音，我们同时定位源并分离各个发言者。我们方法的核心是波形域中的深层网络，在给定感兴趣角度 $θ$ 和角度窗口大小 $w$ 的情况下，它隔离角度区域 $θ\pm w/2$ 内的源。通过指数减少 $w$，我们可以执行二分搜索来在对数时间内定位和分离所有源。我们的算法允许在测试时使用任意数量的潜在移动扬声器，包括比训练期间看到的更多的扬声器。实验证明了源分离和源定位的最先进的性能，特别是在高背景噪声的情况下。 本文提出一种基于深度网络的语音分离方法，通过定位声源角度实现多说话人分离。 Teerapat Jenrungrot,Vivek Jayaram,Steve Seitz,Ira Kemelmacher-Shlizerman cs.SD,cs.AI

authors_text: Grady Booch,Francesco Fabiano,Lior Horesh,Kiran Kate,Jon Lenchner,Nick Linck,Andrea Loreggia,Keerthiram Murugesan,Nicholas Mattei,Francesca Rossi,Biplav Srivastava
title: Thinking Fast and Slow in AI
title_zh: 人工智能的快与慢思考
comment: ef:Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2021, 35(17), 15042-15046
comments: ef:Proceedings of the AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2021, 35(17), 15042-15046
abstract: This paper proposes a research direction to advance AI which draws inspiration from cognitive theories of human decision making. The premise is that if we gain insights about the causes of some human capabilities that are still lacking in AI (for instance, adaptability, generalizability, common sense, and causal reasoning), we may obtain similar capabilities in an AI system by embedding these causal components. We hope that the high-level description of our vision included in this paper, as well as the several research questions that we propose to consider, can stimulate the AI research community to define, try and evaluate new methodologies, frameworks, and evaluation metrics, in the spirit of achieving a better understanding of both human and machine intelligence.
summary: This paper proposes a research direction to advance AI which draws inspiration from cognitive theories of human decision making. The premise is that if we gain insights about the causes of some human capabilities that are still lacking in AI (for instance, adaptability, generalizability, common sense, and causal reasoning), we may obtain similar capabilities in an AI system by embedding these causal components. We hope that the high-level description of our vision included in this paper, as well as the several research questions that we propose to consider, can stimulate the AI research community to define, try and evaluate new methodologies, frameworks, and evaluation metrics, in the spirit of achieving a better understanding of both human and machine intelligence.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个推进人工智能的研究方向，该方向从人类决策的认知理论中汲取灵感。前提是，如果我们深入了解人工智能仍然缺乏的一些人类能力（例如适应性、普遍性、常识和因果推理）的原因，我们可以通过嵌入这些因果组件在人工智能系统中获得类似的能力。我们希望本文中对我们愿景的高层描述，以及我们建议考虑的几个研究问题，能够刺激人工智能研究界本着更好地理解人类和机器智能的精神，定义、尝试和评估新的方法、框架和评估指标。

AI.tldr: 提出一个研究方向，借鉴人类认知理论提升AI的适应性、泛化能力、常识和因果推理等能力
AI.motivation: 通过借鉴人类决策中的认知机制，解决AI在适应性、泛化能力、常识和因果推理等方面的不足
AI.method: 提出研究问题和方向，鼓励AI社区探索新方法、框架和评估指标，以模拟人类认知机制
AI.result: 未提供具体实验结果，但提出了未来研究的问题和方向，以促进AI领域的新方法和评估体系的发展
AI.conclusion: 呼吁AI研究社区通过理解人类和机器智能的共同点，推动AI系统在适应性、泛化能力、常识和因果推理等方面的进步

authors_text: Sanjay Subramanian,Lucy Lu Wang,Sachin Mehta,Ben Bogin,Madeleine van Zuylen,Sravanthi Parasa,Sameer Singh,Matt Gardner,Hannaneh Hajishirzi
title: MedICaT: A Dataset of Medical Images, Captions, and Textual References
title_zh: MedICaT：医学图像、标题和文本参考的数据集
abstract: Understanding the relationship between figures and text is key to scientific document understanding. Medical figures in particular are quite complex, often consisting of several subfigures (75% of figures in our dataset), with detailed text describing their content. Previous work studying figures in scientific papers focused on classifying figure content rather than understanding how images relate to the text. To address challenges in figure retrieval and figure-to-text alignment, we introduce MedICaT, a dataset of medical images in context. MedICaT consists of 217K images from 131K open access biomedical papers, and includes captions, inline references for 74% of figures, and manually annotated subfigures and subcaptions for a subset of figures. Using MedICaT, we introduce the task of subfigure to subcaption alignment in compound figures and demonstrate the utility of inline references in image-text matching. Our data and code can be accessed at https://github.com/allenai/medicat.
summary: Understanding the relationship between figures and text is key to scientific document understanding. Medical figures in particular are quite complex, often consisting of several subfigures (75% of figures in our dataset), with detailed text describing their content. Previous work studying figures in scientific papers focused on classifying figure content rather than understanding how images relate to the text. To address challenges in figure retrieval and figure-to-text alignment, we introduce MedICaT, a dataset of medical images in context. MedICaT consists of 217K images from 131K open access biomedical papers, and includes captions, inline references for 74% of figures, and manually annotated subfigures and subcaptions for a subset of figures. Using MedICaT, we introduce the task of subfigure to subcaption alignment in compound figures and demonstrate the utility of inline references in image-text matching. Our data and code can be accessed at https://github.com/allenai/medicat.
abstract_zh: 理解图形和文本之间的关系是理解科学文档的关键。医学数据尤其复杂，通常由多个子图（我们数据集中的 75% 的图）组成，并有详细的文本描述其内容。以前研究科学论文中的图形的工作重点是对图形内容进行分类，而不是理解图像与文本的关系。为了解决图形检索和图形到文本对齐方面的挑战，我们引入了 MedICaT，一个上下文中的医学图像数据集。 MedICaT 由来自 131K 开放获取生物医学论文的 217K 图像组成，包括标题、74% 的图形的内联参考以及手动注释的子图和部分图形的子标题。使用 MedICaT，我们介绍了复合图中子图到子标题对齐的任务，并演示了内联引用在图像文本匹配中的实用性。我们的数据和代码可以在 https://github.com/allenai/medicat 访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MedICaT数据集，用于解决医学图像与文本的对齐问题，包含217K医学图像及对应的标题、内联引用和子图标注。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注图表内容分类而非图像与文本的关系，而医学图表常包含复杂子图和详细描述，需解决图表检索和图文对齐的挑战。
AI.method: 构建包含131K篇开放获取生物医学论文中217K张图像的数据集，提供标题、74%的内联引用及部分手动标注的子图和子标题，引入子图-子标题对齐任务。
AI.result: 发布MedICaT数据集并演示子图对齐任务，验证内联引用在图像-文本匹配中的有效性，代码和数据开源。
AI.conclusion: MedICaT为医学图像与文本关系研究提供新资源，推动复杂图表理解及图文对齐技术的发展。

authors_text: Suman K. Bera,Lior Gishboliner,Yevgeny Levanzov,C. Seshadhri,Asaf Shapira
title: Counting Subgraphs in Degenerate Graphs
title_zh: 计算退化图中的子图
abstract: We consider the problem of counting the number of copies of a fixed graph $H$ within an input graph $G$. This is one of the most well-studied algorithmic graph problems, with many theoretical and practical applications. We focus on solving this problem when the input $G$ has bounded degeneracy. This is a rich family of graphs, containing all graphs without a fixed minor (e.g. planar graphs), as well as graphs generated by various random processes (e.g. preferential attachment graphs). We say that $H$ is easy if there is a linear-time algorithm for counting the number of copies of $H$ in an input $G$ of bounded degeneracy. A seminal result of Chiba and Nishizeki from '85 states that every $H$ on at most 4 vertices is easy. Bera, Pashanasangi, and Seshadhri recently extended this to all $H$ on 5 vertices, and further proved that for every $k > 5$ there is a $k$-vertex $H$ which is not easy. They left open the natural problem of characterizing all easy graphs $H$. Bressan has recently introduced a framework for counting subgraphs in degenerate graphs, from which one can extract a sufficient condition for a graph $H$ to be easy. Here we show that this sufficient condition is also necessary, thus fully answering the Bera--Pashanasangi--Seshadhri problem. We further resolve two closely related problems; namely characterizing the graphs that are easy with respect to counting induced copies, and with respect to counting homomorphisms.
summary: We consider the problem of counting the number of copies of a fixed graph $H$ within an input graph $G$. This is one of the most well-studied algorithmic graph problems, with many theoretical and practical applications. We focus on solving this problem when the input $G$ has bounded degeneracy. This is a rich family of graphs, containing all graphs without a fixed minor (e.g. planar graphs), as well as graphs generated by various random processes (e.g. preferential attachment graphs). We say that $H$ is easy if there is a linear-time algorithm for counting the number of copies of $H$ in an input $G$ of bounded degeneracy. A seminal result of Chiba and Nishizeki from '85 states that every $H$ on at most 4 vertices is easy. Bera, Pashanasangi, and Seshadhri recently extended this to all $H$ on 5 vertices, and further proved that for every $k > 5$ there is a $k$-vertex $H$ which is not easy. They left open the natural problem of characterizing all easy graphs $H$. Bressan has recently introduced a framework for counting subgraphs in degenerate graphs, from which one can extract a sufficient condition for a graph $H$ to be easy. Here we show that this sufficient condition is also necessary, thus fully answering the Bera--Pashanasangi--Seshadhri problem. We further resolve two closely related problems; namely characterizing the graphs that are easy with respect to counting induced copies, and with respect to counting homomorphisms.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑计算输入图 $G$ 内固定图 $H$ 的副本数量的问题。这是研究最深入的算法图问题之一，具有许多理论和实际应用。当输入 $G$ 具有有限简并性时，我们专注于解决这个问题。这是一个丰富的图族，包含所有没有固定次要图的图（例如平面图），以及由各种随机过程生成的图（例如优先附着图）。如果有一个线性时间算法来计算有界简并的输入 $G$ 中 $H$ 的副本数量，我们就说 $H$ 很容易。 Chiba 和 Nishizeki 在 85 年得出的一个开创性的结果表明，最多 4 个顶点上的每个 $H$ 都是容易的。 Bera、Pashanasangi 和 Seshadhri 最近将此扩展到 5 个顶点上的所有 $H$，并进一步证明对于每个 $k > 5$ 都有一个 $k$ 顶点 $H$，这并不容易。他们留下了表征所有简单图 $H$ 的自然问题。 Bressan 最近引入了一种用于计算退化图中子图的框架，从中可以轻松提取图 $H$ 的充分条件。这里我们证明这个充分条件也是必要的，从而完全回答了Bera--Pashanasangi--Seshadhri问题。我们进一步解决两个密切相关的问题；即描述在计算诱导拷贝和计算同态方面很容易的图。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有界度生成图中统计固定子图数量的问题，旨在刻画所有易于高效统计的子图结构。
AI.motivation: 统计子图数量是图算法中的核心问题，具有广泛的应用。对于有界度生成图（如平面图、偏好依附图），已有结果表明顶点数≤5的子图可线性时间统计，但更高顶点数的刻画仍为开放问题。
AI.method: 基于Bressan提出的子图计数框架，通过证明其充分条件的必要性，结合归纳法与图论分析，解决相关诱导子图与同态计数问题。
AI.result: 完全刻画了所有易于统计的子图H的条件，证明了Bressan框架的充分条件亦为必要条件，并解决了诱导子图与同态计数的刻画问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文解决了子图计数问题的长期开放问题，为有界度生成图的算法设计提供了理论依据，推动了图算法理论的发展。

search_text: Counting Subgraphs in Degenerate Graphs 计算退化图中的子图 We consider the problem of counting the number of copies of a fixed graph $H$ within an input graph $G$. This is one of the most well-studied algorithmic graph problems, with many theoretical and practical applications. We focus on solving this problem when the input $G$ has bounded degeneracy. This is a rich family of graphs, containing all graphs without a fixed minor (e.g. planar graphs), as well as graphs generated by various random processes (e.g. preferential attachment graphs). We say that $H$ is easy if there is a linear-time algorithm for counting the number of copies of $H$ in an input $G$ of bounded degeneracy. A seminal result of Chiba and Nishizeki from '85 states that every $H$ on at most 4 vertices is easy. Bera, Pashanasangi, and Seshadhri recently extended this to all $H$ on 5 vertices, and further proved that for every $k > 5$ there is a $k$-vertex $H$ which is not easy. They left open the natural problem of characterizing all easy graphs $H$. Bressan has recently introduced a framework for counting subgraphs in degenerate graphs, from which one can extract a sufficient condition for a graph $H$ to be easy. Here we show that this sufficient condition is also necessary, thus fully answering the Bera--Pashanasangi--Seshadhri problem. We further resolve two closely related problems; namely characterizing the graphs that are easy with respect to counting induced copies, and with respect to counting homomorphisms. 我们考虑计算输入图 $G$ 内固定图 $H$ 的副本数量的问题。这是研究最深入的算法图问题之一，具有许多理论和实际应用。当输入 $G$ 具有有限简并性时，我们专注于解决这个问题。这是一个丰富的图族，包含所有没有固定次要图的图（例如平面图），以及由各种随机过程生成的图（例如优先附着图）。如果有一个线性时间算法来计算有界简并的输入 $G$ 中 $H$ 的副本数量，我们就说 $H$ 很容易。 Chiba 和 Nishizeki 在 85 年得出的一个开创性的结果表明，最多 4 个顶点上的每个 $H$ 都是容易的。 Bera、Pashanasangi 和 Seshadhri 最近将此扩展到 5 个顶点上的所有 $H$，并进一步证明对于每个 $k > 5$ 都有一个 $k$ 顶点 $H$，这并不容易。他们留下了表征所有简单图 $H$ 的自然问题。 Bressan 最近引入了一种用于计算退化图中子图的框架，从中可以轻松提取图 $H$ 的充分条件。这里我们证明这个充分条件也是必要的，从而完全回答了Bera--Pashanasangi--Seshadhri问题。我们进一步解决两个密切相关的问题；即描述在计算诱导拷贝和计算同态方面很容易的图。 本文研究在有界度生成图中统计固定子图数量的问题，旨在刻画所有易于高效统计的子图结构。 Suman K. Bera,Lior Gishboliner,Yevgeny Levanzov,C. Seshadhri,Asaf Shapira cs.CC,cs.DS,math.CO

title: Look It Up: Bilingual Dictionaries Improve Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 查一下：双语词典改善神经机器翻译
abstract: Despite advances in neural machine translation (NMT) quality, rare words continue to be problematic. For humans, the solution to the rare-word problem has long been dictionaries, but dictionaries cannot be straightforwardly incorporated into NMT. In this paper, we describe a new method for "attaching" dictionary definitions to rare words so that the network can learn the best way to use them. We demonstrate improvements of up to 1.8 BLEU using bilingual dictionaries.
summary: Despite advances in neural machine translation (NMT) quality, rare words continue to be problematic. For humans, the solution to the rare-word problem has long been dictionaries, but dictionaries cannot be straightforwardly incorporated into NMT. In this paper, we describe a new method for "attaching" dictionary definitions to rare words so that the network can learn the best way to use them. We demonstrate improvements of up to 1.8 BLEU using bilingual dictionaries.
abstract_zh: 尽管神经机器翻译 (NMT) 质量取得了进步，但罕见词仍然存在问题。对于人类来说，稀有词问题的解决方案早已是字典，但字典并不能直接纳入 NMT 中。在本文中，我们描述了一种将字典定义“附加”到稀有单词的新方法，以便网络可以学习使用它们的最佳方式。我们使用双语词典展示了高达 1.8 BLEU 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将双语词典整合到神经机器翻译（NMT）中的方法，以解决罕见词翻译问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经机器翻译质量提升，但罕见词仍难以准确翻译，而人类常用双语词典解决此问题，但传统方法无法直接应用于NMT。
AI.method: 通过将双语词典中的定义附加到罕见词上，使神经网络学习如何有效利用词典信息进行翻译。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用双语词典后，翻译质量（BLEU分数）最高提升1.8。
AI.conclusion: 双语词典可有效增强NMT对罕见词的处理能力，验证了外部知识整合的可行性。

authors_text: Min Du,Nesime Tatbul,Brian Rivers,Akhilesh Kumar Gupta,Lucas Hu,Wei Wang,Ryan Marcus,Shengtian Zhou,Insup Lee,Justin Gottschlich
title: A Skew-Sensitive Evaluation Framework for Imbalanced Data Classification
title_zh: 不平衡数据分类的倾斜敏感评估框架
comment: 17 pages, Data-centric Machine Learning Research (DMLR) Workshop at ICML 2023
comments: 17 pages, Data-centric Machine Learning Research (DMLR) Workshop at ICML 2023
abstract: Class distribution skews in imbalanced datasets may lead to models with prediction bias towards majority classes, making fair assessment of classifiers a challenging task. Metrics such as Balanced Accuracy are commonly used to evaluate a classifier's prediction performance under such scenarios. However, these metrics fall short when classes vary in importance. In this paper, we propose a simple and general-purpose evaluation framework for imbalanced data classification that is sensitive to arbitrary skews in class cardinalities and importances. Experiments with several state-of-the-art classifiers tested on real-world datasets from three different domains show the effectiveness of our framework - not only in evaluating and ranking classifiers, but also training them.
summary: Class distribution skews in imbalanced datasets may lead to models with prediction bias towards majority classes, making fair assessment of classifiers a challenging task. Metrics such as Balanced Accuracy are commonly used to evaluate a classifier's prediction performance under such scenarios. However, these metrics fall short when classes vary in importance. In this paper, we propose a simple and general-purpose evaluation framework for imbalanced data classification that is sensitive to arbitrary skews in class cardinalities and importances. Experiments with several state-of-the-art classifiers tested on real-world datasets from three different domains show the effectiveness of our framework - not only in evaluating and ranking classifiers, but also training them.
abstract_zh: 不平衡数据集中的类分布偏差可能会导致模型对大多数类产生预测偏差，从而使分类器的公平评估成为一项具有挑战性的任务。平衡精度等指标通常用于评估此类场景下分类器的预测性能。然而，当类别的重要性不同时，这些指标就会显得不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于不平衡数据分类的简单且通用的评估框架，该框架对类基数和重要性的任意偏差敏感。在来自三个不同领域的真实数据集上测试的几个最先进的分类器的实验表明了我们框架的有效性 - 不仅在评估和排名分类器方面，而且在训练它们方面。

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对不平衡数据分类的偏斜敏感评估框架，以解决类别分布偏斜导致的模型预测偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标在处理类别重要性差异时存在不足，需更通用的框架以公平评估分类器性能。
AI.method: 提出一个简单通用的评估框架，能够敏感处理类别数量和重要性的任意偏斜，适用于不同领域数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能有效评估和排序分类器，并提升其训练效果，适用于多个领域的真实数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了不平衡数据分类的评估难题，具有广泛的适用性和实用性。

title: Vulgaris: Analysis of a Corpus for Middle-Age Varieties of Italian Language
title_zh: Vulgaris：中世纪意大利语语料库分析
abstract: Italian is a Romance language that has its roots in Vulgar Latin. The birth of the modern Italian started in Tuscany around the 14th century, and it is mainly attributed to the works of Dante Alighieri, Francesco Petrarca and Giovanni Boccaccio, who are among the most acclaimed authors of the medieval age in Tuscany. However, Italy has been characterized by a high variety of dialects, which are often loosely related to each other, due to the past fragmentation of the territory. Italian has absorbed influences from many of these dialects, as also from other languages due to dominion of portions of the country by other nations, such as Spain and France. In this work we present Vulgaris, a project aimed at studying a corpus of Italian textual resources from authors of different regions, ranging in a time period between 1200 and 1600. Each composition is associated to its author, and authors are also grouped in families, i.e. sharing similar stylistic/chronological characteristics. Hence, the dataset is not only a valuable resource for studying the diachronic evolution of Italian and the differences between its dialects, but it is also useful to investigate stylistic aspects between single authors. We provide a detailed statistical analysis of the data, and a corpus-driven study in dialectology and diachronic varieties.
summary: Italian is a Romance language that has its roots in Vulgar Latin. The birth of the modern Italian started in Tuscany around the 14th century, and it is mainly attributed to the works of Dante Alighieri, Francesco Petrarca and Giovanni Boccaccio, who are among the most acclaimed authors of the medieval age in Tuscany. However, Italy has been characterized by a high variety of dialects, which are often loosely related to each other, due to the past fragmentation of the territory. Italian has absorbed influences from many of these dialects, as also from other languages due to dominion of portions of the country by other nations, such as Spain and France. In this work we present Vulgaris, a project aimed at studying a corpus of Italian textual resources from authors of different regions, ranging in a time period between 1200 and 1600. Each composition is associated to its author, and authors are also grouped in families, i.e. sharing similar stylistic/chronological characteristics. Hence, the dataset is not only a valuable resource for studying the diachronic evolution of Italian and the differences between its dialects, but it is also useful to investigate stylistic aspects between single authors. We provide a detailed statistical analysis of the data, and a corpus-driven study in dialectology and diachronic varieties.
abstract_zh: 意大利语是一种罗曼语言，其根源在于通俗拉丁语。现代意大利语的诞生始于14世纪左右的托斯卡纳，主要归功于但丁·阿利吉耶里、弗朗切斯科·佩特拉卡和乔瓦尼·薄伽丘的作品，他们是托斯卡纳中世纪最受赞誉的作家之一。然而，意大利的特点是方言种类繁多，由于过去领土的分裂，这些方言往往彼此松散相关。意大利语吸收了许多这些方言的影响，由于西班牙和法国等其他国家对该国部分地区的统治，意大利语也吸收了其他语言的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Vulgaris，一个旨在研究来自不同地区作者的意大利语文本资源语料库，时间范围在 1200 年到 1600 年之间。每个作品都与其作者相关，并且作者也按家族分组，即具有相似的风格/时间顺序特征。因此，该数据集不仅是研究意大利语历时演变及其方言之间差异的宝贵资源，而且对于研究单个作者之间的文体方面也很有用。我们提供详细的数据统计分析，以及方言学和历时变体的语料库驱动研究。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Vulgaris项目，旨在通过分析13至17世纪意大利不同地区作者的文本语料库，研究中古意大利语的方言差异和语言演变。
AI.motivation: 意大利语因历史地域分裂和外部语言影响呈现高度方言多样性，需通过系统性语料分析探索其历时演变及作者风格差异。
AI.method: 收集1200-1600年间意大利各地作者文本，按作者风格和年代分组，进行统计分析及方言学与历时语言学的语料驱动研究。
AI.result: 提供了详细的统计数据，揭示了意大利语方言差异、作者风格特征及语言演变规律，为后续研究提供重要语料资源。
AI.conclusion: Vulgaris语料库为研究意大利语历时发展和方言多样性提供了基础，同时支持作者风格对比分析，具有重要学术价值。

search_text: Vulgaris: Analysis of a Corpus for Middle-Age Varieties of Italian Language Vulgaris：中世纪意大利语语料库分析 Italian is a Romance language that has its roots in Vulgar Latin. The birth of the modern Italian started in Tuscany around the 14th century, and it is mainly attributed to the works of Dante Alighieri, Francesco Petrarca and Giovanni Boccaccio, who are among the most acclaimed authors of the medieval age in Tuscany. However, Italy has been characterized by a high variety of dialects, which are often loosely related to each other, due to the past fragmentation of the territory. Italian has absorbed influences from many of these dialects, as also from other languages due to dominion of portions of the country by other nations, such as Spain and France. In this work we present Vulgaris, a project aimed at studying a corpus of Italian textual resources from authors of different regions, ranging in a time period between 1200 and 1600. Each composition is associated to its author, and authors are also grouped in families, i.e. sharing similar stylistic/chronological characteristics. Hence, the dataset is not only a valuable resource for studying the diachronic evolution of Italian and the differences between its dialects, but it is also useful to investigate stylistic aspects between single authors. We provide a detailed statistical analysis of the data, and a corpus-driven study in dialectology and diachronic varieties. 意大利语是一种罗曼语言，其根源在于通俗拉丁语。现代意大利语的诞生始于14世纪左右的托斯卡纳，主要归功于但丁·阿利吉耶里、弗朗切斯科·佩特拉卡和乔瓦尼·薄伽丘的作品，他们是托斯卡纳中世纪最受赞誉的作家之一。然而，意大利的特点是方言种类繁多，由于过去领土的分裂，这些方言往往彼此松散相关。意大利语吸收了许多这些方言的影响，由于西班牙和法国等其他国家对该国部分地区的统治，意大利语也吸收了其他语言的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Vulgaris，一个旨在研究来自不同地区作者的意大利语文本资源语料库，时间范围在 1200 年到 1600 年之间。每个作品都与其作者相关，并且作者也按家族分组，即具有相似的风格/时间顺序特征。因此，该数据集不仅是研究意大利语历时演变及其方言之间差异的宝贵资源，而且对于研究单个作者之间的文体方面也很有用。我们提供详细的数据统计分析，以及方言学和历时变体的语料库驱动研究。 本文介绍了Vulgaris项目，旨在通过分析13至17世纪意大利不同地区作者的文本语料库，研究中古意大利语的方言差异和语言演变。 Andrea Zugarini,Matteo Tiezzi,Marco Maggini cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jordan J. Bird,Anikó Ekárt,Diego R. Faria
title: Chatbot Interaction with Artificial Intelligence: Human Data Augmentation with T5 and Language Transformer Ensemble for Text Classification
title_zh: 聊天机器人与人工智能的交互：使用 T5 和语言转换器集成进行人类数据增强以进行文本分类
abstract: In this work, we present the Chatbot Interaction with Artificial Intelligence (CI-AI) framework as an approach to the training of deep learning chatbots for task classification. The intelligent system augments human-sourced data via artificial paraphrasing in order to generate a large set of training data for further classical, attention, and language transformation-based learning approaches for Natural Language Processing. Human beings are asked to paraphrase commands and questions for task identification for further execution of a machine. The commands and questions are split into training and validation sets. A total of 483 responses were recorded. Secondly, the training set is paraphrased by the T5 model in order to augment it with further data. Seven state-of-the-art transformer-based text classification algorithms (BERT, DistilBERT, RoBERTa, DistilRoBERTa, XLM, XLM-RoBERTa, and XLNet) are benchmarked for both sets after fine-tuning on the training data for two epochs. We find that all models are improved when training data is augmented by the T5 model, with an average increase of classification accuracy by 4.01%. The best result was the RoBERTa model trained on T5 augmented data which achieved 98.96% classification accuracy. Finally, we found that an ensemble of the five best-performing transformer models via Logistic Regression of output label predictions led to an accuracy of 99.59% on the dataset of human responses. A highly-performing model allows the intelligent system to interpret human commands at the social-interaction level through a chatbot-like interface (e.g. "Robot, can we have a conversation?") and allows for better accessibility to AI by non-technical users.
summary: In this work, we present the Chatbot Interaction with Artificial Intelligence (CI-AI) framework as an approach to the training of deep learning chatbots for task classification. The intelligent system augments human-sourced data via artificial paraphrasing in order to generate a large set of training data for further classical, attention, and language transformation-based learning approaches for Natural Language Processing. Human beings are asked to paraphrase commands and questions for task identification for further execution of a machine. The commands and questions are split into training and validation sets. A total of 483 responses were recorded. Secondly, the training set is paraphrased by the T5 model in order to augment it with further data. Seven state-of-the-art transformer-based text classification algorithms (BERT, DistilBERT, RoBERTa, DistilRoBERTa, XLM, XLM-RoBERTa, and XLNet) are benchmarked for both sets after fine-tuning on the training data for two epochs. We find that all models are improved when training data is augmented by the T5 model, with an average increase of classification accuracy by 4.01%. The best result was the RoBERTa model trained on T5 augmented data which achieved 98.96% classification accuracy. Finally, we found that an ensemble of the five best-performing transformer models via Logistic Regression of output label predictions led to an accuracy of 99.59% on the dataset of human responses. A highly-performing model allows the intelligent system to interpret human commands at the social-interaction level through a chatbot-like interface (e.g. "Robot, can we have a conversation?") and allows for better accessibility to AI by non-technical users.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了聊天机器人与人工智能交互（CI-AI）框架，作为训练深度学习聊天机器人进行任务分类的方法。该智能系统通过人工释义增强人类来源的数据，以便生成大量训练数据，用于进一步的经典、注意力和基于语言转换的自然语言处理学习方法。人类被要求解释任务识别的命令和问题，以便进一步执行机器。命令和问题分为训练集和验证集。总共记录了 483 条回复。其次，训练集由 T5 模型解释，以便用更多数据对其进行扩充。在对两个 epoch 的训练数据进行微调后，对这两个集合的七种最先进的基于 Transformer 的文本分类算法（BERT、DistilBERT、RoBERTa、DistilRoBERTa、XLM、XLM-RoBERTa 和 XLNet）进行了基准测试。我们发现，当通过 T5 模型增强训练数据时，所有模型都得到了改进，分类准确率平均提高了 4.01%。最好的结果是在 T5 增强数据上训练的 RoBERTa 模型，分类准确率达到 98.96%。最后，我们发现，通过输出标签预测的逻辑回归，五个性能最佳的 Transformer 模型的集合使得人类响应数据集的准确率达到 99.59%。高性能模型允许智能系统通过类似聊天机器人的界面在社交互动层面解释人类命令（例如“机器人，我们可以交谈一下吗？”），并允许非技术用户更好地访问人工智能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CI-AI框架，通过人类数据增强与T5模型生成训练数据，结合多种Transformer模型进行文本分类任务，提升聊天机器人对人类指令的识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习聊天机器人受限于训练数据量不足，难以准确理解复杂的人类指令，需通过数据增强和模型优化提升分类性能。
AI.method: 收集人类对指令的重述数据（483条），使用T5模型进行数据增强，对比BERT、RoBERTa等7种Transformer模型，并通过逻辑回归集成效果最佳的5个模型。
AI.result: T5增强后所有模型分类准确率平均提升4.01%，RoBERTa达到98.96%；集成模型在人类响应数据集上达到99.59%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强与模型集成显著提升聊天机器人指令识别能力，使非技术用户更便捷地通过自然语言交互访问AI系统。

authors_text: Leonel Merino,Magdalena Schwarzl,Matthias Kraus,Michael Sedlmair,Dieter Schmalstieg,Daniel Weiskopf
title: Evaluating Mixed and Augmented Reality: A Systematic Literature Review (2009-2019)
title_zh: 评估混合现实和增强现实：系统文献综述（2009-2019）
abstract: We present a systematic review of 458 papers that report on evaluations in mixed and augmented reality (MR/AR) published in ISMAR, CHI, IEEE VR, and UIST over a span of 11 years (2009-2019). Our goal is to provide guidance for future evaluations of MR/AR approaches. To this end, we characterize publications by paper type (e.g., technique, design study), research topic (e.g., tracking, rendering), evaluation scenario (e.g., algorithm performance, user performance), cognitive aspects (e.g., perception, emotion), and the context in which evaluations were conducted (e.g., lab vs. in-the-wild). We found a strong coupling of types, topics, and scenarios. We observe two groups: (a) technology-centric performance evaluations of algorithms that focus on improving tracking, displays, reconstruction, rendering, and calibration, and (b) human-centric studies that analyze implications of applications and design, human factors on perception, usability, decision making, emotion, and attention. Amongst the 458 papers, we identified 248 user studies that involved 5,761 participants in total, of whom only 1,619 were identified as female. We identified 43 data collection methods used to analyze 10 cognitive aspects. We found nine objective methods, and eight methods that support qualitative analysis. A majority (216/248) of user studies are conducted in a laboratory setting. Often (138/248), such studies involve participants in a static way. However, we also found a fair number (30/248) of in-the-wild studies that involve participants in a mobile fashion. We consider this paper to be relevant to academia and industry alike in presenting the state-of-the-art and guiding the steps to designing, conducting, and analyzing results of evaluations in MR/AR.

We observe two groups: (a) technology-centric performance evaluations of algorithms that focus on improving tracking, displays, reconstruction, rendering, and calibration, and (b) human-centric studies that analyze implications of applications and design, human factors on perception, usability, decision making, emotion, and attention. Amongst the 458 papers, we identified 248 user studies that involved 5,761 participants in total, of whom only 1,619 were identified as female. We identified 43 data collection methods used to analyze 10 cognitive aspects. We found nine objective methods, and eight methods that support qualitative analysis. A majority (216/248) of user studies are conducted in a laboratory setting. Often (138/248), such studies involve participants in a static way. However, we also found a fair number (30/248) of in-the-wild studies that involve participants in a mobile fashion. We consider this paper to be relevant to academia and industry alike in presenting the state-of-the-art and guiding the steps to designing, conducting, and analyzing results of evaluations in MR/AR.
abstract_zh: 我们对 11 年（2009-2019 年）期间在 ISMAR、CHI、IEEE VR 和 UIST 上发表的 458 篇论文进行了系统回顾，这些论文报告了混合和增强现实 (MR/AR) 的评估。我们的目标是为 MR/AR 方法的未来评估提供指导。为此，我们通过论文类型（例如，技术、设计研究）、研究主题（例如，跟踪、渲染）、评估场景（例如，算法性能、用户性能）、认知方面（例如，感知、情感）以及进行评估的环境（例如，实验室与野外）来描述出版物的特征。我们发现类型、主题和场景之间存在很强的耦合性。我们观察两组：（a）以技术为中心的算法性能评估，重点关注改进跟踪、显示、重建、渲染和校准；（b）以人为中心的研究，分析应用和设计的影响、人为因素对感知、可用性、决策、情感和注意力的影响。在 458 篇论文中，我们确定了 248 篇用户研究，总共涉及 5,761 名参与者，其中只有 1,619 名参与者是女性。我们确定了 43 种数据收集方法，用于分析 10 个认知方面。我们发现了九种客观方法和八种支持定性分析的方法。大多数（216/248）用户研究是在实验室环境中进行的。通常（138/248），此类研究以静态方式涉及参与者。然而，我们还发现相当数量（30/248）的野外研究涉及移动时尚的参与者。我们认为本文在介绍最先进的技术并指导 MR/AR 评估结果的设计、实施和分析步骤方面与学术界和工业界相关。

AI.tldr: 本文对2009至2019年间发表在ISMAR、CHI等会议上的458篇混合现实与增强现实（MR/AR）评估论文进行系统性综述，旨在为未来MR/AR方法的评估提供指导。
AI.motivation: 现有MR/AR研究缺乏系统性的评估方法指导，需通过梳理文献明确技术发展现状与研究趋势，为学术界和工业界提供参考框架。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，按论文类型、研究主题、评估场景、认知维度及实验环境等维度对458篇论文进行分类分析，并统计用户研究数据与方法。
AI.result: 发现两类研究主导：技术导向的算法性能评估与以人为中心的应用分析；248项用户研究中仅1619人为女性，多数（216项）在实验室进行且参与者静态化，仅30项为实地移动研究。
AI.conclusion: 本文总结了MR/AR评估现状与方法论，指出需加强实地研究与多样化数据收集方法，为后续研究设计与分析提供系统性参考。

search_text: Evaluating Mixed and Augmented Reality: A Systematic Literature Review (2009-2019) 评估混合现实和增强现实：系统文献综述（2009-2019） We present a systematic review of 458 papers that report on evaluations in mixed and augmented reality (MR/AR) published in ISMAR, CHI, IEEE VR, and UIST over a span of 11 years (2009-2019). Our goal is to provide guidance for future evaluations of MR/AR approaches. To this end, we characterize publications by paper type (e.g., technique, design study), research topic (e.g., tracking, rendering), evaluation scenario (e.g., algorithm performance, user performance), cognitive aspects (e.g., perception, emotion), and the context in which evaluations were conducted (e.g., lab vs. in-the-wild). We found a strong coupling of types, topics, and scenarios. We observe two groups: (a) technology-centric performance evaluations of algorithms that focus on improving tracking, displays, reconstruction, rendering, and calibration, and (b) human-centric studies that analyze implications of applications and design, human factors on perception, usability, decision making, emotion, and attention. Amongst the 458 papers, we identified 248 user studies that involved 5,761 participants in total, of whom only 1,619 were identified as female. We identified 43 data collection methods used to analyze 10 cognitive aspects. We found nine objective methods, and eight methods that support qualitative analysis. A majority (216/248) of user studies are conducted in a laboratory setting. Often (138/248), such studies involve participants in a static way. However, we also found a fair number (30/248) of in-the-wild studies that involve participants in a mobile fashion. We consider this paper to be relevant to academia and industry alike in presenting the state-of-the-art and guiding the steps to designing, conducting, and analyzing results of evaluations in MR/AR. 我们对 11 年（2009-2019 年）期间在 ISMAR、CHI、IEEE VR 和 UIST 上发表的 458 篇论文进行了系统回顾，这些论文报告了混合和增强现实 (MR/AR) 的评估。我们的目标是为 MR/AR 方法的未来评估提供指导。为此，我们通过论文类型（例如，技术、设计研究）、研究主题（例如，跟踪、渲染）、评估场景（例如，算法性能、用户性能）、认知方面（例如，感知、情感）以及进行评估的环境（例如，实验室与野外）来描述出版物的特征。我们发现类型、主题和场景之间存在很强的耦合性。我们观察两组：（a）以技术为中心的算法性能评估，重点关注改进跟踪、显示、重建、渲染和校准；（b）以人为中心的研究，分析应用和设计的影响、人为因素对感知、可用性、决策、情感和注意力的影响。在 458 篇论文中，我们确定了 248 篇用户研究，总共涉及 5,761 名参与者，其中只有 1,619 名参与者是女性。我们确定了 43 种数据收集方法，用于分析 10 个认知方面。我们发现了九种客观方法和八种支持定性分析的方法。大多数（216/248）用户研究是在实验室环境中进行的。通常（138/248），此类研究以静态方式涉及参与者。然而，我们还发现相当数量（30/248）的野外研究涉及移动时尚的参与者。我们认为本文在介绍最先进的技术并指导 MR/AR 评估结果的设计、实施和分析步骤方面与学术界和工业界相关。 本文对2009至2019年间发表在ISMAR、CHI等会议上的458篇混合现实与增强现实（MR/AR）评估论文进行系统性综述，旨在为未来MR/AR方法的评估提供指导。 Leonel Merino,Magdalena Schwarzl,Matthias Kraus,Michael Sedlmair,Dieter Schmalstieg,Daniel Weiskopf cs.HC

title: NEMO: Frequentist Inference Approach to Constrained Linguistic Typology Feature Prediction in SIGTYP 2020 Shared Task
title_zh: NEMO：SIGTYP 2020 共享任务中约束语言类型学特征预测的频率推理方法
comment: To appear in Second Workshop on Computational Research in Linguistic Typology (SIGTYP 2020) at 2020 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)
comments: To appear in Second Workshop on Computational Research in Linguistic Typology (SIGTYP 2020) at 2020 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)
abstract: This paper describes the NEMO submission to SIGTYP 2020 shared task which deals with prediction of linguistic typological features for multiple languages using the data derived from World Atlas of Language Structures (WALS). We employ frequentist inference to represent correlations between typological features and use this representation to train simple multi-class estimators that predict individual features. We describe two submitted ridge regression-based configurations which ranked second and third overall in the constrained task. Our best configuration achieved the micro-averaged accuracy score of 0.66 on 149 test languages.
summary: This paper describes the NEMO submission to SIGTYP 2020 shared task which deals with prediction of linguistic typological features for multiple languages using the data derived from World Atlas of Language Structures (WALS). We employ frequentist inference to represent correlations between typological features and use this representation to train simple multi-class estimators that predict individual features. We describe two submitted ridge regression-based configurations which ranked second and third overall in the constrained task. Our best configuration achieved the micro-averaged accuracy score of 0.66 on 149 test languages.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 NEMO 向 SIGTYP 2020 共享任务提交的内容，该任务使用从世界语言结构地图集 (WALS) 导出的数据来预测多种语言的语言类型特征。我们采用频率推理来表示类型特征之间的相关性，并使用这种表示来训练预测单个特征的简单多类估计器。我们描述了两个提交的基于岭回归的配置，它们在约束任务中总体排名第二和第三。我们的最佳配置在 149 种测试语言上获得了 0.66 的微平均准确度得分。

AI.tldr: 该论文描述了NEMO系统在SIGTYP 2020共享任务中使用频率主义推断方法预测多语言类型学特征的方案。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理语言类型学特征预测任务时存在约束条件下的性能不足问题，需探索更有效的建模方式。
AI.method: 基于频率主义推断建模特征相关性，采用岭回归训练多类分类器，并提交两种配置参与评估。
AI.result: 两种岭回归配置在约束任务中分别排名第二和第三，最佳配置在149种测试语言上达到0.66微平均准确率。
AI.conclusion: 频率主义方法在约束条件下表现优异，未来可进一步优化模型结构和特征选择策略。
