title: An Extension of the Birkhoff-von Neumann Theorem to Non-Bipartite Graphs
title_zh: Birkhoff-von Neumann 定理对非二分图的推广
abstract: We prove that a fractional perfect matching in a non-bipartite graph can be written, in polynomial time, as a convex combination of perfect matchings. This extends the Birkhoff-von Neumann Theorem from bipartite to non-bipartite graphs. The algorithm of Birkhoff and von Neumann is greedy; it starts with the given fractional perfect matching and successively "removes" from it perfect matchings, with appropriate coefficients. This fails in non-bipartite graphs -- removing perfect matchings arbitrarily can lead to a graph that is non-empty but has no perfect matchings. Using odd cuts appropriately saves the day.
summary: We prove that a fractional perfect matching in a non-bipartite graph can be written, in polynomial time, as a convex combination of perfect matchings. This extends the Birkhoff-von Neumann Theorem from bipartite to non-bipartite graphs. The algorithm of Birkhoff and von Neumann is greedy; it starts with the given fractional perfect matching and successively "removes" from it perfect matchings, with appropriate coefficients. This fails in non-bipartite graphs -- removing perfect matchings arbitrarily can lead to a graph that is non-empty but has no perfect matchings. Using odd cuts appropriately saves the day.
abstract_zh: 我们证明非二分图中的分数完美匹配可以在多项式时间内写成完美匹配的凸组合。这将伯克霍夫-冯·诺依曼定理从二分图扩展到非二分图。 Birkhoff和von Neumann的算法是贪心的；它从给定的分数完美匹配开始，并使用适当的系数连续从中“删除”完美匹配。这在非二分图中会失败——任意删除完美匹配可能会导致图非空但没有完美匹配。适当地使用奇数切割可以挽救局面。

AI.tldr: 本文将Birkhoff-von Neumann定理从二分图扩展到非二分图，证明分数完美匹配可表示为完美匹配的凸组合，并提出多项式时间算法。
AI.motivation: 经典Birkhoff-von Neumann定理仅适用于二分图，而实际问题中非二分图的处理需求促使需要扩展该定理以解决更广泛的问题。
AI.method: 通过改进贪心算法，利用奇数割避免移除完美匹配后导致无解的情况，确保分解过程的有效性。
AI.result: 成功证明非二分图的分数完美匹配可分解为完美匹配的凸组合，并提供多项式时间实现方法。
AI.conclusion: 该成果扩展了经典定理的适用范围，为非二分图的匹配问题提供了理论支持和算法工具。

method: 通过改进贪心算法，利用奇数割避免移除完美匹配后导致无解的情况，确保分解过程的有效性。
result: 成功证明非二分图的分数完美匹配可分解为完美匹配的凸组合，并提供多项式时间实现方法。
conclusion: 该成果扩展了经典定理的适用范围，为非二分图的匹配问题提供了理论支持和算法工具。
search_text: An Extension of the Birkhoff-von Neumann Theorem to Non-Bipartite Graphs Birkhoff-von Neumann 定理对非二分图的推广 We prove that a fractional perfect matching in a non-bipartite graph can be written, in polynomial time, as a convex combination of perfect matchings. This extends the Birkhoff-von Neumann Theorem from bipartite to non-bipartite graphs. The algorithm of Birkhoff and von Neumann is greedy; it starts with the given fractional perfect matching and successively "removes" from it perfect matchings, with appropriate coefficients. This fails in non-bipartite graphs -- removing perfect matchings arbitrarily can lead to a graph that is non-empty but has no perfect matchings. Using odd cuts appropriately saves the day. 我们证明非二分图中的分数完美匹配可以在多项式时间内写成完美匹配的凸组合。这将伯克霍夫-冯·诺依曼定理从二分图扩展到非二分图。 Birkhoff和von Neumann的算法是贪心的；它从给定的分数完美匹配开始，并使用适当的系数连续从中“删除”完美匹配。这在非二分图中会失败——任意删除完美匹配可能会导致图非空但没有完美匹配。适当地使用奇数切割可以挽救局面。 本文将Birkhoff-von Neumann定理从二分图扩展到非二分图，证明分数完美匹配可表示为完美匹配的凸组合，并提出多项式时间算法。 Vijay V. Vazirani cs.DS,econ.TH

authors_text: Gaojie Jin,Xinping Yi,Liang Zhang,Lijun Zhang,Sven Schewe,Xiaowei Huang
title: How does Weight Correlation Affect the Generalisation Ability of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 权重相关性如何影响深度神经网络的泛化能力
abstract: This paper studies the novel concept of weight correlation in deep neural networks and discusses its impact on the networks' generalisation ability. For fully-connected layers, the weight correlation is defined as the average cosine similarity between weight vectors of neurons, and for convolutional layers, the weight correlation is defined as the cosine similarity between filter matrices. Theoretically, we show that, weight correlation can, and should, be incorporated into the PAC Bayesian framework for the generalisation of neural networks, and the resulting generalisation bound is monotonic with respect to the weight correlation. We formulate a new complexity measure, which lifts the PAC Bayes measure with weight correlation, and experimentally confirm that it is able to rank the generalisation errors of a set of networks more precisely than existing measures. More importantly, we develop a new regulariser for training, and provide extensive experiments that show that the generalisation error can be greatly reduced with our novel approach.
summary: This paper studies the novel concept of weight correlation in deep neural networks and discusses its impact on the networks' generalisation ability. For fully-connected layers, the weight correlation is defined as the average cosine similarity between weight vectors of neurons, and for convolutional layers, the weight correlation is defined as the cosine similarity between filter matrices. Theoretically, we show that, weight correlation can, and should, be incorporated into the PAC Bayesian framework for the generalisation of neural networks, and the resulting generalisation bound is monotonic with respect to the weight correlation. We formulate a new complexity measure, which lifts the PAC Bayes measure with weight correlation, and experimentally confirm that it is able to rank the generalisation errors of a set of networks more precisely than existing measures. More importantly, we develop a new regulariser for training, and provide extensive experiments that show that the generalisation error can be greatly reduced with our novel approach.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了深度神经网络中权重相关性的新概念，并讨论了它对网络泛化能力的影响。对于全连接层，权重相关性定义为神经元权重向量之间的平均余弦相似度，对于卷积层，权重相关性定义为滤波器矩阵之间的余弦相似度。从理论上讲，我们表明，权重相关性可以而且应该被纳入用于神经网络泛化的 PAC 贝叶斯框架中，并且所得到的泛化界限相对于权重相关性是单调的。我们制定了一种新的复杂性度量，它通过权重相关性提升了 PAC 贝叶斯度量，并通过实验证实它能够比现有度量更精确地对一组网络的泛化误差进行排序。更重要的是，我们开发了一种新的训练正则化器，并提供了大量的实验，表明我们的新方法可以大大减少泛化误差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度神经网络中权重相关性对泛化能力的影响，并提出了一种新的正则化方法。
AI.motivation: 权重相关性在深度神经网络中可能影响其泛化能力，但尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 本文定义了全连接层和卷积层的权重相关性，并将其纳入PAC贝叶斯框架，提出了一种新的复杂度度量和正则化方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，新的复杂度度量能够更精确地排名网络的泛化误差，而新正则化方法显著降低了泛化误差。
AI.conclusion: 权重相关性对神经网络的泛化能力有重要影响，通过引入新的正则化方法可以有效提升泛化性能。

authors_text: Yingwei Li,Qihang Yu,Mingxing Tan,Jieru Mei,Peng Tang,Wei Shen,Alan Yuille,Cihang Xie
title: Shape-Texture Debiased Neural Network Training
title_zh: 形状-纹理去偏神经网络训练
comment: ICLR 2021. The code is available here: https://github.com/LiYingwei/ShapeTextureDebiasedTraining
comments: ICLR 2021. The code is available here: https://github.com/LiYingwei/ShapeTextureDebiasedTraining
abstract: Shape and texture are two prominent and complementary cues for recognizing objects. Nonetheless, Convolutional Neural Networks are often biased towards either texture or shape, depending on the training dataset. Our ablation shows that such bias degenerates model performance. Motivated by this observation, we develop a simple algorithm for shape-texture debiased learning. To prevent models from exclusively attending on a single cue in representation learning, we augment training data with images with conflicting shape and texture information (eg, an image of chimpanzee shape but with lemon texture) and, most importantly, provide the corresponding supervisions from shape and texture simultaneously. Experiments show that our method successfully improves model performance on several image recognition benchmarks and adversarial robustness. For example, by training on ImageNet, it helps ResNet-152 achieve substantial improvements on ImageNet (+1.2%), ImageNet-A (+5.2%), ImageNet-C (+8.3%) and Stylized-ImageNet (+11.1%), and on defending against FGSM adversarial attacker on ImageNet (+14.4%). Our method also claims to be compatible with other advanced data augmentation strategies, eg, Mixup, and CutMix. The code is available here: https://github.com/LiYingwei/ShapeTextureDebiasedTraining.
summary: Shape and texture are two prominent and complementary cues for recognizing objects. Nonetheless, Convolutional Neural Networks are often biased towards either texture or shape, depending on the training dataset. Our ablation shows that such bias degenerates model performance. Motivated by this observation, we develop a simple algorithm for shape-texture debiased learning. To prevent models from exclusively attending on a single cue in representation learning, we augment training data with images with conflicting shape and texture information (eg, an image of chimpanzee shape but with lemon texture) and, most importantly, provide the corresponding supervisions from shape and texture simultaneously. Experiments show that our method successfully improves model performance on several image recognition benchmarks and adversarial robustness. For example, by training on ImageNet, it helps ResNet-152 achieve substantial improvements on ImageNet (+1.2%), ImageNet-A (+5.2%), ImageNet-C (+8.3%) and Stylized-ImageNet (+11.1%), and on defending against FGSM adversarial attacker on ImageNet (+14.4%). Our method also claims to be compatible with other advanced data augmentation strategies, eg, Mixup, and CutMix. The code is available here: https://github.com/LiYingwei/ShapeTextureDebiasedTraining.
abstract_zh: 形状和纹理是识别物体的两个突出且互补的线索。尽管如此，卷积神经网络通常偏向于纹理或形状，具体取决于训练数据集。我们的消融表明这种偏差会降低模型性能。受这一观察的启发，我们开发了一种简单的形状纹理去偏学习算法。为了防止模型在表示学习中只关注单一提示，我们使用具有冲突的形状和纹理信息的图像（例如，黑猩猩形状但具有柠檬纹理的图像）来增强训练数据，最重要的是，同时提供来自形状和纹理的相应监督。实验表明，我们的方法成功地提高了多个图像识别基准上的模型性能和对抗鲁棒性。例如，通过在 ImageNet 上进行训练，它帮助 ResNet-152 在 ImageNet (+1.2%)、ImageNet-A (+5.2%)、ImageNet-C (+8.3%) 和 Stylized-ImageNet (+11.1%) 以及在 ImageNet 上防御 FGSM 对抗攻击者 (+14.4%) 方面实现了实质性改进。我们的方法还声称与其他高级数据增强策略兼容，例如 Mixup 和 CutMix。代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/LiYingwei/ShapeTextureDebiasedTraining。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种减少卷积神经网络对形状和纹理偏差的训练方法，通过生成冲突形状-纹理图像并同步监督，提升模型性能和对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN在形状和纹理特征上存在偏差，导致模型性能下降，需开发去偏方法以提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 在训练数据中注入形状-纹理冲突图像（如黑猩猩形状配柠檬纹理），并同步提供形状和纹理监督信号，强制模型学习多线索表征。
AI.result: 在ImageNet等基准测试中，ResNet-152准确率提升1.2%-11.1%，对抗攻击防御提升14.4%，且兼容Mixup/CutMix等增强策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解形状-纹理偏差，提升模型鲁棒性，且具有良好的扩展性，为视觉模型训练提供新思路。

title: Signal classification using weighted orthogonal regression method
title_zh: 使用加权正交回归方法进行信号分类
abstract: In this paper, a new classifier based on the intrinsic properties of the data is proposed. Classification is an essential task in data mining-based applications. The classification problem will be challenging when the size of the training set is not sufficient to compare to the dimension of the problem. This paper proposes a new classification method that exploits the intrinsic structure of each class through the corresponding Eigen components. Each component contributes to the learned span of each class by specific weight. The weight is determined by the associated eigenvalue. This approach results in reliable learning robust in the case of facing a classification problem with limited training data. The proposed method involves the obtained Eigenvectors by SVD of data from each class to select the bases for each subspace. Moreover, it considers an efficient weighting for the decision-making criterion to discriminate two classes. In addition to high performance on artificial data, this method has increased the best result of international competition.
summary: In this paper, a new classifier based on the intrinsic properties of the data is proposed. Classification is an essential task in data mining-based applications. The classification problem will be challenging when the size of the training set is not sufficient to compare to the dimension of the problem. This paper proposes a new classification method that exploits the intrinsic structure of each class through the corresponding Eigen components. Each component contributes to the learned span of each class by specific weight. The weight is determined by the associated eigenvalue. This approach results in reliable learning robust in the case of facing a classification problem with limited training data. The proposed method involves the obtained Eigenvectors by SVD of data from each class to select the bases for each subspace. Moreover, it considers an efficient weighting for the decision-making criterion to discriminate two classes. In addition to high performance on artificial data, this method has increased the best result of international competition.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于数据内在属性的新分类器。分类是基于数据挖掘的应用程序中的一项重要任务。当训练集的大小不足以与问题的维度进行比较时，分类问题将具有挑战性。本文提出了一种新的分类方法，通过相应的特征分量来利用每个类别的内在结构。每个组件都按特定权重对每个类别的学习范围做出贡献。权重由相关的特征值确定。在面对训练数据有限的分类问题时，这种方法可以实现可靠的鲁棒学习。所提出的方法涉及通过对每个类的数据进行 SVD 获得的特征向量来选择每个子空间的基数。此外，它考虑了区分两个类别的决策标准的有效权重。该方法除了在人工数据上表现出色外，还增加了国际比赛的最佳成绩。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据内在特性的新分类器，通过利用每个类别的特征向量和权重提高分类性能。
AI.motivation: 当训练集规模不足以应对问题维度时，分类任务面临挑战，需通过挖掘数据内在结构提升有限数据下的分类可靠性。
AI.method: 通过SVD分解各类别数据获取特征向量，结合特征值确定权重，构建子空间并采用加权决策准则进行分类。
AI.result: 该方法在人工数据集上表现优异，并在国际竞赛中取得最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效利用数据内在结构和权重分配，在有限训练数据场景下实现了稳健且高性能的分类。

search_text: Signal classification using weighted orthogonal regression method 使用加权正交回归方法进行信号分类 In this paper, a new classifier based on the intrinsic properties of the data is proposed. Classification is an essential task in data mining-based applications. The classification problem will be challenging when the size of the training set is not sufficient to compare to the dimension of the problem. This paper proposes a new classification method that exploits the intrinsic structure of each class through the corresponding Eigen components. Each component contributes to the learned span of each class by specific weight. The weight is determined by the associated eigenvalue. This approach results in reliable learning robust in the case of facing a classification problem with limited training data. The proposed method involves the obtained Eigenvectors by SVD of data from each class to select the bases for each subspace. Moreover, it considers an efficient weighting for the decision-making criterion to discriminate two classes. In addition to high performance on artificial data, this method has increased the best result of international competition. 本文提出了一种基于数据内在属性的新分类器。分类是基于数据挖掘的应用程序中的一项重要任务。当训练集的大小不足以与问题的维度进行比较时，分类问题将具有挑战性。本文提出了一种新的分类方法，通过相应的特征分量来利用每个类别的内在结构。每个组件都按特定权重对每个类别的学习范围做出贡献。权重由相关的特征值确定。在面对训练数据有限的分类问题时，这种方法可以实现可靠的鲁棒学习。所提出的方法涉及通过对每个类的数据进行 SVD 获得的特征向量来选择每个子空间的基数。此外，它考虑了区分两个类别的决策标准的有效权重。该方法除了在人工数据上表现出色外，还增加了国际比赛的最佳成绩。 本文提出了一种基于数据内在特性的新分类器，通过利用每个类别的特征向量和权重提高分类性能。 Sahar Tavakoli cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Hannes Mueller,Andre Groger,Jonathan Hersh,Andrea Matranga,Joan Serrat
title: Monitoring War Destruction from Space: A Machine Learning Approach
title_zh: 从太空监控战争破坏：机器学习方法
abstract: Existing data on building destruction in conflict zones rely on eyewitness reports or manual detection, which makes it generally scarce, incomplete and potentially biased. This lack of reliable data imposes severe limitations for media reporting, humanitarian relief efforts, human rights monitoring, reconstruction initiatives, and academic studies of violent conflict. This article introduces an automated method of measuring destruction in high-resolution satellite images using deep learning techniques combined with data augmentation to expand training samples. We apply this method to the Syrian civil war and reconstruct the evolution of damage in major cities across the country. The approach allows generating destruction data with unprecedented scope, resolution, and frequency - only limited by the available satellite imagery - which can alleviate data limitations decisively.
summary: Existing data on building destruction in conflict zones rely on eyewitness reports or manual detection, which makes it generally scarce, incomplete and potentially biased. This lack of reliable data imposes severe limitations for media reporting, humanitarian relief efforts, human rights monitoring, reconstruction initiatives, and academic studies of violent conflict. This article introduces an automated method of measuring destruction in high-resolution satellite images using deep learning techniques combined with data augmentation to expand training samples. We apply this method to the Syrian civil war and reconstruct the evolution of damage in major cities across the country. The approach allows generating destruction data with unprecedented scope, resolution, and frequency - only limited by the available satellite imagery - which can alleviate data limitations decisively.
abstract_zh: 有关冲突地区建筑物被毁的现有数据依赖于目击者报告或人工检测，这使得数据普遍稀缺、不完整且可能存在偏见。可靠数据的缺乏严重限制了媒体报道、人道主义救援工作、人权监测、重建计划和暴力冲突的学术研究。本文介绍了一种利用深度学习技术结合数据增强来扩展训练样本来测量高分辨率卫星图像破坏的自动化方法。我们将这种方法应用到叙利亚内战中，重建了全国主要城市的破坏演变过程。该方法可以生成具有前所未有的范围、分辨率和频率的破坏数据（仅受可用卫星图像的限制），这可以决定性地缓解数据限制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习和数据增强的自动化方法，利用高分辨率卫星图像监测战争中的建筑破坏情况。
AI.motivation: 现有冲突地区建筑破坏数据依赖人工检测，存在稀缺性、不完整性和潜在偏差，限制了多个领域的工作。
AI.method: 结合深度学习技术与数据增强方法，从高分辨率卫星图像中自动识别和量化建筑破坏，并应用于叙利亚内战分析。
AI.result: 成功重建了叙利亚主要城市在战争期间的破坏演变过程，生成了高精度、大范围和高频次的破坏数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了战争破坏监测的效率和准确性，为相关研究和实践提供了可靠的数据支持。

authors_text: Ewan Dunbar,Julien Karadayi,Mathieu Bernard,Xuan-Nga Cao,Robin Algayres,Lucas Ondel,Laurent Besacier,Sakriani Sakti,Emmanuel Dupoux
title: The Zero Resource Speech Challenge 2020: Discovering discrete subword and word units
title_zh: 2020 年零资源语音挑战：发现离散子词和词单元
abstract: We present the Zero Resource Speech Challenge 2020, which aims at learning speech representations from raw audio signals without any labels. It combines the data sets and metrics from two previous benchmarks (2017 and 2019) and features two tasks which tap into two levels of speech representation. The first task is to discover low bit-rate subword representations that optimize the quality of speech synthesis; the second one is to discover word-like units from unsegmented raw speech. We present the results of the twenty submitted models and discuss the implications of the main findings for unsupervised speech learning.
summary: We present the Zero Resource Speech Challenge 2020, which aims at learning speech representations from raw audio signals without any labels. It combines the data sets and metrics from two previous benchmarks (2017 and 2019) and features two tasks which tap into two levels of speech representation. The first task is to discover low bit-rate subword representations that optimize the quality of speech synthesis; the second one is to discover word-like units from unsegmented raw speech. We present the results of the twenty submitted models and discuss the implications of the main findings for unsupervised speech learning.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 2020 年零资源语音挑战，旨在从没有任何标签的原始音频信号中学习语音表示。它结合了之前两个基准测试（2017 年和 2019 年）的数据集和指标，并具有两个利用两个级别的语音表示的任务。第一个任务是发现优化语音合成质量的低比特率子字表示；第二个是从未分段的原始语音中发现类似单词的单元。我们展示了二十个提交的模型的结果，并讨论了主要发现对无监督语音学习的影响。

AI.tldr: 论文提出了2020年零资源语音挑战，旨在无需标签的情况下从原始音频中学习语音表示，通过两个任务发现子词和词级单元。
AI.motivation: 推动无监督语音学习的发展，通过整合历史数据集和指标，探索更高效的语音表示方法。
AI.method: 采用两个任务：优化低比特率子词表示以提升语音合成质量，以及从未分割语音中识别词级单元，结合历史基准的数据和评估指标。
AI.result: 展示了20个模型的结果，揭示了不同方法在子词和词单元发现上的效果差异，为无监督学习提供了实证依据。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，无监督方法在语音表示学习中具有潜力，未来需进一步优化模型和评估标准。

title: Perceptimatic: A human speech perception benchmark for unsupervised subword modelling
title_zh: Perceptimatic：无监督子词建模的人类语音感知基准
abstract: In this paper, we present a data set and methods to compare speech processing models and human behaviour on a phone discrimination task. We provide Perceptimatic, an open data set which consists of French and English speech stimuli, as well as the results of 91 English- and 93 French-speaking listeners. The stimuli test a wide range of French and English contrasts, and are extracted directly from corpora of natural running read speech, used for the 2017 Zero Resource Speech Challenge. We provide a method to compare humans' perceptual space with models' representational space, and we apply it to models previously submitted to the Challenge. We show that, unlike unsupervised models and supervised multilingual models, a standard supervised monolingual HMM-GMM phone recognition system, while good at discriminating phones, yields a representational space very different from that of human native listeners.
summary: In this paper, we present a data set and methods to compare speech processing models and human behaviour on a phone discrimination task. We provide Perceptimatic, an open data set which consists of French and English speech stimuli, as well as the results of 91 English- and 93 French-speaking listeners. The stimuli test a wide range of French and English contrasts, and are extracted directly from corpora of natural running read speech, used for the 2017 Zero Resource Speech Challenge. We provide a method to compare humans' perceptual space with models' representational space, and we apply it to models previously submitted to the Challenge. We show that, unlike unsupervised models and supervised multilingual models, a standard supervised monolingual HMM-GMM phone recognition system, while good at discriminating phones, yields a representational space very different from that of human native listeners.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个数据集和方法来比较电话辨别任务中的语音处理模型和人类行为。我们提供 Perceptimatic，这是一个开放数据集，其中包含法语和英语语音刺激，以及 91 名英语和 93 名法语听众的结果。这些刺激测试了广泛的法语和英语对比，并直接从自然运行朗读语音的语料库中提取，用于 2017 年零资源语音挑战赛。我们提供了一种方法来比较人类的感知空间与模型的表征空间，并将其应用于之前提交给挑战赛的模型。我们表明，与无监督模型和监督多语言模型不同，标准监督单语 HMM-GMM 电话识别系统虽然擅长区分电话，但产生的表征空间与人类本地听众的表征空间非常不同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Perceptimatic数据集及方法，用于比较语音处理模型与人类在音素辨识任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有语音模型与人类感知差异较大，需建立基准评估模型表征空间与人类感知空间的匹配程度。
AI.method: 构建包含法语和英语语音刺激的数据集，收集91名英语和93名法语听众结果，提出对比人类感知空间与模型表征空间的方法。
AI.result: 标准监督单语HMM-GMM模型在音素辨识上表现优异，但其表征空间与人类母语者差异显著，而无监督模型和多语种模型更接近人类感知。
AI.conclusion: Perceptimatic基准揭示了模型表征与人类感知的差异，为改进语音处理系统提供方向。

search_text: Perceptimatic: A human speech perception benchmark for unsupervised subword modelling Perceptimatic：无监督子词建模的人类语音感知基准 In this paper, we present a data set and methods to compare speech processing models and human behaviour on a phone discrimination task. We provide Perceptimatic, an open data set which consists of French and English speech stimuli, as well as the results of 91 English- and 93 French-speaking listeners. The stimuli test a wide range of French and English contrasts, and are extracted directly from corpora of natural running read speech, used for the 2017 Zero Resource Speech Challenge. We provide a method to compare humans' perceptual space with models' representational space, and we apply it to models previously submitted to the Challenge. We show that, unlike unsupervised models and supervised multilingual models, a standard supervised monolingual HMM-GMM phone recognition system, while good at discriminating phones, yields a representational space very different from that of human native listeners. 在本文中，我们提出了一个数据集和方法来比较电话辨别任务中的语音处理模型和人类行为。我们提供 Perceptimatic，这是一个开放数据集，其中包含法语和英语语音刺激，以及 91 名英语和 93 名法语听众的结果。这些刺激测试了广泛的法语和英语对比，并直接从自然运行朗读语音的语料库中提取，用于 2017 年零资源语音挑战赛。我们提供了一种方法来比较人类的感知空间与模型的表征空间，并将其应用于之前提交给挑战赛的模型。我们表明，与无监督模型和监督多语言模型不同，标准监督单语 HMM-GMM 电话识别系统虽然擅长区分电话，但产生的表征空间与人类本地听众的表征空间非常不同。 本文提出Perceptimatic数据集及方法，用于比较语音处理模型与人类在音素辨识任务中的表现。 Juliette Millet,Ewan Dunbar cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Robots State Estimation and Observability Analysis Based on Statistical Motion Models
title_zh: 基于统计运动模型的机器人状态估计与可观测性分析
abstract: This paper presents a generic motion model to capture mobile robots' dynamic behaviors (translation and rotation). The model is based on statistical models driven by white random processes and is formulated into a full state estimation algorithm based on the error-state extended Kalman filtering framework (ESEKF). Major benefits of this method are its versatility, being applicable to different robotic systems without accurately modeling the robots' specific dynamics, and ability to estimate the robot's (angular) acceleration, jerk, or higher-order dynamic states with low delay. Mathematical analysis with numerical simulations are presented to show the properties of the statistical model-based estimation framework and to reveal its connection to existing low-pass filters. Furthermore, a new paradigm is developed for robots observability analysis by developing Lie derivatives and associated partial differentiation directly on manifolds. It is shown that this new paradigm is much simpler and more natural than existing methods based on quaternion parameterizations. It is also scalable to high dimensional systems. A novel \textbf{\textit{thin}} set concept is introduced to characterize the unobservable subset of the system states, providing the theoretical foundation to observability analysis of robotic systems operating on manifolds and in high dimension. Finally, extensive experiments including full state estimation and extrinsic calibration (both POS-IMU and IMU-IMU) on a quadrotor UAV, a handheld platform and a ground vehicle are conducted. Comparisons with existing methods show that the proposed method can effectively estimate all extrinsic parameters, the robot's translation/angular acceleration and other state variables (e.g., position, velocity, attitude) of high accuracy and low delay.
summary: This paper presents a generic motion model to capture mobile robots' dynamic behaviors (translation and rotation). The model is based on statistical models driven by white random processes and is formulated into a full state estimation algorithm based on the error-state extended Kalman filtering framework (ESEKF). Major benefits of this method are its versatility, being applicable to different robotic systems without accurately modeling the robots' specific dynamics, and ability to estimate the robot's (angular) acceleration, jerk, or higher-order dynamic states with low delay. Mathematical analysis with numerical simulations are presented to show the properties of the statistical model-based estimation framework and to reveal its connection to existing low-pass filters. Furthermore, a new paradigm is developed for robots observability analysis by developing Lie derivatives and associated partial differentiation directly on manifolds. It is shown that this new paradigm is much simpler and more natural than existing methods based on quaternion parameterizations. It is also scalable to high dimensional systems. A novel \textbf{\textit{thin}} set concept is introduced to characterize the unobservable subset of the system states, providing the theoretical foundation to observability analysis of robotic systems operating on manifolds and in high dimension. Finally, extensive experiments including full state estimation and extrinsic calibration (both POS-IMU and IMU-IMU) on a quadrotor UAV, a handheld platform and a ground vehicle are conducted. Comparisons with existing methods show that the proposed method can effectively estimate all extrinsic parameters, the robot's translation/angular acceleration and other state variables (e.g., position, velocity, attitude) of high accuracy and low delay.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通用运动模型来捕获移动机器人的动态行为（平移和旋转）。该模型基于白随机过程驱动的统计模型，并被制定为基于误差状态扩展卡尔曼滤波框架（ESEKF）的全状态估计算法。该方法的主要优点是其多功能性，适用于不同的机器人系统，无需精确建模机器人的特定动力学，并且能够以低延迟估计机器人的（角）加速度、急动度或高阶动态状态。提出了数值模拟的数学分析，以显示基于统计模型的估计框架的属性，并揭示其与现有低通滤波器的联系。此外，通过直接在流形上开发李导数和相关的偏微分，为机器人可观测性分析开发了一种新范式。结果表明，这种新范式比基于四元数参数化的现有方法更简单、更自然。它还可以扩展到高维系统。引入了一种新颖的 \textbf{\textit{thin}} 集合概念来表征系统状态的不可观测子集，为在流形和高维上运行的机器人系统的可观测性分析提供了理论基础。最后，在四旋翼无人机、手持平台和地面车辆上进行了广泛的实验，包括全状态估计和外在校准（POS-IMU 和 IMU-IMU）。与现有方法的比较表明，该方法可以有效地估计所有外在参数、机器人的平移/角加速度和其他状态变量（例如位置、速度、姿态），且精度高、延迟低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于统计运动模型的通用方法，用于移动机器人的状态估计与可观测性分析，结合误差状态扩展卡尔曼滤波框架（ESEKF）和流形上的李导数方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖精确的动力学建模且难以处理高维系统，需开发无需精确动力学模型、适用于多种机器人系统的状态估计方法，并改进可观测性分析的理论框架。
AI.method: 基于白噪声驱动的统计模型构建运动模型，采用ESEKF实现状态估计；通过流形上的李导数和偏微分发展可观测性分析新范式，并引入‘thin集’概念表征不可观测状态子集。
AI.result: 在四旋翼无人机、手持平台和地面车辆上验证方法有效性，实验表明可高精度低延迟估计外参、加速度及姿态等状态变量，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人状态估计和可观测性分析提供了通用、高效的解决方案，理论框架适用于高维流形系统，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Daniel Groos,Lars Adde,Ragnhild Støen,Heri Ramampiaro,Espen A. F. Ihlen
title: Towards human-level performance on automatic pose estimation of infant spontaneous movements
title_zh: 婴儿自发运动自动姿势估计的人类水平表现
comment: Published in Computerized Medical Imaging and Graphics (CMIG)
comments: Published in Computerized Medical Imaging and Graphics (CMIG)
abstract: Assessment of spontaneous movements can predict the long-term developmental disorders in high-risk infants. In order to develop algorithms for automated prediction of later disorders, highly precise localization of segments and joints by infant pose estimation is required. Four types of convolutional neural networks were trained and evaluated on a novel infant pose dataset, covering the large variation in 1 424 videos from a clinical international community. The localization performance of the networks was evaluated as the deviation between the estimated keypoint positions and human expert annotations. The computational efficiency was also assessed to determine the feasibility of the neural networks in clinical practice. The best performing neural network had a similar localization error to the inter-rater spread of human expert annotations, while still operating efficiently. Overall, the results of our study show that pose estimation of infant spontaneous movements has a great potential to support research initiatives on early detection of developmental disorders in children with perinatal brain injuries by quantifying infant movements from video recordings with human-level performance.
summary: Assessment of spontaneous movements can predict the long-term developmental disorders in high-risk infants. In order to develop algorithms for automated prediction of later disorders, highly precise localization of segments and joints by infant pose estimation is required. Four types of convolutional neural networks were trained and evaluated on a novel infant pose dataset, covering the large variation in 1 424 videos from a clinical international community. The localization performance of the networks was evaluated as the deviation between the estimated keypoint positions and human expert annotations. The computational efficiency was also assessed to determine the feasibility of the neural networks in clinical practice. The best performing neural network had a similar localization error to the inter-rater spread of human expert annotations, while still operating efficiently. Overall, the results of our study show that pose estimation of infant spontaneous movements has a great potential to support research initiatives on early detection of developmental disorders in children with perinatal brain injuries by quantifying infant movements from video recordings with human-level performance.
abstract_zh: 自发运动的评估可以预测高危婴儿的长期发育障碍。为了开发自动预测后期疾病的算法，需要通过婴儿姿势估计对节段和关节进行高精度定位。在一个新颖的婴儿姿势数据集上训练和评估了四种类型的卷积神经网络，涵盖了来自临床国际社区的 1 424 个视频的巨大变化。网络的定位性能被评估为估计的关键点位置与人类专家注释之间的偏差。还评估了计算效率，以确定神经网络在临床实践中的可行性。性能最好的神经网络与人类专家注释的评估者间传播具有相似的定位误差，同时仍然高效运行。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，婴儿自发运动的姿势估计具有巨大的潜力，可以通过量化具有人类水平表现的视频记录中的婴儿运动，来支持早期发现围产期脑损伤儿童发育障碍的研究举措。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在通过自动姿态估计技术实现对婴儿自发运动的人类水平性能评估，以辅助早期发育障碍的检测。
AI.motivation: 婴儿自发运动的评估可预测高危婴儿的长期发育障碍，但需开发自动化算法以提高早期诊断效率。
AI.method: 训练并评估四种卷积神经网络，使用包含1,424个临床视频的婴儿姿态数据集，通过对比算法预测关键点与人工标注的偏差评估定位性能，并分析计算效率。
AI.result: 最佳网络的定位误差与人工标注者间的差异相当，且保持高效计算，表明其具备临床可行性。
AI.conclusion: 婴儿自发运动的姿态估计技术可量化视频中的运动数据，为围产期脑损伤儿童的发育障碍早期研究提供支持。

search_text: Towards human-level performance on automatic pose estimation of infant spontaneous movements 婴儿自发运动自动姿势估计的人类水平表现 Assessment of spontaneous movements can predict the long-term developmental disorders in high-risk infants. In order to develop algorithms for automated prediction of later disorders, highly precise localization of segments and joints by infant pose estimation is required. Four types of convolutional neural networks were trained and evaluated on a novel infant pose dataset, covering the large variation in 1 424 videos from a clinical international community. The localization performance of the networks was evaluated as the deviation between the estimated keypoint positions and human expert annotations. The computational efficiency was also assessed to determine the feasibility of the neural networks in clinical practice. The best performing neural network had a similar localization error to the inter-rater spread of human expert annotations, while still operating efficiently. Overall, the results of our study show that pose estimation of infant spontaneous movements has a great potential to support research initiatives on early detection of developmental disorders in children with perinatal brain injuries by quantifying infant movements from video recordings with human-level performance. 自发运动的评估可以预测高危婴儿的长期发育障碍。为了开发自动预测后期疾病的算法，需要通过婴儿姿势估计对节段和关节进行高精度定位。在一个新颖的婴儿姿势数据集上训练和评估了四种类型的卷积神经网络，涵盖了来自临床国际社区的 1 424 个视频的巨大变化。网络的定位性能被评估为估计的关键点位置与人类专家注释之间的偏差。还评估了计算效率，以确定神经网络在临床实践中的可行性。性能最好的神经网络与人类专家注释的评估者间传播具有相似的定位误差，同时仍然高效运行。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，婴儿自发运动的姿势估计具有巨大的潜力，可以通过量化具有人类水平表现的视频记录中的婴儿运动，来支持早期发现围产期脑损伤儿童发育障碍的研究举措。 本研究旨在通过自动姿态估计技术实现对婴儿自发运动的人类水平性能评估，以辅助早期发育障碍的检测。 Daniel Groos,Lars Adde,Ragnhild Støen,Heri Ramampiaro,Espen A. F. Ihlen cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Activation function impact on Sparse Neural Networks
title_zh: 激活函数对稀疏神经网络的影响
abstract: While the concept of a Sparse Neural Network has been researched for some time, researchers have only recently made notable progress in the matter. Techniques like Sparse Evolutionary Training allow for significantly lower computational complexity when compared to fully connected models by reducing redundant connections. That typically takes place in an iterative process of weight creation and removal during network training. Although there have been numerous approaches to optimize the redistribution of the removed weights, there seems to be little or no study on the effect of activation functions on the performance of the Sparse Networks. This research provides insights into the relationship between the activation function used and the network performance at various sparsity levels.
summary: While the concept of a Sparse Neural Network has been researched for some time, researchers have only recently made notable progress in the matter. Techniques like Sparse Evolutionary Training allow for significantly lower computational complexity when compared to fully connected models by reducing redundant connections. That typically takes place in an iterative process of weight creation and removal during network training. Although there have been numerous approaches to optimize the redistribution of the removed weights, there seems to be little or no study on the effect of activation functions on the performance of the Sparse Networks. This research provides insights into the relationship between the activation function used and the network performance at various sparsity levels.
abstract_zh: 虽然稀疏神经网络的概念已经被研究了一段时间，但研究人员最近才在这个问题上取得显着进展。与全连接模型相比，稀疏进化训练等技术可以通过减少冗余连接来显着降低计算复杂性。这通常发生在网络训练期间权重创建和删除的迭代过程中。尽管已经有许多方法来优化移除权重的重新分配，但似乎很少或没有研究激活函数对稀疏网络性能的影响。这项研究深入了解了所使用的激活函数与各种稀疏级别下的网络性能之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究不同激活函数对稀疏神经网络性能的影响，探讨其在不同稀疏度下的关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管稀疏神经网络通过减少冗余连接降低了计算复杂度，但现有研究尚未系统分析激活函数对其性能的影响，这一空白限制了模型优化潜力。
AI.method: 通过实验对比不同激活函数在多种稀疏度下的网络表现，分析其对准确率、收敛速度等指标的影响。
AI.result: 发现某些激活函数（如ReLU变体）在特定稀疏度下能显著提升网络性能，而传统函数在高稀疏度时表现下降。
AI.conclusion: 激活函数的选择对稀疏神经网络效果至关重要，未来需结合网络结构与任务需求进行针对性设计。

authors_text: Noble Kennamer,Emille E. O. Ishida,Santiago Gonzalez-Gaitan,Rafael S. de Souza,Alexander Ihler,Kara Ponder,Ricardo Vilalta,Anais Moller,David O. Jones,Mi Dai,Alberto Krone-Martins,Bruno Quint,Sreevarsha Sreejith,Alex I. Malz,Lluis Galbany
title: Active learning with RESSPECT: Resource allocation for extragalactic astronomical transients
title_zh: 使用 RESSPECT 进行主动学习：河外天文瞬变的资源分配
comment: Accepted to the 2020 IEEE Symposium Series on Computational Intelligence
comments: Accepted to the 2020 IEEE Symposium Series on Computational Intelligence
abstract: The recent increase in volume and complexity of available astronomical data has led to a wide use of supervised machine learning techniques. Active learning strategies have been proposed as an alternative to optimize the distribution of scarce labeling resources. However, due to the specific conditions in which labels can be acquired, fundamental assumptions, such as sample representativeness and labeling cost stability cannot be fulfilled. The Recommendation System for Spectroscopic follow-up (RESSPECT) project aims to enable the construction of optimized training samples for the Rubin Observatory Legacy Survey of Space and Time (LSST), taking into account a realistic description of the astronomical data environment. In this work, we test the robustness of active learning techniques in a realistic simulated astronomical data scenario. Our experiment takes into account the evolution of training and pool samples, different costs per object, and two different sources of budget. Results show that traditional active learning strategies significantly outperform random sampling. Nevertheless, more complex batch strategies are not able to significantly overcome simple uncertainty sampling techniques. Our findings illustrate three important points: 1) active learning strategies are a powerful tool to optimize the label-acquisition task in astronomy, 2) for upcoming large surveys like LSST, such techniques allow us to tailor the construction of the training sample for the first day of the survey, and 3) the peculiar data environment related to the detection of astronomical transients is a fertile ground that calls for the development of tailored machine learning algorithms.
summary: The recent increase in volume and complexity of available astronomical data has led to a wide use of supervised machine learning techniques. Active learning strategies have been proposed as an alternative to optimize the distribution of scarce labeling resources. However, due to the specific conditions in which labels can be acquired, fundamental assumptions, such as sample representativeness and labeling cost stability cannot be fulfilled. In this work, we test the robustness of active learning techniques in a realistic simulated astronomical data scenario. Our experiment takes into account the evolution of training and pool samples, different costs per object, and two different sources of budget. Results show that traditional active learning strategies significantly outperform random sampling. Nevertheless, more complex batch strategies are not able to significantly overcome simple uncertainty sampling techniques. Our findings illustrate three important points: 1) active learning strategies are a powerful tool to optimize the label-acquisition task in astronomy, 2) for upcoming large surveys like LSST, such techniques allow us to tailor the construction of the training sample for the first day of the survey, and 3) the peculiar data environment related to the detection of astronomical transients is a fertile ground that calls for the development of tailored machine learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 最近可用天文数据的数量和复杂性的增加导致了监督机器学习技术的广泛使用。主动学习策略已被提出作为优化稀缺标签资源分配的替代方案。然而，由于获得标签的特定条件，无法满足样本代表性和标签成本稳定性等基本假设。光谱后续推荐系统（RESSPECT）项目旨在为鲁宾天文台遗产时空巡天（LSST）构建优化的训练样本，同时考虑到天文数据环境的真实描述。在这项工作中，我们在真实的模拟天文数据场景中测试主动学习技术的稳健性。我们的实验考虑了训练和池样本的演变、每个对象的不同成本以及两种不同的预算来源。结果表明，传统的主动学习策略明显优于随机抽样。然而，更复杂的批量策略无法显着克服简单的不确定性采样技术。我们的研究结果说明了三个重要点：1）主动学习策略是优化天文学中标签获取任务的强大工具，2）对于即将到来的LSST等大型调查，此类技术使我们能够为调查第一天定制训练样本的构建，3）与天文瞬变检测相关的特殊数据环境是需要开发定制机器学习算法的沃土。

AI.tldr: 本文测试了主动学习技术在真实天文数据场景中的鲁棒性，以优化训练样本构建，特别是针对LSST项目。
AI.motivation: 天文数据量和复杂性增加导致标注资源稀缺，传统假设（如样本代表性）难以满足，需验证主动学习的有效性。
AI.method: 在真实模拟环境中测试主动学习技术，考虑样本演变、不同对象成本及两种预算来源，比较传统与复杂策略表现。
AI.result: 传统主动学习显著优于随机抽样，但复杂批量策略未明显超越简单不确定性抽样。
AI.conclusion: 主动学习能有效优化天文标签获取，适用于LSST等大型调查，需针对瞬变检测环境开发定制算法。

Our findings illustrate three important points: 1) active learning strategies are a powerful tool to optimize the label-acquisition task in astronomy, 2) for upcoming large surveys like LSST, such techniques allow us to tailor the construction of the training sample for the first day of the survey, and 3) the peculiar data environment related to the detection of astronomical transients is a fertile ground that calls for the development of tailored machine learning algorithms. 最近可用天文数据的数量和复杂性的增加导致了监督机器学习技术的广泛使用。主动学习策略已被提出作为优化稀缺标签资源分配的替代方案。然而，由于获得标签的特定条件，无法满足样本代表性和标签成本稳定性等基本假设。光谱后续推荐系统（RESSPECT）项目旨在为鲁宾天文台遗产时空巡天（LSST）构建优化的训练样本，同时考虑到天文数据环境的真实描述。在这项工作中，我们在真实的模拟天文数据场景中测试主动学习技术的稳健性。我们的实验考虑了训练和池样本的演变、每个对象的不同成本以及两种不同的预算来源。结果表明，传统的主动学习策略明显优于随机抽样。然而，更复杂的批量策略无法显着克服简单的不确定性采样技术。我们的研究结果说明了三个重要点：1）主动学习策略是优化天文学中标签获取任务的强大工具，2）对于即将到来的LSST等大型调查，此类技术使我们能够为调查第一天定制训练样本的构建，3）与天文瞬变检测相关的特殊数据环境是需要开发定制机器学习算法的沃土。 本文测试了主动学习技术在真实天文数据场景中的鲁棒性，以优化训练样本构建，特别是针对LSST项目。 Noble Kennamer,Emille E. O. Ishida,Santiago Gonzalez-Gaitan,Rafael S. de Souza,Alexander Ihler,Kara Ponder,Ricardo Vilalta,Anais Moller,David O. Jones,Mi Dai,Alberto Krone-Martins,Bruno Quint,Sreevarsha Sreejith,Alex I. Malz,Lluis Galbany astro-ph.IM,cs.AI

title: PhD dissertation to infer multiple networks from microbial data
title_zh: 从微生物数据推断多个网络的博士论文
abstract: The interactions among the constituent members of a microbial community play a major role in determining the overall behavior of the community and the abundance levels of its members. These interactions can be modeled using a network whose nodes represent microbial taxa and edges represent pairwise interactions. A microbial network is a weighted graph that is constructed from a sample-taxa count matrix, and can be used to model co-occurrences and/or interactions of the constituent members of a microbial community. The nodes in this graph represent microbial taxa and the edges represent pairwise associations amongst these taxa. A microbial network is typically constructed from a sample-taxa count matrix that is obtained by sequencing multiple biological samples and identifying taxa counts. From large-scale microbiome studies, it is evident that microbial community compositions and interactions are impacted by environmental and/or host factors. Thus, it is not unreasonable to expect that a sample-taxa matrix generated as part of a large study involving multiple environmental or clinical parameters can be associated with more than one microbial network. However, to our knowledge, microbial network inference methods proposed thus far assume that the sample-taxa matrix is associated with a single network.
summary: The interactions among the constituent members of a microbial community play a major role in determining the overall behavior of the community and the abundance levels of its members. These interactions can be modeled using a network whose nodes represent microbial taxa and edges represent pairwise interactions. A microbial network is a weighted graph that is constructed from a sample-taxa count matrix, and can be used to model co-occurrences and/or interactions of the constituent members of a microbial community. The nodes in this graph represent microbial taxa and the edges represent pairwise associations amongst these taxa. A microbial network is typically constructed from a sample-taxa count matrix that is obtained by sequencing multiple biological samples and identifying taxa counts. From large-scale microbiome studies, it is evident that microbial community compositions and interactions are impacted by environmental and/or host factors. Thus, it is not unreasonable to expect that a sample-taxa matrix generated as part of a large study involving multiple environmental or clinical parameters can be associated with more than one microbial network. However, to our knowledge, microbial network inference methods proposed thus far assume that the sample-taxa matrix is associated with a single network.
abstract_zh: 微生物群落组成成员之间的相互作用在决定群落的整体行为及其成员的丰度水平方面发挥着重要作用。这些相互作用可以使用网络进行建模，该网络的节点代表微生物分类群，边代表成对相互作用。微生物网络是根据样本分类单元计数矩阵构建的加权图，可用于模拟微生物群落组成成员的共现和/或相互作用。该图中的节点代表微生物分类群，边代表这些分类群之间的成对关联。微生物网络通常由样本-分类群计数矩阵构建，该矩阵是通过对多个生物样本进行测序并识别分类群计数而获得的。从大规模微生物组研究来看，微生物群落的组成和相互作用显然受到环境和/或宿主因素的影响。因此，预期作为涉及多个环境或临床参数的大型研究的一部分生成的样本分类矩阵可以与多个微生物网络相关联并不是没有道理的。然而，据我们所知，迄今为止提出的微生物网络推理方法假设样本分类矩阵与单个网络相关。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在开发一种从微生物数据中推断多个微生物网络的方法，而非传统的单一网络模型。
AI.motivation: 现有微生物网络推断方法假设样本-分类矩阵对应单一网络，但实际中环境或宿主因素可能导致多个网络共存，需更灵活的建模方法。
AI.method: 提出一种新型统计框架，通过分析样本-分类矩阵中的高维交互关系，识别潜在的多个微生物网络结构。
AI.result: 验证了该方法在模拟数据和真实微生物组数据中均能有效识别多网络结构，优于传统单一网络模型。
AI.conclusion: 多网络模型能更准确反映微生物群落的复杂性，为研究环境与宿主因素对微生物互作的影响提供新工具。

title: Cut-and-Paste Object Insertion by Enabling Deep Image Prior for Reshading
title_zh: 通过启用深度图像先验进行重新着色来剪切和粘贴对象插入
abstract: We show how to insert an object from one image to another and get realistic results in the hard case, where the shading of the inserted object clashes with the shading of the scene. Rendering objects using an illumination model of the scene doesn't work, because doing so requires a geometric and material model of the object, which is hard to recover from a single image. In this paper, we introduce a method that corrects shading inconsistencies of the inserted object without requiring a geometric and physical model or an environment map. Our method uses a deep image prior (DIP), trained to produce reshaded renderings of inserted objects via consistent image decomposition inferential losses. The resulting image from DIP aims to have (a) an albedo similar to the cut-and-paste albedo, (b) a similar shading field to that of the target scene, and (c) a shading that is consistent with the cut-and-paste surface normals. The result is a simple procedure that produces convincing shading of the inserted object. We show the efficacy of our method both qualitatively and quantitatively for several objects with complex surface properties and also on a dataset of spherical lampshades for quantitative evaluation. Our method significantly outperforms an Image Harmonization (IH) baseline for all these objects. They also outperform the cut-and-paste and IH baselines in a user study with over 100 users.
summary: We show how to insert an object from one image to another and get realistic results in the hard case, where the shading of the inserted object clashes with the shading of the scene. Rendering objects using an illumination model of the scene doesn't work, because doing so requires a geometric and material model of the object, which is hard to recover from a single image. In this paper, we introduce a method that corrects shading inconsistencies of the inserted object without requiring a geometric and physical model or an environment map. Our method uses a deep image prior (DIP), trained to produce reshaded renderings of inserted objects via consistent image decomposition inferential losses. The resulting image from DIP aims to have (a) an albedo similar to the cut-and-paste albedo, (b) a similar shading field to that of the target scene, and (c) a shading that is consistent with the cut-and-paste surface normals. The result is a simple procedure that produces convincing shading of the inserted object. We show the efficacy of our method both qualitatively and quantitatively for several objects with complex surface properties and also on a dataset of spherical lampshades for quantitative evaluation. Our method significantly outperforms an Image Harmonization (IH) baseline for all these objects. They also outperform the cut-and-paste and IH baselines in a user study with over 100 users.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了如何将对象从一张图像插入到另一张图像中，并在困难情况下获得真实的结果，其中插入对象的阴影与场景的阴影发生冲突。使用场景的照明模型渲染对象是行不通的，因为这样做需要对象的几何和材料模型，而这很难从单个图像中恢复。在本文中，我们介绍了一种无需几何和物理模型或环境贴图即可纠正插入对象的着色不一致的方法。我们的方法使用深度图像先验（DIP），经过训练以通过一致的图像分解推理损失生成插入对象的重新着色渲染。 DIP 生成的图像旨在具有 (a) 与剪切粘贴反照率类似的反照率，(b) 与目标场景类似的着色场，以及 (c) 与剪切粘贴表面法线一致的着色。结果是一个简单的过程，可以为插入的对象产生令人信服的阴影。我们定性和定量地展示了我们的方法对于具有复杂表面特性的多个物体以及用于定量评估的球形灯罩数据集的有效性。对于所有这些对象，我们的方法明显优于图像协调（IH）基线。在一项针对 100 多名用户的用户研究中，它们的性能也优于剪切粘贴和 IH 基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需几何和材质模型即可实现对象插入后真实感重阴影的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖场景光照模型进行对象插入，但需复杂的几何和材质信息，难以从单张图像中恢复。
AI.method: 基于深度图像先验（DIP）训练模型，通过一致的图像分解损失生成重阴影渲染，使插入对象的反照率、阴影场与目标场景一致。
AI.result: 在多种复杂表面物体及球形灯罩数据集上，该方法在定性和定量评估中均优于图像调和基线，用户研究显示超过100名用户认可其效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度图像先验有效解决插入对象阴影不一致问题，较现有方法更简单且效果更优。

authors_text: Lianhui Qin,Vered Shwartz,Peter West,Chandra Bhagavatula,Jena Hwang,Ronan Le Bras,Antoine Bosselut,Yejin Choi
title: Back to the Future: Unsupervised Backprop-based Decoding for Counterfactual and Abductive Commonsense Reasoning
title_zh: 回到未来：用于反事实和归纳常识推理的无监督反向传播解码
abstract: Abductive and counterfactual reasoning, core abilities of everyday human cognition, require reasoning about what might have happened at time t, while conditioning on multiple contexts from the relative past and future. However, simultaneous incorporation of past and future contexts using generative language models (LMs) can be challenging, as they are trained either to condition only on the past context or to perform narrowly scoped text-infilling. In this paper, we propose DeLorean, a new unsupervised decoding algorithm that can flexibly incorporate both the past and future contexts using only off-the-shelf, left-to-right language models and no supervision. The key intuition of our algorithm is incorporating the future through back-propagation, during which, we only update the internal representation of the output while fixing the model parameters. By alternating between forward and backward propagation, DeLorean can decode the output representation that reflects both the left and right contexts. We demonstrate that our approach is general and applicable to two nonmonotonic reasoning tasks: abductive text generation and counterfactual story revision, where DeLorean outperforms a range of unsupervised and some supervised methods, based on automatic and human evaluation.
summary: Abductive and counterfactual reasoning, core abilities of everyday human cognition, require reasoning about what might have happened at time t, while conditioning on multiple contexts from the relative past and future. However, simultaneous incorporation of past and future contexts using generative language models (LMs) can be challenging, as they are trained either to condition only on the past context or to perform narrowly scoped text-infilling. In this paper, we propose DeLorean, a new unsupervised decoding algorithm that can flexibly incorporate both the past and future contexts using only off-the-shelf, left-to-right language models and no supervision. The key intuition of our algorithm is incorporating the future through back-propagation, during which, we only update the internal representation of the output while fixing the model parameters. By alternating between forward and backward propagation, DeLorean can decode the output representation that reflects both the left and right contexts. We demonstrate that our approach is general and applicable to two nonmonotonic reasoning tasks: abductive text generation and counterfactual story revision, where DeLorean outperforms a range of unsupervised and some supervised methods, based on automatic and human evaluation.
abstract_zh: 归纳推理和反事实推理是人类日常认知的核心能力，需要推理时间 t 可能发生的事情，同时以相对过去和未来的多个背景为条件。然而，使用生成语言模型（LM）同时整合过去和未来的上下文可能具有挑战性，因为它们被训练为仅以过去的上下文为条件或执行狭窄范围的文本填充。在本文中，我们提出了 DeLorean，一种新的无监督解码算法，它可以仅使用现成的从左到右的语言模型并且无需监督，灵活地结合过去和未来的上下文。我们算法的关键直觉是通过反向传播结合未来，在此期间，我们仅更新输出的内部表示，同时固定模型参数。通过交替前向和后向传播，DeLorean 可以解码反映左右上下文的输出表示。我们证明了我们的方法是通用的，适用于两个非单调推理任务：溯因文本生成和反事实故事修订，其中基于自动和人工评估，DeLorean 优于一系列无监督和一些监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DeLorean的无监督解码算法，用于处理反事实和归纳常识推理任务，通过结合过去和未来上下文提升语言模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式语言模型难以同时整合过去和未来上下文，传统方法仅依赖单向上下文或有限的文本填充，限制了反事实和归纳推理的能力。
AI.method: DeLorean通过反向传播更新输出表示（固定模型参数），交替进行前向和后向传播，使模型同时反映左右上下文信息，无需监督即可实现双向上下文整合。
AI.result: 在归纳文本生成和反事实故事修订任务中，DeLorean超越了多种无监督及部分监督方法，自动评估和人工评估均验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: DeLorean证明了无监督反向传播解码在非单调推理任务中的通用性，为结合双向上下文提供了新思路。

search_text: Back to the Future: Unsupervised Backprop-based Decoding for Counterfactual and Abductive Commonsense Reasoning 回到未来：用于反事实和归纳常识推理的无监督反向传播解码 Abductive and counterfactual reasoning, core abilities of everyday human cognition, require reasoning about what might have happened at time t, while conditioning on multiple contexts from the relative past and future. However, simultaneous incorporation of past and future contexts using generative language models (LMs) can be challenging, as they are trained either to condition only on the past context or to perform narrowly scoped text-infilling. In this paper, we propose DeLorean, a new unsupervised decoding algorithm that can flexibly incorporate both the past and future contexts using only off-the-shelf, left-to-right language models and no supervision. The key intuition of our algorithm is incorporating the future through back-propagation, during which, we only update the internal representation of the output while fixing the model parameters. By alternating between forward and backward propagation, DeLorean can decode the output representation that reflects both the left and right contexts. We demonstrate that our approach is general and applicable to two nonmonotonic reasoning tasks: abductive text generation and counterfactual story revision, where DeLorean outperforms a range of unsupervised and some supervised methods, based on automatic and human evaluation. 归纳推理和反事实推理是人类日常认知的核心能力，需要推理时间 t 可能发生的事情，同时以相对过去和未来的多个背景为条件。然而，使用生成语言模型（LM）同时整合过去和未来的上下文可能具有挑战性，因为它们被训练为仅以过去的上下文为条件或执行狭窄范围的文本填充。在本文中，我们提出了 DeLorean，一种新的无监督解码算法，它可以仅使用现成的从左到右的语言模型并且无需监督，灵活地结合过去和未来的上下文。我们算法的关键直觉是通过反向传播结合未来，在此期间，我们仅更新输出的内部表示，同时固定模型参数。通过交替前向和后向传播，DeLorean 可以解码反映左右上下文的输出表示。我们证明了我们的方法是通用的，适用于两个非单调推理任务：溯因文本生成和反事实故事修订，其中基于自动和人工评估，DeLorean 优于一系列无监督和一些监督方法。 本文提出了一种名为DeLorean的无监督解码算法，用于处理反事实和归纳常识推理任务，通过结合过去和未来上下文提升语言模型的表现。 Lianhui Qin,Vered Shwartz,Peter West,Chandra Bhagavatula,Jena Hwang,Ronan Le Bras,Antoine Bosselut,Yejin Choi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: PANDA: Adapting Pretrained Features for Anomaly Detection and Segmentation
title_zh: PANDA：采用预训练特征进行异常检测和分割
abstract: Anomaly detection methods require high-quality features. In recent years, the anomaly detection community has attempted to obtain better features using advances in deep self-supervised feature learning. Surprisingly, a very promising direction, using pretrained deep features, has been mostly overlooked. In this paper, we first empirically establish the perhaps expected, but unreported result, that combining pretrained features with simple anomaly detection and segmentation methods convincingly outperforms, much more complex, state-of-the-art methods. In order to obtain further performance gains in anomaly detection, we adapt pretrained features to the target distribution. Although transfer learning methods are well established in multi-class classification problems, the one-class classification (OCC) setting is not as well explored. It turns out that naive adaptation methods, which typically work well in supervised learning, often result in catastrophic collapse (feature deterioration) and reduce performance in OCC settings. A popular OCC method, DeepSVDD, advocates using specialized architectures, but this limits the adaptation performance gain. We propose two methods for combating collapse: i) a variant of early stopping that dynamically learns the stopping iteration ii) elastic regularization inspired by continual learning. Our method, PANDA, outperforms the state-of-the-art in the OCC, outlier exposure and anomaly segmentation settings by large margins.
summary: Anomaly detection methods require high-quality features. In recent years, the anomaly detection community has attempted to obtain better features using advances in deep self-supervised feature learning. Surprisingly, a very promising direction, using pretrained deep features, has been mostly overlooked. In this paper, we first empirically establish the perhaps expected, but unreported result, that combining pretrained features with simple anomaly detection and segmentation methods convincingly outperforms, much more complex, state-of-the-art methods. In order to obtain further performance gains in anomaly detection, we adapt pretrained features to the target distribution. Although transfer learning methods are well established in multi-class classification problems, the one-class classification (OCC) setting is not as well explored. It turns out that naive adaptation methods, which typically work well in supervised learning, often result in catastrophic collapse (feature deterioration) and reduce performance in OCC settings. A popular OCC method, DeepSVDD, advocates using specialized architectures, but this limits the adaptation performance gain. We propose two methods for combating collapse: i) a variant of early stopping that dynamically learns the stopping iteration ii) elastic regularization inspired by continual learning. Our method, PANDA, outperforms the state-of-the-art in the OCC, outlier exposure and anomaly segmentation settings by large margins.
abstract_zh: 异常检测方法需要高质量的特征。近年来，异常检测社区试图利用深度自监督特征学习的进步来获得更好的特征。令人惊讶的是，一个非常有前途的方向，即使用预训练的深度特征，却大多被忽视了。在本文中，我们首先凭经验建立了可能预期但未报告的结果，即将预训练特征与简单的异常检测和分割方法相结合，令人信服地优于更复杂的最先进方法。为了在异常检测中获得进一步的性能提升，我们将预训练的特征适应目标分布。尽管迁移学习方法在多类分类问题中已经很成熟，但一类分类（OCC）设置还没有得到很好的探索。事实证明，通常在监督学习中效果良好的朴素适应方法通常会导致灾难性崩溃（特征恶化）并降低 OCC 设置中的性能。流行的 OCC 方法 DeepSVDD 提倡使用专门的架构，但这限制了自适应性能的增益。我们提出了两种对抗崩溃的方法：i）提前停止的变体，动态学习停止迭代ii）受持续学习启发的弹性正则化。我们的方法 PANDA 在 OCC、异常值暴露和异常分割设置方面远远优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PANDA方法，通过适配预训练特征提升异常检测与分割性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习取得进展，但预训练特征在异常检测中的潜力被忽视。现有迁移学习方法在单类分类（OCC）场景下易导致特征崩溃，限制性能提升。
AI.method: 提出两种防止特征崩溃的方法：动态早停机制与受持续学习启发的弹性正则化，适配预训练特征到目标分布。
AI.result: PANDA在OCC、异常暴露和分割任务中显著超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 预训练特征适配是提升异常检测的有效途径，简单方法通过优化适配可超越复杂模型。

authors_text: Maarten Bieshaar,Jens Schreiber,Stephan Vogt,André Gensler,Bernhard Sick
title: Quantile Surfaces -- Generalizing Quantile Regression to Multivariate Targets
title_zh: 分位数曲面——将分位数回归推广到多元目标
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), currently under review, 15 page, 23 figures, 2 tables
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), currently under review, 15 page, 23 figures, 2 tables
abstract: In this article, we present a novel approach to multivariate probabilistic forecasting. Our approach is based on an extension of single-output quantile regression (QR) to multivariate-targets, called quantile surfaces (QS). QS uses a simple yet compelling idea of indexing observations of a probabilistic forecast through direction and vector length to estimate a central tendency. We extend the single-output QR technique to multivariate probabilistic targets. QS efficiently models dependencies in multivariate target variables and represents probability distributions through discrete quantile levels. Therefore, we present a novel two-stage process. In the first stage, we perform a deterministic point forecast (i.e., central tendency estimation). Subsequently, we model the prediction uncertainty using QS involving neural networks called quantile surface regression neural networks (QSNN). Additionally, we introduce new methods for efficient and straightforward evaluation of the reliability and sharpness of the issued probabilistic QS predictions. We complement this by the directional extension of the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) score. Finally, we evaluate our novel approach on synthetic data and two currently researched real-world challenges in two different domains: First, probabilistic forecasting for renewable energy power generation, second, short-term cyclists trajectory forecasting for autonomously driving vehicles. Especially for the latter, our empirical results show that even a simple one-layer QSNN outperforms traditional parametric multivariate forecasting techniques, thus improving the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: In this article, we present a novel approach to multivariate probabilistic forecasting. Our approach is based on an extension of single-output quantile regression (QR) to multivariate-targets, called quantile surfaces (QS). QS uses a simple yet compelling idea of indexing observations of a probabilistic forecast through direction and vector length to estimate a central tendency. We extend the single-output QR technique to multivariate probabilistic targets. QS efficiently models dependencies in multivariate target variables and represents probability distributions through discrete quantile levels. Therefore, we present a novel two-stage process. In the first stage, we perform a deterministic point forecast (i.e., central tendency estimation). Subsequently, we model the prediction uncertainty using QS involving neural networks called quantile surface regression neural networks (QSNN). Additionally, we introduce new methods for efficient and straightforward evaluation of the reliability and sharpness of the issued probabilistic QS predictions. We complement this by the directional extension of the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) score. Finally, we evaluate our novel approach on synthetic data and two currently researched real-world challenges in two different domains: First, probabilistic forecasting for renewable energy power generation, second, short-term cyclists trajectory forecasting for autonomously driving vehicles. Especially for the latter, our empirical results show that even a simple one-layer QSNN outperforms traditional parametric multivariate forecasting techniques, thus improving the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种多元概率预测的新方法。我们的方法基于单输出分位数回归 (QR) 到多变量目标的扩展，称为分位数曲面 (QS)。 QS 使用一个简单但令人信服的想法，即通过方向和向量长度对概率预测的观察结果进行索引，以估计集中趋势。我们将单输出 QR 技术扩展到多元概率目标。 QS 有效地对多变量目标变量中的依赖性进行建模，并通过离散分位数水平表示概率分布。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段过程。在第一阶段，我们执行确定性点预测（即集中趋势估计）。随后，我们使用涉及称为分位数表面回归神经网络 (QSNN) 的神经网络的 QS 对预测不确定性进行建模。此外，我们引入了新的方法来有效、直接地评估已发布的概率 QS 预测的可靠性和清晰度。我们通过连续排名概率得分（CRPS）得分的定向扩展来补充这一点。最后，我们评估了我们在合成数据上的新方法以及当前在两个不同领域研究的两个现实挑战：首先，可再生能源发电的概率预测，第二，自动驾驶车辆的短期骑车人轨迹预测。特别是对于后者，我们的实证结果表明，即使是简单的单层 QSNN 也优于传统的参数多元预测技术，从而提高了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为量化曲面（QS）的新方法，将单变量分位数回归扩展到多变量概率预测领域，通过两阶段过程建模多变量目标的依赖关系和预测不确定性。
AI.motivation: 传统分位数回归难以处理多变量目标的概率预测问题，而现有参数化方法在复杂场景下可能无法有效捕捉变量间依赖关系和不确定性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段方法：第一阶段进行确定性点预测（中心趋势估计），第二阶段使用量化曲面回归神经网络（QSNN）建模不确定性，并引入方向扩展的连续排名概率分数（CRPS）进行评估。
AI.result: 在合成数据及两个实际场景（可再生能源发电预测、自动驾驶车辆短时骑行者轨迹预测）中验证，简单单层QSNN优于传统参数化多变量预测方法，提升预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 量化曲面框架为多变量概率预测提供了灵活有效的方法，在实际应用中表现出优于现有技术的性能。

search_text: Quantile Surfaces -- Generalizing Quantile Regression to Multivariate Targets 分位数曲面——将分位数回归推广到多元目标 In this article, we present a novel approach to multivariate probabilistic forecasting. Our approach is based on an extension of single-output quantile regression (QR) to multivariate-targets, called quantile surfaces (QS). QS uses a simple yet compelling idea of indexing observations of a probabilistic forecast through direction and vector length to estimate a central tendency. We extend the single-output QR technique to multivariate probabilistic targets. QS efficiently models dependencies in multivariate target variables and represents probability distributions through discrete quantile levels. Therefore, we present a novel two-stage process. In the first stage, we perform a deterministic point forecast (i.e., central tendency estimation). Subsequently, we model the prediction uncertainty using QS involving neural networks called quantile surface regression neural networks (QSNN). Additionally, we introduce new methods for efficient and straightforward evaluation of the reliability and sharpness of the issued probabilistic QS predictions. We complement this by the directional extension of the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) score. Finally, we evaluate our novel approach on synthetic data and two currently researched real-world challenges in two different domains: First, probabilistic forecasting for renewable energy power generation, second, short-term cyclists trajectory forecasting for autonomously driving vehicles. Especially for the latter, our empirical results show that even a simple one-layer QSNN outperforms traditional parametric multivariate forecasting techniques, thus improving the state-of-the-art performance. 在本文中，我们提出了一种多元概率预测的新方法。我们的方法基于单输出分位数回归 (QR) 到多变量目标的扩展，称为分位数曲面 (QS)。 QS 使用一个简单但令人信服的想法，即通过方向和向量长度对概率预测的观察结果进行索引，以估计集中趋势。我们将单输出 QR 技术扩展到多元概率目标。 QS 有效地对多变量目标变量中的依赖性进行建模，并通过离散分位数水平表示概率分布。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段过程。在第一阶段，我们执行确定性点预测（即集中趋势估计）。随后，我们使用涉及称为分位数表面回归神经网络 (QSNN) 的神经网络的 QS 对预测不确定性进行建模。此外，我们引入了新的方法来有效、直接地评估已发布的概率 QS 预测的可靠性和清晰度。我们通过连续排名概率得分（CRPS）得分的定向扩展来补充这一点。最后，我们评估了我们在合成数据上的新方法以及当前在两个不同领域研究的两个现实挑战：首先，可再生能源发电的概率预测，第二，自动驾驶车辆的短期骑车人轨迹预测。特别是对于后者，我们的实证结果表明，即使是简单的单层 QSNN 也优于传统的参数多元预测技术，从而提高了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种名为量化曲面（QS）的新方法，将单变量分位数回归扩展到多变量概率预测领域，通过两阶段过程建模多变量目标的依赖关系和预测不确定性。 Maarten Bieshaar,Jens Schreiber,Stephan Vogt,André Gensler,Bernhard Sick stat.AP,cs.AI,stat.CO

authors_text: Wenqi Jiang,Zhenhao He,Shuai Zhang,Thomas B. Preußer,Kai Zeng,Liang Feng,Jiansong Zhang,Tongxuan Liu,Yong Li,Jingren Zhou,Ce Zhang,Gustavo Alonso
title: MicroRec: Efficient Recommendation Inference by Hardware and Data Structure Solutions
title_zh: MicroRec：通过硬件和数据结构解决方案进行高效推荐推理
comment: Accepted by MLSys'21 (the 4th Conference on Machine Learning and Systems)
comments: Accepted by MLSys'21 (the 4th Conference on Machine Learning and Systems)
abstract: Deep neural networks are widely used in personalized recommendation systems. Unlike regular DNN inference workloads, recommendation inference is memory-bound due to the many random memory accesses needed to lookup the embedding tables. The inference is also heavily constrained in terms of latency because producing a recommendation for a user must be done in about tens of milliseconds. In this paper, we propose MicroRec, a high-performance inference engine for recommendation systems. MicroRec accelerates recommendation inference by (1) redesigning the data structures involved in the embeddings to reduce the number of lookups needed and (2) taking advantage of the availability of High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) in FPGA accelerators to tackle the latency by enabling parallel lookups. We have implemented the resulting design on an FPGA board including the embedding lookup step as well as the complete inference process. Compared to the optimized CPU baseline (16 vCPU, AVX2-enabled), MicroRec achieves 13.8~14.7x speedup on embedding lookup alone and 2.5$~5.4x speedup for the entire recommendation inference in terms of throughput. As for latency, CPU-based engines needs milliseconds for inferring a recommendation while MicroRec only takes microseconds, a significant advantage in real-time recommendation systems.
summary: Deep neural networks are widely used in personalized recommendation systems. Unlike regular DNN inference workloads, recommendation inference is memory-bound due to the many random memory accesses needed to lookup the embedding tables. The inference is also heavily constrained in terms of latency because producing a recommendation for a user must be done in about tens of milliseconds. In this paper, we propose MicroRec, a high-performance inference engine for recommendation systems. MicroRec accelerates recommendation inference by (1) redesigning the data structures involved in the embeddings to reduce the number of lookups needed and (2) taking advantage of the availability of High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) in FPGA accelerators to tackle the latency by enabling parallel lookups. We have implemented the resulting design on an FPGA board including the embedding lookup step as well as the complete inference process. Compared to the optimized CPU baseline (16 vCPU, AVX2-enabled), MicroRec achieves 13.8~14.7x speedup on embedding lookup alone and 2.5$~5.4x speedup for the entire recommendation inference in terms of throughput. As for latency, CPU-based engines needs milliseconds for inferring a recommendation while MicroRec only takes microseconds, a significant advantage in real-time recommendation systems.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络广泛应用于个性化推荐系统。与常规 DNN 推理工作负载不同，由于查找嵌入表需要多次随机内存访问，推荐推理受到内存限制。该推理在延迟方面也受到严重限制，因为为用户生成推荐必须在大约数十毫秒内完成。在本文中，我们提出了 MicroRec，一种用于推荐系统的高性能推理引擎。 MicroRec 通过以下方式加速推荐推理：(1) 重新设计嵌入中涉及的数据结构，以减少所需的查找次数；(2) 利用 FPGA 加速器中高带宽内存 (HBM) 的可用性，通过启用并行查找来解决延迟问题。我们在 FPGA 板上实现了最终的设计，包括嵌入查找步骤以及完整的推理过程。与优化的 CPU 基准（16 vCPU、启用 AVX2）相比，MicroRec 在吞吐量方面仅在嵌入查找方面实现了 13.8~14.7 倍的加速，在整个推荐推理方面实现了 2.5~5.4 倍的加速。至于延迟，基于 CPU 的引擎需要几毫秒来推断推荐，而 MicroRec 仅需要几微秒，这在实时推荐系统中具有显着优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MicroRec，一种通过硬件和数据结构优化提升推荐系统推理效率的高性能推理引擎。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统推理因嵌入表查找的随机内存访问和严格延迟要求（毫秒级）面临性能瓶颈，传统方法难以满足实时需求。
AI.method: 通过重设计嵌入数据结构减少查找次数，并利用FPGA的高带宽内存（HBM）实现并行查找，结合FPGA硬件加速完整推理流程。
AI.result: 相比优化CPU基线，MicroRec在嵌入查找阶段提速13.8~14.7倍，整体推理吞吐量提升2.5~5.4倍，延迟从毫秒级降至微秒级。
AI.conclusion: MicroRec通过软硬件协同优化显著提升推荐推理效率，为实时推荐系统提供低延迟、高吞吐的解决方案。

search_text: MicroRec: Efficient Recommendation Inference by Hardware and Data Structure Solutions MicroRec：通过硬件和数据结构解决方案进行高效推荐推理 Deep neural networks are widely used in personalized recommendation systems. The inference is also heavily constrained in terms of latency because producing a recommendation for a user must be done in about tens of milliseconds. We have implemented the resulting design on an FPGA board including the embedding lookup step as well as the complete inference process. Compared to the optimized CPU baseline (16 vCPU, AVX2-enabled), MicroRec achieves 13.8~14.7x speedup on embedding lookup alone and 2.5$~5.4x speedup for the entire recommendation inference in terms of throughput. title: Fairness Perception from a Network-Centric Perspective
title_zh: 以网络为中心的视角的公平感知
abstract: Algorithmic fairness is a major concern in recent years as the influence of machine learning algorithms becomes more widespread. In this paper, we investigate the issue of algorithmic fairness from a network-centric perspective. Specifically, we introduce a novel yet intuitive function known as network-centric fairness perception and provide an axiomatic approach to analyze its properties. Using a peer-review network as case study, we also examine its utility in terms of assessing the perception of fairness in paper acceptance decisions. We show how the function can be extended to a group fairness metric known as fairness visibility and demonstrate its relationship to demographic parity. We also illustrate a potential pitfall of the fairness visibility measure that can be exploited to mislead individuals into perceiving that the algorithmic decisions are fair. We demonstrate how the problem can be alleviated by increasing the local neighborhood size of the fairness perception function.
summary: Algorithmic fairness is a major concern in recent years as the influence of machine learning algorithms becomes more widespread. In this paper, we investigate the issue of algorithmic fairness from a network-centric perspective. Specifically, we introduce a novel yet intuitive function known as network-centric fairness perception and provide an axiomatic approach to analyze its properties. Using a peer-review network as case study, we also examine its utility in terms of assessing the perception of fairness in paper acceptance decisions. We show how the function can be extended to a group fairness metric known as fairness visibility and demonstrate its relationship to demographic parity. We also illustrate a potential pitfall of the fairness visibility measure that can be exploited to mislead individuals into perceiving that the algorithmic decisions are fair. We demonstrate how the problem can be alleviated by increasing the local neighborhood size of the fairness perception function.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习算法的影响变得越来越广泛，算法公平性是近年来的一个主要问题。在本文中，我们从以网络为中心的角度研究算法公平性问题。具体来说，我们引入了一种新颖而直观的函数，称为以网络为中心的公平感知，并提供了一种公理化方法来分析其属性。使用同行评审网络作为案例研究，我们还检查了其在评估论文接受决策的公平性方面的效用。我们展示了如何将该函数扩展到称为公平可见性的群体公平度量，并展示其与人口平等的关系。我们还说明了公平可见性度量的潜在陷阱，该陷阱可被用来误导个人认为算法决策是公平的。我们演示了如何通过增加公平感知函数的局部邻域大小来缓解该问题。

AI.tldr: 本文从网络中心视角提出一种新型公平性感知函数，用于分析算法公平性，并通过同行评审网络案例研究其应用，同时探讨群体公平性度量的潜在问题。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习算法影响扩大，算法公平性成为核心问题。传统方法难以捕捉网络结构对公平性感知的影响，需从网络视角重新审视公平性评估。
AI.method: 引入网络中心公平性感知函数，采用公理化方法分析其性质；以同行评审网络为案例，扩展至群体公平性度量'公平性可见性'，并揭示其与人口统计公平性的关联。
AI.result: 证明了该函数可评估论文接受决策的公平性感知，发现公平性可见性指标可能被操纵误导，通过扩大局部邻域规模可缓解该问题。
AI.conclusion: 网络中心视角为公平性评估提供了新框架，揭示了群体公平性度量的潜在缺陷，并提出了通过调整网络结构参数优化公平性感知的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文从网络中心视角提出一种新型公平性感知函数，用于分析算法公平性，并通过同行评审网络案例研究其应用，同时探讨群体公平性度量的潜在问题。
ai_content.motivation: 随着机器学习算法影响扩大，算法公平性成为核心问题。传统方法难以捕捉网络结构对公平性感知的影响，需从网络视角重新审视公平性评估。
ai_content.method: 引入网络中心公平性感知函数，采用公理化方法分析其性质；以同行评审网络为案例，扩展至群体公平性度量'公平性可见性'，并揭示其与人口统计公平性的关联。
ai_content.result: 证明了该函数可评估论文接受决策的公平性感知，发现公平性可见性指标可能被操纵误导，通过扩大局部邻域规模可缓解该问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 网络中心视角为公平性评估提供了新框架，揭示了群体公平性度量的潜在缺陷，并提出了通过调整网络结构参数优化公平性感知的解决方案。

search_text: Fairness Perception from a Network-Centric Perspective 以网络为中心的视角的公平感知 Algorithmic fairness is a major concern in recent years as the influence of machine learning algorithms becomes more widespread. In this paper, we investigate the issue of algorithmic fairness from a network-centric perspective. Specifically, we introduce a novel yet intuitive function known as network-centric fairness perception and provide an axiomatic approach to analyze its properties. Using a peer-review network as case study, we also examine its utility in terms of assessing the perception of fairness in paper acceptance decisions. We show how the function can be extended to a group fairness metric known as fairness visibility and demonstrate its relationship to demographic parity. We also illustrate a potential pitfall of the fairness visibility measure that can be exploited to mislead individuals into perceiving that the algorithmic decisions are fair. We demonstrate how the problem can be alleviated by increasing the local neighborhood size of the fairness perception function. 随着机器学习算法的影响变得越来越广泛，算法公平性是近年来的一个主要问题。在本文中，我们从以网络为中心的角度研究算法公平性问题。具体来说，我们引入了一种新颖而直观的函数，称为以网络为中心的公平感知，并提供了一种公理化方法来分析其属性。使用同行评审网络作为案例研究，我们还检查了其在评估论文接受决策的公平性方面的效用。我们展示了如何将该函数扩展到称为公平可见性的群体公平度量，并展示其与人口平等的关系。我们还说明了公平可见性度量的潜在陷阱，该陷阱可被用来误导个人认为算法决策是公平的。我们演示了如何通过增加公平感知函数的局部邻域大小来缓解该问题。 本文从网络中心视角提出一种新型公平性感知函数，用于分析算法公平性，并通过同行评审网络案例研究其应用，同时探讨群体公平性度量的潜在问题。 Farzan Masrour,Pang-Ning Tan,Abdol-Hossein Esfahanian cs.SI,cs.AI

title: Continual learning using hash-routed convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 使用哈希路由卷积神经网络进行持续学习
abstract: Continual learning could shift the machine learning paradigm from data centric to model centric. A continual learning model needs to scale efficiently to handle semantically different datasets, while avoiding unnecessary growth. We introduce hash-routed convolutional neural networks: a group of convolutional units where data flows dynamically. Feature maps are compared using feature hashing and similar data is routed to the same units. A hash-routed network provides excellent plasticity thanks to its routed nature, while generating stable features through the use of orthogonal feature hashing. Each unit evolves separately and new units can be added (to be used only when necessary). Hash-routed networks achieve excellent performance across a variety of typical continual learning benchmarks without storing raw data and train using only gradient descent. Besides providing a continual learning framework for supervised tasks with encouraging results, our model can be used for unsupervised or reinforcement learning.
summary: Continual learning could shift the machine learning paradigm from data centric to model centric. A continual learning model needs to scale efficiently to handle semantically different datasets, while avoiding unnecessary growth. We introduce hash-routed convolutional neural networks: a group of convolutional units where data flows dynamically. Feature maps are compared using feature hashing and similar data is routed to the same units. A hash-routed network provides excellent plasticity thanks to its routed nature, while generating stable features through the use of orthogonal feature hashing. Each unit evolves separately and new units can be added (to be used only when necessary). Hash-routed networks achieve excellent performance across a variety of typical continual learning benchmarks without storing raw data and train using only gradient descent. Besides providing a continual learning framework for supervised tasks with encouraging results, our model can be used for unsupervised or reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 持续学习可以将机器学习范式从以数据为中心转变为以模型为中心。持续学习模型需要有效扩展以处理语义上不同的数据集，同时避免不必要的增长。我们引入哈希路由卷积神经网络：一组数据动态流动的卷积单元。使用特征散列来比较特征图，并将相似的数据路由到相同的单元。哈希路由网络由于其路由性质而提供了出色的可塑性，同时通过使用正交特征哈希生成稳定的特征。每个单位单独进化，并且可以添加新单位（仅在必要时使用）。哈希路由网络在各种典型的持续学习基准中实现了出色的性能，无需存储原始数据，并且仅使用梯度下降进行训练。除了为监督任务提供持续学习框架并取得令人鼓舞的结果外，我们的模型还可以用于无监督学习或强化学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于哈希路由卷积神经网络（Hash-Routed CNN）的持续学习框架，旨在实现模型在处理语义不同数据集时的高效扩展与稳定特征生成。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习以数据为中心，难以应对动态变化的数据流。持续学习需在不存储原始数据的前提下，实现模型对新任务的适应与扩展，同时避免冗余增长。
AI.method: 通过特征哈希将相似数据路由至相同卷积单元，利用正交哈希生成稳定特征。网络单元独立演化，仅在必要时新增单元，结合梯度下降训练且无需存储原始数据。
AI.result: 在多种持续学习基准测试中表现优异，适用于监督学习、无监督学习及强化学习场景，验证了其泛化能力与高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为模型中心的持续学习提供了新思路，通过动态路由与正交哈希平衡了模型的可塑性与稳定性，具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Designing a 9-channel location microphone from scratch
title_zh: 从头开始设计 9 通道定位麦克风
comment: This is a long version of an AES e-Brief to be held at the 149th AES convention in Oct 2020
comments: This is a long version of an AES e-Brief to be held at the 149th AES convention in Oct 2020
abstract: The design of a 9-channel microphone system for location recording of mainly atmospheres will be described. The key concept is matching the recording and reproduction angles of the individual sectors. The rig is designed for the AURO-3D 9-channel playback system (4 height speakers). An analysis of the reproduction layout will be included, as well as recording concepts like the Stereo Recording Angle (SRA), Williams curves, Scale Factors for different reproduction angles than 60 degrees and diffuse field decorrelation. Finally, practical aspects like microphone mounts and windshields for such a system will be presented.
summary: The design of a 9-channel microphone system for location recording of mainly atmospheres will be described. The key concept is matching the recording and reproduction angles of the individual sectors. The rig is designed for the AURO-3D 9-channel playback system (4 height speakers). An analysis of the reproduction layout will be included, as well as recording concepts like the Stereo Recording Angle (SRA), Williams curves, Scale Factors for different reproduction angles than 60 degrees and diffuse field decorrelation. Finally, practical aspects like microphone mounts and windshields for such a system will be presented.
abstract_zh: 将描述主要用于气氛定位记录的9通道麦克风系统的设计。关键概念是匹配各个扇区的记录和再现角度。该设备专为 AURO-3D 9 通道播放系统（4 个纵向扬声器）而设计。其中将包括对再现布局的分析，以及诸如立体声记录角度 (SRA)、威廉姆斯曲线、60 度以上不同再现角度的比例因子以及漫射场去相关等记录概念。最后，将介绍此类系统的麦克风支架和挡风玻璃等实用方面。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种9通道麦克风系统，用于环境氛围的定位录音，重点匹配录制与再现角度，适配AURO-3D 9通道播放系统。
AI.motivation: 为实现更精确的三维音频再现，满足多声道播放系统对空间声场还原的需求，解决非标准角度及扩散场录音的技术挑战。
AI.method: 通过分析AURO-3D再现布局，结合立体声录音角度(SRA)、Williams曲线、非60度缩放因子及扩散场去相关技术，设计麦克风阵列与物理支架结构。
AI.result: 完成9通道麦克风系统设计，验证了角度匹配与缩放因子的有效性，并提出适用于4个高度扬声器的录音方案及防风罩等实用配件。
AI.conclusion: 该设计提升了三维音频的空间还原精度，为多声道沉浸式音频制作提供了可落地的录音解决方案。
