Finally, practical aspects like microphone mounts and windshields for such a system will be presented. 将描述主要用于气氛定位记录的9通道麦克风系统的设计。关键概念是匹配各个扇区的记录和再现角度。该设备专为 AURO-3D 9 通道播放系统（4 个纵向扬声器）而设计。其中将包括对再现布局的分析，以及诸如立体声记录角度 (SRA)、威廉姆斯曲线、60 度以上不同再现角度的比例因子以及漫射场去相关等记录概念。最后，将介绍此类系统的麦克风支架和挡风玻璃等实用方面。 本文设计了一种9通道麦克风系统，用于环境氛围的定位录音，重点匹配录制与再现角度，适配AURO-3D 9通道播放系统。 Florian Camerer eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Differentially Private Secure Multi-Party Computation for Federated Learning in Financial Applications
title_zh: 金融应用中联邦学习的差分隐私安全多方计算
abstract: Federated Learning enables a population of clients, working with a trusted server, to collaboratively learn a shared machine learning model while keeping each client's data within its own local systems. This reduces the risk of exposing sensitive data, but it is still possible to reverse engineer information about a client's private data set from communicated model parameters. Most federated learning systems therefore use differential privacy to introduce noise to the parameters. This adds uncertainty to any attempt to reveal private client data, but also reduces the accuracy of the shared model, limiting the useful scale of privacy-preserving noise. A system can further reduce the coordinating server's ability to recover private client information, without additional accuracy loss, by also including secure multiparty computation. An approach combining both techniques is especially relevant to financial firms as it allows new possibilities for collaborative learning without exposing sensitive client data. This could produce more accurate models for important tasks like optimal trade execution, credit origination, or fraud detection. The key contributions of this paper are: We present a privacy-preserving federated learning protocol to a non-specialist audience, demonstrate it using logistic regression on a real-world credit card fraud data set, and evaluate it using an open-source simulation platform which we have adapted for the development of federated learning systems.
summary: Federated Learning enables a population of clients, working with a trusted server, to collaboratively learn a shared machine learning model while keeping each client's data within its own local systems. This reduces the risk of exposing sensitive data, but it is still possible to reverse engineer information about a client's private data set from communicated model parameters. Most federated learning systems therefore use differential privacy to introduce noise to the parameters. This adds uncertainty to any attempt to reveal private client data, but also reduces the accuracy of the shared model, limiting the useful scale of privacy-preserving noise. A system can further reduce the coordinating server's ability to recover private client information, without additional accuracy loss, by also including secure multiparty computation. An approach combining both techniques is especially relevant to financial firms as it allows new possibilities for collaborative learning without exposing sensitive client data. This could produce more accurate models for important tasks like optimal trade execution, credit origination, or fraud detection. The key contributions of this paper are: We present a privacy-preserving federated learning protocol to a non-specialist audience, demonstrate it using logistic regression on a real-world credit card fraud data set, and evaluate it using an open-source simulation platform which we have adapted for the development of federated learning systems.
abstract_zh: 联合学习使一群客户端能够与受信任的服务器合作，协作学习共享的机器学习模型，同时将每个客户端的数据保留在其自己的本地系统中。这降低了暴露敏感数据的风险，但仍然可以从通信的模型参数中逆向工程有关客户私有数据集的信息。因此，大多数联邦学习系统使用差分隐私向参数引入噪声。这给任何泄露私人客户数据的尝试增加了不确定性，但也降低了共享模型的准确性，限制了隐私保护噪声的有用规模。通过还包括安全多方计算，系统可以进一步降低协调服务器恢复私人客户端信息的能力，而不会造成额外的准确性损失。结合这两种技术的方法与金融公司尤其相关，因为它为协作学习提供了新的可能性，而无需暴露敏感的客户数据。这可以为优化交易执行、信贷发放或欺诈检测等重要任务生成更准确的模型。本文的主要贡献是：我们向非专业受众展示了一种保护隐私的联邦学习协议，在现实世界的信用卡欺诈数据集上使用逻辑回归来演示它，并使用我们已适应联邦学习系统开发的开源模拟平台对其进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合差分隐私与安全多方计算的联邦学习协议，用于金融领域的隐私保护协作学习。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中模型参数可能泄露客户端敏感数据，差分隐私虽能增加不确定性但会降低模型精度，需进一步结合安全多方计算以增强隐私保护。
AI.method: 融合差分隐私与安全多方计算技术，基于逻辑回归在信用卡欺诈数据集上实现隐私保护联邦学习，并通过开源仿真平台进行验证。
AI.result: 成功演示了隐私保护协议的有效性，在保持模型精度的同时降低服务器恢复私有信息的能力，验证了方法在金融场景的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为金融领域提供了兼顾隐私与模型精度的协作学习方案，通过实际数据集验证了技术组合的实用性与安全性。

authors_text: Jingkang Yang,Weirong Chen,Litong Feng,Xiaopeng Yan,Huabin Zheng,Wayne Zhang
title: Webly Supervised Image Classification with Metadata: Automatic Noisy Label Correction via Visual-Semantic Graph
title_zh: 使用元数据进行 Webly 监督图像分类：通过视觉语义图自动进行噪声标签校正
abstract: Webly supervised learning becomes attractive recently for its efficiency in data expansion without expensive human labeling. However, adopting search queries or hashtags as web labels of images for training brings massive noise that degrades the performance of DNNs. Especially, due to the semantic confusion of query words, the images retrieved by one query may contain tremendous images belonging to other concepts. For example, searching `tiger cat' on Flickr will return a dominating number of tiger images rather than the cat images. These realistic noisy samples usually have clear visual semantic clusters in the visual space that mislead DNNs from learning accurate semantic labels. To correct real-world noisy labels, expensive human annotations seem indispensable. Fortunately, we find that metadata can provide extra knowledge to discover clean web labels in a labor-free fashion, making it feasible to automatically provide correct semantic guidance among the massive label-noisy web data. In this paper, we propose an automatic label corrector VSGraph-LC based on the visual-semantic graph. VSGraph-LC starts from anchor selection referring to the semantic similarity between metadata and correct label concepts, and then propagates correct labels from anchors on a visual graph using graph neural network (GNN). Experiments on realistic webly supervised learning datasets Webvision-1000 and NUS-81-Web show the effectiveness and robustness of VSGraph-LC. Moreover, VSGraph-LC reveals its advantage on the open-set validation set.
summary: Webly supervised learning becomes attractive recently for its efficiency in data expansion without expensive human labeling. However, adopting search queries or hashtags as web labels of images for training brings massive noise that degrades the performance of DNNs. Especially, due to the semantic confusion of query words, the images retrieved by one query may contain tremendous images belonging to other concepts. For example, searching `tiger cat' on Flickr will return a dominating number of tiger images rather than the cat images. These realistic noisy samples usually have clear visual semantic clusters in the visual space that mislead DNNs from learning accurate semantic labels. To correct real-world noisy labels, expensive human annotations seem indispensable. Fortunately, we find that metadata can provide extra knowledge to discover clean web labels in a labor-free fashion, making it feasible to automatically provide correct semantic guidance among the massive label-noisy web data. In this paper, we propose an automatic label corrector VSGraph-LC based on the visual-semantic graph. VSGraph-LC starts from anchor selection referring to the semantic similarity between metadata and correct label concepts, and then propagates correct labels from anchors on a visual graph using graph neural network (GNN). Experiments on realistic webly supervised learning datasets Webvision-1000 and NUS-81-Web show the effectiveness and robustness of VSGraph-LC. Moreover, VSGraph-LC reveals its advantage on the open-set validation set.
abstract_zh: Webly 监督学习最近因其在数据扩展方面的效率而无需昂贵的人工标记而变得有吸引力。然而，采用搜索查询或主题标签作为训练图像的网络标签会带来大量噪声，从而降低 DNN 的性能。特别是，由于查询词的语义混乱，一个查询检索到的图像可能包含大量属于其他概念的图像。例如，在 Flickr 上搜索“虎猫”将返回大量老虎图像而不是猫图像。这些真实的噪声样本通常在视觉空间中具有清晰的视觉语义簇，从而误导 DNN 学习准确的语义标签。为了纠正现实世界中的嘈杂标签，昂贵的人工注释似乎是必不可少的。幸运的是，我们发现元数据可以提供额外的知识，以一种无需人工的方式发现干净的网络标签，从而可以在大量标签噪声的网络数据中自动提供正确的语义指导。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于视觉语义图的自动标签校正器 VSGraph-LC。 VSGraph-LC 从锚点选择开始，参考元数据和正确标签概念之间的语义相似性，然后使用图神经网络（GNN）从视觉图上的锚点传播正确的标签。在现实网络监督学习数据集 Webvision-1000 和 NUS-81-Web 上的实验表明了 VSGraph-LC 的有效性和鲁棒性。此外，VSGraph-LC在开放集验证集上展现了其优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉语义图的自动噪声标签校正方法VSGraph-LC，解决网络监督图像分类中因搜索关键词语义混淆导致的标签噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 网络监督学习虽能高效扩展数据，但依赖搜索查询/标签作为图像标签时存在严重语义混淆噪声，传统人工校正成本高昂，需探索自动化的标签清洗方案。
AI.method: 构建视觉语义图，通过元数据与正确标签的语义相似度选择锚点，利用图神经网络在视觉图上进行标签传播，实现噪声标签的自动校正。
AI.result: 在Webvision-1000和NUS-81-Web数据集上验证了VSGraph-LC的有效性与鲁棒性，尤其在开放集验证集上展现显著优势。
AI.conclusion: VSGraph-LC通过元数据引导的视觉语义图结构，实现了无需人工干预的噪声标签自动校正，为网络监督学习提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

Experiments on realistic webly supervised learning datasets Webvision-1000 and NUS-81-Web show the effectiveness and robustness of VSGraph-LC. Moreover, VSGraph-LC reveals its advantage on the open-set validation set. Webly 监督学习最近因其在数据扩展方面的效率而无需昂贵的人工标记而变得有吸引力。然而，采用搜索查询或主题标签作为训练图像的网络标签会带来大量噪声，从而降低 DNN 的性能。特别是，由于查询词的语义混乱，一个查询检索到的图像可能包含大量属于其他概念的图像。例如，在 Flickr 上搜索“虎猫”将返回大量老虎图像而不是猫图像。这些真实的噪声样本通常在视觉空间中具有清晰的视觉语义簇，从而误导 DNN 学习准确的语义标签。为了纠正现实世界中的嘈杂标签，昂贵的人工注释似乎是必不可少的。幸运的是，我们发现元数据可以提供额外的知识，以一种无需人工的方式发现干净的网络标签，从而可以在大量标签噪声的网络数据中自动提供正确的语义指导。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于视觉语义图的自动标签校正器 VSGraph-LC。 VSGraph-LC 从锚点选择开始，参考元数据和正确标签概念之间的语义相似性，然后使用图神经网络（GNN）从视觉图上的锚点传播正确的标签。在现实网络监督学习数据集 Webvision-1000 和 NUS-81-Web 上的实验表明了 VSGraph-LC 的有效性和鲁棒性。此外，VSGraph-LC在开放集验证集上展现了其优势。 本文提出一种基于视觉语义图的自动噪声标签校正方法VSGraph-LC，解决网络监督图像分类中因搜索关键词语义混淆导致的标签噪声问题。 Jingkang Yang,Weirong Chen,Litong Feng,Xiaopeng Yan,Huabin Zheng,Wayne Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Atchade Parfait Adelomou,Elisabet Golobardes Ribe,Xavier Vilasis Cardona
title: Using the Parameterized Quantum Circuit combined with Variational-Quantum-Eigensolver (VQE) to create an Intelligent social workers' schedule problem solver
title_zh: 使用参数化量子电路结合变分量子特征求解器（VQE）创建智能社工日程问题解决器
comment: Quantum algorithms, Variational Quantum Eigensolver, variational quantum computing, Case-based reasoning, combinatorial optimization algorithms
comments: Quantum algorithms, Variational Quantum Eigensolver, variational quantum computing, Case-based reasoning, combinatorial optimization algorithms
abstract: The social worker scheduling problem is a class of combinatorial optimization problems that combines scheduling with routing issues. These types of problems with classical computing can only be solved, in the best of cases, in an approximate way and significantly when the input data does not grow considerably. Today, the focus on the quantum computer should no longer be only on its enormous computing power, but also on the use of its imperfection for this era, (Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ)) to create a powerful optimization and learning device that uses variational techniques. We had already proposed a formulation and solution of this problem using the capacity of the quantum computer. In this article, we present some broad results of the experimentation techniques. And above all, we propose an adaptive and intelligence solution, which efficiently recalculates the schedules of social workers. Taking into account new restrictions and changes in the initial conditions, by using a case-based reasoning system and the variational quantum eigensolver based on a finite-depth quantum circuit. That encodes the ground state of the Hamiltonian of social workers. The quantum feasibility of the algorithm will be modelled with docplex and tested on IBMQ computers.

These types of problems with classical computing can only be solved, in the best of cases, in an approximate way and significantly when the input data does not grow considerably. Today, the focus on the quantum computer should no longer be only on its enormous computing power, but also on the use of its imperfection for this era, (Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ)) to create a powerful optimization and learning device that uses variational techniques. We had already proposed a formulation and solution of this problem using the capacity of the quantum computer. In this article, we present some broad results of the experimentation techniques. And above all, we propose an adaptive and intelligence solution, which efficiently recalculates the schedules of social workers. Taking into account new restrictions and changes in the initial conditions, by using a case-based reasoning system and the variational quantum eigensolver based on a finite-depth quantum circuit. That encodes the ground state of the Hamiltonian of social workers. The quantum feasibility of the algorithm will be modelled with docplex and tested on IBMQ computers.
abstract_zh: 社会工作者调度问题是一类将调度与路由问题相结合的组合优化问题。在最好的情况下，只有当输入数据没有大幅增长时，经典计算才能以近似的方式显着地解决这些类型的问题。如今，人们对量子计算机的关注点不应仅仅停留在其巨大的计算能力上，而应该放在利用其对于这个时代的不完善性（噪声中尺度量子（NISQ））来创建使用变分技术的强大优化和学习设备。我们已经提出了利用量子计算机的能力来解决这个问题的公式和解决方案。在本文中，我们介绍了实验技术的一些广泛结果。最重要的是，我们提出了一种自适应智能解决方案，可以有效地重新计算社会工作者的日程安排。考虑到新的限制和初始条件的变化，通过使用基于案例的推理系统和基于有限深度量子电路的变分量子本征求解器。它编码了社会工作者哈密顿量的基态。该算法的量子可行性将使用 docplex 进行建模并在 IBMQ 计算机上进行测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合参数化量子电路与变分量子特征求解器（VQE）的智能社会工作者排班问题求解方法。
AI.motivation: 传统计算方法在处理社会工作者排班（组合优化问题）时存在效率低、难以应对动态变化的缺陷，需利用量子计算的潜力解决大规模数据问题。
AI.method: 基于NISQ量子计算机，设计参数化量子电路编码社会工作者调度的哈密顿量基态，并结合案例推理系统与VQE实现动态排班优化。
AI.result: 通过docplex建模验证算法可行性，并在IBMQ量子计算机上测试，证明其可有效处理新增约束与初始条件变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂调度问题提供了一种适应性强、基于量子变分技术的智能解决方案，展示了量子计算在优化领域的应用潜力。

title: Robust Optimal Transport with Applications in Generative Modeling and Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 鲁棒最优传输在生成建模和领域适应中的应用
comment: Accepted in NeurIPS 2020. Code available at https://github.com/yogeshbalaji/robustOT
comments: Accepted in NeurIPS 2020. Code available at https://github.com/yogeshbalaji/robustOT
abstract: Optimal Transport (OT) distances such as Wasserstein have been used in several areas such as GANs and domain adaptation. OT, however, is very sensitive to outliers (samples with large noise) in the data since in its objective function, every sample, including outliers, is weighed similarly due to the marginal constraints. To remedy this issue, robust formulations of OT with unbalanced marginal constraints have previously been proposed. However, employing these methods in deep learning problems such as GANs and domain adaptation is challenging due to the instability of their dual optimization solvers. In this paper, we resolve these issues by deriving a computationally-efficient dual form of the robust OT optimization that is amenable to modern deep learning applications. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our formulation in two applications of GANs and domain adaptation. Our approach can train state-of-the-art GAN models on noisy datasets corrupted with outlier distributions. In particular, our optimization computes weights for training samples reflecting how difficult it is for those samples to be generated in the model. In domain adaptation, our robust OT formulation leads to improved accuracy compared to the standard adversarial adaptation methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/yogeshbalaji/robustOT.
summary: Optimal Transport (OT) distances such as Wasserstein have been used in several areas such as GANs and domain adaptation. OT, however, is very sensitive to outliers (samples with large noise) in the data since in its objective function, every sample, including outliers, is weighed similarly due to the marginal constraints. To remedy this issue, robust formulations of OT with unbalanced marginal constraints have previously been proposed. However, employing these methods in deep learning problems such as GANs and domain adaptation is challenging due to the instability of their dual optimization solvers. In this paper, we resolve these issues by deriving a computationally-efficient dual form of the robust OT optimization that is amenable to modern deep learning applications. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our formulation in two applications of GANs and domain adaptation. Our approach can train state-of-the-art GAN models on noisy datasets corrupted with outlier distributions. In particular, our optimization computes weights for training samples reflecting how difficult it is for those samples to be generated in the model. In domain adaptation, our robust OT formulation leads to improved accuracy compared to the standard adversarial adaptation methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/yogeshbalaji/robustOT.
abstract_zh: Wasserstein 等最佳传输 (OT) 距离已用于 GAN 和域适应等多个领域。然而，OT 对数据中的异常值（具有大噪声的样本）非常敏感，因为在其目标函数中，由于边际约束，每个样本（包括异常值）都会被类似地加权。为了解决这个问题，先前已经提出了具有不平衡边际约束的稳健 OT 公式。然而，由于其对偶优化求解器的不稳定性，在 GAN 和域适应等深度学习问题中采用这些方法具有挑战性。在本文中，我们通过推导计算高效的鲁棒 OT 优化的对偶形式来解决这些问题，该优化适合现代深度学习应用。我们在 GAN 和域适应的两个应用中证明了我们的公式的有效性。我们的方法可以在因异常分布而损坏的噪声数据集上训练最先进的 GAN 模型。特别是，我们的优化计算训练样本的权重，反映了在模型中生成这些样本的难度。在领域适应中，与标准对抗性适应方法相比，我们强大的 OT 公式提高了准确性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yogeshbalaji/robustOT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒最优运输方法，用于解决生成模型和领域适应中的噪声数据问题。
AI.motivation: 传统最优运输（OT）对异常值敏感，导致在生成对抗网络（GAN）和领域适应任务中表现不稳定。
AI.method: 推导出计算高效的鲁棒OT对偶形式，通过不平衡边缘约束优化样本权重。
AI.result: 在噪声数据集上成功训练先进GAN模型，并提升领域适应任务的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了OT对异常值的敏感性，增强了深度学习应用的鲁棒性。

title: On the Minimal Recognizable Image Patch
title_zh: 关于最小可识别图像块
abstract: In contrast to human vision, common recognition algorithms often fail on partially occluded images. We propose characterizing, empirically, the algorithmic limits by finding a minimal recognizable patch (MRP) that is by itself sufficient to recognize the image. A specialized deep network allows us to find the most informative patches of a given size, and serves as an experimental tool. A human vision study recently characterized related (but different) minimally recognizable configurations (MIRCs) [1], for which we specify computational analogues (denoted cMIRCs). The drop in human decision accuracy associated with size reduction of these MIRCs is substantial and sharp. Interestingly, such sharp reductions were also found for the computational versions we specified.
summary: In contrast to human vision, common recognition algorithms often fail on partially occluded images. We propose characterizing, empirically, the algorithmic limits by finding a minimal recognizable patch (MRP) that is by itself sufficient to recognize the image. A specialized deep network allows us to find the most informative patches of a given size, and serves as an experimental tool. A human vision study recently characterized related (but different) minimally recognizable configurations (MIRCs) [1], for which we specify computational analogues (denoted cMIRCs). The drop in human decision accuracy associated with size reduction of these MIRCs is substantial and sharp. Interestingly, such sharp reductions were also found for the computational versions we specified.
abstract_zh: 与人类视觉相比，常见的识别算法通常无法识别部分遮挡的图像。我们建议通过寻找本身足以识别图像的最小可识别补丁（MRP）来凭经验表征算法限制。专门的深度网络使我们能够找到给定大小的信息最丰富的补丁，并作为实验工具。最近的一项人类视觉研究描述了相关（但不同）的最小可识别配置（MIRC）[1]，我们为此指定了计算类似物（表示为 cMIRC）。与这些 MIRC 尺寸减小相关的人类决策准确性大幅下降。有趣的是，我们指定的计算版本也发现了这种急剧减少。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过寻找最小可识别图像块（MRP），实证分析算法在部分遮挡图像下的识别极限，并与人类视觉研究结果进行对比。
AI.motivation: 传统识别算法在部分遮挡图像上表现不佳，而人类视觉能有效处理此类情况。作者希望通过研究算法的最小可识别块（MRP）及其与人类视觉研究（MIRCs）的关联，揭示算法局限性。
AI.method: 设计专用深度网络，识别特定尺寸的最具信息量的图像块，并定义计算模拟的cMIRCs以对应人类MIRCs，通过尺寸缩减实验对比算法与人类的识别性能变化。
AI.result: 当MIRCs尺寸缩减时，人类和计算版本（cMIRCs）的识别准确率均出现显著且急剧的下降，表明两者在识别敏感性上存在相似性。
AI.conclusion: 算法与人类视觉在最小可识别块的敏感性上具有一致性，这为理解算法局限性及改进方向提供了实证依据。

search_text: On the Minimal Recognizable Image Patch 关于最小可识别图像块 In contrast to human vision, common recognition algorithms often fail on partially occluded images. We propose characterizing, empirically, the algorithmic limits by finding a minimal recognizable patch (MRP) that is by itself sufficient to recognize the image. A specialized deep network allows us to find the most informative patches of a given size, and serves as an experimental tool. A human vision study recently characterized related (but different) minimally recognizable configurations (MIRCs) [1], for which we specify computational analogues (denoted cMIRCs). The drop in human decision accuracy associated with size reduction of these MIRCs is substantial and sharp. Interestingly, such sharp reductions were also found for the computational versions we specified. 与人类视觉相比，常见的识别算法通常无法识别部分遮挡的图像。我们建议通过寻找本身足以识别图像的最小可识别补丁（MRP）来凭经验表征算法限制。专门的深度网络使我们能够找到给定大小的信息最丰富的补丁，并作为实验工具。最近的一项人类视觉研究描述了相关（但不同）的最小可识别配置（MIRC）[1]，我们为此指定了计算类似物（表示为 cMIRC）。与这些 MIRC 尺寸减小相关的人类决策准确性大幅下降。有趣的是，我们指定的计算版本也发现了这种急剧减少。 本文旨在通过寻找最小可识别图像块（MRP），实证分析算法在部分遮挡图像下的识别极限，并与人类视觉研究结果进行对比。 Mark Fonaryov,Michael Lindenbaum cs.CV

authors_text: Chuanbo Wang,DM Anisuzzaman,Victor Williamson,Mrinal Kanti Dhar,Behrouz Rostami,Jeffrey Niezgoda,Sandeep Gopalakrishnan,Zeyun Yu
title: Fully Automatic Wound Segmentation with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度卷积神经网络进行全自动伤口分割
abstract: Acute and chronic wounds have varying etiologies and are an economic burden to healthcare systems around the world. The advanced wound care market is expected to exceed $22 billion by 2024. Wound care professionals rely heavily on images and image documentation for proper diagnosis and treatment. Unfortunately lack of expertise can lead to improper diagnosis of wound etiology and inaccurate wound management and documentation. Fully automatic segmentation of wound areas in natural images is an important part of the diagnosis and care protocol since it is crucial to measure the area of the wound and provide quantitative parameters in the treatment. Various deep learning models have gained success in image analysis including semantic segmentation. Particularly, MobileNetV2 stands out among others due to its lightweight architecture and uncompromised performance. This manuscript proposes a novel convolutional framework based on MobileNetV2 and connected component labelling to segment wound regions from natural images. We build an annotated wound image dataset consisting of 1,109 foot ulcer images from 889 patients to train and test the deep learning models. We demonstrate the effectiveness and mobility of our method by conducting comprehensive experiments and analyses on various segmentation neural networks.
summary: Acute and chronic wounds have varying etiologies and are an economic burden to healthcare systems around the world. The advanced wound care market is expected to exceed $22 billion by 2024. Wound care professionals rely heavily on images and image documentation for proper diagnosis and treatment. Unfortunately lack of expertise can lead to improper diagnosis of wound etiology and inaccurate wound management and documentation. Fully automatic segmentation of wound areas in natural images is an important part of the diagnosis and care protocol since it is crucial to measure the area of the wound and provide quantitative parameters in the treatment. Various deep learning models have gained success in image analysis including semantic segmentation. Particularly, MobileNetV2 stands out among others due to its lightweight architecture and uncompromised performance. This manuscript proposes a novel convolutional framework based on MobileNetV2 and connected component labelling to segment wound regions from natural images. We build an annotated wound image dataset consisting of 1,109 foot ulcer images from 889 patients to train and test the deep learning models. We demonstrate the effectiveness and mobility of our method by conducting comprehensive experiments and analyses on various segmentation neural networks.
abstract_zh: 急性和慢性伤口有不同的病因，给世界各地的医疗系统带来经济负担。到 2024 年，高级伤口护理市场预计将超过 220 亿美元。伤口护理专业人员严重依赖图像和图像文档来进行正确的诊断和治疗。不幸的是，缺乏专业知识可能会导致伤口病因诊断不当以及伤口管理和记录不准确。自然图像中伤口区域的全自动分割是诊断和护理方案的重要组成部分，因为测量伤口面积并在治疗中提供定量参数至关重要。各种深度学习模型在包括语义分割在内的图像分析方面取得了成功。特别是，MobileNetV2 因其轻量级架构和不折不扣的性能而脱颖而出。本手稿提出了一种基于 MobileNetV2 和连接组件标记的新型卷积框架，用于从自然图像中分割伤口区域。我们构建了一个带注释的伤口图像数据集，其中包含来自 889 名患者的 1,109 张足部溃疡图像，用于训练和测试深度学习模型。我们通过对各种分割神经网络进行全面的实验和分析来证明我们方法的有效性和移动性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于MobileNetV2和连通分量标记的深度卷积神经网络框架，用于自然图像中的伤口区域自动分割。
AI.motivation: 伤口诊断依赖图像分析，但缺乏专业知识可能导致诊断错误和管理不当，而自动分割技术可提供定量参数以提高治疗准确性。
AI.method: 结合轻量级MobileNetV2架构与连通分量标记算法，构建伤口分割框架，并使用包含1,109张足部溃疡图像的数据集进行训练与测试。
AI.result: 通过全面实验验证了该方法在多种分割网络中的有效性，证明其在准确性和移动性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为临床伤口诊断提供了高效、自动化的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

The advanced wound care market is expected to exceed $22 billion by 2024. Wound care professionals rely heavily on images and image documentation for proper diagnosis and treatment. Unfortunately lack of expertise can lead to improper diagnosis of wound etiology and inaccurate wound management and documentation. Fully automatic segmentation of wound areas in natural images is an important part of the diagnosis and care protocol since it is crucial to measure the area of the wound and provide quantitative parameters in the treatment. title: A Refined Laser Method and Faster Matrix Multiplication
title_zh: 改进的激光方法和更快的矩阵乘法
abstract: The complexity of matrix multiplication is measured in terms of $ω$, the smallest real number such that two $n\times n$ matrices can be multiplied using $O(n^{ω+ε})$ field operations for all $ε>0$; the best bound until now is $ω<2.37287$ [Le Gall'14]. All bounds on $ω$ since 1986 have been obtained using the so-called laser method, a way to lower-bound the `value' of a tensor in designing matrix multiplication algorithms. The main result of this paper is a refinement of the laser method that improves the resulting value bound for most sufficiently large tensors. Thus, even before computing any specific values, it is clear that we achieve an improved bound on $ω$, and we indeed obtain the best bound on $ω$ to date: $$ω< 2.37286.$$ The improvement is of the same magnitude as the improvement that [Le Gall'14] obtained over the previous bound [Vassilevska W.'12]. Our improvement to the laser method is quite general, and we believe it will have further applications in arithmetic complexity.
summary: The complexity of matrix multiplication is measured in terms of $ω$, the smallest real number such that two $n\times n$ matrices can be multiplied using $O(n^{ω+ε})$ field operations for all $ε>0$; the best bound until now is $ω<2.37287$ [Le Gall'14]. All bounds on $ω$ since 1986 have been obtained using the so-called laser method, a way to lower-bound the `value' of a tensor in designing matrix multiplication algorithms. The main result of this paper is a refinement of the laser method that improves the resulting value bound for most sufficiently large tensors. Thus, even before computing any specific values, it is clear that we achieve an improved bound on $ω$, and we indeed obtain the best bound on $ω$ to date: $$ω< 2.37286.$$ The improvement is of the same magnitude as the improvement that [Le Gall'14] obtained over the previous bound [Vassilevska W.'12]. Our improvement to the laser method is quite general, and we believe it will have further applications in arithmetic complexity.
abstract_zh: 矩阵乘法的复杂度以 $ω$ 来衡量，它是最小实数，使得两个 $n\times n$ 矩阵可以使用 $O(n^{ω+ε})$ 域运算对所有 $ε>0$ 进行相乘；迄今为止最好的界限是 $ω<2.37287$ [Le Gall'14]。自 1986 年以来 $ω$ 的所有界限都是使用所谓的激光方法获得的，这是一种在设计矩阵乘法算法时降低张量“值”的方法。本文的主要结果是激光方法的改进，提高了大多数足够大的张量的结果值。因此，即使在计算任何特定值之前，很明显我们在 $ω$ 上实现了改进的界限，并且我们确实获得了迄今为止 $ω$ 上的最佳界限：$$ω< 2.37286.$$ 该改进与 [Le Gall'14] 相对于先前界限 [Vassilevska W.'12] 获得的改进具有相同的幅度。我们对激光方法的改进是相当普遍的，我们相信它将在算术复杂性方面有进一步的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文改进了激光方法，从而将矩阵乘法的复杂度上界进一步降低。
AI.motivation: 自1986年以来，所有矩阵乘法复杂度的上界均通过激光方法获得，改进该方法可进一步优化复杂度界。
AI.method: 提出一种改进的激光方法，通过提升张量值下界来优化矩阵乘法算法设计。
AI.result: 将矩阵乘法复杂度上界从2.37287改进至2.37286，为当前最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的激光方法有效且通用，未来可能在其他算术复杂度问题中产生更多应用。

search_text: A Refined Laser Method and Faster Matrix Multiplication 改进的激光方法和更快的矩阵乘法 The complexity of matrix multiplication is measured in terms of $ω$, the smallest real number such that two $n\times n$ matrices can be multiplied using $O(n^{ω+ε})$ field operations for all $ε>0$; the best bound until now is $ω<2.37287$ [Le Gall'14]. All bounds on $ω$ since 1986 have been obtained using the so-called laser method, a way to lower-bound the `value' of a tensor in designing matrix multiplication algorithms. The main result of this paper is a refinement of the laser method that improves the resulting value bound for most sufficiently large tensors. Thus, even before computing any specific values, it is clear that we achieve an improved bound on $ω$, and we indeed obtain the best bound on $ω$ to date: $$ω< 2.37286.$$ The improvement is of the same magnitude as the improvement that [Le Gall'14] obtained over the previous bound [Vassilevska W.'12]. Our improvement to the laser method is quite general, and we believe it will have further applications in arithmetic complexity. 矩阵乘法的复杂度以 $ω$ 来衡量，它是最小实数，使得两个 $n\times n$ 矩阵可以使用 $O(n^{ω+ε})$ 域运算对所有 $ε>0$ 进行相乘；迄今为止最好的界限是 $ω<2.37287$ [Le Gall'14]。自 1986 年以来 $ω$ 的所有界限都是使用所谓的激光方法获得的，这是一种在设计矩阵乘法算法时降低张量“值”的方法。本文的主要结果是激光方法的改进，提高了大多数足够大的张量的结果值。因此，即使在计算任何特定值之前，很明显我们在 $ω$ 上实现了改进的界限，并且我们确实获得了迄今为止 $ω$ 上的最佳界限：$$ω< 2.37286.$$ 该改进与 [Le Gall'14] 相对于先前界限 [Vassilevska W.'12] 获得的改进具有相同的幅度。我们对激光方法的改进是相当普遍的，我们相信它将在算术复杂性方面有进一步的应用。 本文改进了激光方法，从而将矩阵乘法的复杂度上界进一步降低。 Josh Alman,Virginia Vassilevska Williams cs.DS,cs.CC,math.CO

authors_text: Mohammad Esmaeilpour,Raymel Alfonso Sallo,Olivier St-Georges,Patrick Cardinal,Alessandro Lameiras Koerich
title: Conditioning Trick for Training Stable GANs
title_zh: 训练稳定 GAN 的调节技巧
abstract: In this paper we propose a conditioning trick, called difference departure from normality, applied on the generator network in response to instability issues during GAN training. We force the generator to get closer to the departure from normality function of real samples computed in the spectral domain of Schur decomposition. This binding makes the generator amenable to truncation and does not limit exploring all the possible modes. We slightly modify the BigGAN architecture incorporating residual network for synthesizing 2D representations of audio signals which enables reconstructing high quality sounds with some preserved phase information. Additionally, the proposed conditional training scenario makes a trade-off between fidelity and variety for the generated spectrograms. The experimental results on UrbanSound8k and ESC-50 environmental sound datasets and the Mozilla common voice dataset have shown that the proposed GAN configuration with the conditioning trick remarkably outperforms baseline architectures, according to three objective metrics: inception score, Frechet inception distance, and signal-to-noise ratio.
summary: In this paper we propose a conditioning trick, called difference departure from normality, applied on the generator network in response to instability issues during GAN training. We force the generator to get closer to the departure from normality function of real samples computed in the spectral domain of Schur decomposition. This binding makes the generator amenable to truncation and does not limit exploring all the possible modes. We slightly modify the BigGAN architecture incorporating residual network for synthesizing 2D representations of audio signals which enables reconstructing high quality sounds with some preserved phase information. Additionally, the proposed conditional training scenario makes a trade-off between fidelity and variety for the generated spectrograms. The experimental results on UrbanSound8k and ESC-50 environmental sound datasets and the Mozilla common voice dataset have shown that the proposed GAN configuration with the conditioning trick remarkably outperforms baseline architectures, according to three objective metrics: inception score, Frechet inception distance, and signal-to-noise ratio.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种条件技巧，称为偏离正态性的差异，应用于生成器网络，以应对 GAN 训练期间的不稳定问题。我们迫使生成器更接近在 Schur 分解的谱域中计算的真实样本的正态函数的偏离。这种绑定使得生成器能够进行截断，并且不限制探索所有可能的模式。我们稍微修改了 BigGAN 架构，结合了残差网络来合成音频信号的 2D 表示，从而能够使用一些保留的相位信息重建高质量的声音。此外，所提出的条件训练场景在生成的频谱图的保真度和多样性之间进行了权衡。 UrbanSound8k 和 ESC-50 环境声音数据集以及 Mozilla 常见语音数据集的实验结果表明，根据三个客观指标：初始得分、Frechet 初始距离和信噪比，所提出的具有调节技巧的 GAN 配置显着优于基线架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种称为'difference departure from normality'的条件技巧，通过改进生成器网络稳定GAN训练，并结合残差网络提升音频信号生成质量。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN在训练过程中易出现不稳定性，导致生成结果质量下降或模式崩溃，需寻找增强生成器稳定性同时保持多样性的方法。
AI.method: 在生成器中引入谱域Schur分解的'departure from normality'函数约束，结合残差网络改进BigGAN架构，实现音频信号的高质量相位保留生成。
AI.result: 在UrbanSound8k、ESC-50和Mozilla数据集上，新方法在Inception分数、FID和信噪比三个指标上均显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该条件技巧有效提升了GAN训练稳定性与生成质量，为音频生成任务提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Royson Lee,Stylianos I. Venieris,Nicholas D. Lane
title: Neural Enhancement in Content Delivery Systems: The State-of-the-Art and Future Directions
title_zh: 内容交付系统中的神经增强：最先进的技术和未来的方向
comment: Accepted at the 1st Workshop on Distributed Machine Learning at CoNEXT 2020 (DistributedML 2020)
comments: Accepted at the 1st Workshop on Distributed Machine Learning at CoNEXT 2020 (DistributedML 2020)
abstract: Internet-enabled smartphones and ultra-wide displays are transforming a variety of visual apps spanning from on-demand movies and 360-degree videos to video-conferencing and live streaming. However, robustly delivering visual content under fluctuating networking conditions on devices of diverse capabilities remains an open problem. In recent years, advances in the field of deep learning on tasks such as super-resolution and image enhancement have led to unprecedented performance in generating high-quality images from low-quality ones, a process we refer to as neural enhancement. In this paper, we survey state-of-the-art content delivery systems that employ neural enhancement as a key component in achieving both fast response time and high visual quality. We first present the deployment challenges of neural enhancement models. We then cover systems targeting diverse use-cases and analyze their design decisions in overcoming technical challenges. Moreover, we present promising directions based on the latest insights from deep learning research to further boost the quality of experience of these systems.
summary: Internet-enabled smartphones and ultra-wide displays are transforming a variety of visual apps spanning from on-demand movies and 360-degree videos to video-conferencing and live streaming. However, robustly delivering visual content under fluctuating networking conditions on devices of diverse capabilities remains an open problem. In recent years, advances in the field of deep learning on tasks such as super-resolution and image enhancement have led to unprecedented performance in generating high-quality images from low-quality ones, a process we refer to as neural enhancement. In this paper, we survey state-of-the-art content delivery systems that employ neural enhancement as a key component in achieving both fast response time and high visual quality. We first present the deployment challenges of neural enhancement models. We then cover systems targeting diverse use-cases and analyze their design decisions in overcoming technical challenges. Moreover, we present promising directions based on the latest insights from deep learning research to further boost the quality of experience of these systems.
abstract_zh: 支持互联网的智能手机和超宽显示屏正在改变各种视觉应用程序，从点播电影和 360 度视频到视频会议和直播。然而，在不同功能的设备上在波动的网络条件下稳健地交付视觉内容仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。近年来，深度学习领域在超分辨率和图像增强等任务上的进步，在从低质量图像生成高质量图像方面取得了前所未有的性能，我们将这一过程称为神经增强。在本文中，我们调查了最先进的内容交付系统，这些系统采用神经增强作为实现快速响应时间和高视觉质量的关键组成部分。我们首先提出神经增强模型的部署挑战。然后，我们涵盖针对不同用例的系统，并分析其克服技术挑战的设计决策。此外，我们根据深度学习研究的最新见解提出了有前景的方向，以进一步提高这些系统的体验质量。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了将神经增强技术应用于内容分发系统的研究现状与未来方向，重点分析其在提升视觉质量与响应速度中的作用。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉应用对高画质需求的增长，如何在多变的网络环境和异构设备上稳定传输高质量内容成为关键挑战。
AI.method: 通过调研现有系统，分析神经增强模型的部署难题及针对不同场景的设计决策，并结合深度学习最新进展提出优化方向。
AI.result: 总结了当前神经增强在内容分发中的技术路线，揭示了其在提升用户体验中的潜力及现存技术瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 神经增强技术能有效平衡传输效率与画质，但需进一步解决模型轻量化、实时性及跨设备适配等核心问题。

authors_text: Yiming Li,Ziqi Zhang,Jiawang Bai,Baoyuan Wu,Yong Jiang,Shu-Tao Xia
title: Open-sourced Dataset Protection via Backdoor Watermarking
title_zh: 通过后门水印保护开源数据集
comment: Accepted by the NeurIPS Workshop on Dataset Curation and Security, 2020. 6 pages
comments: Accepted by the NeurIPS Workshop on Dataset Curation and Security, 2020. 6 pages
abstract: The rapid development of deep learning has benefited from the release of some high-quality open-sourced datasets ($e.g.$, ImageNet), which allows researchers to easily verify the effectiveness of their algorithms. Almost all existing open-sourced datasets require that they can only be adopted for academic or educational purposes rather than commercial purposes, whereas there is still no good way to protect them. In this paper, we propose a \emph{backdoor embedding based dataset watermarking} method to protect an open-sourced image-classification dataset by verifying whether it is used for training a third-party model. Specifically, the proposed method contains two main processes, including \emph{dataset watermarking} and \emph{dataset verification}. We adopt classical poisoning-based backdoor attacks ($e.g.$, BadNets) for dataset watermarking, ie, generating some poisoned samples by adding a certain trigger ($e.g.$, a local patch) onto some benign samples, labeled with a pre-defined target class. Based on the proposed backdoor-based watermarking, we use a hypothesis test guided method for dataset verification based on the posterior probability generated by the suspicious third-party model of the benign samples and their correspondingly watermarked samples ($i.e.$, images with trigger) on the target class. Experiments on some benchmark datasets are conducted, which verify the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: The rapid development of deep learning has benefited from the release of some high-quality open-sourced datasets ($e.g.$, ImageNet), which allows researchers to easily verify the effectiveness of their algorithms. Almost all existing open-sourced datasets require that they can only be adopted for academic or educational purposes rather than commercial purposes, whereas there is still no good way to protect them. In this paper, we propose a \emph{backdoor embedding based dataset watermarking} method to protect an open-sourced image-classification dataset by verifying whether it is used for training a third-party model. Specifically, the proposed method contains two main processes, including \emph{dataset watermarking} and \emph{dataset verification}. We adopt classical poisoning-based backdoor attacks ($e.g.$, BadNets) for dataset watermarking, ie, generating some poisoned samples by adding a certain trigger ($e.g.$, a local patch) onto some benign samples, labeled with a pre-defined target class. Based on the proposed backdoor-based watermarking, we use a hypothesis test guided method for dataset verification based on the posterior probability generated by the suspicious third-party model of the benign samples and their correspondingly watermarked samples ($i.e.$, images with trigger) on the target class. Experiments on some benchmark datasets are conducted, which verify the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的快速发展受益于一些高质量开源数据集（例如，ImageNet）的发布，这使得研究人员可以轻松验证其算法的有效性。几乎所有现有的开源数据集都要求只能用于学术或教育目的，而不能用于商业目的，而目前还没有很好的方法来保护它们。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于后门嵌入的数据集水印方法，通过验证开源图像分类数据集是否用于训练第三方模型来保护该数据集。具体来说，所提出的方法包含两个主要过程，包括\emph{数据集水印}和\emph{数据集验证}。我们采用经典的基于中毒的后门攻击（$例如$，BadNets）进行数据集水印，即通过在一些良性样本上添加特定触发器（$例如$，本地补丁）来生成一些中毒样本，并标记为预定义的目标类别。基于所提出的基于后门的水印，我们使用假设检验引导的方法进行数据集验证，该方法基于良性样本及其相应水印样本（$i.e.$，带有触发器的图像）的目标类的可疑第三方模型生成的后验概率。在一些基准数据集上进行了实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于后门水印的开放数据集保护方法，通过在数据集中嵌入触发器并验证第三方模型是否使用该数据集进行训练，以防止商业用途。
AI.motivation: 现有开放数据集虽限制商业用途，但缺乏有效保护手段，需通过技术手段确保其使用合规性。
AI.method: 采用基于后门攻击的水印嵌入方法，在数据集中添加触发器生成中毒样本；通过假设检验验证第三方模型对正常样本和水印样本在目标类别的后验概率差异，判断是否使用该数据集训练。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性，能够准确检测第三方模型是否使用带水印的数据集进行训练。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的后门水印方法为开放数据集提供了有效的保护机制，可有效识别未经授权的商业使用行为。

search_text: Open-sourced Dataset Protection via Backdoor Watermarking 通过后门水印保护开源数据集 The rapid development of deep learning has benefited from the release of some high-quality open-sourced datasets ($e.g.$, ImageNet), which allows researchers to easily verify the effectiveness of their algorithms. Almost all existing open-sourced datasets require that they can only be adopted for academic or educational purposes rather than commercial purposes, whereas there is still no good way to protect them. In this paper, we propose a \emph{backdoor embedding based dataset watermarking} method to protect an open-sourced image-classification dataset by verifying whether it is used for training a third-party model. Specifically, the proposed method contains two main processes, including \emph{dataset watermarking} and \emph{dataset verification}. We adopt classical poisoning-based backdoor attacks ($e.g.$, BadNets) for dataset watermarking, ie, generating some poisoned samples by adding a certain trigger ($e.g.$, a local patch) onto some benign samples, labeled with a pre-defined target class. Based on the proposed backdoor-based watermarking, we use a hypothesis test guided method for dataset verification based on the posterior probability generated by the suspicious third-party model of the benign samples and their correspondingly watermarked samples ($i.e.$, images with trigger) on the target class. Experiments on some benchmark datasets are conducted, which verify the effectiveness of the proposed method. 深度学习的快速发展受益于一些高质量开源数据集（例如，ImageNet）的发布，这使得研究人员可以轻松验证其算法的有效性。几乎所有现有的开源数据集都要求只能用于学术或教育目的，而不能用于商业目的，而目前还没有很好的方法来保护它们。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于后门嵌入的数据集水印方法，通过验证开源图像分类数据集是否用于训练第三方模型来保护该数据集。具体来说，所提出的方法包含两个主要过程，包括\emph{数据集水印}和\emph{数据集验证}。我们采用经典的基于中毒的后门攻击（$例如$，BadNets）进行数据集水印，即通过在一些良性样本上添加特定触发器（$例如$，本地补丁）来生成一些中毒样本，并标记为预定义的目标类别。基于所提出的基于后门的水印，我们使用假设检验引导的方法进行数据集验证，该方法基于良性样本及其相应水印样本（$i.e.$，带有触发器的图像）的目标类的可疑第三方模型生成的后验概率。在一些基准数据集上进行了实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于后门水印的开放数据集保护方法，通过在数据集中嵌入触发器并验证第三方模型是否使用该数据集进行训练，以防止商业用途。 Yiming Li,Ziqi Zhang,Jiawang Bai,Baoyuan Wu,Yong Jiang,Shu-Tao Xia cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Viewpoint-Aware Channel-Wise Attentive Network for Vehicle Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于车辆重新识别的视点感知通道式关注网络
abstract: Vehicle re-identification (re-ID) matches images of the same vehicle across different cameras. It is fundamentally challenging because the dramatically different appearance caused by different viewpoints would make the framework fail to match two vehicles of the same identity. Most existing works solved the problem by extracting viewpoint-aware feature via spatial attention mechanism, which, yet, usually suffers from noisy generated attention map or otherwise requires expensive keypoint labels to improve the quality. In this work, we propose Viewpoint-aware Channel-wise Attention Mechanism (VCAM) by observing the attention mechanism from a different aspect. Our VCAM enables the feature learning framework channel-wisely reweighing the importance of each feature maps according to the "viewpoint" of input vehicle. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed method and show that we perform favorably against state-of-the-arts methods on the public VeRi-776 dataset and obtain promising results on the 2020 AI City Challenge. We also conduct other experiments to demonstrate the interpretability of how our VCAM practically assists the learning framework.
summary: Vehicle re-identification (re-ID) matches images of the same vehicle across different cameras. It is fundamentally challenging because the dramatically different appearance caused by different viewpoints would make the framework fail to match two vehicles of the same identity. Most existing works solved the problem by extracting viewpoint-aware feature via spatial attention mechanism, which, yet, usually suffers from noisy generated attention map or otherwise requires expensive keypoint labels to improve the quality. In this work, we propose Viewpoint-aware Channel-wise Attention Mechanism (VCAM) by observing the attention mechanism from a different aspect. Our VCAM enables the feature learning framework channel-wisely reweighing the importance of each feature maps according to the "viewpoint" of input vehicle. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed method and show that we perform favorably against state-of-the-arts methods on the public VeRi-776 dataset and obtain promising results on the 2020 AI City Challenge. We also conduct other experiments to demonstrate the interpretability of how our VCAM practically assists the learning framework.
abstract_zh: 车辆重新识别 (re-ID) 通过不同摄像头匹配同一车辆的图像。这从根本上来说是具有挑战性的，因为不同的视角导致的显着不同的外观将使框架无法匹配具有相同身份的两辆车。大多数现有工作通过空间注意机制提取视点感知特征来解决该问题，但通常会受到生成的注意图的噪声影响，或者需要昂贵的关键点标签来提高质量。在这项工作中，我们通过从不同的方面观察注意力机制，提出了视点感知的通道注意力机制（VCAM）。我们的 VCAM 使特征学习框架能够根据输入车辆的“观点”按通道重新权衡每个特征图的重要性。大量实验验证了所提出方法的有效性，并表明我们在公共 VeRi-776 数据集上的表现优于最先进的方法，并在 2020 年人工智能城市挑战赛中获得了有希望的结果。我们还进行了其他实验来证明我们的 VCAM 如何实际协助学习框架的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种观点感知的通道级注意力机制（VCAM），用于解决车辆重识别中因视角差异导致的特征匹配难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过空间注意力机制提取视角感知特征，但存在注意力图噪声多或依赖昂贵关键点标签的问题。
AI.method: 设计VCAM机制，通过通道级重新加权特征图的重要性，依据输入车辆的视角动态调整特征学习过程。
AI.result: 在VeRi-776数据集和2020 AI City Challenge中优于现有方法，且通过实验验证了方法的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: VCAM有效提升了车辆重识别性能，为视角自适应特征学习提供了新思路。

title: New Sublinear Algorithms and Lower Bounds for LIS Estimation
title_zh: 新的次线性算法和 LIS 估计下界
abstract: Estimating the length of the longest increasing subsequence (LIS) in an array is a problem of fundamental importance. Despite the significance of the LIS estimation problem and the amount of attention it has received, there are important aspects of the problem that are not yet fully understood. There are no better lower bounds for LIS estimation than the obvious bounds implied by testing monotonicity (for adaptive or nonadaptive algorithms). In this paper, we give the first nontrivial lower bound on the complexity of LIS estimation, and also provide novel algorithms that complement our lower bound. Specifically, for every constant $ε\in (0,1)$, every nonadaptive algorithm that outputs an estimate of the length of the LIS in an array of length $n$ to within an additive error of $ε\cdot n$ has to make $\log^{Ω(\log (1/ε))} n)$ queries. Next, we design nonadaptive LIS estimation algorithms whose complexity decreases as the the number of distinct values, $r$, in the array decreases. We first present a simple algorithm that makes $\tilde{O}(r/ε^3)$ queries and approximates the LIS length with an additive error bounded by $εn$. We then use it to construct a nonadaptive algorithm with query complexity $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{r} \cdot \text{poly}(1/λ))$ that, for an array with LIS length at least $λn$, outputs a multiplicative $Ω(λ)$-approximation to the LIS length. Finally, we describe a nonadaptive erasure-resilient tester for sortedness, with query complexity $O(\log n)$. Our result implies that nonadaptive tolerant testing is strictly harder than nonadaptive erasure-resilient testing for the natural property of monotonicity.
summary: Estimating the length of the longest increasing subsequence (LIS) in an array is a problem of fundamental importance. Despite the significance of the LIS estimation problem and the amount of attention it has received, there are important aspects of the problem that are not yet fully understood. There are no better lower bounds for LIS estimation than the obvious bounds implied by testing monotonicity (for adaptive or nonadaptive algorithms). In this paper, we give the first nontrivial lower bound on the complexity of LIS estimation, and also provide novel algorithms that complement our lower bound. Specifically, for every constant $ε\in (0,1)$, every nonadaptive algorithm that outputs an estimate of the length of the LIS in an array of length $n$ to within an additive error of $ε\cdot n$ has to make $\log^{Ω(\log (1/ε))} n)$ queries. Next, we design nonadaptive LIS estimation algorithms whose complexity decreases as the the number of distinct values, $r$, in the array decreases. We first present a simple algorithm that makes $\tilde{O}(r/ε^3)$ queries and approximates the LIS length with an additive error bounded by $εn$. We then use it to construct a nonadaptive algorithm with query complexity $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{r} \cdot \text{poly}(1/λ))$ that, for an array with LIS length at least $λn$, outputs a multiplicative $Ω(λ)$-approximation to the LIS length. Finally, we describe a nonadaptive erasure-resilient tester for sortedness, with query complexity $O(\log n)$. Our result implies that nonadaptive tolerant testing is strictly harder than nonadaptive erasure-resilient testing for the natural property of monotonicity.
abstract_zh: 估计数组中最长递增子序列 (LIS) 的长度是一个非常重要的问题。尽管 LIS 估计问题很重要并且受到了广泛的关注，但该问题的一些重要方面尚未得到充分理解。对于 LIS 估计来说，没有比测试单调性（对于自适应或非自适应算法）所暗示的明显界限更好的下限了。在本文中，我们给出了 LIS 估计复杂性的第一个重要下界，并提供了补充我们下界的新颖算法。具体来说，对于每个常量 $ε\in (0,1)$，每个在长度为 $n$ 的数组中输出 LIS 长度估计值并在 $ε\cdot n$ 的加性误差范围内的非自适应算法都必须进行 $\log^{Ω(\log (1/ε))} n)$ 查询。接下来，我们设计非自适应 LIS 估计算法，其复杂性随着数组中不同值 $r$ 的数量减少而降低。我们首先提出一个简单的算法，该算法进行 $\tilde{O}(r/ε^3)$ 查询并以 $εn$ 为界的加性误差近似 LIS 长度。然后，我们使用它构建一个查询复杂度为 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{r} \cdot \text{poly}(1/λ))$ 的非自适应算法，对于 LIS 长度至少为 $λn$ 的数组，输出 LIS 长度的乘法 $Ω(λ)$ 近似值。最后，我们描述了一个用于排序的非自适应擦除弹性测试器，查询复杂度为 $O(\log n)$。我们的结果表明，对于单调性的自然属性，非自适应容忍测试比非自适应擦除弹性测试严格得多。

AI.tldr: 本文研究最长递增子序列（LIS）估计问题，提出新的亚线性算法和复杂度下界。
AI.motivation: 尽管LIS估计问题已被广泛研究，但其复杂度下界仍不明确，且现有算法在特定条件下效率不足，需进一步探索更优方法。
AI.method: 通过分析非自适应算法的查询复杂度，建立非平凡下界；设计依赖于数组不同值数量$ r $的算法，并构造乘法近似算法及擦除弹性排序测试器。
AI.result: 证明非自适应算法需至少$ \\log^{Ω(\\log (1/ε))} n $次查询；提出复杂度为$ \tilde{O}(r/ε^3) $和$ \tilde{O}(\\sqrt{r} \\cdot \text{poly}(1/λ)) $的算法；构造$ O(\\log n) $复杂度的擦除弹性测试器。
AI.conclusion: 填补了LIS估计下界研究的空白，提供了更高效的算法，并证明非自适应容忍性测试严格难于擦除弹性测试。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究最长递增子序列（LIS）估计问题，提出新的亚线性算法和复杂度下界。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管LIS估计问题已被广泛研究，但其复杂度下界仍不明确，且现有算法在特定条件下效率不足，需进一步探索更优方法。
ai_content.method: 通过分析非自适应算法的查询复杂度，建立非平凡下界；设计依赖于数组不同值数量$ r $的算法，并构造乘法近似算法及擦除弹性排序测试器。
ai_content.result: 证明非自适应算法需至少$ \\log^{Ω(\\log (1/ε))} n $次查询；提出复杂度为$ \tilde{O}(r/ε^3) $和$ \tilde{O}(\\sqrt{r} \\cdot \text{poly}(1/λ)) $的算法；构造$ O(\\log n) $复杂度的擦除弹性测试器。
ai_content.conclusion: 填补了LIS估计下界研究的空白，提供了更高效的算法，并证明非自适应容忍性测试严格难于擦除弹性测试。

search_text: New Sublinear Algorithms and Lower Bounds for LIS Estimation 新的次线性算法和 LIS 估计下界 Estimating the length of the longest increasing subsequence (LIS) in an array is a problem of fundamental importance. Despite the significance of the LIS estimation problem and the amount of attention it has received, there are important aspects of the problem that are not yet fully understood. There are no better lower bounds for LIS estimation than the obvious bounds implied by testing monotonicity (for adaptive or nonadaptive algorithms). In this paper, we give the first nontrivial lower bound on the complexity of LIS estimation, and also provide novel algorithms that complement our lower bound. Specifically, for every constant $ε\in (0,1)$, every nonadaptive algorithm that outputs an estimate of the length of the LIS in an array of length $n$ to within an additive error of $ε\cdot n$ has to make $\log^{Ω(\log (1/ε))} n)$ queries. Next, we design nonadaptive LIS estimation algorithms whose complexity decreases as the the number of distinct values, $r$, in the array decreases. We first present a simple algorithm that makes $\tilde{O}(r/ε^3)$ queries and approximates the LIS length with an additive error bounded by $εn$. We then use it to construct a nonadaptive algorithm with query complexity $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{r} \cdot \text{poly}(1/λ))$ that, for an array with LIS length at least $λn$, outputs a multiplicative $Ω(λ)$-approximation to the LIS length. Finally, we describe a nonadaptive erasure-resilient tester for sortedness, with query complexity $O(\log n)$. Our result implies that nonadaptive tolerant testing is strictly harder than nonadaptive erasure-resilient testing for the natural property of monotonicity. 估计数组中最长递增子序列 (LIS) 的长度是一个非常重要的问题。尽管 LIS 估计问题很重要并且受到了广泛的关注，但该问题的一些重要方面尚未得到充分理解。对于 LIS 估计来说，没有比测试单调性（对于自适应或非自适应算法）所暗示的明显界限更好的下限了。在本文中，我们给出了 LIS 估计复杂性的第一个重要下界，并提供了补充我们下界的新颖算法。具体来说，对于每个常量 $ε\in (0,1)$，每个在长度为 $n$ 的数组中输出 LIS 长度估计值并在 $ε\cdot n$ 的加性误差范围内的非自适应算法都必须进行 $\log^{Ω(\log (1/ε))} n)$ 查询。接下来，我们设计非自适应 LIS 估计算法，其复杂性随着数组中不同值 $r$ 的数量减少而降低。我们首先提出一个简单的算法，该算法进行 $\tilde{O}(r/ε^3)$ 查询并以 $εn$ 为界的加性误差近似 LIS 长度。然后，我们使用它构建一个查询复杂度为 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{r} \cdot \text{poly}(1/λ))$ 的非自适应算法，对于 LIS 长度至少为 $λn$ 的数组，输出 LIS 长度的乘法 $Ω(λ)$ 近似值。最后，我们描述了一个用于排序的非自适应擦除弹性测试器，查询复杂度为 $O(\log n)$。我们的结果表明，对于单调性的自然属性，非自适应容忍测试比非自适应擦除弹性测试严格得多。 本文研究最长递增子序列（LIS）估计问题，提出新的亚线性算法和复杂度下界。 Ilan Newman,Nithin Varma cs.DS

authors_text: Simone Zamboni,Zekarias Tilahun Kefato,Sarunas Girdzijauskas,Noren Christoffer,Laura Dal Col
title: Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction with Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络进行行人轨迹预测
comment: 35 pages, 8 figures. This article is a the accepted manuscript submitted to Pattern Recognition Journal. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.patcog.2021.108252. This manuscript version is made available under the CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0 license (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/)
comments: 35 pages, 8 figures. This article is a the accepted manuscript submitted to Pattern Recognition Journal. Article DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.patcog.2021.108252. This manuscript version is made available under the CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0 license (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/4.0/)
abstract: Predicting the future trajectories of pedestrians is a challenging problem that has a range of application, from crowd surveillance to autonomous driving. In literature, methods to approach pedestrian trajectory prediction have evolved, transitioning from physics-based models to data-driven models based on recurrent neural networks. In this work, we propose a new approach to pedestrian trajectory prediction, with the introduction of a novel 2D convolutional model. This new model outperforms recurrent models, and it achieves state-of-the-art results on the ETH and TrajNet datasets. We also present an effective system to represent pedestrian positions and powerful data augmentation techniques, such as the addition of Gaussian noise and the use of random rotations, which can be applied to any model. As an additional exploratory analysis, we present experimental results on the inclusion of occupancy methods to model social information, which empirically show that these methods are ineffective in capturing social interaction.
summary: Predicting the future trajectories of pedestrians is a challenging problem that has a range of application, from crowd surveillance to autonomous driving. In literature, methods to approach pedestrian trajectory prediction have evolved, transitioning from physics-based models to data-driven models based on recurrent neural networks. In this work, we propose a new approach to pedestrian trajectory prediction, with the introduction of a novel 2D convolutional model. This new model outperforms recurrent models, and it achieves state-of-the-art results on the ETH and TrajNet datasets. We also present an effective system to represent pedestrian positions and powerful data augmentation techniques, such as the addition of Gaussian noise and the use of random rotations, which can be applied to any model. As an additional exploratory analysis, we present experimental results on the inclusion of occupancy methods to model social information, which empirically show that these methods are ineffective in capturing social interaction.
abstract_zh: 预测行人的未来轨迹是一个具有挑战性的问题，具有从人群监控到自动驾驶等一系列应用。在文献中，行人轨迹预测的方法已经发展，从基于物理的模型转变为基于循环神经网络的数据驱动模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种行人轨迹预测的新方法，引入了新颖的 2D 卷积模型。这个新模型的性能优于循环模型，并且在 ETH 和 TrajNet 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。我们还提出了一个有效的系统来表示行人位置和强大的数据增强技术，例如添加高斯噪声和使用随机旋转，这些技术可以应用于任何模型。作为额外的探索性分析，我们提出了包含占用方法来对社会信息进行建模的实验结果，这些结果从经验上表明这些方法在捕获社会互动方面无效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二维卷积神经网络的新方法，用于预测行人轨迹，并在ETH和TrajNet数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法（如物理模型和循环神经网络）在行人轨迹预测中存在局限性，需探索更有效的数据驱动模型。
AI.method: 设计了一种新颖的2D卷积模型，结合数据增强技术（如高斯噪声添加和随机旋转），并探索了占用方法对社会信息的建模效果。
AI.result: 在ETH和TrajNet数据集上，该模型优于循环神经网络，且实验表明占用方法无法有效捕捉社会交互。
AI.conclusion: 卷积模型在行人轨迹预测中表现优异，数据增强技术具有普适性，而基于占用的社会信息建模方法效果不足。

title: Permuted AdaIN: Reducing the Bias Towards Global Statistics in Image Classification
title_zh: 置换 AdaIN：减少图像分类中全局统计的偏差
abstract: Recent work has shown that convolutional neural network classifiers overly rely on texture at the expense of shape cues. We make a similar but different distinction between shape and local image cues, on the one hand, and global image statistics, on the other. Our method, called Permuted Adaptive Instance Normalization (pAdaIN), reduces the representation of global statistics in the hidden layers of image classifiers. pAdaIN samples a random permutation $π$ that rearranges the samples in a given batch. Adaptive Instance Normalization (AdaIN) is then applied between the activations of each (non-permuted) sample $i$ and the corresponding activations of the sample $π(i)$, thus swapping statistics between the samples of the batch. Since the global image statistics are distorted, this swapping procedure causes the network to rely on cues, such as shape or texture. By choosing the random permutation with probability $p$ and the identity permutation otherwise, one can control the effect's strength. With the correct choice of $p$, fixed apriori for all experiments and selected without considering test data, our method consistently outperforms baselines in multiple settings. In image classification, our method improves on both CIFAR100 and ImageNet using multiple architectures. In the setting of robustness, our method improves on both ImageNet-C and Cifar-100-C for multiple architectures. In the setting of domain adaptation and domain generalization, our method achieves state of the art results on the transfer learning task from GTAV to Cityscapes and on the PACS benchmark.
summary: Recent work has shown that convolutional neural network classifiers overly rely on texture at the expense of shape cues. We make a similar but different distinction between shape and local image cues, on the one hand, and global image statistics, on the other. Our method, called Permuted Adaptive Instance Normalization (pAdaIN), reduces the representation of global statistics in the hidden layers of image classifiers. pAdaIN samples a random permutation $π$ that rearranges the samples in a given batch. Adaptive Instance Normalization (AdaIN) is then applied between the activations of each (non-permuted) sample $i$ and the corresponding activations of the sample $π(i)$, thus swapping statistics between the samples of the batch. Since the global image statistics are distorted, this swapping procedure causes the network to rely on cues, such as shape or texture. By choosing the random permutation with probability $p$ and the identity permutation otherwise, one can control the effect's strength. With the correct choice of $p$, fixed apriori for all experiments and selected without considering test data, our method consistently outperforms baselines in multiple settings. In image classification, our method improves on both CIFAR100 and ImageNet using multiple architectures. In the setting of robustness, our method improves on both ImageNet-C and Cifar-100-C for multiple architectures. In the setting of domain adaptation and domain generalization, our method achieves state of the art results on the transfer learning task from GTAV to Cityscapes and on the PACS benchmark.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，卷积神经网络分类器过度依赖纹理，而牺牲了形状线索。一方面，我们对形状和局部图像线索与全局图像统计数据进行类似但不同的区分。我们的方法称为置换自适应实例归一化 (pAdaIN)，减少了图像分类器隐藏层中全局统计数据的表示。 pAdaIN 对随机排列 $π$ 进行采样，重新排列给定批次中的样本。然后，在每个（未排列的）样本 $i$ 的激活和样本 $π(i)$ 的相应激活之间应用自适应实例归一化 (AdaIN)，从而在批次样本之间交换统计数据。由于全局图像统计数据是扭曲的，因此这种交换过程会导致网络依赖于形状或纹理等线索。通过选择具有概率 $p$ 的随机排列和否则的恒等排列，可以控制效果的强度。通过正确选择 $p$、固定所有实验的先验并在不考虑测试数据的情况下进行选择，我们的方法在多个设置中始终优于基线。在图像分类中，我们的方法使用多种架构对 CIFAR100 和 ImageNet 进行了改进。在鲁棒性方面，我们的方法在 ImageNet-C 和 Cifar-100-C 的基础上针对多种架构进行了改进。在领域适应和领域泛化的设置中，我们的方法在从 GTAV 到 Cityscapes 的迁移学习任务以及 PACS 基准上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Permuted AdaIN（pAdaIN）的方法，通过减少图像分类器对全局统计信息的依赖，提升模型在形状和纹理等局部线索上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络（CNN）分类器过度依赖纹理信息而忽视形状线索，导致对全局统计信息的偏差。本文旨在通过干预隐藏层的全局统计信息，增强模型对局部特征的利用。
AI.method: pAdaIN通过随机排列批次样本并应用自适应实例归一化（AdaIN），在非排列样本与排列后样本之间交换统计信息，从而扭曲全局统计信息。通过概率p控制排列强度，无需测试数据即可固定参数。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100和ImageNet分类任务中优于基线方法，在ImageNet-C和CIFAR-100-C鲁棒性测试中表现更优，并在GTAV到Cityscapes的领域适应及PACS基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: pAdaIN有效降低了模型对全局统计信息的依赖，提升了多场景下的分类性能和领域适应能力，且参数选择无需依赖测试数据。

ai_content_json.method: pAdaIN通过随机排列批次样本并应用自适应实例归一化（AdaIN），在非排列样本与排列后样本之间交换统计信息，从而扭曲全局统计信息。通过概率p控制排列强度，无需测试数据即可固定参数。
ai_content_json.result: 在CIFAR100和ImageNet分类任务中优于基线方法，在ImageNet-C和CIFAR-100-C鲁棒性测试中表现更优，并在GTAV到Cityscapes的领域适应及PACS基准测试中达到最先进水平。
ai_content_json.conclusion: pAdaIN有效降低了模型对全局统计信息的依赖，提升了多场景下的分类性能和领域适应能力，且参数选择无需依赖测试数据。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Permuted AdaIN（pAdaIN）的方法，通过减少图像分类器对全局统计信息的依赖，提升模型在形状和纹理等局部线索上的表现。
motivation: 现有卷积神经网络（CNN）分类器过度依赖纹理信息而忽视形状线索，导致对全局统计信息的偏差。本文旨在通过干预隐藏层的全局统计信息，增强模型对局部特征的利用。
method: pAdaIN通过随机排列批次样本并应用自适应实例归一化（AdaIN），在非排列样本与排列后样本之间交换统计信息，从而扭曲全局统计信息。通过概率p控制排列强度，无需测试数据即可固定参数。
result: 在CIFAR100和ImageNet分类任务中优于基线方法，在ImageNet-C和CIFAR-100-C鲁棒性测试中表现更优，并在GTAV到Cityscapes的领域适应及PACS基准测试中达到最先进水平。
conclusion: pAdaIN有效降低了模型对全局统计信息的依赖，提升了多场景下的分类性能和领域适应能力，且参数选择无需依赖测试数据。
search_text: Permuted AdaIN: Reducing the Bias Towards Global Statistics in Image Classification 置换 AdaIN：减少图像分类中全局统计的偏差 Recent work has shown that convolutional neural network classifiers overly rely on texture at the expense of shape cues. We make a similar but different distinction between shape and local image cues, on the one hand, and global image statistics, on the other. Our method, called Permuted Adaptive Instance Normalization (pAdaIN), reduces the representation of global statistics in the hidden layers of image classifiers. pAdaIN samples a random permutation $π$ that rearranges the samples in a given batch. Adaptive Instance Normalization (AdaIN) is then applied between the activations of each (non-permuted) sample $i$ and the corresponding activations of the sample $π(i)$, thus swapping statistics between the samples of the batch. Since the global image statistics are distorted, this swapping procedure causes the network to rely on cues, such as shape or texture. By choosing the random permutation with probability $p$ and the identity permutation otherwise, one can control the effect's strength. With the correct choice of $p$, fixed apriori for all experiments and selected without considering test data, our method consistently outperforms baselines in multiple settings. In image classification, our method improves on both CIFAR100 and ImageNet using multiple architectures. In the setting of robustness, our method improves on both ImageNet-C and Cifar-100-C for multiple architectures. In the setting of domain adaptation and domain generalization, our method achieves state of the art results on the transfer learning task from GTAV to Cityscapes and on the PACS benchmark. 最近的工作表明，卷积神经网络分类器过度依赖纹理，而牺牲了形状线索。一方面，我们对形状和局部图像线索与全局图像统计数据进行类似但不同的区分。我们的方法称为置换自适应实例归一化 (pAdaIN)，减少了图像分类器隐藏层中全局统计数据的表示。 pAdaIN 对随机排列 $π$ 进行采样，重新排列给定批次中的样本。然后，在每个（未排列的）样本 $i$ 的激活和样本 $π(i)$ 的相应激活之间应用自适应实例归一化 (AdaIN)，从而在批次样本之间交换统计数据。由于全局图像统计数据是扭曲的，因此这种交换过程会导致网络依赖于形状或纹理等线索。通过选择具有概率 $p$ 的随机排列和否则的恒等排列，可以控制效果的强度。通过正确选择 $p$、固定所有实验的先验并在不考虑测试数据的情况下进行选择，我们的方法在多个设置中始终优于基线。在图像分类中，我们的方法使用多种架构对 CIFAR100 和 ImageNet 进行了改进。在鲁棒性方面，我们的方法在 ImageNet-C 和 Cifar-100-C 的基础上针对多种架构进行了改进。在领域适应和领域泛化的设置中，我们的方法在从 GTAV 到 Cityscapes 的迁移学习任务以及 PACS 基准上取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种名为Permuted AdaIN（pAdaIN）的方法，通过减少图像分类器对全局统计信息的依赖，提升模型在形状和纹理等局部线索上的表现。 Oren Nuriel,Sagie Benaim,Lior Wolf cs.CV

authors_text: Haoxuan Wang,Zhiding Yu,Yisong Yue,Anima Anandkumar,Anqi Liu,Junchi Yan
title: Learning Calibrated Uncertainties for Domain Shift: A Distributionally Robust Learning Approach
title_zh: 学习域转移的校准不确定性：一种分布式鲁棒学习方法
abstract: We propose a framework for learning calibrated uncertainties under domain shifts, where the source (training) distribution differs from the target (test) distribution. We detect such domain shifts via a differentiable density ratio estimator and train it together with the task network, composing an adjusted softmax predictive form concerning domain shift. In particular, the density ratio estimation reflects the closeness of a target (test) sample to the source (training) distribution. We employ it to adjust the uncertainty of prediction in the task network. This idea of using the density ratio is based on the distributionally robust learning (DRL) framework, which accounts for the domain shift by adversarial risk minimization. We show that our proposed method generates calibrated uncertainties that benefit downstream tasks, such as unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) and semi-supervised learning (SSL). On these tasks, methods like self-training and FixMatch use uncertainties to select confident pseudo-labels for re-training. Our experiments show that the introduction of DRL leads to significant improvements in cross-domain performance. We also show that the estimated density ratios align with human selection frequencies, suggesting a positive correlation with a proxy of human perceived uncertainties.
summary: We propose a framework for learning calibrated uncertainties under domain shifts, where the source (training) distribution differs from the target (test) distribution. We detect such domain shifts via a differentiable density ratio estimator and train it together with the task network, composing an adjusted softmax predictive form concerning domain shift. In particular, the density ratio estimation reflects the closeness of a target (test) sample to the source (training) distribution. We employ it to adjust the uncertainty of prediction in the task network. This idea of using the density ratio is based on the distributionally robust learning (DRL) framework, which accounts for the domain shift by adversarial risk minimization. We show that our proposed method generates calibrated uncertainties that benefit downstream tasks, such as unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) and semi-supervised learning (SSL). On these tasks, methods like self-training and FixMatch use uncertainties to select confident pseudo-labels for re-training. Our experiments show that the introduction of DRL leads to significant improvements in cross-domain performance. We also show that the estimated density ratios align with human selection frequencies, suggesting a positive correlation with a proxy of human perceived uncertainties.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个在域转移下学习校准不确定性的框架，其中源（训练）分布与目标（测试）分布不同。我们通过可微密度比估计器检测此类域移位，并将其与任务网络一起训练，组成关于域移位的调整后的 softmax 预测形式。特别是，密度比估计反映了目标（测试）样本与源（训练）分布的接近程度。我们用它来调整任务网络中预测的不确定性。这种使用密度比的想法基于分布式鲁棒学习（DRL）框架，该框架通过对抗性风险最小化来解释域转移。我们表明，我们提出的方法会生成有利于下游任务的校准不确定性，例如无监督域适应（UDA）和半监督学习（SSL）。在这些任务中，自我训练和 FixMatch 等方法使用不确定性来选择可信的伪标签进行重新训练。我们的实验表明，DRL 的引入可以显着提高跨域性能。我们还表明，估计的密度比与人类选择频率一致，表明与人类感知不确定性的代理呈正相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分布鲁棒学习框架，通过密度比估计调整预测不确定性，以应对领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 领域偏移会导致模型预测不确定性失准，影响下游任务（如无监督领域自适应和半监督学习）的性能，需改进不确定性校准方法。
AI.method: 结合可微密度比估计器与任务网络，通过密度比调整softmax预测形式，并基于分布鲁棒学习框架进行对抗风险最小化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升跨领域性能，且密度比估计与人类感知的不确定性选择频率正相关。
AI.conclusion: 密度比驱动的分布鲁棒学习有效校准了领域偏移下的预测不确定性，为领域自适应任务提供可靠支持。

title: Sparse universal graphs for planarity
title_zh: 稀疏通用图的平面性
comment: v4: minor change. v3: revised following referee's comments. v2: added new result about induced-universal graphs
comments: v4: minor change. v3: revised following referee's comments. v2: added new result about induced-universal graphs
abstract: We show that for every integer $n\geq 1$ there exists a graph $G_n$ with $(1+o(1))n$ vertices and $n^{1 + o(1)}$ edges such that every $n$-vertex planar graph is isomorphic to a subgraph of $G_n$. The best previous bound on the number of edges was $O(n^{3/2})$, proved by Babai, Chung, Erdős, Graham, and Spencer in 1982. We then show that for every integer $n\geq 1$ there is a graph $U_n$ with $n^{1 + o(1)}$ vertices and edges that contains induced copies of every $n$-vertex planar graph. This significantly reduces the number of edges in a recent construction of the authors with Dujmović, Gavoille, and Micek.
summary: We show that for every integer $n\geq 1$ there exists a graph $G_n$ with $(1+o(1))n$ vertices and $n^{1 + o(1)}$ edges such that every $n$-vertex planar graph is isomorphic to a subgraph of $G_n$. The best previous bound on the number of edges was $O(n^{3/2})$, proved by Babai, Chung, Erdős, Graham, and Spencer in 1982. We then show that for every integer $n\geq 1$ there is a graph $U_n$ with $n^{1 + o(1)}$ vertices and edges that contains induced copies of every $n$-vertex planar graph. This significantly reduces the number of edges in a recent construction of the authors with Dujmović, Gavoille, and Micek.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，对于每个整数 $n\geq 1$ ，都存在一个图 $G_n$，其具有 $(1+o(1))n$ 个顶点和 $n^{1 + o(1)}$ 个边，使得每个 $n$ 顶点平面图与 $G_n$ 的子图同构。先前关于边数的最佳界限是 $O(n^{3/2})$，由 Babai、Chung、Erdős、Graham 和 Spencer 在 1982 年证明。然后我们证明，对于每个整数 $n\geq 1$，都存在一个具有 $n^{1 + o(1)}$ 个顶点和边的图 $U_n$，其中包含每个 $n$ 顶点平面图的导出副本。这大大减少了作者与 Dujmović、Gavoille 和 Micek 最近构建的边的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了平面图的全图嵌入问题，构造了稀疏的全图使得每个n顶点平面图都能作为子图（或诱导子图）嵌入其中。
AI.motivation: 此前Babai等人于1982年构造的全图边数为O(n^{3/2})，本文希望进一步降低边数至接近线性，并同时改进诱导子图版本的结果。
AI.method: 通过组合构造与概率方法，设计出顶点数和边数均为n^{1+o(1)}的图族，利用平面图的性质（如树宽、分隔子等）实现稀疏嵌入。
AI.result: 构造了图G_n，顶点数(1+o(1))n，边数n^{1+o(1)}，包含所有n顶点平面图作为子图；以及图U_n，顶点数和边数均为n^{1+o(1)}，包含所有n顶点平面图作为诱导子图。
AI.conclusion: 显著改进了平面图全图的边数上界（从O(n^{3/2})降至n^{1+o(1)}），同时大幅减少了诱导子图版本构造中的边数。

The best previous bound on the number of edges was $O(n^{3/2})$, proved by Babai, Chung, Erdős, Graham, and Spencer in 1982. We then show that for every integer $n\geq 1$ there is a graph $U_n$ with $n^{1 + o(1)}$ vertices and edges that contains induced copies of every $n$-vertex planar graph. This significantly reduces the number of edges in a recent construction of the authors with Dujmović, Gavoille, and Micek. 我们证明，对于每个整数 $n\geq 1$ ，都存在一个图 $G_n$，其具有 $(1+o(1))n$ 个顶点和 $n^{1 + o(1)}$ 个边，使得每个 $n$ 顶点平面图与 $G_n$ 的子图同构。先前关于边数的最佳界限是 $O(n^{3/2})$，由 Babai、Chung、Erdős、Graham 和 Spencer 在 1982 年证明。然后我们证明，对于每个整数 $n\geq 1$，都存在一个具有 $n^{1 + o(1)}$ 个顶点和边的图 $U_n$，其中包含每个 $n$ 顶点平面图的导出副本。这大大减少了作者与 Dujmović、Gavoille 和 Micek 最近构建的边的数量。 本文研究了平面图的全图嵌入问题，构造了稀疏的全图使得每个n顶点平面图都能作为子图（或诱导子图）嵌入其中。 Louis Esperet,Gwenaël Joret,Pat Morin math.CO,cs.DM,cs.DS

authors_text: Giorgos Mamakoukas,Maria L. Castano,Xiaobo Tan,Todd D. Murphey
title: Derivative-Based Koopman Operators for Real-Time Control of Robotic Systems
title_zh: 用于机器人系统实时控制的基于导数的 Koopman 算子
abstract: This paper presents a generalizable methodology for data-driven identification of nonlinear dynamics that bounds the model error in terms of the prediction horizon and the magnitude of the derivatives of the system states. Using higher-order derivatives of general nonlinear dynamics that need not be known, we construct a Koopman operator-based linear representation and utilize Taylor series accuracy analysis to derive an error bound. The resulting error formula is used to choose the order of derivatives in the basis functions and obtain a data-driven Koopman model using a closed-form expression that can be computed in real time. Using the inverted pendulum system, we illustrate the robustness of the error bounds given noisy measurements of unknown dynamics, where the derivatives are estimated numerically. When combined with control, the Koopman representation of the nonlinear system has marginally better performance than competing nonlinear modeling methods, such as SINDy and NARX. In addition, as a linear model, the Koopman approach lends itself readily to efficient control design tools, such as LQR, whereas the other modeling approaches require nonlinear control methods. The efficacy of the approach is further demonstrated with simulation and experimental results on the control of a tail-actuated robotic fish. Experimental results show that the proposed data-driven control approach outperforms a tuned PID (Proportional Integral Derivative) controller and that updating the data-driven model online significantly improves performance in the presence of unmodeled fluid disturbance. This paper is complemented with a video: https://youtu.be/9_wx0tdDta0.
summary: This paper presents a generalizable methodology for data-driven identification of nonlinear dynamics that bounds the model error in terms of the prediction horizon and the magnitude of the derivatives of the system states. Using higher-order derivatives of general nonlinear dynamics that need not be known, we construct a Koopman operator-based linear representation and utilize Taylor series accuracy analysis to derive an error bound. The resulting error formula is used to choose the order of derivatives in the basis functions and obtain a data-driven Koopman model using a closed-form expression that can be computed in real time. Using the inverted pendulum system, we illustrate the robustness of the error bounds given noisy measurements of unknown dynamics, where the derivatives are estimated numerically. When combined with control, the Koopman representation of the nonlinear system has marginally better performance than competing nonlinear modeling methods, such as SINDy and NARX. In addition, as a linear model, the Koopman approach lends itself readily to efficient control design tools, such as LQR, whereas the other modeling approaches require nonlinear control methods. The efficacy of the approach is further demonstrated with simulation and experimental results on the control of a tail-actuated robotic fish. Experimental results show that the proposed data-driven control approach outperforms a tuned PID (Proportional Integral Derivative) controller and that updating the data-driven model online significantly improves performance in the presence of unmodeled fluid disturbance. This paper is complemented with a video: https://youtu.be/9_wx0tdDta0.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的非线性动力学识别的通用方法，该方法根据预测范围和系统状态导数的大小来限制模型误差。使用不需要知道的一般非线性动力学的高阶导数，我们构造了基于库普曼算子的线性表示，并利用泰勒级数精度分析来导出误差范围。所得误差公式用于选择基函数中导数的阶数，并使用可实时计算的封闭式表达式获得数据驱动的库普曼模型。使用倒立摆系统，我们说明了给定未知动态的噪声测量的误差范围的鲁棒性，其中导数是数值估计的。与控制相结合时，非线性系统的 Koopman 表示法的性能略好于竞争的非线性建模方法（例如 SINDy 和 NARX）。此外，作为线性模型，库普曼方法很容易使用高效的控制设计工具，例如 LQR，而其他建模方法则需要非线性控制方法。通过尾部驱动机器鱼控制的仿真和实验结果进一步证明了该方法的有效性。实验结果表明，所提出的数据驱动控制方法优于调谐 PID（比例积分微分）控制器，并且在线更新数据驱动模型可显着提高存在未建模流体扰动时的性能。本文附有视频：https://youtu.be/9_wx0tdDta0。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于导数的Koopman算子方法，用于实时控制机器人系统的非线性动力学建模，通过误差边界分析和实时数据驱动模型实现控制性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统非线性建模方法（如SINDy、NARX）在控制设计和误差边界分析上存在局限，尤其在噪声测量和未建模干扰下表现不足，需开发鲁棒且适用于实时控制的线性化建模方法。
AI.method: 利用高阶导数构建Koopman算子的线性表示，结合泰勒级数分析推导误差边界，通过闭式表达式实现实时计算，并在倒立摆和尾鳍驱动机械鱼实验中验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 该方法在噪声环境下误差边界稳健，控制性能优于PID、SINDy和NARX；机械鱼实验中在线更新模型可显著提升抗流体干扰能力，验证了数据驱动控制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于导数的Koopman方法为复杂机器人系统提供了可靠的数据驱动控制框架，兼具误差边界分析和线性控制工具（如LQR）兼容性，适用于实时动态建模与控制场景。

title: AttendLight: Universal Attention-Based Reinforcement Learning Model for Traffic Signal Control
title_zh: attendLight：用于交通信号控制的通用基于注意力的强化学习模型
abstract: We propose AttendLight, an end-to-end Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithm for the problem of traffic signal control. Previous approaches for this problem have the shortcoming that they require training for each new intersection with a different structure or traffic flow distribution. AttendLight solves this issue by training a single, universal model for intersections with any number of roads, lanes, phases (possible signals), and traffic flow. To this end, we propose a deep RL model which incorporates two attention models. The first attention model is introduced to handle different numbers of roads-lanes; and the second attention model is intended for enabling decision-making with any number of phases in an intersection. As a result, our proposed model works for any intersection configuration, as long as a similar configuration is represented in the training set. Experiments were conducted with both synthetic and real-world standard benchmark data-sets. The results we show cover intersections with three or four approaching roads; one-directional/bi-directional roads with one, two, and three lanes; different number of phases; and different traffic flows. We consider two regimes: (i) single-environment training, single-deployment, and (ii) multi-environment training, multi-deployment. AttendLight outperforms both classical and other RL-based approaches on all cases in both regimes.
summary: We propose AttendLight, an end-to-end Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithm for the problem of traffic signal control. Previous approaches for this problem have the shortcoming that they require training for each new intersection with a different structure or traffic flow distribution. AttendLight solves this issue by training a single, universal model for intersections with any number of roads, lanes, phases (possible signals), and traffic flow. To this end, we propose a deep RL model which incorporates two attention models. The first attention model is introduced to handle different numbers of roads-lanes; and the second attention model is intended for enabling decision-making with any number of phases in an intersection. As a result, our proposed model works for any intersection configuration, as long as a similar configuration is represented in the training set. Experiments were conducted with both synthetic and real-world standard benchmark data-sets. The results we show cover intersections with three or four approaching roads; one-directional/bi-directional roads with one, two, and three lanes; different number of phases; and different traffic flows. We consider two regimes: (i) single-environment training, single-deployment, and (ii) multi-environment training, multi-deployment. AttendLight outperforms both classical and other RL-based approaches on all cases in both regimes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 attendLight，这是一种用于解决交通信号控制问题的端到端强化学习 (RL) 算法。以前解决此问题的方法存在缺点，即需要对具有不同结构或交通流分布的每个新交叉口进行训练。 AttenLight 通过针对具有任意数量的道路、车道、相位（可能的信号）和交通流的交叉口训练单一通用模型来解决此问题。为此，我们提出了一个包含两个注意力模型的深度强化学习模型。引入第一个注意力模型来处理不同数量的道路车道；第二个注意力模型旨在支持在交叉口中进行任意数量的阶段的决策。因此，我们提出的模型适用于任何交叉口配置，只要训练集中有类似的配置即可。使用合成的和真实世界的标准基准数据集进行了实验。我们显示的结果涵盖了具有三到四条临近道路的交叉路口；具有一车道、二车道和三车道的单向/双向道路；不同的相数；以及不同的流量。我们考虑两种制度：（i）单一环境训练、单一部署，以及（ii）多环境训练、多重部署。在两种机制的所有情况下，AttendLight 都优于经典方法和其他基于强化学习的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AttendLight，一种基于注意力机制的强化学习模型，用于解决交通信号控制问题，能够适应不同结构和交通流量的交叉路口。
AI.motivation: 传统交通信号控制方法需要为每个新交叉路口单独训练模型，效率低下且缺乏通用性，亟需一种能够处理任意路口配置的统一解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含两个注意力模块的深度强化学习模型：第一模块处理不同道路-车道数量，第二模块支持任意信号相位决策，通过合成与真实数据集验证模型普适性。
AI.result: 在单环境训练/部署和多环境训练/部署两种模式下，AttendLight均优于经典方法及其他RL方法，覆盖3-4条道路、单双行道、1-3车道及不同流量场景。
AI.conclusion: AttendLight通过注意力机制实现了交通信号控制的通用性，为复杂多样的路口配置提供了高效且统一的解决方案。
