AttendLight outperforms both classical and other RL-based approaches on all cases in both regimes. 我们提出了 attendLight，这是一种用于解决交通信号控制问题的端到端强化学习 (RL) 算法。以前解决此问题的方法存在缺点，即需要对具有不同结构或交通流分布的每个新交叉口进行训练。 AttenLight 通过针对具有任意数量的道路、车道、相位（可能的信号）和交通流的交叉口训练单一通用模型来解决此问题。为此，我们提出了一个包含两个注意力模型的深度强化学习模型。引入第一个注意力模型来处理不同数量的道路车道；第二个注意力模型旨在支持在交叉口中进行任意数量的阶段的决策。因此，我们提出的模型适用于任何交叉口配置，只要训练集中有类似的配置即可。使用合成的和真实世界的标准基准数据集进行了实验。我们显示的结果涵盖了具有三到四条临近道路的交叉路口；具有一车道、二车道和三车道的单向/双向道路；不同的相数；以及不同的流量。我们考虑两种制度：（i）单一环境训练、单一部署，以及（ii）多环境训练、多重部署。在两种机制的所有情况下，AttendLight 都优于经典方法和其他基于强化学习的方法。 本文提出AttendLight，一种基于注意力机制的强化学习模型，用于解决交通信号控制问题，能够适应不同结构和交通流量的交叉路口。 Afshin Oroojlooy,Mohammadreza Nazari,Davood Hajinezhad,Jorge Silva cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Heribert Wankerl,Maike L. Stern,Ali Mahdavi,Christoph Eichler,Elmar W. Lang
title: Parameterized Reinforcement Learning for Optical System Optimization
title_zh: 用于光学系统优化的参数化强化学习
comment: Presented as a poster at the workshop on machine learning for engineering modeling, simulation and design @ NeurIPS 2020
comments: Presented as a poster at the workshop on machine learning for engineering modeling, simulation and design @ NeurIPS 2020
abstract: Designing a multi-layer optical system with designated optical characteristics is an inverse design problem in which the resulting design is determined by several discrete and continuous parameters. In particular, we consider three design parameters to describe a multi-layer stack: Each layer's dielectric material and thickness as well as the total number of layers. Such a combination of both, discrete and continuous parameters is a challenging optimization problem that often requires a computationally expensive search for an optimal system design. Hence, most methods merely determine the optimal thicknesses of the system's layers. To incorporate layer material and the total number of layers as well, we propose a method that considers the stacking of consecutive layers as parameterized actions in a Markov decision process. We propose an exponentially transformed reward signal that eases policy optimization and adapt a recent variant of Q-learning for inverse design optimization. We demonstrate that our method outperforms human experts and a naive reinforcement learning algorithm concerning the achieved optical characteristics. Moreover, the learned Q-values contain information about the optical properties of multi-layer optical systems, thereby allowing physical interpretation or what-if analysis.
summary: Designing a multi-layer optical system with designated optical characteristics is an inverse design problem in which the resulting design is determined by several discrete and continuous parameters. In particular, we consider three design parameters to describe a multi-layer stack: Each layer's dielectric material and thickness as well as the total number of layers. Such a combination of both, discrete and continuous parameters is a challenging optimization problem that often requires a computationally expensive search for an optimal system design. Hence, most methods merely determine the optimal thicknesses of the system's layers. To incorporate layer material and the total number of layers as well, we propose a method that considers the stacking of consecutive layers as parameterized actions in a Markov decision process. We propose an exponentially transformed reward signal that eases policy optimization and adapt a recent variant of Q-learning for inverse design optimization. We demonstrate that our method outperforms human experts and a naive reinforcement learning algorithm concerning the achieved optical characteristics. Moreover, the learned Q-values contain information about the optical properties of multi-layer optical systems, thereby allowing physical interpretation or what-if analysis.
abstract_zh: 设计具有指定光学特性的多层光学系统是一个逆设计问题，其中最终的设计由多个离散和连续参数决定。特别是，我们考虑三个设计参数来描述多层堆叠：每层的介电材料和厚度以及总层数。这种离散参数和连续参数的组合是一个具有挑战性的优化问题，通常需要进行计算成本高昂的搜索来寻找最佳系统设计。因此，大多数方法仅仅确定系统层的最佳厚度。为了合并层材料和总层数，我们提出了一种方法，将连续层的堆叠视为马尔可夫决策过程中的参数化动作。我们提出了一种指数变换的奖励信号，可以简化策略优化，并采用 Q 学习的最新变体进行逆向设计优化。我们证明了我们的方法在所实现的光学特性方面优于人类专家和简单的强化学习算法。此外，学习到的 Q 值包含有关多层光学系统的光学特性的信息，从而允许物理解释或假设分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数化强化学习方法，用于优化多层光学系统设计，同时考虑离散和连续参数。
AI.motivation: 传统光学系统优化方法仅关注层厚等连续参数，难以有效处理材料选择和层数等离散参数，且计算成本高。
AI.method: 将层堆叠过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程，采用指数变换奖励信号并改进Q-learning算法，实现离散-连续参数联合优化。
AI.result: 方法在光学性能上超越人类专家和传统强化学习算法，且Q值可解释为光学系统的物理特性指标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为光学逆向设计提供高效优化框架，具有物理可解释性，可扩展至其他多参数工程优化场景。

title: Smaller World Models for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习的更小世界模型
abstract: Sample efficiency remains a fundamental issue of reinforcement learning. Model-based algorithms try to make better use of data by simulating the environment with a model. We propose a new neural network architecture for world models based on a vector quantized-variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) to encode observations and a convolutional LSTM to predict the next embedding indices. A model-free PPO agent is trained purely on simulated experience from the world model. We adopt the setup introduced by Kaiser et al. (2020), which only allows 100K interactions with the real environment. We apply our method on 36 Atari environments and show that we reach comparable performance to their SimPLe algorithm, while our model is significantly smaller.
summary: Sample efficiency remains a fundamental issue of reinforcement learning. Model-based algorithms try to make better use of data by simulating the environment with a model. We propose a new neural network architecture for world models based on a vector quantized-variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) to encode observations and a convolutional LSTM to predict the next embedding indices. A model-free PPO agent is trained purely on simulated experience from the world model. We adopt the setup introduced by Kaiser et al. (2020), which only allows 100K interactions with the real environment. We apply our method on 36 Atari environments and show that we reach comparable performance to their SimPLe algorithm, while our model is significantly smaller.
abstract_zh: 样本效率仍然是强化学习的一个基本问题。基于模型的算法试图通过模型模拟环境来更好地利用数据。我们为世界模型提出了一种新的神经网络架构，该架构基于矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQ-VAE）来编码观测值和卷积 LSTM 来预测下一个嵌入索引。无模型 PPO 智能体纯粹根据世界模型的模拟经验进行训练。我们采用 Kaiser 等人介绍的设置。 (2020)，仅允许与真实环境进行 100K 次交互。我们将我们的方法应用于 36 个 Atari 环境，结果表明我们达到了与他们的 SimPLe 算法相当的性能，而我们的模型要小得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于VQ-VAE和卷积LSTM的更小规模世界模型架构，用于提升强化学习的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中样本效率低下，现有基于模型的方法需在真实环境中进行大量交互，而本文旨在通过更高效的世界模型减少真实交互次数。
AI.method: 采用VQ-VAE编码观测数据，结合卷积LSTM预测嵌入索引，训练无模型PPO代理仅依赖模拟经验，并在36个Atari环境中验证。
AI.result: 在仅允许10万次真实环境交互的设定下，模型性能与SimPLe算法相当，但模型规模显著减小。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过紧凑的世界模型有效提升了样本效率，在保持性能的同时降低了计算资源需求。

title: Hierarchical Attention Learning of Scene Flow in 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: 3D 点云场景流的分层注意力学习
abstract: Scene flow represents the 3D motion of every point in the dynamic environments. Like the optical flow that represents the motion of pixels in 2D images, 3D motion representation of scene flow benefits many applications, such as autonomous driving and service robot. This paper studies the problem of scene flow estimation from two consecutive 3D point clouds. In this paper, a novel hierarchical neural network with double attention is proposed for learning the correlation of point features in adjacent frames and refining scene flow from coarse to fine layer by layer. The proposed network has a new more-for-less hierarchical architecture. The more-for-less means that the number of input points is greater than the number of output points for scene flow estimation, which brings more input information and balances the precision and resource consumption. In this hierarchical architecture, scene flow of different levels is generated and supervised respectively. A novel attentive embedding module is introduced to aggregate the features of adjacent points using a double attention method in a patch-to-patch manner. The proper layers for flow embedding and flow supervision are carefully considered in our network designment. Experiments show that the proposed network outperforms the state-of-the-art performance of 3D scene flow estimation on the FlyingThings3D and KITTI Scene Flow 2015 datasets. We also apply the proposed network to realistic LiDAR odometry task, which is an key problem in autonomous driving. The experiment results demonstrate that our proposed network can outperform the ICP-based method and shows the good practical application ability.
summary: Scene flow represents the 3D motion of every point in the dynamic environments. Like the optical flow that represents the motion of pixels in 2D images, 3D motion representation of scene flow benefits many applications, such as autonomous driving and service robot. This paper studies the problem of scene flow estimation from two consecutive 3D point clouds. In this paper, a novel hierarchical neural network with double attention is proposed for learning the correlation of point features in adjacent frames and refining scene flow from coarse to fine layer by layer. The proposed network has a new more-for-less hierarchical architecture. The more-for-less means that the number of input points is greater than the number of output points for scene flow estimation, which brings more input information and balances the precision and resource consumption. In this hierarchical architecture, scene flow of different levels is generated and supervised respectively. A novel attentive embedding module is introduced to aggregate the features of adjacent points using a double attention method in a patch-to-patch manner. The proper layers for flow embedding and flow supervision are carefully considered in our network designment. Experiments show that the proposed network outperforms the state-of-the-art performance of 3D scene flow estimation on the FlyingThings3D and KITTI Scene Flow 2015 datasets. We also apply the proposed network to realistic LiDAR odometry task, which is an key problem in autonomous driving. The experiment results demonstrate that our proposed network can outperform the ICP-based method and shows the good practical application ability.
abstract_zh: 场景流代表动态环境中每个点的 3D 运动。与表示 2D 图像中像素运动的光流一样，场景流的 3D 运动表示有利于许多应用，例如自动驾驶和服务机器人。本文研究了两个连续 3D 点云的场景流估计问题。本文提出了一种新型的双重注意力分层神经网络，用于学习相邻帧中点特征的相关性，并逐层细化场景流从粗到细。所提出的网络具有新的多为少的分层架构。多换少是指场景流估计的输入点数大于输出点数，带来更多的输入信息，平衡精度和资源消耗。在这种分层架构中，不同级别的场景流分别生成和监督。引入了一种新颖的注意嵌入模块，使用双重注意方法以补丁到补丁的方式聚合相邻点的特征。我们的网络设计中仔细考虑了流嵌入和流监督的适当层。实验表明，所提出的网络优于 FlyingThings3D 和 KITTI Scene Flow 2015 数据集上 3D 场景流估计的最新性能。我们还将所提出的网络应用于现实的激光雷达测距任务，这是自动驾驶中的一个关键问题。实验结果表明，我们提出的网络可以优于基于ICP的方法，并显示出良好的实际应用能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双注意力机制的分层神经网络，用于从连续3D点云中估计场景流，以提升动态环境中的运动感知能力。
AI.motivation: 场景流作为3D点云中每个点的运动表示，对自动驾驶等应用至关重要。现有方法在精度与计算资源消耗间难以平衡，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计分层架构实现'更多输入-更少输出'（more-for-less）策略，通过双注意力机制聚合相邻点特征，并分层生成与监督场景流，引入注意力嵌入模块提升特征表达。
AI.result: 在FlyingThings3D和KITTI数据集上优于现有最优方法，在真实LiDAR里程计任务中超越ICP基线方法，验证了实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层双注意力网络有效平衡了精度与效率，为3D场景流估计和自动驾驶中的感知任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Hierarchical Attention Learning of Scene Flow in 3D Point Clouds 3D 点云场景流的分层注意力学习 Scene flow represents the 3D motion of every point in the dynamic environments. Like the optical flow that represents the motion of pixels in 2D images, 3D motion representation of scene flow benefits many applications, such as autonomous driving and service robot. This paper studies the problem of scene flow estimation from two consecutive 3D point clouds. In this paper, a novel hierarchical neural network with double attention is proposed for learning the correlation of point features in adjacent frames and refining scene flow from coarse to fine layer by layer. The proposed network has a new more-for-less hierarchical architecture. The more-for-less means that the number of input points is greater than the number of output points for scene flow estimation, which brings more input information and balances the precision and resource consumption. In this hierarchical architecture, scene flow of different levels is generated and supervised respectively. A novel attentive embedding module is introduced to aggregate the features of adjacent points using a double attention method in a patch-to-patch manner. The proper layers for flow embedding and flow supervision are carefully considered in our network designment. Experiments show that the proposed network outperforms the state-of-the-art performance of 3D scene flow estimation on the FlyingThings3D and KITTI Scene Flow 2015 datasets. We also apply the proposed network to realistic LiDAR odometry task, which is an key problem in autonomous driving. The experiment results demonstrate that our proposed network can outperform the ICP-based method and shows the good practical application ability. 场景流代表动态环境中每个点的 3D 运动。与表示 2D 图像中像素运动的光流一样，场景流的 3D 运动表示有利于许多应用，例如自动驾驶和服务机器人。本文研究了两个连续 3D 点云的场景流估计问题。本文提出了一种新型的双重注意力分层神经网络，用于学习相邻帧中点特征的相关性，并逐层细化场景流从粗到细。所提出的网络具有新的多为少的分层架构。多换少是指场景流估计的输入点数大于输出点数，带来更多的输入信息，平衡精度和资源消耗。在这种分层架构中，不同级别的场景流分别生成和监督。引入了一种新颖的注意嵌入模块，使用双重注意方法以补丁到补丁的方式聚合相邻点的特征。我们的网络设计中仔细考虑了流嵌入和流监督的适当层。实验表明，所提出的网络优于 FlyingThings3D 和 KITTI Scene Flow 2015 数据集上 3D 场景流估计的最新性能。我们还将所提出的网络应用于现实的激光雷达测距任务，这是自动驾驶中的一个关键问题。实验结果表明，我们提出的网络可以优于基于ICP的方法，并显示出良好的实际应用能力。 本文提出一种基于双注意力机制的分层神经网络，用于从连续3D点云中估计场景流，以提升动态环境中的运动感知能力。 Guangming Wang,Xinrui Wu,Zhe Liu,Hesheng Wang cs.CV

title: The Risks of Invariant Risk Minimization
title_zh: 不变风险最小化的风险
abstract: Invariant Causal Prediction (Peters et al., 2016) is a technique for out-of-distribution generalization which assumes that some aspects of the data distribution vary across the training set but that the underlying causal mechanisms remain constant. Recently, Arjovsky et al. (2019) proposed Invariant Risk Minimization (IRM), an objective based on this idea for learning deep, invariant features of data which are a complex function of latent variables; many alternatives have subsequently been suggested. However, formal guarantees for all of these works are severely lacking. In this paper, we present the first analysis of classification under the IRM objective--as well as these recently proposed alternatives--under a fairly natural and general model. In the linear case, we show simple conditions under which the optimal solution succeeds or, more often, fails to recover the optimal invariant predictor. We furthermore present the very first results in the non-linear regime: we demonstrate that IRM can fail catastrophically unless the test data are sufficiently similar to the training distribution--this is precisely the issue that it was intended to solve. Thus, in this setting we find that IRM and its alternatives fundamentally do not improve over standard Empirical Risk Minimization.
summary: Invariant Causal Prediction (Peters et al., 2016) is a technique for out-of-distribution generalization which assumes that some aspects of the data distribution vary across the training set but that the underlying causal mechanisms remain constant. Recently, Arjovsky et al. (2019) proposed Invariant Risk Minimization (IRM), an objective based on this idea for learning deep, invariant features of data which are a complex function of latent variables; many alternatives have subsequently been suggested. However, formal guarantees for all of these works are severely lacking. In this paper, we present the first analysis of classification under the IRM objective--as well as these recently proposed alternatives--under a fairly natural and general model. In the linear case, we show simple conditions under which the optimal solution succeeds or, more often, fails to recover the optimal invariant predictor. We furthermore present the very first results in the non-linear regime: we demonstrate that IRM can fail catastrophically unless the test data are sufficiently similar to the training distribution--this is precisely the issue that it was intended to solve. Thus, in this setting we find that IRM and its alternatives fundamentally do not improve over standard Empirical Risk Minimization.
abstract_zh: 不变因果预测（Peters et al., 2016）是一种分布外泛化技术，它假设数据分布的某些方面在整个训练集中有所不同，但潜在的因果机制保持不变。最近，Arjovsky 等人。 (2019) 提出了不变风险最小化 (IRM)，这是一个基于此思想的目标，用于学习数据的深层不变特征，这些特征是潜在变量的复杂函数；随后提出了许多替代方案。然而，所有这些工作都严重缺乏正式保障。在本文中，我们在相当自然和通用的模型下，首次对 IRM 目标下的分类以及这些最近提出的替代方案进行了分析。在线性情况下，我们展示了最佳解决方案成功的简单条件，或者更常见的是，无法恢复最佳不变预测器。我们还展示了非线性机制中的第一个结果：我们证明，除非测试数据与训练分布足够相似，否则 IRM 可能会灾难性地失败——这正是它想要解决的问题。因此，在这种情况下，我们发现 IRM 及其替代方案从根本上并没有比标准经验风险最小化有所改进。

AI.tldr: 分析不变风险最小化（IRM）及其替代方法在分类任务中的有效性及局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管IRM被提出用于解决分布外泛化问题，但其理论保证不足，需进一步分析其有效性。
AI.method: 在一般模型下分析IRM及替代方法，通过线性和非线性条件评估其性能。
AI.result: 发现IRM在非线性情况下可能严重失败，且无法超越标准经验风险最小化方法。
AI.conclusion: IRM及其替代方法未能有效解决分布外泛化问题，需进一步研究。

authors_text: Antonio J G Busson,Paulo R C Mendes,Daniel de S Moraes,Álvaro M da Veiga,Álan L V Guedes,Sérgio Colcher
title: Video Quality Enhancement Using Deep Learning-Based Prediction Models for Quantized DCT Coefficients in MPEG I-frames
title_zh: 使用基于深度学习的预测模型来增强 MPEG I 帧中的量化 DCT 系数的视频质量
abstract: Recent works have successfully applied some types of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to reduce the noticeable distortion resulting from the lossy JPEG/MPEG compression technique. Most of them are built upon the processing made on the spatial domain. In this work, we propose a MPEG video decoder that is purely based on the frequency-to-frequency domain: it reads the quantized DCT coefficients received from a low-quality I-frames bitstream and, using a deep learning-based model, predicts the missing coefficients in order to recompose the same frames with enhanced quality. In experiments with a video dataset, our best model was able to improve from frames with quantized DCT coefficients corresponding to a Quality Factor (QF) of 10 to enhanced quality frames with QF slightly near to 20.
summary: Recent works have successfully applied some types of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to reduce the noticeable distortion resulting from the lossy JPEG/MPEG compression technique. Most of them are built upon the processing made on the spatial domain. In this work, we propose a MPEG video decoder that is purely based on the frequency-to-frequency domain: it reads the quantized DCT coefficients received from a low-quality I-frames bitstream and, using a deep learning-based model, predicts the missing coefficients in order to recompose the same frames with enhanced quality. In experiments with a video dataset, our best model was able to improve from frames with quantized DCT coefficients corresponding to a Quality Factor (QF) of 10 to enhanced quality frames with QF slightly near to 20.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作已成功应用某些类型的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来减少有损 JPEG/MPEG 压缩技术造成的明显失真。其中大多数都是建立在空间域上的处理基础上的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种纯粹基于频域到频域的 MPEG 视频解码器：它读取从低质量 I 帧比特流接收到的量化 DCT 系数，并使用基于深度学习的模型预测丢失的系数，以便以更高的质量重新组合相同的帧。在视频数据集的实验中，我们的最佳模型能够从质量因子 (QF) 为 10 的量化 DCT 系数帧改进为 QF 略接近 20 的增强质量帧。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的MPEG视频解码方法，通过预测量化DCT系数来增强I帧视频质量。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法多基于空间域处理，难以有效恢复量化DCT系数导致的压缩失真，需探索频率域直接处理方案。
AI.method: 构建纯频率域MPEG解码器，利用深度学习模型预测低质量I帧的量化DCT系数缺失部分，重建高质量帧。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法可将QF=10的低质量帧提升至接近QF=20的增强质量水平。
AI.conclusion: 频率域深度学习模型能有效提升视频质量，优于传统空间域方法，在压缩视频增强领域具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Alexander Katzmann,Oliver Taubmann,Stephen Ahmad,Alexander Mühlberg,Michael Sühling,Horst-Michael Groß
title: Explaining Clinical Decision Support Systems in Medical Imaging using Cycle-Consistent Activation Maximization
title_zh: 使用周期一致激活最大化解释医学成像中的临床决策支持系统
comment: 49 pages, 13 figures, 18 pages appendix, accepted manuscript
comments: 49 pages, 13 figures, 18 pages appendix, accepted manuscript
abstract: Clinical decision support using deep neural networks has become a topic of steadily growing interest. While recent work has repeatedly demonstrated that deep learning offers major advantages for medical image classification over traditional methods, clinicians are often hesitant to adopt the technology because its underlying decision-making process is considered to be intransparent and difficult to comprehend. In recent years, this has been addressed by a variety of approaches that have successfully contributed to providing deeper insight. Most notably, additive feature attribution methods are able to propagate decisions back into the input space by creating a saliency map which allows the practitioner to "see what the network sees." However, the quality of the generated maps can become poor and the images noisy if only limited data is available - a typical scenario in clinical contexts. We propose a novel decision explanation scheme based on CycleGAN activation maximization which generates high-quality visualizations of classifier decisions even in smaller data sets. We conducted a user study in which we evaluated our method on the LIDC dataset for lung lesion malignancy classification, the BreastMNIST dataset for ultrasound image breast cancer detection, as well as two subsets of the CIFAR-10 dataset for RBG image object recognition. Within this user study, our method clearly outperformed existing approaches on the medical imaging datasets and ranked second in the natural image setting. With our approach we make a significant contribution towards a better understanding of clinical decision support systems based on deep neural networks and thus aim to foster overall clinical acceptance.

abstract_zh: 使用深度神经网络的临床决策支持已成为人们日益关注的话题。虽然最近的工作一再证明深度学习在医学图像分类方面比传统方法具有主要优势，但临床医生往往对采用该技术犹豫不决，因为其底层决策过程被认为是不透明且难以理解的。近年来，已经通过多种方法解决了这个问题，这些方法成功地提供了更深入的见解。最值得注意的是，附加特征归因方法能够通过创建显着性图将决策传播回输入空间，该显着性图允许从业者“看到网络看到的内容”。然而，如果只有有限的数据可用，生成的图的质量可能会变差并且图像有噪声——这是临床环境中的典型情况。我们提出了一种基于 CycleGAN 激活最大化的新颖决策解释方案，即使在较小的数据集中也能生成高质量的分类器决策可视化。我们进行了一项用户研究，其中我们在用于肺部病变恶性肿瘤分类的 LIDC 数据集、用于超声图像乳腺癌检测的 BreastMNIST 数据集以及用于 RBG 图像对象识别的 CIFAR-10 数据集的两个子集上评估了我们的方法。在这项用户研究中，我们的方法明显优于医学成像数据集上的现有方法，并在自然图像设置中排名第二。通过我们的方法，我们为更好地理解基于深度神经网络的临床决策支持系统做出了重大贡献，从而旨在促进整体临床接受度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CycleGAN激活最大化的新方法，用于在医学影像分类任务中解释临床决策支持系统的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学影像分类中表现优异，但其决策过程不透明，导致临床医生难以信任。现有方法在数据有限时生成的显著性图质量较差。
AI.method: 采用Cycle-Consistent Activation Maximization（循环一致激活最大化）技术，通过生成高质量的可视化图像解释分类器决策，即使在小数据集上也能保持效果。
AI.result: 用户研究显示，该方法在LIDC和BreastMNIST医学数据集上显著优于现有方法，在CIFAR-10自然图像任务中排名第二。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了临床决策支持系统的可解释性，有助于推动其在医疗领域的应用与接受度。

authors_text: Aaron S. Eisman,Nishant R. Shah,Carsten Eickhoff,George Zerveas,Elizabeth S. Chen,Wen-Chih Wu,Indra Neil Sarkar
title: Extracting Angina Symptoms from Clinical Notes Using Pre-Trained Transformer Architectures
title_zh: 使用预先训练的 Transformer 架构从临床记录中提取心绞痛症状
abstract: Anginal symptoms can connote increased cardiac risk and a need for change in cardiovascular management. This study evaluated the potential to extract these symptoms from physician notes using the Bidirectional Encoder from Transformers language model fine-tuned on a domain-specific corpus. The history of present illness section of 459 expert annotated primary care physician notes from consecutive patients referred for cardiac testing without known atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease were included. Notes were annotated for positive and negative mentions of chest pain and shortness of breath characterization. The results demonstrate high sensitivity and specificity for the detection of chest pain or discomfort, substernal chest pain, shortness of breath, and dyspnea on exertion. Small sample size limited extracting factors related to provocation and palliation of chest pain. This study provides a promising starting point for the natural language processing of physician notes to characterize clinically actionable anginal symptoms.
summary: Anginal symptoms can connote increased cardiac risk and a need for change in cardiovascular management. This study evaluated the potential to extract these symptoms from physician notes using the Bidirectional Encoder from Transformers language model fine-tuned on a domain-specific corpus. The history of present illness section of 459 expert annotated primary care physician notes from consecutive patients referred for cardiac testing without known atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease were included. Notes were annotated for positive and negative mentions of chest pain and shortness of breath characterization. The results demonstrate high sensitivity and specificity for the detection of chest pain or discomfort, substernal chest pain, shortness of breath, and dyspnea on exertion. Small sample size limited extracting factors related to provocation and palliation of chest pain. This study provides a promising starting point for the natural language processing of physician notes to characterize clinically actionable anginal symptoms.
abstract_zh: 心绞痛症状可能意味着心脏病风险增加，需要改变心血管管理。这项研究评估了使用在特定领域语料库上微调的变形金刚语言模型的双向编码器从医生笔记中提取这些症状的潜力。包括 459 名专家注释的初级保健医生记录的现病史部分，这些记录来自转诊进行心脏检查但没有已知动脉粥样硬化性心血管疾病的连续患者。对胸痛和呼吸短促特征的正面和负面提及进行了注释。结果表明，对于检测胸痛或不适、胸骨后胸痛、气短和劳力性呼吸困难具有很高的敏感性和特异性。小样本量限制了与胸痛的激发和缓解相关的因素的提取。这项研究为医生笔记的自然语言处理提供了一个有希望的起点，以表征临床上可操作的心绞痛症状。

AI.tldr: 利用预训练Transformer模型从临床笔记中提取心绞痛症状，以辅助心血管风险评估。
AI.motivation: 心绞痛症状对心血管风险评估至关重要，但手动提取耗时且易出错，需开发自动化方法提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 采用微调的双向Transformer（BERT）模型，基于领域特定语料库，对459份标注的医生现病史笔记进行症状提取。
AI.result: 模型在检测胸痛、呼吸短促等症状上表现出高灵敏度和特异度，但小样本限制了诱发和缓解因素的提取。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了预训练Transformer模型在自动提取临床症状中的有效性，为心血管疾病管理的NLP应用提供了可行方案。

title: On Feature Selection Using Anisotropic General Regression Neural Network
title_zh: 利用各向异性广义回归神经网络进行特征选择
abstract: The presence of irrelevant features in the input dataset tends to reduce the interpretability and predictive quality of machine learning models. Therefore, the development of feature selection methods to recognize irrelevant features is a crucial topic in machine learning. Here we show how the General Regression Neural Network used with an anisotropic Gaussian Kernel can be used to perform feature selection. A number of numerical experiments are conducted using simulated data to study the robustness of the proposed methodology and its sensitivity to sample size. Finally, a comparison with four other feature selection methods is performed on several real world datasets.
summary: The presence of irrelevant features in the input dataset tends to reduce the interpretability and predictive quality of machine learning models. Therefore, the development of feature selection methods to recognize irrelevant features is a crucial topic in machine learning. Here we show how the General Regression Neural Network used with an anisotropic Gaussian Kernel can be used to perform feature selection. A number of numerical experiments are conducted using simulated data to study the robustness of the proposed methodology and its sensitivity to sample size. Finally, a comparison with four other feature selection methods is performed on several real world datasets.
abstract_zh: 输入数据集中存在不相关特征往往会降低机器学习模型的可解释性和预测质量。因此，开发特征选择方法来识别不相关的特征是机器学习中的一个重要课题。在这里，我们展示了如何使用与各向异性高斯核一起使用的通用回归神经网络来执行特征选择。使用模拟数据进行了许多数值实验，以研究所提出的方法的稳健性及其对样本量的敏感性。最后，在几个现实世界数据集上与其他四种特征选择方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用各向异性高斯核的广义回归神经网络（GRNN）进行特征选择，以解决无关特征对机器学习模型的影响。
AI.motivation: 无关特征会降低模型的可解释性和预测性能，因此需要开发有效的特征选择方法。
AI.method: 采用结合各向异性高斯核的GRNN模型，通过模拟数据实验分析方法鲁棒性，并与四种其他特征选择方法在真实数据集上进行对比。
AI.result: 数值实验表明方法对样本量敏感且具有鲁棒性，真实数据集对比显示其与其他方法相比表现具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 各向异性GRNN特征选择方法有效，能够识别无关特征并提升模型性能，适用于实际应用。

ai_content_json.method: 采用结合各向异性高斯核的GRNN模型，通过模拟数据实验分析方法鲁棒性，并与四种其他特征选择方法在真实数据集上进行对比。
ai_content_json.result: 数值实验表明方法对样本量敏感且具有鲁棒性，真实数据集对比显示其与其他方法相比表现具有竞争力。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 各向异性GRNN特征选择方法有效，能够识别无关特征并提升模型性能，适用于实际应用。

search_text: On Feature Selection Using Anisotropic General Regression Neural Network 利用各向异性广义回归神经网络进行特征选择 The presence of irrelevant features in the input dataset tends to reduce the interpretability and predictive quality of machine learning models. Therefore, the development of feature selection methods to recognize irrelevant features is a crucial topic in machine learning. Here we show how the General Regression Neural Network used with an anisotropic Gaussian Kernel can be used to perform feature selection. A number of numerical experiments are conducted using simulated data to study the robustness of the proposed methodology and its sensitivity to sample size. Finally, a comparison with four other feature selection methods is performed on several real world datasets. 输入数据集中存在不相关特征往往会降低机器学习模型的可解释性和预测质量。因此，开发特征选择方法来识别不相关的特征是机器学习中的一个重要课题。在这里，我们展示了如何使用与各向异性高斯核一起使用的通用回归神经网络来执行特征选择。使用模拟数据进行了许多数值实验，以研究所提出的方法的稳健性及其对样本量的敏感性。最后，在几个现实世界数据集上与其他四种特征选择方法进行了比较。 本文提出利用各向异性高斯核的广义回归神经网络（GRNN）进行特征选择，以解决无关特征对机器学习模型的影响。 Federico Amato,Fabian Guignard,Philippe Jacquet,Mikhail Kanevski stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Using Type Information to Improve Entity Coreference Resolution
title_zh: 使用类型信息改进实体共指解析
comment: Accepted as Long Paper at CODI workshop EMNLP 2020
comments: Accepted as Long Paper at CODI workshop EMNLP 2020
abstract: Coreference resolution (CR) is an essential part of discourse analysis. Most recently, neural approaches have been proposed to improve over SOTA models from earlier paradigms. So far none of the published neural models leverage external semantic knowledge such as type information. This paper offers the first such model and evaluation, demonstrating modest gains in accuracy by introducing either gold standard or predicted types. In the proposed approach, type information serves both to (1) improve mention representation and (2) create a soft type consistency check between coreference candidate mentions. Our evaluation covers two different grain sizes of types over four different benchmark corpora.
summary: Coreference resolution (CR) is an essential part of discourse analysis. Most recently, neural approaches have been proposed to improve over SOTA models from earlier paradigms. So far none of the published neural models leverage external semantic knowledge such as type information. This paper offers the first such model and evaluation, demonstrating modest gains in accuracy by introducing either gold standard or predicted types. In the proposed approach, type information serves both to (1) improve mention representation and (2) create a soft type consistency check between coreference candidate mentions. Our evaluation covers two different grain sizes of types over four different benchmark corpora.
abstract_zh: 共指消解（CR）是话语分析的重要组成部分。最近，人们提出了神经方法来改进早期范式的 SOTA 模型。到目前为止，已发表的神经模型都没有利用外部语义知识，例如类型信息。本文提供了第一个这样的模型和评估，通过引入黄金标准或预测类型证明了准确性的适度提高。在所提出的方法中，类型信息既可以（1）改进提及表示，也可以（2）在共指候选提及之间创建软类型一致性检查。我们的评估涵盖了四种不同基准语料库中两种不同粒度的类型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用类型信息改进实体共指解析的神经网络模型，通过引入类型信息提升模型准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络共指解析模型未有效利用外部语义知识（如类型信息），而类型信息对实体消歧和一致性判断具有潜在价值。
AI.method: 将类型信息融入提及表示，并构建软类型一致性约束，通过两种粒度类型信息（标准类型/预测类型）增强模型判别能力。
AI.result: 在四个基准语料库上实现小幅准确率提升，验证了类型信息对共指解析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 类型信息能有效辅助共指解析，未来可探索更丰富的外部知识融合方式。

authors_text: Petr A. Golovach,Paloma T. Lima,Charis Papadopoulos
title: Graph Square Roots of Small Distance from Degree One Graphs
title_zh: 从一阶图得出小距离的图平方根
abstract: Given a graph class $\mathcal{H}$, the task of the $\mathcal{H}$-Square Root problem is to decide, whether an input graph $G$ has a square root $H$ from $\mathcal{H}$. We are interested in the parameterized complexity of the problem for classes $\mathcal{H}$ that are composed by the graphs at vertex deletion distance at most $k$ from graphs of maximum degree at most one, that is, we are looking for a square root $H$ such that there is a modulator $S$ of size $k$ such that $H-S$ is the disjoint union of isolated vertices and disjoint edges. We show that different variants of the problems with constraints on the number of isolated vertices and edges in $H-S$ are FPT when parameterized by $k$ by demonstrating algorithms with running time $2^{2^{O(k)}}\cdot n^{O(1)}$. We further show that the running time of our algorithms is asymptotically optimal and it is unlikely that the double-exponential dependence on $k$ could be avoided. In particular, we prove that the VC-$k$ Root problem, that asks whether an input graph has a square root with vertex cover of size at most $k$, cannot be solved in time $2^{2^{o(k)}}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ unless Exponential Time Hypothesis fails. Moreover, we point out that VC-$k$ Root parameterized by $k$ does not admit a subexponential kernel unless $P=NP$.
summary: Given a graph class $\mathcal{H}$, the task of the $\mathcal{H}$-Square Root problem is to decide, whether an input graph $G$ has a square root $H$ from $\mathcal{H}$. We are interested in the parameterized complexity of the problem for classes $\mathcal{H}$ that are composed by the graphs at vertex deletion distance at most $k$ from graphs of maximum degree at most one, that is, we are looking for a square root $H$ such that there is a modulator $S$ of size $k$ such that $H-S$ is the disjoint union of isolated vertices and disjoint edges. We show that different variants of the problems with constraints on the number of isolated vertices and edges in $H-S$ are FPT when parameterized by $k$ by demonstrating algorithms with running time $2^{2^{O(k)}}\cdot n^{O(1)}$. We further show that the running time of our algorithms is asymptotically optimal and it is unlikely that the double-exponential dependence on $k$ could be avoided. In particular, we prove that the VC-$k$ Root problem, that asks whether an input graph has a square root with vertex cover of size at most $k$, cannot be solved in time $2^{2^{o(k)}}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ unless Exponential Time Hypothesis fails. Moreover, we point out that VC-$k$ Root parameterized by $k$ does not admit a subexponential kernel unless $P=NP$.
abstract_zh: 给定一个图类$\mathcal{H}$，$\mathcal{H}$平方根问题的任务是确定输入图$G$是否具有来自$\mathcal{H}$的平方根$H$。我们感兴趣的是类 $\mathcal{H}$ 问题的参数化复杂性，这些类由最大度数最多为 1 的图的顶点删除距离最多 $k$ 处的图组成，也就是说，我们正在寻找一个平方根 $H$，使得存在一个大小为 $k$ 的调制器 $S$，使得 $H-S$ 是孤立顶点和不相交边的不相交并集。我们通过演示运行时间为 $2^{2^{O(k)}}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ 的算法，证明了当 $k$ 参数化时，$H-S$ 中孤立顶点和边的数量受到限制的问题的不同变体是 FPT。我们进一步表明，我们算法的运行时间是渐近最优的，并且不太可能避免对 $k$ 的双指数依赖性。特别是，我们证明了 VC-$k$ 根问题，即询问输入图是否具有顶点覆盖大小至多 $k$ 的平方根，除非指数时间假设失败，否则无法在 $2^{2^{o(k)}}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ 时间内解决。此外，我们指出由 $k$ 参数化的 VC-$k$ 根不承认次指数内核，除非 $P=NP$。

AI.tldr: 研究图类ℋ的平方根判定问题，即判断输入图G是否存在一个平方根H属于ℋ，其中ℋ由与最大度至多为1的图顶点删除距离不超过k的图组成。
AI.motivation: 探索当平方根图的结构接近简单图（孤立点和孤立边的并集）时，该问题的参数化复杂性，特别是在参数k下的可解性与下界。
AI.method: 设计运行时间为2^{2^{O(k)}}·n^{O(1)}的FPT算法，并通过归约证明该双指数依赖在渐近意义下是最优的，同时证明了VC-k Root问题在ETH假设下不能有更好的时间复杂度，且无次级指数核。
AI.result: 证明了问题的不同变体在参数化下是FPT的，给出了双指数时间算法；证明了该算法运行时间渐近最优，且VC-k Root问题在ETH下无2^{2^{o(k)}}·n^{O(1)}算法，也不存在次级指数核（除非P=NP）。
AI.conclusion: 对于接近最大度至多为1的图的平方根问题，双指数参数依赖是必要的，揭示了该类问题在参数化复杂度上的本质困难。

title: On the Complementary Nature of Knowledge Graph Embedding, Fine Grain Entity Types, and Language Modeling
title_zh: 关于知识图嵌入、细粒度实体类型和语言建模的互补性
comment: To appear at the EMNLP 2020 Workshop on Deep Learning Inside Out
comments: To appear at the EMNLP 2020 Workshop on Deep Learning Inside Out
abstract: We demonstrate the complementary natures of neural knowledge graph embedding, fine-grain entity type prediction, and neural language modeling. We show that a language model-inspired knowledge graph embedding approach yields both improved knowledge graph embeddings and fine-grain entity type representations. Our work also shows that jointly modeling both structured knowledge tuples and language improves both.
summary: We demonstrate the complementary natures of neural knowledge graph embedding, fine-grain entity type prediction, and neural language modeling. We show that a language model-inspired knowledge graph embedding approach yields both improved knowledge graph embeddings and fine-grain entity type representations. Our work also shows that jointly modeling both structured knowledge tuples and language improves both.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了神经知识图嵌入、细粒度实体类型预测和神经语言建模的互补性质。我们表明，受语言模型启发的知识图嵌入方法可以产生改进的知识图嵌入和细粒度实体类型表示。我们的工作还表明，对结构化知识元组和语言进行联合建模可以改善两者。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨知识图嵌入、细粒度实体类型预测与语言模型的互补性，并提出结合语言模型的知识图嵌入方法以提升表示效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法可能未能充分挖掘知识图嵌入、实体类型预测与语言模型之间的协同潜力，导致表示效果受限。
AI.method: 设计语言模型启发的知识图嵌入框架，联合建模结构化知识元组与语言信息，同时预测细粒度实体类型。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在知识图嵌入质量与细粒度实体类型表示上均优于基线模型，联合建模进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 结构化知识与语言模型的联合建模能有效互补，为多模态知识表示提供新思路。

search_text: On the Complementary Nature of Knowledge Graph Embedding, Fine Grain Entity Types, and Language Modeling 关于知识图嵌入、细粒度实体类型和语言建模的互补性 We demonstrate the complementary natures of neural knowledge graph embedding, fine-grain entity type prediction, and neural language modeling. We show that a language model-inspired knowledge graph embedding approach yields both improved knowledge graph embeddings and fine-grain entity type representations. Our work also shows that jointly modeling both structured knowledge tuples and language improves both. 我们展示了神经知识图嵌入、细粒度实体类型预测和神经语言建模的互补性质。我们表明，受语言模型启发的知识图嵌入方法可以产生改进的知识图嵌入和细粒度实体类型表示。我们的工作还表明，对结构化知识元组和语言进行联合建模可以改善两者。 本文探讨知识图嵌入、细粒度实体类型预测与语言模型的互补性，并提出结合语言模型的知识图嵌入方法以提升表示效果。 Rajat Patel,Francis Ferraro cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Almost Linear Time Algorithms for Minsum $k$-Sink Problems on Dynamic Flow Path Networks
title_zh: 动态流路径网络上最小 $k$ 汇问题的几乎线性时间算法
abstract: We address the facility location problems on dynamic flow path networks. A dynamic flow path network consists of an undirected path with positive edge lengths, positive edge capacities, and positive vertex weights. A path can be considered as a road, an edge length as the distance along the road and a vertex weight as the number of people at the site. An edge capacity limits the number of people that can enter the edge per unit time. In the dynamic flow network, given particular points on edges or vertices, called sinks, all the people evacuate from the vertices to the sinks as quickly as possible. The problem is to find the location of sinks on a dynamic flow path network in such a way that the aggregate evacuation time (i.e., the sum of evacuation times for all the people) to sinks is minimized. We consider two models of the problem: the confluent flow model and the non-confluent flow model. In the former model, the way of evacuation is restricted so that all the people at a vertex have to evacuate to the same sink, and in the latter model, there is no such restriction. In this paper, for both the models, we develop algorithms which run in almost linear time regardless of the number of sinks. It should be stressed that for the confluent flow model, our algorithm improves upon the previous result by Benkoczi et al. [Theoretical Computer Science, 2020], and one for the non-confluent flow model is the first polynomial time algorithm.
summary: We address the facility location problems on dynamic flow path networks. A dynamic flow path network consists of an undirected path with positive edge lengths, positive edge capacities, and positive vertex weights. A path can be considered as a road, an edge length as the distance along the road and a vertex weight as the number of people at the site. An edge capacity limits the number of people that can enter the edge per unit time. In the dynamic flow network, given particular points on edges or vertices, called sinks, all the people evacuate from the vertices to the sinks as quickly as possible. The problem is to find the location of sinks on a dynamic flow path network in such a way that the aggregate evacuation time (i.e., the sum of evacuation times for all the people) to sinks is minimized. We consider two models of the problem: the confluent flow model and the non-confluent flow model. In the former model, the way of evacuation is restricted so that all the people at a vertex have to evacuate to the same sink, and in the latter model, there is no such restriction. In this paper, for both the models, we develop algorithms which run in almost linear time regardless of the number of sinks. It should be stressed that for the confluent flow model, our algorithm improves upon the previous result by Benkoczi et al. [Theoretical Computer Science, 2020], and one for the non-confluent flow model is the first polynomial time algorithm.
abstract_zh: 我们解决动态流动路径网络上的设施位置问题。动态流路径网络由具有正边长度、正边容量和正顶点权重的无向路径组成。路径可以被视为一条道路，边长可以被视为沿路的距离，顶点权重可以被视为该地点的人数。边缘容量限制了单位时间内可以进入边缘的人数。在动态流动网络中，给定边或顶点上的特定点（称为汇点），所有人员尽快从顶点疏散到汇点。问题是在动态流动路径网络上找到汇点的位置，以使到汇点的总疏散时间（即所有人的疏散时间之和）最小化。我们考虑该问题的两种模型：合流流模型和非合流流模型。在前一种模型中，疏散方式受到限制，使得同一顶点的所有人员都必须疏散到同一个汇点，而在后一种模型中，则没有这种限制。在本文中，对于这两个模型，我们开发了几乎以线性时间运行的算法，无论接收器的数量有多少。应该强调的是，对于合流流模型，我们的算法改进了 Benkoczi 等人之前的结果。 [理论计算机科学，2020]，针对非汇合流模型的一个是第一个多项式时间算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究动态流路径网络上的最小总疏散时间k-sink问题，提出适用于两种流模型的几乎线性时间算法。
AI.motivation: 设施选址问题在现实场景（如紧急疏散）中具有重要意义，而现有算法在处理大规模动态流网络时效率不足，需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析动态流网络特性，设计针对confluent和non-confluent流模型的高效算法，结合优化技术实现几乎线性时间复杂度。
AI.result: 为两种模型分别开发出几乎线性时间算法，其中confluent模型优于先前结果，non-confluent模型首次实现多项式时间求解。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法显著提升了动态流网络设施选址问题的计算效率，为实际应用提供了理论支持与实用工具。

authors_text: Chen He,Luana Micallef,Liye He,Gopal Peddinti,Tero Aittokallio,Giulio Jacucci
title: Characterizing the Quality of Insight by Interactions: A Case Study
title_zh: 通过交互来表征洞察力的质量：案例研究
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics. Keywords: insight, visualization, interaction, interaction pattern, insight-based evaluation
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics. Keywords: insight, visualization, interaction, interaction pattern, insight-based evaluation
abstract: Understanding the quality of insight has become increasingly important with the trend of allowing users to post comments during visual exploration, yet approaches for qualifying insight are rare. This paper presents a case study to investigate the possibility of characterizing the quality of insight via the interactions performed. To do this, we devised the interaction of a visualization tool-MediSyn-for insight generation. MediSyn supports five types of interactions: selecting, connecting, elaborating, exploring, and sharing. We evaluated MediSyn with 14 participants by allowing them to freely explore the data and generate insights. We then extracted seven interaction patterns from their interaction logs and correlated the patterns to four aspects of insight quality. The results show the possibility of qualifying insights via interactions. Among other findings, exploration actions can lead to unexpected insights; the drill-down pattern tends to increase the domain values of insights. A qualitative analysis shows that using domain knowledge to guide exploration can positively affect the domain value of derived insights. We discuss the study's implications, lessons learned, and future research opportunities.
summary: Understanding the quality of insight has become increasingly important with the trend of allowing users to post comments during visual exploration, yet approaches for qualifying insight are rare. This paper presents a case study to investigate the possibility of characterizing the quality of insight via the interactions performed. To do this, we devised the interaction of a visualization tool-MediSyn-for insight generation. MediSyn supports five types of interactions: selecting, connecting, elaborating, exploring, and sharing. We evaluated MediSyn with 14 participants by allowing them to freely explore the data and generate insights. We then extracted seven interaction patterns from their interaction logs and correlated the patterns to four aspects of insight quality. The results show the possibility of qualifying insights via interactions. Among other findings, exploration actions can lead to unexpected insights; the drill-down pattern tends to increase the domain values of insights. A qualitative analysis shows that using domain knowledge to guide exploration can positively affect the domain value of derived insights. We discuss the study's implications, lessons learned, and future research opportunities.
abstract_zh: 随着允许用户在视觉探索期间发表评论的趋势，了解洞察力的质量变得越来越重要，但限定洞察力的方法却很少。本文提出了一个案例研究，以调查通过所执行的交互来表征洞察力质量的可能性。为此，我们设计了可视化工具 MediSyn 的交互，以生成洞察力。 MediSyn 支持五种类型的交互：选择、连接、阐述、探索和共享。我们让 14 名参与者自由探索数据并产生见解，对 MediSyn 进行了评估。然后，我们从他们的交互日志中提取了七种交互模式，并将这些模式与洞察质量的四个方面相关联。结果表明通过交互获得合格见解的可能性。除其他发现外，探索行动可以带来意想不到的见解；向下钻取模式往往会增加见解的领域价值。定性分析表明，使用领域知识来指导探索可以对衍生见解的领域价值产生积极影响。我们讨论了该研究的意义、经验教训和未来的研究机会。

AI.tldr: 通过分析用户在可视化工具中的交互行为，研究如何表征洞察质量。
AI.motivation: 随着用户在可视化探索中可自由发表评论，评估洞察质量的方法稀缺，亟需通过交互行为量化洞察价值。
AI.method: 开发支持五类交互（选择、连接、阐述、探索、分享）的可视化工具MediSyn，让14名参与者自由探索数据并生成洞察，从交互日志中提取七种模式并与洞察质量的四个维度关联分析。
AI.result: 探索性操作可产生意外洞察，深入分析模式能提升领域价值；结合领域知识引导探索可增强洞察的领域价值。
AI.conclusion: 交互模式能有效表征洞察质量，未来可进一步结合领域知识优化洞察评估方法。

conclusion: 交互模式能有效表征洞察质量，未来可进一步结合领域知识优化洞察评估方法。
search_text: Characterizing the Quality of Insight by Interactions: A Case Study 通过交互来表征洞察力的质量：案例研究 Understanding the quality of insight has become increasingly important with the trend of allowing users to post comments during visual exploration, yet approaches for qualifying insight are rare. This paper presents a case study to investigate the possibility of characterizing the quality of insight via the interactions performed. To do this, we devised the interaction of a visualization tool-MediSyn-for insight generation. MediSyn supports five types of interactions: selecting, connecting, elaborating, exploring, and sharing. We evaluated MediSyn with 14 participants by allowing them to freely explore the data and generate insights. We then extracted seven interaction patterns from their interaction logs and correlated the patterns to four aspects of insight quality. The results show the possibility of qualifying insights via interactions. Among other findings, exploration actions can lead to unexpected insights; the drill-down pattern tends to increase the domain values of insights. A qualitative analysis shows that using domain knowledge to guide exploration can positively affect the domain value of derived insights. We discuss the study's implications, lessons learned, and future research opportunities. 随着允许用户在视觉探索期间发表评论的趋势，了解洞察力的质量变得越来越重要，但限定洞察力的方法却很少。本文提出了一个案例研究，以调查通过所执行的交互来表征洞察力质量的可能性。为此，我们设计了可视化工具 MediSyn 的交互，以生成洞察力。 MediSyn 支持五种类型的交互：选择、连接、阐述、探索和共享。我们让 14 名参与者自由探索数据并产生见解，对 MediSyn 进行了评估。然后，我们从他们的交互日志中提取了七种交互模式，并将这些模式与洞察质量的四个方面相关联。结果表明通过交互获得合格见解的可能性。除其他发现外，探索行动可以带来意想不到的见解；向下钻取模式往往会增加见解的领域价值。定性分析表明，使用领域知识来指导探索可以对衍生见解的领域价值产生积极影响。我们讨论了该研究的意义、经验教训和未来的研究机会。 通过分析用户在可视化工具中的交互行为，研究如何表征洞察质量。 Chen He,Luana Micallef,Liye He,Gopal Peddinti,Tero Aittokallio,Giulio Jacucci cs.HC

title: Unsupervised Image-to-Image Translation via Pre-trained StyleGAN2 Network
title_zh: 通过预训练 StyleGAN2 网络进行无监督图像到图像转换

abstract: Image-to-Image (I2I) translation is a heated topic in academia, and it also has been applied in real-world industry for tasks like image synthesis, super-resolution, and colorization. However, traditional I2I translation methods train data in two or more domains together. This requires lots of computation resources. Moreover, the results are of lower quality, and they contain many more artifacts. The training process could be unstable when the data in different domains are not balanced, and modal collapse is more likely to happen. We proposed a new I2I translation method that generates a new model in the target domain via a series of model transformations on a pre-trained StyleGAN2 model in the source domain. After that, we proposed an inversion method to achieve the conversion between an image and its latent vector. By feeding the latent vector into the generated model, we can perform I2I translation between the source domain and target domain. Both qualitative and quantitative evaluations were conducted to prove that the proposed method can achieve outstanding performance in terms of image quality, diversity and semantic similarity to the input and reference images compared to state-of-the-art works.
summary: Image-to-Image (I2I) translation is a heated topic in academia, and it also has been applied in real-world industry for tasks like image synthesis, super-resolution, and colorization. However, traditional I2I translation methods train data in two or more domains together. This requires lots of computation resources. Moreover, the results are of lower quality, and they contain many more artifacts. The training process could be unstable when the data in different domains are not balanced, and modal collapse is more likely to happen. We proposed a new I2I translation method that generates a new model in the target domain via a series of model transformations on a pre-trained StyleGAN2 model in the source domain. After that, we proposed an inversion method to achieve the conversion between an image and its latent vector. By feeding the latent vector into the generated model, we can perform I2I translation between the source domain and target domain. Both qualitative and quantitative evaluations were conducted to prove that the proposed method can achieve outstanding performance in terms of image quality, diversity and semantic similarity to the input and reference images compared to state-of-the-art works.
abstract_zh: 图像到图像（I2I）翻译是学术界的热门话题，它也已应用于现实工业中的图像合成、超分辨率和着色等任务。然而，传统的 I2I 翻译方法一起训练两个或多个域中的数据。这需要大量的计算资源。此外，结果质量较低，并且包含更多伪影。当不同领域的数据不平衡时，训练过程可能会不稳定，更容易发生模态崩溃。我们提出了一种新的 I2I 翻译方法，通过对源域中预训练的 StyleGAN2 模型进行一系列模型转换，在目标域中生成新模型。之后，我们提出了一种反演方法来实现图像与其潜在向量之间的转换。通过将潜在向量输入到生成的模型中，我们可以在源域和目标域之间执行 I2I 转换。定性和定量评估都证明，与最先进的作品相比，所提出的方法在图像质量、多样性和输入图像和参考图像的语义相似性方面可以取得出色的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预训练StyleGAN2网络的无监督图像到图像翻译方法，通过模型转换和潜在向量反转实现跨域图像生成。
AI.motivation: 传统图像翻译方法需要多域数据联合训练，存在计算资源消耗大、生成质量低、易出现伪影和模式崩溃等问题。
AI.method: 在源域预训练StyleGAN2模型基础上进行系列模型转换生成目标域模型，并提出图像-潜在向量反转方法实现跨域翻译。
AI.result: 在图像质量、多样性及语义相似性指标上均优于现有最先进的方法，且无需域间数据平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过预训练模型转换有效解决了传统跨域图像翻译的计算与质量瓶颈问题。

title: Logical Judges Challenge Human Judges on the Strange Case of B.C.-Valjean
title_zh: 逻辑法官在BC-Valjean奇怪案件中挑战人类法官
abstract: On May 12th, 2020, during the course entitled Artificial Intelligence and Jurisdiction Practice organized by the Italian School of Magistracy, more than 70 magistrates followed our demonstration of a Prolog logical judge reasoning on an armed robbery case. Although the implemented logical judge is just an exercise of knowledge representation and simple deductive reasoning, a practical demonstration of an automated reasoning tool to such a large audience of potential end-users represents a first and unique attempt in Italy and, to the best of our knowledge, in the international panorama. In this paper we present the case addressed by the logical judge - a real case already addressed by a human judge in 2015 - and the feedback on the demonstration collected from the attendees.
summary: On May 12th, 2020, during the course entitled Artificial Intelligence and Jurisdiction Practice organized by the Italian School of Magistracy, more than 70 magistrates followed our demonstration of a Prolog logical judge reasoning on an armed robbery case. Although the implemented logical judge is just an exercise of knowledge representation and simple deductive reasoning, a practical demonstration of an automated reasoning tool to such a large audience of potential end-users represents a first and unique attempt in Italy and, to the best of our knowledge, in the international panorama. In this paper we present the case addressed by the logical judge - a real case already addressed by a human judge in 2015 - and the feedback on the demonstration collected from the attendees.
abstract_zh: 2020年5月12日，在意大利治安学院举办的《人工智能与司法实践》课程中，70多位治安法官观看了我们对持械抢劫案件的Prolog逻辑法官推理演示。尽管所实施的逻辑判断只是知识表示和简单演绎推理的练习，但向如此众多的潜在最终用户实际演示自动推理工具，代表着意大利乃至国际上的首次且独特的尝试。在本文中，我们介绍了逻辑法官处理的案例（人类法官已在 2015 年处理过的真实案例）以及从与会者那里收集的演示反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在意大利司法学校课程中，通过Prolog逻辑法官对2015年真实武装抢劫案进行推理演示的实践尝试，并收集了法官们的反馈。
AI.motivation: 探索逻辑法官在司法实践中的可行性，验证自动化推理工具在真实案例中的应用效果，推动人工智能与司法的结合。
AI.method: 基于Prolog构建逻辑法官模型，对已由人类法官判决的真实案例进行知识表示和演绎推理，并向70余名法官进行现场演示与反馈收集。
AI.result: 首次在意大利及国际范围内向大规模司法从业者展示逻辑法官系统，获得关于自动化推理工具在司法领域应用的初步反馈与评价。
AI.conclusion: 逻辑法官作为知识表示与简单推理的示范，虽未替代人类判断，但为AI在司法实践中的潜在应用提供了有价值的经验与研究方向。

authors_text: Lalith Bharadwaj B,Rohit Boddeda,Sai Vardhan K,Madhu G
title: COVID-19 Classification Using Staked Ensembles: A Comprehensive Analysis
title_zh: 使用权益集合进行 COVID-19 分类：综合分析
comment: This paper has serious technical concerns. The diagnostic model which was built is inaccurate and the results are flawed
comments: This paper has serious technical concerns. The diagnostic model which was built is inaccurate and the results are flawed
abstract: The issue of COVID-19, increasing with a massive mortality rate. This led to the WHO declaring it as a pandemic. In this situation, it is crucial to perform efficient and fast diagnosis. The reverse transcript polymerase chain reaction (RTPCR) test is conducted to detect the presence of SARS-CoV-2. This test is time-consuming and instead chest CT (or Chest X-ray) can be used for a fast and accurate diagnosis. Automated diagnosis is considered to be important as it reduces human effort and provides accurate and low-cost tests. The contributions of our research are three-fold. First, it is aimed to analyse the behaviour and performance of variant vision models ranging from Inception to NAS networks with the appropriate fine-tuning procedure. Second, the behaviour of these models is visually analysed by plotting CAMs for individual networks and determining classification performance with AUCROC curves. Thirdly, stacked ensembles techniques are imparted to provide higher generalisation on combining the fine-tuned models, in which six ensemble neural networks are designed by combining the existing fine-tuned networks. Implying these stacked ensembles provides a great generalization to the models. The ensemble model designed by combining all the fine-tuned networks obtained a state-of-the-art accuracy score of 99.17%. The precision and recall for the COVID-19 class are 99.99% and 89.79% respectively, which resembles the robustness of the stacked ensembles.
summary: The issue of COVID-19, increasing with a massive mortality rate. This led to the WHO declaring it as a pandemic. In this situation, it is crucial to perform efficient and fast diagnosis. The reverse transcript polymerase chain reaction (RTPCR) test is conducted to detect the presence of SARS-CoV-2. This test is time-consuming and instead chest CT (or Chest X-ray) can be used for a fast and accurate diagnosis. Automated diagnosis is considered to be important as it reduces human effort and provides accurate and low-cost tests. The contributions of our research are three-fold. First, it is aimed to analyse the behaviour and performance of variant vision models ranging from Inception to NAS networks with the appropriate fine-tuning procedure. Second, the behaviour of these models is visually analysed by plotting CAMs for individual networks and determining classification performance with AUCROC curves. Thirdly, stacked ensembles techniques are imparted to provide higher generalisation on combining the fine-tuned models, in which six ensemble neural networks are designed by combining the existing fine-tuned networks. Implying these stacked ensembles provides a great generalization to the models. The ensemble model designed by combining all the fine-tuned networks obtained a state-of-the-art accuracy score of 99.17%. The precision and recall for the COVID-19 class are 99.99% and 89.79% respectively, which resembles the robustness of the stacked ensembles.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 问题日益严重，死亡率极高。这导致世界卫生组织宣布其为大流行病。在这种情况下，进行高效、快速的诊断至关重要。进行逆转录聚合酶链反应 (RTPCR) 测试来检测 SARS-CoV-2 的存在。该测试非常耗时，而可以使用胸部 CT（或胸部 X 光检查）来进行快速、准确的诊断。自动化诊断被认为很重要，因为它减少了人力并提供准确且低成本的测试。我们的研究的贡献有三个方面。首先，其目的是通过适当的微调程序来分析从 Inception 到 NAS 网络的各种视觉模型的行为和性能。其次，通过绘制各个网络的 CAM 并使用 AUCROC 曲线确定分类性能，对这些模型的行为进行可视化分析。第三，赋予堆叠集成技术以在组合微调模型时提供更高的泛化性，其中通过组合现有的微调网络设计了六个集成神经网络。暗示这些堆叠的集合为模型提供了很好的概括。通过结合所有微调网络设计的集成模型获得了 99.17% 的最新准确率。 COVID-19 类别的精确度和召回率分别为 99.99% 和 89.79%，这类似于堆叠集成的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于堆叠集成的深度学习方法，用于通过胸部CT/X光图像实现高效的COVID-19分类诊断。
AI.motivation: 由于COVID-19的高致死率和RT-PCR检测的耗时性，亟需开发快速准确的自动化诊断技术以降低人工成本并提高检测效率。
AI.method: 分析Inception到NAS等视觉模型的性能，结合梯度加权类激活映射（CAM）和AUCROC曲线评估分类效果，并设计六种堆叠集成网络融合多模型预测结果。
AI.result: 集成模型在测试集上达到99.17%的准确率，COVID-19类别的精确率为99.99%，召回率为89.79%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 堆叠集成技术显著提升了模型泛化能力，为疫情下的快速诊断提供了可靠的技术方案。

search_text: COVID-19 Classification Using Staked Ensembles: A Comprehensive Analysis 使用权益集合进行 COVID-19 分类：综合分析 The issue of COVID-19, increasing with a massive mortality rate. This led to the WHO declaring it as a pandemic. In this situation, it is crucial to perform efficient and fast diagnosis. The reverse transcript polymerase chain reaction (RTPCR) test is conducted to detect the presence of SARS-CoV-2. This test is time-consuming and instead chest CT (or Chest X-ray) can be used for a fast and accurate diagnosis. Automated diagnosis is considered to be important as it reduces human effort and provides accurate and low-cost tests. The contributions of our research are three-fold. First, it is aimed to analyse the behaviour and performance of variant vision models ranging from Inception to NAS networks with the appropriate fine-tuning procedure. Second, the behaviour of these models is visually analysed by plotting CAMs for individual networks and determining classification performance with AUCROC curves. Thirdly, stacked ensembles techniques are imparted to provide higher generalisation on combining the fine-tuned models, in which six ensemble neural networks are designed by combining the existing fine-tuned networks. Implying these stacked ensembles provides a great generalization to the models. The ensemble model designed by combining all the fine-tuned networks obtained a state-of-the-art accuracy score of 99.17%. The precision and recall for the COVID-19 class are 99.99% and 89.79% respectively, which resembles the robustness of the stacked ensembles. authors_text: Kunping Yang,Gui-Song Xia,Zicheng Liu,Bo Du,Wen Yang,Marcello Pelillo,Liangpei Zhang
title: Semantic Change Detection with Asymmetric Siamese Networks
title_zh: 使用非对称连体网络进行语义变化检测
abstract: Given two multi-temporal aerial images, semantic change detection aims to locate the land-cover variations and identify their change types with pixel-wise boundaries. This problem is vital in many earth vision related tasks, such as precise urban planning and natural resource management. Existing state-of-the-art algorithms mainly identify the changed pixels by applying homogeneous operations on each input image and comparing the extracted features. However, in changed regions, totally different land-cover distributions often require heterogeneous features extraction procedures w.r.t each input. In this paper, we present an asymmetric siamese network (ASN) to locate and identify semantic changes through feature pairs obtained from modules of widely different structures, which involve areas of various sizes and apply different quantities of parameters to factor in the discrepancy across different land-cover distributions. To better train and evaluate our model, we create a large-scale well-annotated SEmantic Change detectiON Dataset (SECOND), while an Adaptive Threshold Learning (ATL) module and a Separated Kappa (SeK) coefficient are proposed to alleviate the influences of label imbalance in model training and evaluation. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model can stably outperform the state-of-the-art algorithms with different encoder backbones.
summary: Given two multi-temporal aerial images, semantic change detection aims to locate the land-cover variations and identify their change types with pixel-wise boundaries. This problem is vital in many earth vision related tasks, such as precise urban planning and natural resource management. Existing state-of-the-art algorithms mainly identify the changed pixels by applying homogeneous operations on each input image and comparing the extracted features. However, in changed regions, totally different land-cover distributions often require heterogeneous features extraction procedures w.r.t each input. In this paper, we present an asymmetric siamese network (ASN) to locate and identify semantic changes through feature pairs obtained from modules of widely different structures, which involve areas of various sizes and apply different quantities of parameters to factor in the discrepancy across different land-cover distributions. To better train and evaluate our model, we create a large-scale well-annotated SEmantic Change detectiON Dataset (SECOND), while an Adaptive Threshold Learning (ATL) module and a Separated Kappa (SeK) coefficient are proposed to alleviate the influences of label imbalance in model training and evaluation. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model can stably outperform the state-of-the-art algorithms with different encoder backbones.
abstract_zh: 给定两个多时相航空图像，语义变化检测旨在定位土地覆盖变化并通过像素边界识别其变化类型。这个问题对于许多地球视觉相关任务至关重要，例如精确的城市规划和自然资源管理。现有最先进的算法主要通过对每个输入图像应用齐次操作并比较提取的特征来识别变化的像素。然而，在变化的地区，完全不同的土地覆盖分布通常需要针对每个输入的异构特征提取程序。在本文中，我们提出了一种非对称暹罗网络（ASN），通过从结构广泛不同的模块获得的特征对来定位和识别语义变化，这些特征对涉及不同大小的区域，并应用不同数量的参数来考虑不同土地覆盖分布的差异。为了更好地训练和评估我们的模型，我们创建了一个大规模的注释良好的语义变化检测数据集（SECOND），同时提出了自适应阈值学习（ATL）模块和分离的卡帕（SeK）系数来减轻模型训练和评估中标签不平衡的影响。实验结果表明，所提出的模型可以稳定地优于具有不同编码器主干的最先进算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非对称孪生网络（ASN）用于多时相航拍图像的语义变化检测，以识别土地覆盖变化类型。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理不同土地覆盖分布时存在不足，需通过异质化特征提取方法应对变化区域的差异性。
AI.method: 设计非对称孪生网络（ASN）采用结构差异大的模块提取特征，并构建SECOND数据集，结合自适应阈值学习模块（ATL）与分离Kappa系数（SeK）缓解标签不平衡问题。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在多种编码器主干上稳定优于现有先进算法，且在数据集上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 非对称网络结构与新型评估指标有效提升了语义变化检测性能，为相关研究提供了新方向。

title: TurboTransformers: An Efficient GPU Serving System For Transformer Models
title_zh: TurboTransformers：用于 Transformer 模型的高效 GPU 服务系统
abstract: The transformer is the most critical algorithm innovation of the Nature Language Processing (NLP) field in recent years. Unlike the Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) models, Transformers can process on dimensions of sequence lengths in parallel, therefore leading to better accuracy on long sequences. However, efficient deployments of them for online services in data centers equipped with GPUs are not easy. First, more computation introduced by transformer structures makes it more challenging to meet the latency and throughput constraints of serving. Second, NLP tasks take in sentences of variable length. The variability of input dimensions brings a severe problem to efficient memory management and serving optimization. This paper designed a transformer serving system called TurboTransformers, which consists of a computing runtime and a serving framework to solve the above challenges. Three innovative features make it stand out from other similar works. An efficient parallel algorithm is proposed for GPU-based batch reduction operations, like Softmax and LayerNorm, major hot spots besides BLAS routines. A memory allocation algorithm, which better balances the memory footprint and allocation/free efficiency, is designed for variable-length input situations. A serving framework equipped with a new batch scheduler using dynamic programming achieves the optimal throughput on variable-length requests. The system can achieve the state-of-the-art transformer model serving performance on GPU platforms and can be seamlessly integrated into your PyTorch code with a few lines of code.
summary: The transformer is the most critical algorithm innovation of the Nature Language Processing (NLP) field in recent years. Unlike the Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) models, Transformers can process on dimensions of sequence lengths in parallel, therefore leading to better accuracy on long sequences. However, efficient deployments of them for online services in data centers equipped with GPUs are not easy. First, more computation introduced by transformer structures makes it more challenging to meet the latency and throughput constraints of serving. Second, NLP tasks take in sentences of variable length. The variability of input dimensions brings a severe problem to efficient memory management and serving optimization. This paper designed a transformer serving system called TurboTransformers, which consists of a computing runtime and a serving framework to solve the above challenges. Three innovative features make it stand out from other similar works. An efficient parallel algorithm is proposed for GPU-based batch reduction operations, like Softmax and LayerNorm, major hot spots besides BLAS routines. A memory allocation algorithm, which better balances the memory footprint and allocation/free efficiency, is designed for variable-length input situations. A serving framework equipped with a new batch scheduler using dynamic programming achieves the optimal throughput on variable-length requests. The system can achieve the state-of-the-art transformer model serving performance on GPU platforms and can be seamlessly integrated into your PyTorch code with a few lines of code.
abstract_zh: Transformer是近年来自然语言处理（NLP）领域最关键的算法创新。与循环神经网络 (RNN) 模型不同，Transformers 可以并行处理序列长度的维度，因此可以在长序列上获得更好的准确性。然而，在配备 GPU 的数据中心高效部署它们以提供在线服务并不容易。首先，变压器结构引入的更多计算使得满足服务的延迟和吞吐量限制变得更具挑战性。其次，NLP 任务采用可变长度的句子。输入维度的可变性给高效的内存管理和服务优化带来了严重的问题。本文设计了一个名为 TurboTransformers 的变压器服务系统，它由计算运行时和服务框架组成，以解决上述挑战。三大创新特点使其从其他同类作品中脱颖而出。针对基于 GPU 的批量缩减操作，提出了一种高效的并行算法，例如 Softmax 和 LayerNorm，这是除 BLAS 例程之外的主要热点。内存分配算法专为可变长度输入情况而设计，可以更好地平衡内存占用和分配/释放效率。配备有使用动态编程的新批处理调度程序的服务框架可实现可变长度请求的最佳吞吐量。该系统可以实现最先进的 Transformer 模型，在 GPU 平台上提供性能服务，并且可以通过几行代码无缝集成到您的 PyTorch 代码中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TurboTransformers系统，旨在解决在GPU平台上高效部署Transformer模型的服务问题。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型因计算量大和输入长度可变，导致在GPU上部署时面临延迟、吞吐量和内存管理的挑战。
AI.method: 设计了并行化批量操作算法、动态内存分配策略及基于动态规划的请求调度框架，优化计算与内存效率。
AI.result: TurboTransformers在GPU上实现领先的Transformer模型服务性能，并可无缝集成至PyTorch代码中。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过创新算法和框架有效解决了Transformer模型在GPU上的服务瓶颈，适用于实际场景部署。

search_text: TurboTransformers: An Efficient GPU Serving System For Transformer Models TurboTransformers：用于 Transformer 模型的高效 GPU 服务系统 The transformer is the most critical algorithm innovation of the Nature Language Processing (NLP) field in recent years. Unlike the Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) models, Transformers can process on dimensions of sequence lengths in parallel, therefore leading to better accuracy on long sequences. However, efficient deployments of them for online services in data centers equipped with GPUs are not easy. First, more computation introduced by transformer structures makes it more challenging to meet the latency and throughput constraints of serving. Second, NLP tasks take in sentences of variable length. The variability of input dimensions brings a severe problem to efficient memory management and serving optimization. This paper designed a transformer serving system called TurboTransformers, which consists of a computing runtime and a serving framework to solve the above challenges. Three innovative features make it stand out from other similar works. An efficient parallel algorithm is proposed for GPU-based batch reduction operations, like Softmax and LayerNorm, major hot spots besides BLAS routines. A memory allocation algorithm, which better balances the memory footprint and allocation/free efficiency, is designed for variable-length input situations. A serving framework equipped with a new batch scheduler using dynamic programming achieves the optimal throughput on variable-length requests. The system can achieve the state-of-the-art transformer model serving performance on GPU platforms and can be seamlessly integrated into your PyTorch code with a few lines of code. Transformer是近年来自然语言处理（NLP）领域最关键的算法创新。与循环神经网络 (RNN) 模型不同，Transformers 可以并行处理序列长度的维度，因此可以在长序列上获得更好的准确性。然而，在配备 GPU 的数据中心高效部署它们以提供在线服务并不容易。首先，变压器结构引入的更多计算使得满足服务的延迟和吞吐量限制变得更具挑战性。其次，NLP 任务采用可变长度的句子。输入维度的可变性给高效的内存管理和服务优化带来了严重的问题。本文设计了一个名为 TurboTransformers 的变压器服务系统，它由计算运行时和服务框架组成，以解决上述挑战。三大创新特点使其从其他同类作品中脱颖而出。针对基于 GPU 的批量缩减操作，提出了一种高效的并行算法，例如 Softmax 和 LayerNorm，这是除 BLAS 例程之外的主要热点。内存分配算法专为可变长度输入情况而设计，可以更好地平衡内存占用和分配/释放效率。配备有使用动态编程的新批处理调度程序的服务框架可实现可变长度请求的最佳吞吐量。该系统可以实现最先进的 Transformer 模型，在 GPU 平台上提供性能服务，并且可以通过几行代码无缝集成到您的 PyTorch 代码中。 本文提出TurboTransformers系统，旨在解决在GPU平台上高效部署Transformer模型的服务问题。 Jiarui Fang,Yang Yu,Chengduo Zhao,Jie Zhou cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuyuan Yu,Guoxu Zhou,Ning Zheng,Shengli Xie,Qibin Zhao
title: Graph Regularized Nonnegative Tensor Ring Decomposition for Multiway Representation Learning
title_zh: 用于多路表示学习的图正则化非负张量环分解
abstract: Tensor ring (TR) decomposition is a powerful tool for exploiting the low-rank nature of multiway data and has demonstrated great potential in a variety of important applications. In this paper, nonnegative tensor ring (NTR) decomposition and graph regularized NTR (GNTR) decomposition are proposed, where the former equips TR decomposition with local feature extraction by imposing nonnegativity on the core tensors and the latter is additionally able to capture manifold geometry information of tensor data, both significantly extend the applications of TR decomposition for nonnegative multiway representation learning. Accelerated proximal gradient based methods are derived for NTR and GNTR. The experimental result demonstrate that the proposed algorithms can extract parts-based basis with rich colors and rich lines from tensor objects that provide more interpretable and meaningful representation, and hence yield better performance than the state-of-the-art tensor based methods in clustering and classification tasks.
summary: Tensor ring (TR) decomposition is a powerful tool for exploiting the low-rank nature of multiway data and has demonstrated great potential in a variety of important applications. In this paper, nonnegative tensor ring (NTR) decomposition and graph regularized NTR (GNTR) decomposition are proposed, where the former equips TR decomposition with local feature extraction by imposing nonnegativity on the core tensors and the latter is additionally able to capture manifold geometry information of tensor data, both significantly extend the applications of TR decomposition for nonnegative multiway representation learning. Accelerated proximal gradient based methods are derived for NTR and GNTR. The experimental result demonstrate that the proposed algorithms can extract parts-based basis with rich colors and rich lines from tensor objects that provide more interpretable and meaningful representation, and hence yield better performance than the state-of-the-art tensor based methods in clustering and classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 张量环（TR）分解是利用多路数据的低秩性质的强大工具，并在各种重要应用中展示了巨大的潜力。本文提出了非负张量环（NTR）分解和图正则化NTR（GNTR）分解，前者通过在核心张量上施加非负性来为TR分解配备局部特征提取，后者还能够捕获张量数据的流形几何信息，两者都显着扩展了TR分解在非负多路表示学习中的应用。针对 NTR 和 GNTR 推导了基于加速近端梯度的方法。实验结果表明，所提出的算法可以从张量对象中提取具有丰富颜色和丰富线条的基于部分的基础，提供更可解释和更有意义的表示，因此在聚类和分类任务中比最先进的基于张量的方法产生更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出非负张量环（NTR）和图正则化NTR（GNTR）分解方法，用于多维数据的非负表示学习，通过结合非负性约束与图正则化提升特征可解释性与任务性能。
AI.motivation: 传统张量环分解难以有效处理非负数据的局部特征与流形几何结构，限制了其在多维表示学习中的应用。
AI.method: 设计非负约束的NTR分解以提取局部特征，并引入图正则化构建GNTR以捕捉数据流形结构，采用加速近端梯度法求解优化问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法能提取富含颜色与线条的可解释基，显著优于现有张量方法，在聚类与分类任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: GNTR通过融合非负性与图正则化，有效提升了多维数据的表示能力，为非负多路分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Francesco Ragusa,Antonino Furnari,Salvatore Livatino,Giovanni Maria Farinella
title: The MECCANO Dataset: Understanding Human-Object Interactions from Egocentric Videos in an Industrial-like Domain
title_zh: MECCANO 数据集：从类似工业领域的自我中心视频中理解人与物体的交互
abstract: Wearable cameras allow to collect images and videos of humans interacting with the world. While human-object interactions have been thoroughly investigated in third person vision, the problem has been understudied in egocentric settings and in industrial scenarios. To fill this gap, we introduce MECCANO, the first dataset of egocentric videos to study human-object interactions in industrial-like settings. MECCANO has been acquired by 20 participants who were asked to build a motorbike model, for which they had to interact with tiny objects and tools. The dataset has been explicitly labeled for the task of recognizing human-object interactions from an egocentric perspective. Specifically, each interaction has been labeled both temporally (with action segments) and spatially (with active object bounding boxes). With the proposed dataset, we investigate four different tasks including 1) action recognition, 2) active object detection, 3) active object recognition and 4) egocentric human-object interaction detection, which is a revisited version of the standard human-object interaction detection task. Baseline results show that the MECCANO dataset is a challenging benchmark to study egocentric human-object interactions in industrial-like scenarios. We publicy release the dataset at https://iplab.dmi.unict.it/MECCANO.
summary: Wearable cameras allow to collect images and videos of humans interacting with the world. While human-object interactions have been thoroughly investigated in third person vision, the problem has been understudied in egocentric settings and in industrial scenarios. To fill this gap, we introduce MECCANO, the first dataset of egocentric videos to study human-object interactions in industrial-like settings. MECCANO has been acquired by 20 participants who were asked to build a motorbike model, for which they had to interact with tiny objects and tools. The dataset has been explicitly labeled for the task of recognizing human-object interactions from an egocentric perspective. Specifically, each interaction has been labeled both temporally (with action segments) and spatially (with active object bounding boxes). With the proposed dataset, we investigate four different tasks including 1) action recognition, 2) active object detection, 3) active object recognition and 4) egocentric human-object interaction detection, which is a revisited version of the standard human-object interaction detection task. Baseline results show that the MECCANO dataset is a challenging benchmark to study egocentric human-object interactions in industrial-like scenarios. We publicy release the dataset at https://iplab.dmi.unict.it/MECCANO.
abstract_zh: 可穿戴相机可以收集人类与世界互动的图像和视频。虽然人与物体的交互已经在第三人称视觉中得到了彻底的研究，但在以自我为中心的环境和工业场景中，这个问题还没有得到充分研究。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了 MECCANO，这是第一个以自我为中心的视频数据集，用于研究类似工业环境中的人与物体的交互。 MECCANO 已被 20 名参与者收购，他们被要求构建一个摩托车模型，为此他们必须与微小的物体和工具进行交互。该数据集已被明确标记为从自我中心的角度识别人与物体交互的任务。具体来说，每个交互都在时间上（使用动作段）和空间上（使用活动对象边界框）进行标记。利用所提出的数据集，我们研究了四种不同的任务，包括1）动作识别，2）活动对象检测，3）活动对象识别和4）以自我为中心的人与物体交互检测，这是标准人与物体交互检测任务的重新审视版本。基线结果表明，MECCANO 数据集是研究工业场景中以自我为中心的人与物体交互的具有挑战性的基准。我们在 https://iplab.dmi.unict.it/MECCANO 公开发布数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍MECCANO数据集，用于研究工业场景中第一人称视角下的人与物体交互。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在第三人称视角和工业场景下的人与物体交互研究不足，需填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过20名参与者组装摩托车模型采集数据，标注时间动作分段和空间物体边界框，并提出四个任务进行验证。
AI.result: 基线实验表明MECCANO数据集在工业场景下具有挑战性，可作为研究基准。
AI.conclusion: MECCANO数据集为工业场景中的第一人称人-物交互研究提供了有效资源。

title: Interval Query Problem on Cube-free Median Graphs
title_zh: 无立方中值图上的区间查询问题
abstract: In this paper, we introduce the \emph{interval query problem} on cube-free median graphs. Let $G$ be a cube-free median graph and $\mathcal{S}$ be a commutative semigroup. For each vertex $v$ in $G$, we are given an element $p(v)$ in $\mathcal{S}$. For each query, we are given two vertices $u,v$ in $G$ and asked to calculate the sum of $p(z)$ over all vertices $z$ belonging to a $u-v$ shortest path. This is a common generalization of range query problems on trees and grids. In this paper, we provide an algorithm to answer each interval query in $O(\log^2 n)$ time. The required data structure is constructed in $O(n\log^3 n)$ time and $O(n\log^2 n)$ space. To obtain our algorithm, we introduce a new technique, named the \emph{stairs decomposition}, to decompose an interval of cube-free median graphs into simpler substructures.
summary: In this paper, we introduce the \emph{interval query problem} on cube-free median graphs. Let $G$ be a cube-free median graph and $\mathcal{S}$ be a commutative semigroup. For each vertex $v$ in $G$, we are given an element $p(v)$ in $\mathcal{S}$. For each query, we are given two vertices $u,v$ in $G$ and asked to calculate the sum of $p(z)$ over all vertices $z$ belonging to a $u-v$ shortest path. This is a common generalization of range query problems on trees and grids. In this paper, we provide an algorithm to answer each interval query in $O(\log^2 n)$ time. The required data structure is constructed in $O(n\log^3 n)$ time and $O(n\log^2 n)$ space. To obtain our algorithm, we introduce a new technique, named the \emph{stairs decomposition}, to decompose an interval of cube-free median graphs into simpler substructures.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了无立方中值图上的\emph{区间查询问题}。设$G$为无立方中值图，$\mathcal{S}$为交换半群。对于$G$中的每个顶点$v$，我们在$\mathcal{S}$中得到一个元素$p(v)$。对于每个查询，我们在 $G$ 中给出两个顶点 $u,v$ 并要求计算属于 $u-v$ 最短路径的所有顶点 $z$ 的 $p(z)$ 之和。这是树和网格上范围查询问题的常见概括。在本文中，我们提供了一种算法，可以在 $O(\log^2 n)$ 时间内回答每个区间查询。所需的数据结构在 $O(n\log^3 n)$ 时间和 $O(n\log^2 n)$ 空间内构建。为了获得我们的算法，我们引入了一种名为\emph{阶梯分解}的新技术，将无立方体中值图的区间分解为更简单的子结构。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无立方体中位图上解决区间查询问题，提出了一种高效算法以快速计算最短路径上顶点权重的总和。
AI.motivation: 区间查询问题在树和网格结构中已有研究，但针对更一般的无立方体中位图的高效解决方案尚未明确，需扩展现有方法以满足复杂图结构需求。
AI.method: 引入一种名为'stairs分解'的新技术，将无立方体中位图的区间分解为更简单的子结构，并构建支持快速查询的数据结构。
AI.result: 设计的算法可在O(log²n)时间内处理单次查询，数据结构构建时间为O(n log³n)，空间复杂度为O(n log²n)。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无立方体中位图的区间查询提供了高效解决方案，推广了树和网格上的范围查询技术，为相关图算法研究提供了新思路。
