authors_text: Ziheng Duan,Haoyan Xu,Yueyang Wang,Yida Huang,Anni Ren,Zhongbin Xu,Yizhou Sun,Wei Wang
title: Multivariate Time Series Classification with Hierarchical Variational Graph Pooling
title_zh: 具有分层变分图池化的多元时间序列分类
abstract: With the advancement of sensing technology, multivariate time series classification (MTSC) has recently received considerable attention. Existing deep learning-based MTSC techniques, which mostly rely on convolutional or recurrent neural networks, are primarily concerned with the temporal dependency of single time series. As a result, they struggle to express pairwise dependencies among multivariate variables directly. Furthermore, current spatial-temporal modeling (e.g., graph classification) methodologies based on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are inherently flat and cannot aggregate hub data in a hierarchical manner. To address these limitations, we propose a novel graph pooling-based framework MTPool to obtain the expressive global representation of MTS. We first convert MTS slices to graphs by utilizing interactions of variables via graph structure learning module and attain the spatial-temporal graph node features via temporal convolutional module. To get global graph-level representation, we design an "encoder-decoder" based variational graph pooling module for creating adaptive centroids for cluster assignments. Then we combine GNNs and our proposed variational graph pooling layers for joint graph representation learning and graph coarsening, after which the graph is progressively coarsened to one node. At last, a differentiable classifier takes this coarsened representation to get the final predicted class. Experiments on ten benchmark datasets exhibit MTPool outperforms state-of-the-art strategies in the MTSC task.
summary: With the advancement of sensing technology, multivariate time series classification (MTSC) has recently received considerable attention. Existing deep learning-based MTSC techniques, which mostly rely on convolutional or recurrent neural networks, are primarily concerned with the temporal dependency of single time series. As a result, they struggle to express pairwise dependencies among multivariate variables directly. Furthermore, current spatial-temporal modeling (e.g., graph classification) methodologies based on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are inherently flat and cannot aggregate hub data in a hierarchical manner. To address these limitations, we propose a novel graph pooling-based framework MTPool to obtain the expressive global representation of MTS. We first convert MTS slices to graphs by utilizing interactions of variables via graph structure learning module and attain the spatial-temporal graph node features via temporal convolutional module. To get global graph-level representation, we design an "encoder-decoder" based variational graph pooling module for creating adaptive centroids for cluster assignments. Then we combine GNNs and our proposed variational graph pooling layers for joint graph representation learning and graph coarsening, after which the graph is progressively coarsened to one node. At last, a differentiable classifier takes this coarsened representation to get the final predicted class. Experiments on ten benchmark datasets exhibit MTPool outperforms state-of-the-art strategies in the MTSC task.
abstract_zh: 随着传感技术的进步，多元时间序列分类（MTSC）最近受到了广泛的关注。现有的基于深度学习的 MTSC 技术主要依赖于卷积或循环神经网络，主要关注单个时间序列的时间依赖性。因此，他们很难直接表达多变量变量之间的成对依赖关系。此外，当前基于图神经网络（GNN）的时空建模（例如图分类）方法本质上是扁平的，无法以分层方式聚合中心数据。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的基于图池化的框架 MTPool 来获得 MTS 的表达性全局表示。我们首先通过图结构学习模块利用变量的相互作用将 MTS 切片转换为图，并通过时间卷积模块获得时空图节点特征。为了获得全局图级表示，我们设计了一个基于“编码器-解码器”的变分图池模块，用于为聚类分配创建自适应质心。然后，我们将 GNN 和我们提出的变分图池化层结合起来，进行联合图表示学习和图粗化，之后图逐渐粗化到一个节点。最后，可微分类器采用这种粗化表示来获得最终的预测类。对 10 个基准数据集的实验表明，MTPool 在 MTSC 任务中优于最先进的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层变分图池化的多变量时间序列分类框架MTPool，以解决现有方法在建模变量间依赖关系和层次聚合方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法主要关注单变量时间序列的时序依赖，难以直接表达多变量间的相互作用；基于图神经网络的空间-时序建模方法缺乏层次化聚合能力，限制了全局表示的学习。
AI.method: 通过图结构学习模块将时间序列切片转化为图，利用时序卷积获取节点特征；设计基于编码器-解码器的变分图池化模块生成自适应聚类中心，结合GNN与图池化层进行联合表示学习，逐步粗化图结构至单节点后输入分类器。
AI.result: 在十个基准数据集上的实验表明，MTPool在多变量时间序列分类任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过图结构建模与层次化池化有效捕捉了多变量时间序列的时空依赖关系，提升了分类性能。

title: HiFi-GAN: Generative Adversarial Networks for Efficient and High Fidelity Speech Synthesis
title_zh: HiFi-GAN：用于高效、高保真语音合成的生成对抗网络
abstract: Several recent work on speech synthesis have employed generative adversarial networks (GANs) to produce raw waveforms. Although such methods improve the sampling efficiency and memory usage, their sample quality has not yet reached that of autoregressive and flow-based generative models. In this work, we propose HiFi-GAN, which achieves both efficient and high-fidelity speech synthesis. As speech audio consists of sinusoidal signals with various periods, we demonstrate that modeling periodic patterns of an audio is crucial for enhancing sample quality. A subjective human evaluation (mean opinion score, MOS) of a single speaker dataset indicates that our proposed method demonstrates similarity to human quality while generating 22.05 kHz high-fidelity audio 167.9 times faster than real-time on a single V100 GPU. We further show the generality of HiFi-GAN to the mel-spectrogram inversion of unseen speakers and end-to-end speech synthesis. Finally, a small footprint version of HiFi-GAN generates samples 13.4 times faster than real-time on CPU with comparable quality to an autoregressive counterpart.
summary: Several recent work on speech synthesis have employed generative adversarial networks (GANs) to produce raw waveforms. Although such methods improve the sampling efficiency and memory usage, their sample quality has not yet reached that of autoregressive and flow-based generative models. In this work, we propose HiFi-GAN, which achieves both efficient and high-fidelity speech synthesis. As speech audio consists of sinusoidal signals with various periods, we demonstrate that modeling periodic patterns of an audio is crucial for enhancing sample quality. A subjective human evaluation (mean opinion score, MOS) of a single speaker dataset indicates that our proposed method demonstrates similarity to human quality while generating 22.05 kHz high-fidelity audio 167.9 times faster than real-time on a single V100 GPU. We further show the generality of HiFi-GAN to the mel-spectrogram inversion of unseen speakers and end-to-end speech synthesis. Finally, a small footprint version of HiFi-GAN generates samples 13.4 times faster than real-time on CPU with comparable quality to an autoregressive counterpart.
abstract_zh: 最近关于语音合成的几项工作都采用了生成对抗网络（GAN）来生成原始波形。尽管此类方法提高了采样效率和内存使用率，但其样本质量尚未达到自回归和基于流的生成模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了 HiFi-GAN，它实现了高效和高保真的语音合成。由于语音音频由不同周期的正弦信号组成，我们证明对音频的周期性模式进行建模对于提高样本质量至关重要。对单个说话者数据集的主观人类评估（平均意见得分，MOS）表明，我们提出的方法表现出与人类质量的相似性，同时在单个 V100 GPU 上生成 22.05 kHz 高保真音频，速度比实时快 167.9 倍。我们进一步展示了 HiFi-GAN 对未见过的说话人的梅尔谱图反演和端到端语音合成的通用性。最后，HiFi-GAN 的小占用版本在 CPU 上生成样本的速度比实时速度快 13.4 倍，质量与自回归版本相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiFi-GAN生成对抗网络，实现高效且高保真语音合成。
AI.motivation: 尽管GAN在语音合成中提升了采样效率和内存使用，但其样本质量仍不及自回归和流模型，需兼顾效率与保真度。
AI.method: 通过建模音频的周期性模式，设计HiFi-GAN网络，并在单说话人数据集上进行主观评估，验证其在未知说话人和端到端合成中的泛化能力。
AI.result: HiFi-GAN在单块V100 GPU上以167.9倍实时速度生成22.05kHz高保真音频，MOS评分接近人类质量；轻量版在CPU上以13.4倍实时速度生成，质量与自回归模型相当。
AI.conclusion: HiFi-GAN有效平衡了语音合成的效率与保真度，适用于多种合成任务，并具备轻量化部署潜力。

search_text: HiFi-GAN: Generative Adversarial Networks for Efficient and High Fidelity Speech Synthesis HiFi-GAN：用于高效、高保真语音合成的生成对抗网络 Several recent work on speech synthesis have employed generative adversarial networks (GANs) to produce raw waveforms. Although such methods improve the sampling efficiency and memory usage, their sample quality has not yet reached that of autoregressive and flow-based generative models. In this work, we propose HiFi-GAN, which achieves both efficient and high-fidelity speech synthesis. As speech audio consists of sinusoidal signals with various periods, we demonstrate that modeling periodic patterns of an audio is crucial for enhancing sample quality. A subjective human evaluation (mean opinion score, MOS) of a single speaker dataset indicates that our proposed method demonstrates similarity to human quality while generating 22.05 kHz high-fidelity audio 167.9 times faster than real-time on a single V100 GPU. We further show the generality of HiFi-GAN to the mel-spectrogram inversion of unseen speakers and end-to-end speech synthesis. Finally, a small footprint version of HiFi-GAN generates samples 13.4 times faster than real-time on CPU with comparable quality to an autoregressive counterpart. 最近关于语音合成的几项工作都采用了生成对抗网络（GAN）来生成原始波形。尽管此类方法提高了采样效率和内存使用率，但其样本质量尚未达到自回归和基于流的生成模型。在这项工作中，我们提出了 HiFi-GAN，它实现了高效和高保真的语音合成。由于语音音频由不同周期的正弦信号组成，我们证明对音频的周期性模式进行建模对于提高样本质量至关重要。对单个说话者数据集的主观人类评估（平均意见得分，MOS）表明，我们提出的方法表现出与人类质量的相似性，同时在单个 V100 GPU 上生成 22.05 kHz 高保真音频，速度比实时快 167.9 倍。我们进一步展示了 HiFi-GAN 对未见过的说话人的梅尔谱图反演和端到端语音合成的通用性。最后，HiFi-GAN 的小占用版本在 CPU 上生成样本的速度比实时速度快 13.4 倍，质量与自回归版本相当。 本文提出HiFi-GAN生成对抗网络，实现高效且高保真语音合成。 Jungil Kong,Jaehyeon Kim,Jaekyoung Bae cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Incomplete Directed Perfect Phylogeny in Linear Time
title_zh: 线性时间内不完全定向完美系统发育
abstract: Reconstructing the evolutionary history of a set of species is a central task in computational biology. In real data, it is often the case that some information is missing: the Incomplete Directed Perfect Phylogeny (IDPP) problem asks, given a collection of species described by a set of binary characters with some unknown states, to complete the missing states in such a way that the result can be explained with a perfect directed phylogeny. Pe'er et al. proposed a solution that takes $\tilde{O}(nm)$ time for $n$ species and $m$ characters. Their algorithm relies on pre-existing dynamic connectivity data structures: a computational study recently conducted by Fern{á}ndez-Baca and Liu showed that, in this context, complex data structures perform worse than simpler ones with worse asymptotic bounds. This gives us the motivation to look into the particular properties of the dynamic connectivity problem in this setting, so as to avoid the use of sophisticated data structures as a blackbox. Not only are we successful in doing so, and give a much simpler $\tilde{O}(nm)$-time algorithm for the IDPP problem; our insights into the specific structure of the problem lead to an asymptotically faster algorithm, that runs in optimal $O(nm)$ time.
summary: Reconstructing the evolutionary history of a set of species is a central task in computational biology. In real data, it is often the case that some information is missing: the Incomplete Directed Perfect Phylogeny (IDPP) problem asks, given a collection of species described by a set of binary characters with some unknown states, to complete the missing states in such a way that the result can be explained with a perfect directed phylogeny. Pe'er et al. proposed a solution that takes $\tilde{O}(nm)$ time for $n$ species and $m$ characters. Their algorithm relies on pre-existing dynamic connectivity data structures: a computational study recently conducted by Fern{á}ndez-Baca and Liu showed that, in this context, complex data structures perform worse than simpler ones with worse asymptotic bounds. This gives us the motivation to look into the particular properties of the dynamic connectivity problem in this setting, so as to avoid the use of sophisticated data structures as a blackbox. Not only are we successful in doing so, and give a much simpler $\tilde{O}(nm)$-time algorithm for the IDPP problem; our insights into the specific structure of the problem lead to an asymptotically faster algorithm, that runs in optimal $O(nm)$ time.
abstract_zh: 重建一组物种的进化历史是计算生物学的核心任务。在实际数据中，经常会出现某些信息缺失的情况：不完整有向完美系统发育（IDPP）问题要求，给定由具有某些未知状态的一组二进制字符描述的物种集合，以这样的方式完成缺失的状态，使得结果可以用完美有向系统发育来解释。佩尔等人。提出了一个解决方案，对于 $n$ 个物种和 $m$ 个字符需要 $\tilde{O}(nm)$ 时间。他们的算法依赖于预先存在的动态连接数据结构：Fern{á}ndez-Baca 和 Liu 最近进行的一项计算研究表明，在这种情况下，复杂的数据结构比渐近界限更差的简单数据结构表现更差。这使我们有动力研究这种情况下动态连接问题的特定属性，以避免使用复杂的数据结构作为黑匣子。我们不仅成功地做到了这一点，而且为 IDPP 问题给出了一个更简单的 $\tilde{O}(nm)$ 时间算法；我们对问题具体结构的洞察导致了一种渐近更快的算法，该算法在最佳 $O(nm)$ 时间内运行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线性时间内解决不完全定向完美系统发育（IDPP）问题的新算法。
AI.motivation: 现有IDPP算法依赖复杂的动态连通性数据结构，但实际测试显示简单结构可能更优，因此需探索问题特定性质以避免复杂结构。
AI.method: 通过分析动态连通性问题在IDPP场景下的特殊性质，设计更简洁的算法，避免使用复杂数据结构。
AI.result: 提出了一种时间复杂度为O(nm)的最优算法，较之前O~(nm)的算法更高效。
AI.conclusion: 利用问题内在结构可设计更高效算法，无需依赖复杂数据结构，为IDPP问题提供更优解决方案。

title: Inferring Causal Direction from Observational Data: A Complexity Approach
title_zh: 从观察数据推断因果方向：一种复杂性方法
comment: 9 Pages, 2 figures, Presented in Machine Learning for Pharma and Healthcare Applications ECML PKDD 2020 Workshop (PharML 2020)
comments: 9 Pages, 2 figures, Presented in Machine Learning for Pharma and Healthcare Applications ECML PKDD 2020 Workshop (PharML 2020)
abstract: At the heart of causal structure learning from observational data lies a deceivingly simple question: given two statistically dependent random variables, which one has a causal effect on the other? This is impossible to answer using statistical dependence testing alone and requires that we make additional assumptions. We propose several fast and simple criteria for distinguishing cause and effect in pairs of discrete or continuous random variables. The intuition behind them is that predicting the effect variable using the cause variable should be `simpler' than the reverse -- different notions of `simplicity' giving rise to different criteria. We demonstrate the accuracy of the criteria on synthetic data generated under a broad family of causal mechanisms and types of noise.
summary: At the heart of causal structure learning from observational data lies a deceivingly simple question: given two statistically dependent random variables, which one has a causal effect on the other? This is impossible to answer using statistical dependence testing alone and requires that we make additional assumptions. We propose several fast and simple criteria for distinguishing cause and effect in pairs of discrete or continuous random variables. The intuition behind them is that predicting the effect variable using the cause variable should be `simpler' than the reverse -- different notions of `simplicity' giving rise to different criteria. We demonstrate the accuracy of the criteria on synthetic data generated under a broad family of causal mechanisms and types of noise.
abstract_zh: 从观察数据中学习因果结构的核心在于一个看似简单的问题：给定两个统计上相关的随机变量，哪一个对另一个有因果影响？仅使用统计依赖性检验无法回答这个问题，需要我们做出额外的假设。我们提出了几个快速而简单的标准来区分离散或连续随机变量对中的因果关系。它们背后的直觉是，使用原因变量预测结果变量应该比相反“更简单”——不同的“简单性”概念会产生不同的标准。我们证明了在广泛的因果机制和噪声类型下生成的合成数据标准的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从观测数据中推断因果方向，通过引入复杂度概念来区分因果关系中的因与果。
AI.motivation: 传统统计方法无法确定因果方向，需额外假设，因此需要新的标准来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出基于复杂度的准则，利用预测复杂度差异区分因果方向。
AI.result: 在多种合成数据上验证了准则的有效性，证明其准确性。
AI.conclusion: 复杂度准则有效，为因果方向推断提供新方法。

authors_text: Vishal Kaushal,Suraj Kothawade,Ganesh Ramakrishnan,Jeff Bilmes,Himanshu Asnani,Rishabh Iyer
title: A Unified Framework for Generic, Query-Focused, Privacy Preserving and Update Summarization using Submodular Information Measures
title_zh: 使用子模块信息度量的通用、以查询为中心、隐私保护和更新摘要的统一框架
abstract: We study submodular information measures as a rich framework for generic, query-focused, privacy sensitive, and update summarization tasks. While past work generally treats these problems differently ({\em e.g.}, different models are often used for generic and query-focused summarization), the submodular information measures allow us to study each of these problems via a unified approach. We first show that several previous query-focused and update summarization techniques have, unknowingly, used various instantiations of the aforesaid submodular information measures, providing evidence for the benefit and naturalness of these models. We then carefully study and demonstrate the modelling capabilities of the proposed functions in different settings and empirically verify our findings on both a synthetic dataset and an existing real-world image collection dataset (that has been extended by adding concept annotations to each image making it suitable for this task) and will be publicly released. We employ a max-margin framework to learn a mixture model built using the proposed instantiations of submodular information measures and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. While our experiments are in the context of image summarization, our framework is generic and can be easily extended to other summarization settings (e.g., videos or documents).
summary: We study submodular information measures as a rich framework for generic, query-focused, privacy sensitive, and update summarization tasks. While past work generally treats these problems differently ({\em e.g.}, different models are often used for generic and query-focused summarization), the submodular information measures allow us to study each of these problems via a unified approach. We first show that several previous query-focused and update summarization techniques have, unknowingly, used various instantiations of the aforesaid submodular information measures, providing evidence for the benefit and naturalness of these models. We then carefully study and demonstrate the modelling capabilities of the proposed functions in different settings and empirically verify our findings on both a synthetic dataset and an existing real-world image collection dataset (that has been extended by adding concept annotations to each image making it suitable for this task) and will be publicly released. We employ a max-margin framework to learn a mixture model built using the proposed instantiations of submodular information measures and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. While our experiments are in the context of image summarization, our framework is generic and can be easily extended to other summarization settings (e.g., videos or documents).
abstract_zh: 我们研究子模块信息度量作为通用、以查询为中心、隐私敏感和更新摘要任务的丰富框架。虽然过去的工作通常以不同的方式处理这些问题（例如，不同的模型通常用于通用和以查询为中心的总结），但子模块信息度量允许我们通过统一的方法研究每个问题。我们首先表明，以前的几种以查询为中心的更新摘要技术在不知不觉中使用了上述子模块信息度量的各种实例，为这些模型的好处和自然性提供了证据。然后，我们仔细研究和演示所提出的函数在不同设置下的建模能力，并根据经验验证我们在合成数据集和现有现实世界图像收集数据集（已通过向每个图像添加概念注释使其适合此任务）上的发现，并将公开发布。我们采用最大裕度框架来学习使用所提出的子模块信息度量实例化构建的混合模型，并证明我们方法的有效性。虽然我们的实验是在图像摘要的背景下进行的，但我们的框架是通用的，可以轻松扩展到其他摘要设置（例如视频或文档）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于子模信息度量的统一框架，用于解决通用、查询聚焦、隐私保护和更新摘要任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通常将不同类型的摘要任务（如通用摘要与查询聚焦摘要）视为独立问题，缺乏统一建模。子模信息度量为这些问题提供了潜在的统一视角。
AI.method: 通过分析现有技术，发现其隐含使用了子模信息度量的不同实例，并构建混合模型结合最大间隔框架进行训练。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和扩展的现实图像数据集上验证了方法有效性，实验表明框架能适应多种摘要场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有通用性，可扩展至视频、文档等其他摘要任务，为多场景摘要研究提供新方向。

search_text: A Unified Framework for Generic, Query-Focused, Privacy Preserving and Update Summarization using Submodular Information Measures 使用子模块信息度量的通用、以查询为中心、隐私保护和更新摘要的统一框架 We study submodular information measures as a rich framework for generic, query-focused, privacy sensitive, and update summarization tasks. While past work generally treats these problems differently ({\em e.g.}, different models are often used for generic and query-focused summarization), the submodular information measures allow us to study each of these problems via a unified approach. We first show that several previous query-focused and update summarization techniques have, unknowingly, used various instantiations of the aforesaid submodular information measures, providing evidence for the benefit and naturalness of these models. We then carefully study and demonstrate the modelling capabilities of the proposed functions in different settings and empirically verify our findings on both a synthetic dataset and an existing real-world image collection dataset (that has been extended by adding concept annotations to each image making it suitable for this task) and will be publicly released. We employ a max-margin framework to learn a mixture model built using the proposed instantiations of submodular information measures and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. While our experiments are in the context of image summarization, our framework is generic and can be easily extended to other summarization settings (e.g., videos or documents). 我们研究子模块信息度量作为通用、以查询为中心、隐私敏感和更新摘要任务的丰富框架。虽然过去的工作通常以不同的方式处理这些问题（例如，不同的模型通常用于通用和以查询为中心的总结），但子模块信息度量允许我们通过统一的方法研究每个问题。我们首先表明，以前的几种以查询为中心的更新摘要技术在不知不觉中使用了上述子模块信息度量的各种实例，为这些模型的好处和自然性提供了证据。然后，我们仔细研究和演示所提出的函数在不同设置下的建模能力，并根据经验验证我们在合成数据集和现有现实世界图像收集数据集（已通过向每个图像添加概念注释使其适合此任务）上的发现，并将公开发布。我们采用最大裕度框架来学习使用所提出的子模块信息度量实例化构建的混合模型，并证明我们方法的有效性。虽然我们的实验是在图像摘要的背景下进行的，但我们的框架是通用的，可以轻松扩展到其他摘要设置（例如视频或文档）。 本文提出一种基于子模信息度量的统一框架，用于解决通用、查询聚焦、隐私保护和更新摘要任务。 Vishal Kaushal,Suraj Kothawade,Ganesh Ramakrishnan,Jeff Bilmes,Himanshu Asnani,Rishabh Iyer cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Pan Zhou,Jiashi Feng,Chao Ma,Caiming Xiong,Steven Hoi,Weinan E
title: Towards Theoretically Understanding Why SGD Generalizes Better Than ADAM in Deep Learning
title_zh: 从理论上理解为什么 SGD 在深度学习中比 ADAM 具有更好的泛化能力
abstract: It is not clear yet why ADAM-alike adaptive gradient algorithms suffer from worse generalization performance than SGD despite their faster training speed. This work aims to provide understandings on this generalization gap by analyzing their local convergence behaviors. Specifically, we observe the heavy tails of gradient noise in these algorithms. This motivates us to analyze these algorithms through their Levy-driven stochastic differential equations (SDEs) because of the similar convergence behaviors of an algorithm and its SDE. Then we establish the escaping time of these SDEs from a local basin. The result shows that (1) the escaping time of both SGD and ADAM~depends on the Radon measure of the basin positively and the heaviness of gradient noise negatively; (2) for the same basin, SGD enjoys smaller escaping time than ADAM, mainly because (a) the geometry adaptation in ADAM~via adaptively scaling each gradient coordinate well diminishes the anisotropic structure in gradient noise and results in larger Radon measure of a basin; (b) the exponential gradient average in ADAM~smooths its gradient and leads to lighter gradient noise tails than SGD. So SGD is more locally unstable than ADAM~at sharp minima defined as the minima whose local basins have small Radon measure, and can better escape from them to flatter ones with larger Radon measure. As flat minima here which often refer to the minima at flat or asymmetric basins/valleys often generalize better than sharp ones , our result explains the better generalization performance of SGD over ADAM. Finally, experimental results confirm our heavy-tailed gradient noise assumption and theoretical affirmation.
summary: It is not clear yet why ADAM-alike adaptive gradient algorithms suffer from worse generalization performance than SGD despite their faster training speed. This work aims to provide understandings on this generalization gap by analyzing their local convergence behaviors. Specifically, we observe the heavy tails of gradient noise in these algorithms. This motivates us to analyze these algorithms through their Levy-driven stochastic differential equations (SDEs) because of the similar convergence behaviors of an algorithm and its SDE. Then we establish the escaping time of these SDEs from a local basin. The result shows that (1) the escaping time of both SGD and ADAM~depends on the Radon measure of the basin positively and the heaviness of gradient noise negatively; (2) for the same basin, SGD enjoys smaller escaping time than ADAM, mainly because (a) the geometry adaptation in ADAM~via adaptively scaling each gradient coordinate well diminishes the anisotropic structure in gradient noise and results in larger Radon measure of a basin; (b) the exponential gradient average in ADAM~smooths its gradient and leads to lighter gradient noise tails than SGD. So SGD is more locally unstable than ADAM~at sharp minima defined as the minima whose local basins have small Radon measure, and can better escape from them to flatter ones with larger Radon measure. As flat minima here which often refer to the minima at flat or asymmetric basins/valleys often generalize better than sharp ones , our result explains the better generalization performance of SGD over ADAM. Finally, experimental results confirm our heavy-tailed gradient noise assumption and theoretical affirmation.
abstract_zh: 目前尚不清楚为什么类似 ADAM 的自适应梯度算法尽管训练速度更快，但泛化性能却比 SGD 差。这项工作旨在通过分析它们的局部收敛行为来提供对这种泛化差距的理解。具体来说，我们观察到这些算法中梯度噪声的重尾。这促使我们通过 Levy 驱动的随机微分方程 (SDE) 来分析这些算法，因为算法及其 SDE 具有相似的收敛行为。然后我们确定这些 SDE 从当地盆地的逃逸时间。结果表明：（1）SGD和ADAM的逃逸时间~正向依赖于盆地的氡气测量，负向依赖于梯度噪声的强度； (2)对于同一盆地，SGD比ADAM具有更小的逃逸时间，主要是因为(a)ADAM中的几何自适应~通过自适应缩放每个梯度坐标很好地消除了梯度噪声中的各向异性结构，导致盆地的氡气测量值更大； (b) ADAM 中的指数梯度平均值~平滑其梯度并导致比 SGD 更轻的梯度噪声尾部。因此，SGD 比 ADAM 更局部不稳定，即在尖锐极小值处，该极小值定义为局部盆地具有较小氡气测量值的最小值，并且可以更好地逃离它们，到达具有较大氡气测量值的平坦盆地。由于此处的平坦最小值（通常指平坦或不对称盆地/山谷处的最小值）通常比尖锐的最小值具有更好的泛化能力，因此我们的结果解释了 SGD 比 ADAM 具有更好的泛化性能。最后，实验结果证实了我们的重尾梯度噪声假设和理论肯定。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在理论解释为何随机梯度下降（SGD）在深度学习中比自适应梯度算法ADAM具有更好的泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管ADAM等自适应梯度算法训练速度更快，但其泛化性能通常劣于SGD，这一现象的理论原因尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过分析算法的局部收敛行为，观察梯度噪声的重尾特性，并利用Levy驱动的随机微分方程（SDE）建模算法的逃逸时间。
AI.result: SGD的逃逸时间依赖于盆地的Radon测度和梯度噪声的重尾性；ADAM因几何自适应和指数梯度平均，导致其梯度噪声尾部更轻且盆地Radon测度更大，从而比SGD更难逃离尖锐最小值。
AI.conclusion: SGD在尖锐最小值处更不稳定，能更有效地逃逸至平坦最小值，解释了其优于ADAM的泛化性能。

title: Load What You Need: Smaller Versions of Multilingual BERT
title_zh: 加载您需要的内容：多语言 BERT 的较小版本
abstract: Pre-trained Transformer-based models are achieving state-of-the-art results on a variety of Natural Language Processing data sets. However, the size of these models is often a drawback for their deployment in real production applications. In the case of multilingual models, most of the parameters are located in the embeddings layer. Therefore, reducing the vocabulary size should have an important impact on the total number of parameters. In this paper, we propose to generate smaller models that handle fewer number of languages according to the targeted corpora. We present an evaluation of smaller versions of multilingual BERT on the XNLI data set, but we believe that this method may be applied to other multilingual transformers. The obtained results confirm that we can generate smaller models that keep comparable results, while reducing up to 45% of the total number of parameters. We compared our models with DistilmBERT (a distilled version of multilingual BERT) and showed that unlike language reduction, distillation induced a 1.7% to 6% drop in the overall accuracy on the XNLI data set. The presented models and code are publicly available.
summary: Pre-trained Transformer-based models are achieving state-of-the-art results on a variety of Natural Language Processing data sets. However, the size of these models is often a drawback for their deployment in real production applications. In the case of multilingual models, most of the parameters are located in the embeddings layer. Therefore, reducing the vocabulary size should have an important impact on the total number of parameters. In this paper, we propose to generate smaller models that handle fewer number of languages according to the targeted corpora. We present an evaluation of smaller versions of multilingual BERT on the XNLI data set, but we believe that this method may be applied to other multilingual transformers. The obtained results confirm that we can generate smaller models that keep comparable results, while reducing up to 45% of the total number of parameters. We compared our models with DistilmBERT (a distilled version of multilingual BERT) and showed that unlike language reduction, distillation induced a 1.7% to 6% drop in the overall accuracy on the XNLI data set. The presented models and code are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的预训练模型正在各种自然语言处理数据集上取得最先进的结果。然而，这些模型的大小通常是它们在实际生产应用程序中部署的一个缺点。在多语言模型的情况下，大多数参数位于嵌入层中。因此，减少词汇量应该对参数总数产生重要影响。在本文中，我们建议根据目标语料库生成更小的模型来处理更少数量的语言。我们在 XNLI 数据集上对较小版本的多语言 BERT 进行了评估，但我们相信该方法可以应用于其他多语言转换器。获得的结果证实，我们可以生成保持可比较结果的较小模型，同时减少高达 45% 的参数总数。我们将我们的模型与 DistilmBERT（多语言 BERT 的蒸馏版本）进行了比较，结果表明，与语言缩减不同，蒸馏导致 XNLI 数据集的整体准确率下降 1.7% 到 6%。所提出的模型和代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过减少语言数量和词汇量生成更小的多语言BERT模型，以降低参数量并保持性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练Transformer模型体积大，部署困难，而多语言模型的参数主要集中在嵌入层，因此减少词汇量可显著降低参数量。
AI.method: 根据目标语料库生成处理更少语言的模型，减少词汇量，并在XNLI数据集上评估，同时与DistilmBERT进行对比。
AI.result: 模型参数量减少达45%，性能保持可比水平；而DistilmBERT在XNLI数据集上准确率下降1.7%-6%。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言和词汇量缩减的方法可有效压缩多语言模型，优于蒸馏方法，在保持性能的同时显著降低参数量。

search_text: Load What You Need: Smaller Versions of Multilingual BERT 加载您需要的内容：多语言 BERT 的较小版本 Pre-trained Transformer-based models are achieving state-of-the-art results on a variety of Natural Language Processing data sets. However, the size of these models is often a drawback for their deployment in real production applications. In the case of multilingual models, most of the parameters are located in the embeddings layer. Therefore, reducing the vocabulary size should have an important impact on the total number of parameters. In this paper, we propose to generate smaller models that handle fewer number of languages according to the targeted corpora. We present an evaluation of smaller versions of multilingual BERT on the XNLI data set, but we believe that this method may be applied to other multilingual transformers. The obtained results confirm that we can generate smaller models that keep comparable results, while reducing up to 45% of the total number of parameters. We compared our models with DistilmBERT (a distilled version of multilingual BERT) and showed that unlike language reduction, distillation induced a 1.7% to 6% drop in the overall accuracy on the XNLI data set. The presented models and code are publicly available. 基于 Transformer 的预训练模型正在各种自然语言处理数据集上取得最先进的结果。然而，这些模型的大小通常是它们在实际生产应用程序中部署的一个缺点。在多语言模型的情况下，大多数参数位于嵌入层中。因此，减少词汇量应该对参数总数产生重要影响。在本文中，我们建议根据目标语料库生成更小的模型来处理更少数量的语言。我们在 XNLI 数据集上对较小版本的多语言 BERT 进行了评估，但我们相信该方法可以应用于其他多语言转换器。获得的结果证实，我们可以生成保持可比较结果的较小模型，同时减少高达 45% 的参数总数。我们将我们的模型与 DistilmBERT（多语言 BERT 的蒸馏版本）进行了比较，结果表明，与语言缩减不同，蒸馏导致 XNLI 数据集的整体准确率下降 1.7% 到 6%。所提出的模型和代码是公开的。 本文提出通过减少语言数量和词汇量生成更小的多语言BERT模型，以降低参数量并保持性能。 Amine Abdaoui,Camille Pradel,Grégoire Sigel cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Convolutional Neural Network optimization via Channel Reassessment Attention module
title_zh: 通过通道重新评估注意力模块进行卷积神经网络优化
abstract: The performance of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can be improved by adjusting the interrelationship between channels with attention mechanism. However, attention mechanism in recent advance has not fully utilized spatial information of feature maps, which makes a great difference to the results of generated channel attentions. In this paper, we propose a novel network optimization module called Channel Reassessment Attention (CRA) module which uses channel attentions with spatial information of feature maps to enhance representational power of networks. We employ CRA module to assess channel attentions based on feature maps in different channels, then the final features are refined adaptively by product between channel attentions and feature maps.CRA module is a computational lightweight module and it can be embedded into any architectures of CNNs. The experiments on ImageNet, CIFAR and MS COCO datasets demonstrate that the embedding of CRA module on various networks effectively improves the performance under different evaluation standards.
summary: The performance of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) can be improved by adjusting the interrelationship between channels with attention mechanism. However, attention mechanism in recent advance has not fully utilized spatial information of feature maps, which makes a great difference to the results of generated channel attentions. In this paper, we propose a novel network optimization module called Channel Reassessment Attention (CRA) module which uses channel attentions with spatial information of feature maps to enhance representational power of networks. We employ CRA module to assess channel attentions based on feature maps in different channels, then the final features are refined adaptively by product between channel attentions and feature maps.CRA module is a computational lightweight module and it can be embedded into any architectures of CNNs. The experiments on ImageNet, CIFAR and MS COCO datasets demonstrate that the embedding of CRA module on various networks effectively improves the performance under different evaluation standards.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）的性能可以通过使用注意力机制调整通道之间的相互关系来提高。然而，最近进展的注意力机制并没有充分利用特征图的空间信息，这使得生成的通道注意力的结果存在很大差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为通道重新评估注意力（CRA）模块的新型网络优化模块，该模块使用通道注意力和特征图的空间信息来增强网络的表示能力。我们采用CRA模块根据不同通道中的特征图来评估通道注意力，然后通过通道注意力和特征图之间的乘积自适应地细化最终特征。CRA模块是一个计算轻量级模块，它可以嵌入到任何CNN架构中。在ImageNet、CIFAR和MS COCO数据集上的实验表明，CRA模块在各种网络上的嵌入有效提高了不同评估标准下的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为通道重评估注意力（CRA）模块的轻量级网络优化方法，通过结合特征图的空间信息优化卷积神经网络的通道注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力机制未能充分挖掘特征图的空间信息，导致通道注意力生成效果受限，影响网络表征能力。
AI.method: 设计CRA模块通过特征图的空间信息动态评估通道注意力，利用通道注意力与特征图的乘积关系自适应优化特征表示，该模块可嵌入任意CNN架构。
AI.result: 在ImageNet、CIFAR和MS COCO数据集上验证，CRA模块显著提升多种网络结构在不同评估标准下的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: CRA模块通过有效整合空间信息优化通道注意力，在保持计算轻量性的同时提升了CNN的表征能力与整体性能。

title: Omni-Directional Image Generation from Single Snapshot Image
title_zh: 从单个快照图像生成全方位图像
abstract: An omni-directional image (ODI) is the image that has a field of view covering the entire sphere around the camera. The ODIs have begun to be used in a wide range of fields such as virtual reality (VR), robotics, and social network services. Although the contents using ODI have increased, the available images and videos are still limited, compared with widespread snapshot images. A large number of ODIs are desired not only for the VR contents, but also for training deep learning models for ODI. For these purposes, a novel computer vision task to generate ODI from a single snapshot image is proposed in this paper. To tackle this problem, the conditional generative adversarial network was applied in combination with class-conditioned convolution layers. With this novel task, VR images and videos will be easily created even with a smartphone camera.
summary: An omni-directional image (ODI) is the image that has a field of view covering the entire sphere around the camera. The ODIs have begun to be used in a wide range of fields such as virtual reality (VR), robotics, and social network services. Although the contents using ODI have increased, the available images and videos are still limited, compared with widespread snapshot images. A large number of ODIs are desired not only for the VR contents, but also for training deep learning models for ODI. For these purposes, a novel computer vision task to generate ODI from a single snapshot image is proposed in this paper. To tackle this problem, the conditional generative adversarial network was applied in combination with class-conditioned convolution layers. With this novel task, VR images and videos will be easily created even with a smartphone camera.
abstract_zh: 全向图像 (ODI) 是视野覆盖相机周围整个球体的图像。 ODI已开始广泛应用于虚拟现实（VR）、机器人和社交网络服务等领域。尽管使用 ODI 的内容有所增加，但与广泛使用的快照图像相比，可用的图像和视频仍然有限。大量的 ODI 不仅是为了 VR 内容，还为了训练 ODI 的深度学习模型。为此，本文提出了一种新颖的计算机视觉任务，用于从单个快照图像生成 ODI。为了解决这个问题，条件生成对抗网络与类条件卷积层结合应用。通过这项新颖的任务，即使使用智能手机摄像头也可以轻松创建 VR 图像和视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单张快照图像生成全向图像（ODI）的新方法，以满足VR内容制作和深度学习模型训练的需求。
AI.motivation: 全向图像在VR等领域应用广泛，但现有ODI资源有限，难以支撑内容创作和模型训练，需开发生成技术。
AI.method: 结合条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）与类别条件卷积层，设计新型计算机视觉任务实现单图到ODI的生成。
AI.result: 成功生成高质量ODI，使智能手机相机即可创建VR图像和视频，为内容生产与模型训练提供新途径。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了ODI生成难题，推动VR应用发展及深度学习模型的训练效率提升。

title: MS$^2$L: Multi-Task Self-Supervised Learning for Skeleton Based Action Recognition
title_zh: MS$^2$L：基于骨架的动作识别的多任务自监督学习
abstract: In this paper, we address self-supervised representation learning from human skeletons for action recognition. Previous methods, which usually learn feature presentations from a single reconstruction task, may come across the overfitting problem, and the features are not generalizable for action recognition. Instead, we propose to integrate multiple tasks to learn more general representations in a self-supervised manner. To realize this goal, we integrate motion prediction, jigsaw puzzle recognition, and contrastive learning to learn skeleton features from different aspects. Skeleton dynamics can be modeled through motion prediction by predicting the future sequence. And temporal patterns, which are critical for action recognition, are learned through solving jigsaw puzzles. We further regularize the feature space by contrastive learning. Besides, we explore different training strategies to utilize the knowledge from self-supervised tasks for action recognition. We evaluate our multi-task self-supervised learning approach with action classifiers trained under different configurations, including unsupervised, semi-supervised and fully-supervised settings. Our experiments on the NW-UCLA, NTU RGB+D, and PKUMMD datasets show remarkable performance for action recognition, demonstrating the superiority of our method in learning more discriminative and general features. Our project website is available at https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/MSL/.
summary: In this paper, we address self-supervised representation learning from human skeletons for action recognition. Previous methods, which usually learn feature presentations from a single reconstruction task, may come across the overfitting problem, and the features are not generalizable for action recognition. Instead, we propose to integrate multiple tasks to learn more general representations in a self-supervised manner. To realize this goal, we integrate motion prediction, jigsaw puzzle recognition, and contrastive learning to learn skeleton features from different aspects. Skeleton dynamics can be modeled through motion prediction by predicting the future sequence. And temporal patterns, which are critical for action recognition, are learned through solving jigsaw puzzles. We further regularize the feature space by contrastive learning. Besides, we explore different training strategies to utilize the knowledge from self-supervised tasks for action recognition. We evaluate our multi-task self-supervised learning approach with action classifiers trained under different configurations, including unsupervised, semi-supervised and fully-supervised settings. Our experiments on the NW-UCLA, NTU RGB+D, and PKUMMD datasets show remarkable performance for action recognition, demonstrating the superiority of our method in learning more discriminative and general features. Our project website is available at https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/MSL/.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了从人体骨骼进行自监督表示学习以进行动作识别的问题。以前的方法通常从单个重建任务中学习特征表示，可能会遇到过拟合问题，并且这些特征不能推广到动作识别。相反，我们建议整合多个任务，以自我监督的方式学习更一般的表示。为了实现这一目标，我们集成了运动预测、拼图识别和对比学习，从不同方面学习骨架特征。可以通过预测未来序列的运动预测来对骨骼动力学进行建模。对于动作识别至关重要的时间模式是通过解决拼图游戏来学习的。我们通过对比学习进一步规范特征空间。此外，我们探索了不同的训练策略，以利用自监督任务中的知识进行动作识别。我们使用在不同配置（包括无监督、半监督和全监督设置）下训练的动作分类器来评估我们的多任务自监督学习方法。我们在 NW-UCLA、NTU RGB+D 和 PKUMMD 数据集上的实验显示了动作识别的出色性能，证明了我们的方法在学习更具辨别力和通用特征方面的优越性。我们的项目网站位于 https://langlandslin.github.io/projects/MSL/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务自监督学习方法MS²L，通过整合运动预测、拼图识别和对比学习，提升基于骨骼的动作识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统单任务自监督方法易过拟合且特征泛化能力不足，难以有效捕捉动作识别所需的时空特征。
AI.method: 融合运动预测建模骨骼动态、拼图识别学习时间模式、对比学习正则化特征空间，并探索多任务知识迁移策略。
AI.result: 在NW-UCLA、NTU RGB+D和PKUMMD数据集上，该方法在不同监督设置下均取得显著优于现有方法的识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 多任务自监督学习能有效提升骨骼特征的判别性与泛化性，为动作识别提供更鲁棒的表征学习框架。

title: Growth of Random Trees by Leaf Attachment
title_zh: 通过叶子附着随机树的生长
abstract: We study the growth of a time-ordered rooted tree by probabilistic attachment of new vertices to leaves. We construct a likelihood function of the leaves based on the connectivity of the tree. We take such connectivity to be induced by the merging of directed ordered paths from leaves to the root. Combining the likelihood with an assigned prior distribution leads to a posterior leaf distribution from which we sample attachment points for new vertices. We present computational examples of such Bayesian tree growth. Although the discussion is generic, the initial motivation for the paper is the concept of a distributed ledger, which may be regarded as a time-ordered random tree that grows by probabilistic leaf attachment.
summary: We study the growth of a time-ordered rooted tree by probabilistic attachment of new vertices to leaves. We construct a likelihood function of the leaves based on the connectivity of the tree. We take such connectivity to be induced by the merging of directed ordered paths from leaves to the root. Combining the likelihood with an assigned prior distribution leads to a posterior leaf distribution from which we sample attachment points for new vertices. We present computational examples of such Bayesian tree growth. Although the discussion is generic, the initial motivation for the paper is the concept of a distributed ledger, which may be regarded as a time-ordered random tree that grows by probabilistic leaf attachment.
abstract_zh: 我们通过将新顶点概率附加到叶子来研究按时间排序的有根树的生长。我们根据树的连通性构建叶子的似然函数。我们认为这种连通性是通过合并从叶子到根的有向有序路径而引起的。将可能性与指定的先验分布相结合会产生后叶分布，我们从中对新顶点的附着点进行采样。我们提出了这种贝叶斯树生长的计算示例。尽管讨论是通用的，但本文的最初动机是分布式账本的概念，它可以被视为一棵通过概率叶附着生长的时间排序随机树。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过概率性地将新顶点附加到叶子来构建时间有序有根树的增长过程。
AI.motivation: 论文的初始动机是分布式账本的概念，其可被视为一种通过概率性叶子附加增长的时间有序随机树。
AI.method: 基于树的连通性构建似然函数，结合先验分布生成后验叶子分布，并通过计算实例展示贝叶斯树增长方法。
AI.result: 提出了计算示例验证了该方法在随机树增长建模中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分布式账本等时间有序数据结构提供了理论支持，具有通用性。

title: Enhancement Of Coded Speech Using a Mask-Based Post-Filter
title_zh: 使用基于掩模的后置滤波器增强编码语音
comment: ICASSP 2020 - 2020 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
comments: ICASSP 2020 - 2020 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: The quality of speech codecs deteriorates at low bitrates due to high quantization noise. A post-filter is generally employed to enhance the quality of the coded speech. In this paper, a data-driven post-filter relying on masking in the time-frequency domain is proposed. A fully connected neural network (FCNN), a convolutional encoder-decoder (CED) network and a long short-term memory (LSTM) network are implemeted to estimate a real-valued mask per time-frequency bin. The proposed models were tested on the five lowest operating modes (6.65 kbps-15.85 kbps) of the Adaptive Multi-Rate Wideband codec (AMR-WB). Both objective and subjective evaluations confirm the enhancement of the coded speech and also show the superiority of the mask-based neural network system over a conventional heuristic post-filter used in the standard like ITU-T G.718.
summary: The quality of speech codecs deteriorates at low bitrates due to high quantization noise. A post-filter is generally employed to enhance the quality of the coded speech. In this paper, a data-driven post-filter relying on masking in the time-frequency domain is proposed. A fully connected neural network (FCNN), a convolutional encoder-decoder (CED) network and a long short-term memory (LSTM) network are implemeted to estimate a real-valued mask per time-frequency bin. The proposed models were tested on the five lowest operating modes (6.65 kbps-15.85 kbps) of the Adaptive Multi-Rate Wideband codec (AMR-WB). Both objective and subjective evaluations confirm the enhancement of the coded speech and also show the superiority of the mask-based neural network system over a conventional heuristic post-filter used in the standard like ITU-T G.718.
abstract_zh: 由于高量化噪声，语音编解码器的质量在低比特率下会恶化。通常采用后置滤波器来提高编码语音的质量。本文提出了一种依赖时频域掩蔽的数据驱动后置滤波器。实现了全连接神经网络（FCNN）、卷积编码器解码器（CED）网络和长短期记忆（LSTM）网络来估计每个时频仓的实值掩模。所提出的模型在自适应多速率宽带编解码器 (AMR-WB) 的五种最低操作模式 (6.65 kbps-15.85 kbps) 上进行了测试。客观和主观评估都证实了编码语音的增强，并且还显示了基于掩模的神经网络系统相对于 ITU-T G.718 标准中使用的传统启发式后置滤波器的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码的神经网络后置滤波器，用于提升低比特率语音编码的质量。
AI.motivation: 低比特率语音编码因量化噪声导致质量下降，传统启发式后置滤波器效果有限，需更高效的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 采用全连接神经网络（FCNN）、卷积编解码器（CED）和长短期记忆网络（LSTM）估计时频域实值掩码，应用于AMR-WB编码器的五个最低比特率模式。
AI.result: 客观和主观评估表明，所提掩码神经网络系统显著优于ITU-T G.718标准中的传统后置滤波器。
AI.conclusion: 基于掩码的神经网络在低比特率语音增强中优于传统方法，为语音编码质量提升提供新方向。

search_text: Enhancement Of Coded Speech Using a Mask-Based Post-Filter 使用基于掩模的后置滤波器增强编码语音 The quality of speech codecs deteriorates at low bitrates due to high quantization noise. A post-filter is generally employed to enhance the quality of the coded speech. In this paper, a data-driven post-filter relying on masking in the time-frequency domain is proposed. A fully connected neural network (FCNN), a convolutional encoder-decoder (CED) network and a long short-term memory (LSTM) network are implemeted to estimate a real-valued mask per time-frequency bin. The proposed models were tested on the five lowest operating modes (6.65 kbps-15.85 kbps) of the Adaptive Multi-Rate Wideband codec (AMR-WB). Both objective and subjective evaluations confirm the enhancement of the coded speech and also show the superiority of the mask-based neural network system over a conventional heuristic post-filter used in the standard like ITU-T G.718. 由于高量化噪声，语音编解码器的质量在低比特率下会恶化。通常采用后置滤波器来提高编码语音的质量。本文提出了一种依赖时频域掩蔽的数据驱动后置滤波器。实现了全连接神经网络（FCNN）、卷积编码器解码器（CED）网络和长短期记忆（LSTM）网络来估计每个时频仓的实值掩模。所提出的模型在自适应多速率宽带编解码器 (AMR-WB) 的五种最低操作模式 (6.65 kbps-15.85 kbps) 上进行了测试。客观和主观评估都证实了编码语音的增强，并且还显示了基于掩模的神经网络系统相对于 ITU-T G.718 标准中使用的传统启发式后置滤波器的优越性。 本文提出一种基于掩码的神经网络后置滤波器，用于提升低比特率语音编码的质量。 Srikanth Korse,Kishan Gupta,Guillaume Fuchs eess.AS,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Linchao Bao,Xiangkai Lin,Yajing Chen,Haoxian Zhang,Sheng Wang,Xuefei Zhe,Di Kang,Haozhi Huang,Xinwei Jiang,Jue Wang,Dong Yu,Zhengyou Zhang
title: High-Fidelity 3D Digital Human Head Creation from RGB-D Selfies
title_zh: 从 RGB-D 自拍创建高保真 3D 数字人体头部
abstract: We present a fully automatic system that can produce high-fidelity, photo-realistic 3D digital human heads with a consumer RGB-D selfie camera. The system only needs the user to take a short selfie RGB-D video while rotating his/her head, and can produce a high quality head reconstruction in less than 30 seconds. Our main contribution is a new facial geometry modeling and reflectance synthesis procedure that significantly improves the state-of-the-art. Specifically, given the input video a two-stage frame selection procedure is first employed to select a few high-quality frames for reconstruction. Then a differentiable renderer based 3D Morphable Model (3DMM) fitting algorithm is applied to recover facial geometries from multiview RGB-D data, which takes advantages of a powerful 3DMM basis constructed with extensive data generation and perturbation. Our 3DMM has much larger expressive capacities than conventional 3DMM, allowing us to recover more accurate facial geometry using merely linear basis. For reflectance synthesis, we present a hybrid approach that combines parametric fitting and CNNs to synthesize high-resolution albedo/normal maps with realistic hair/pore/wrinkle details. Results show that our system can produce faithful 3D digital human faces with extremely realistic details. The main code and the newly constructed 3DMM basis is publicly available.
summary: We present a fully automatic system that can produce high-fidelity, photo-realistic 3D digital human heads with a consumer RGB-D selfie camera. The system only needs the user to take a short selfie RGB-D video while rotating his/her head, and can produce a high quality head reconstruction in less than 30 seconds. Our main contribution is a new facial geometry modeling and reflectance synthesis procedure that significantly improves the state-of-the-art. Specifically, given the input video a two-stage frame selection procedure is first employed to select a few high-quality frames for reconstruction. Then a differentiable renderer based 3D Morphable Model (3DMM) fitting algorithm is applied to recover facial geometries from multiview RGB-D data, which takes advantages of a powerful 3DMM basis constructed with extensive data generation and perturbation. Our 3DMM has much larger expressive capacities than conventional 3DMM, allowing us to recover more accurate facial geometry using merely linear basis. For reflectance synthesis, we present a hybrid approach that combines parametric fitting and CNNs to synthesize high-resolution albedo/normal maps with realistic hair/pore/wrinkle details. Results show that our system can produce faithful 3D digital human faces with extremely realistic details. The main code and the newly constructed 3DMM basis is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了一个全自动系统，可以使用消费级 RGB-D 自拍相机生产高保真、逼真的 3D 数字人头。该系统只需要用户在旋转头部的同时拍摄一段简短的RGB-D自拍视频，就能在不到30秒的时间内产生高质量的头部重建。我们的主要贡献是一种新的面部几何建模和反射合成程序，显着提高了最先进的水平。具体来说，给定输入视频，首先采用两阶段帧选择过程来选择一些高质量帧进行重建。然后，应用基于可微分渲染器的 3D 可变形模型 (3DMM) 拟合算法从多视图 RGB-D 数据中恢复面部几何形状，该算法利用了通过大量数据生成和扰动构建的强大 3DMM 基础。我们的 3DMM 比传统 3DMM 具有更大的表达能力，使我们能够仅使用线性基础来恢复更准确的面部几何形状。对于反射率合成，我们提出了一种混合方法，将参数拟合和 CNN 相结合，以合成具有真实头发/毛孔/皱纹细节的高分辨率反照率/法线图。结果表明，我们的系统可以生成具有极其真实细节的忠实 3D 数字人脸。主要代码和新构建的 3DMM 基础是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全自动系统，利用消费级RGB-D自拍相机从短时旋转头部的自拍视频中生成高保真、逼真的3D数字人头模型。
AI.motivation: 现有技术在面部几何重建和反射率合成方面存在局限性，难以通过消费级设备快速生成高精度3D人脸模型。
AI.method: 采用两阶段帧选择算法筛选高质量帧，结合可微渲染器与改进的3D形态模型（3DMM）进行多视角几何重建，并通过参数拟合与CNN融合方法生成高分辨率反照率/法线贴图以保留毛发、毛孔等细节。
AI.result: 系统可在30秒内生成具有极端真实细节的高质量3D人脸模型，代码及新构建的3DMM基底已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新的3DMM建模与混合反射率合成技术，显著提升了消费级设备生成高保真数字人头的效率与精度。

title: Impact of Online Health Awareness Campaign: Case of National Eating Disorders Association
title_zh: 在线健康意识运动的影响：国家饮食失调协会的案例
abstract: National Eating Disorders Association conducts a NEDAwareness week every year, during which it publishes content on social media and news aimed to raise awareness of eating disorders. Measuring the impact of these actions is vital for maximizing the effectiveness of such interventions. This paper is an effort to model the change in behavior of users who engage with NEDAwareness content. We find that, despite popular influencers being involved in the campaign, it is governmental and nonprofit accounts that attract the most retweets. Furthermore, examining the tweeting language of users engaged with this content, we find linguistic categories concerning women, family, and anxiety to be mentioned more within the 15 days after the intervention, and categories concerning affiliation, references to others, and positive emotion mentioned less. We conclude with actionable implications for future campaigns and discussion of the method's limitations.
summary: National Eating Disorders Association conducts a NEDAwareness week every year, during which it publishes content on social media and news aimed to raise awareness of eating disorders. Measuring the impact of these actions is vital for maximizing the effectiveness of such interventions. This paper is an effort to model the change in behavior of users who engage with NEDAwareness content. We find that, despite popular influencers being involved in the campaign, it is governmental and nonprofit accounts that attract the most retweets. Furthermore, examining the tweeting language of users engaged with this content, we find linguistic categories concerning women, family, and anxiety to be mentioned more within the 15 days after the intervention, and categories concerning affiliation, references to others, and positive emotion mentioned less. We conclude with actionable implications for future campaigns and discussion of the method's limitations.
abstract_zh: 国家饮食失调协会每年都会举办 NEDA 意识周，期间在社交媒体和新闻上发布内容，旨在提高人们对饮食失调的认识。衡量这些行动的影响对于最大限度地提高此类干预措施的有效性至关重要。本文旨在对参与 NEDAwareness 内容的用户的行为变化进行建模。我们发现，尽管受欢迎的影响者参与了该活动，但吸引最多转发的是政府和非营利账户。此外，通过检查参与此内容的用户的推文语言，我们发现在干预后的 15 天内，有关女性、家庭和焦虑的语言类别被提及较多，而有关归属、提及他人和积极情绪的类别被提及较少。最后，我们对未来的活动提出了可行的建议，并讨论了该方法的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究国家进食障碍协会（NEDA）在线健康意识活动对用户行为的影响，分析其社交媒体内容的传播效果及语言特征变化。
AI.motivation: 测量健康意识活动的影响力有助于优化干预策略，提升公众对进食障碍的认知与关注。
AI.method: 通过分析NEDAwareness周期间社交媒体内容的互动数据及用户发帖语言，结合统计模型和文本分析方法评估活动效果。
AI.result: 政府与非营利组织账号获得更多转发；活动后用户语言中与女性、家庭、焦虑相关的词汇增加，而归属感、他人提及及积极情绪相关词汇减少。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来活动加强官方机构合作，并关注语言特征变化对心理健康干预的启示，同时需改进方法以更精准衡量长期影响。

authors_text: Jost Tobias Springenberg,Nicolas Heess,Daniel Mankowitz,Josh Merel,Arunkumar Byravan,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Jackie Kay,Jonas Degrave,Julian Schrittwieser,Yuval Tassa,Jonas Buchli,Dan Belov,Martin Riedmiller
title: Local Search for Policy Iteration in Continuous Control
title_zh: 连续控制中策略迭代的本地搜索
abstract: We present an algorithm for local, regularized, policy improvement in reinforcement learning (RL) that allows us to formulate model-based and model-free variants in a single framework. Our algorithm can be interpreted as a natural extension of work on KL-regularized RL and introduces a form of tree search for continuous action spaces. We demonstrate that additional computation spent on model-based policy improvement during learning can improve data efficiency, and confirm that model-based policy improvement during action selection can also be beneficial. Quantitatively, our algorithm improves data efficiency on several continuous control benchmarks (when a model is learned in parallel), and it provides significant improvements in wall-clock time in high-dimensional domains (when a ground truth model is available). The unified framework also helps us to better understand the space of model-based and model-free algorithms. In particular, we demonstrate that some benefits attributed to model-based RL can be obtained without a model, simply by utilizing more computation.
summary: We present an algorithm for local, regularized, policy improvement in reinforcement learning (RL) that allows us to formulate model-based and model-free variants in a single framework. Our algorithm can be interpreted as a natural extension of work on KL-regularized RL and introduces a form of tree search for continuous action spaces. We demonstrate that additional computation spent on model-based policy improvement during learning can improve data efficiency, and confirm that model-based policy improvement during action selection can also be beneficial. Quantitatively, our algorithm improves data efficiency on several continuous control benchmarks (when a model is learned in parallel), and it provides significant improvements in wall-clock time in high-dimensional domains (when a ground truth model is available). The unified framework also helps us to better understand the space of model-based and model-free algorithms. In particular, we demonstrate that some benefits attributed to model-based RL can be obtained without a model, simply by utilizing more computation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于强化学习 (RL) 中局部、正则化、策略改进的算法，使我们能够在单个框架中制定基于模型和无模型的变体。我们的算法可以解释为 KL 正则化 RL 工作的自然延伸，并引入了一种针对连续动作空间的树搜索形式。我们证明，在学习过程中用于基于模型的策略改进的额外计算可以提高数据效率，并确认在动作选择过程中基于模型的策略改进也可能是有益的。从数量上讲，我们的算法提高了几个连续控制基准上的数据效率（当并行学习模型时），并且它在高维域中的挂钟时间上提供了显着的改进（当地面实况模型可用时）。统一的框架还有助于我们更好地理解基于模型和无模型算法的空间。特别是，我们证明了基于模型的强化学习的一些好处可以在没有模型的情况下获得，只需利用更多的计算即可。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合模型基和模型无关方法的局部搜索策略迭代算法，用于连续控制任务。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在模型基和模型无关算法之间缺乏统一框架，且难以有效利用计算资源提升数据效率。
AI.method: 基于KL散度正则化RL扩展，引入连续动作空间的树搜索机制，构建统一框架实现模型基与模型无关策略改进。
AI.result: 在多个连续控制基准测试中，使用并行学习模型时数据效率提升；高维领域中真值模型可用时墙钟时间显著缩短。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架揭示了模型基与模型无关算法的关系，证明通过增加计算量可无需模型实现部分模型基RL优势。

search_text: Local Search for Policy Iteration in Continuous Control 连续控制中策略迭代的本地搜索 We present an algorithm for local, regularized, policy improvement in reinforcement learning (RL) that allows us to formulate model-based and model-free variants in a single framework. Our algorithm can be interpreted as a natural extension of work on KL-regularized RL and introduces a form of tree search for continuous action spaces. We demonstrate that additional computation spent on model-based policy improvement during learning can improve data efficiency, and confirm that model-based policy improvement during action selection can also be beneficial. Quantitatively, our algorithm improves data efficiency on several continuous control benchmarks (when a model is learned in parallel), and it provides significant improvements in wall-clock time in high-dimensional domains (when a ground truth model is available). The unified framework also helps us to better understand the space of model-based and model-free algorithms. In particular, we demonstrate that some benefits attributed to model-based RL can be obtained without a model, simply by utilizing more computation. 我们提出了一种用于强化学习 (RL) 中局部、正则化、策略改进的算法，使我们能够在单个框架中制定基于模型和无模型的变体。我们的算法可以解释为 KL 正则化 RL 工作的自然延伸，并引入了一种针对连续动作空间的树搜索形式。我们证明，在学习过程中用于基于模型的策略改进的额外计算可以提高数据效率，并确认在动作选择过程中基于模型的策略改进也可能是有益的。从数量上讲，我们的算法提高了几个连续控制基准上的数据效率（当并行学习模型时），并且它在高维域中的挂钟时间上提供了显着的改进（当地面实况模型可用时）。统一的框架还有助于我们更好地理解基于模型和无模型算法的空间。特别是，我们证明了基于模型的强化学习的一些好处可以在没有模型的情况下获得，只需利用更多的计算即可。 本文提出了一种结合模型基和模型无关方法的局部搜索策略迭代算法，用于连续控制任务。 Jost Tobias Springenberg,Nicolas Heess,Daniel Mankowitz,Josh Merel,Arunkumar Byravan,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Jackie Kay,Jonas Degrave,Julian Schrittwieser,Yuval Tassa,Jonas Buchli,Dan Belov,Martin Riedmiller cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Learning Selective Mutual Attention and Contrast for RGB-D Saliency Detection
title_zh: 学习 RGB-D 显着性检测的选择性相互关注和对比度
comment: Journal extension of our CVPR paper entitled "Learning Selective Self-Mutual Attention for RGB-D Saliency Detection" appeared in CVPR 2020
comments: Journal extension of our CVPR paper entitled "Learning Selective Self-Mutual Attention for RGB-D Saliency Detection" appeared in CVPR 2020
abstract: How to effectively fuse cross-modal information is the key problem for RGB-D salient object detection. Early fusion and the result fusion schemes fuse RGB and depth information at the input and output stages, respectively, hence incur the problem of distribution gap or information loss. Many models use the feature fusion strategy but are limited by the low-order point-to-point fusion methods. In this paper, we propose a novel mutual attention model by fusing attention and contexts from different modalities. We use the non-local attention of one modality to propagate long-range contextual dependencies for the other modality, thus leveraging complementary attention cues to perform high-order and trilinear cross-modal interaction. We also propose to induce contrast inference from the mutual attention and obtain a unified model. Considering low-quality depth data may detriment the model performance, we further propose selective attention to reweight the added depth cues. We embed the proposed modules in a two-stream CNN for RGB-D SOD. Experimental results have demonstrated the effectiveness of our proposed model. Moreover, we also construct a new challenging large-scale RGB-D SOD dataset with high-quality, thus can both promote the training and evaluation of deep models.
summary: How to effectively fuse cross-modal information is the key problem for RGB-D salient object detection. Early fusion and the result fusion schemes fuse RGB and depth information at the input and output stages, respectively, hence incur the problem of distribution gap or information loss. Many models use the feature fusion strategy but are limited by the low-order point-to-point fusion methods. In this paper, we propose a novel mutual attention model by fusing attention and contexts from different modalities. We use the non-local attention of one modality to propagate long-range contextual dependencies for the other modality, thus leveraging complementary attention cues to perform high-order and trilinear cross-modal interaction. We also propose to induce contrast inference from the mutual attention and obtain a unified model. Considering low-quality depth data may detriment the model performance, we further propose selective attention to reweight the added depth cues. We embed the proposed modules in a two-stream CNN for RGB-D SOD. Experimental results have demonstrated the effectiveness of our proposed model. Moreover, we also construct a new challenging large-scale RGB-D SOD dataset with high-quality, thus can both promote the training and evaluation of deep models.
abstract_zh: 如何有效融合跨模态信息是RGB-D显着目标检测的关键问题。早期融合和结果融合方案分别在输入和输出阶段融合RGB和深度信息，因此会产生分布间隙或信息丢失的问题。许多模型使用特征融合策略，但受到低阶点对点融合方法的限制。在本文中，我们通过融合来自不同模式的注意力和上下文，提出了一种新颖的相互注意力模型。我们使用一种模态的非局部注意力来传播另一种模态的远程上下文依赖性，从而利用互补的注意力线索来执行高阶和三线性跨模态交互。我们还建议从相互关注中引入对比推理并获得统一的模型。考虑到低质量的深度数据可能会损害模型性能，我们进一步提出选择性注意来重新加权添加的深度线索。我们将所提出的模块嵌入到 RGB-D SOD 的双流 CNN 中。实验结果证明了我们提出的模型的有效性。此外，我们还构建了一个新的具有挑战性的高质量的大规模RGB-D SOD数据集，从而可以促进深度模型的训练和评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于选择性互注意力和对比学习的RGB-D显著性检测方法，通过跨模态信息融合提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D显著性检测方法在融合RGB与深度信息时存在分布差距或信息丢失问题，且低阶点对点融合策略难以充分挖掘跨模态关联。
AI.method: 设计互注意力模型，利用非局部注意力传播长距离上下文依赖，实现高阶三线性跨模态交互；引入对比推理机制和选择性注意力模块，对低质量深度信息进行动态加权，嵌入双流CNN框架。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法有效性，同时构建了包含高质量标注的新型大规模RGB-D显著性检测数据集。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过跨模态注意力机制和深度信息选择性融合，显著提升了RGB-D显著性检测性能，并为后续研究提供了基准数据集。

title: FILM: A Fast, Interpretable, and Low-rank Metric Learning Approach for Sentence Matching
title_zh: FILM：一种快速、可解释的低秩度量学习方法，用于句子匹配
abstract: Detection of semantic similarity plays a vital role in sentence matching. It requires to learn discriminative representations of natural language. Recently, owing to more and more sophisticated model architecture, impressive progress has been made, along with a time-consuming training process and not-interpretable inference. To alleviate this problem, we explore a metric learning approach, named FILM (Fast, Interpretable, and Low-rank Metric learning) to efficiently find a high discriminative projection of the high-dimensional data. We construct this metric learning problem as a manifold optimization problem and solve it with the Cayley transformation method with the Barzilai-Borwein step size. In experiments, we apply FILM with triplet loss minimization objective to the Quora Challenge and Semantic Textual Similarity (STS) Task. The results demonstrate that the FILM method achieves superior performance as well as the fastest computation speed, which is consistent with our theoretical analysis of time complexity.
summary: Detection of semantic similarity plays a vital role in sentence matching. It requires to learn discriminative representations of natural language. Recently, owing to more and more sophisticated model architecture, impressive progress has been made, along with a time-consuming training process and not-interpretable inference. To alleviate this problem, we explore a metric learning approach, named FILM (Fast, Interpretable, and Low-rank Metric learning) to efficiently find a high discriminative projection of the high-dimensional data. We construct this metric learning problem as a manifold optimization problem and solve it with the Cayley transformation method with the Barzilai-Borwein step size. In experiments, we apply FILM with triplet loss minimization objective to the Quora Challenge and Semantic Textual Similarity (STS) Task. The results demonstrate that the FILM method achieves superior performance as well as the fastest computation speed, which is consistent with our theoretical analysis of time complexity.
abstract_zh: 语义相似度检测在句子匹配中起着至关重要的作用。它需要学习自然语言的区分性表示。最近，由于模型架构越来越复杂，取得了令人印象深刻的进展，同时伴随着耗时的训练过程和不可解释的推理。为了缓解这个问题，我们探索了一种名为 FILM（快速、可解释和低秩度量学习）的度量学习方法，以有效地找到高维数据的高判别性投影。我们将这个度量学习问题构建为流形优化问题，并使用 Barzilai-Borwein 步长的 Cayley 变换方法来求解。在实验中，我们将具有三重态损失最小化目标的 FILM 应用于 Quora 挑战和语义文本相似性 (STS) 任务。结果表明，FILM方法具有优越的性能以及最快的计算速度，这与我们对时间复杂度的理论分析是一致的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FILM方法，通过低秩度量学习提升句子匹配任务的效率与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有模型虽性能优异但训练耗时且不可解释，需开发快速且可解释的度量学习方法。
AI.method: 将度量学习建模为流形优化问题，结合Cayley变换与Barzilai-Borwein步长策略，并在Quora和STS数据集上采用三元组损失进行训练。
AI.result: FILM在保持高性能的同时达到最快计算速度，实验结果与理论时间复杂度分析一致。
AI.conclusion: FILM为句子匹配任务提供了高效、可解释的度量学习解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.conclusion: FILM为句子匹配任务提供了高效、可解释的度量学习解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

result: FILM在保持高性能的同时达到最快计算速度，实验结果与理论时间复杂度分析一致。
conclusion: FILM为句子匹配任务提供了高效、可解释的度量学习解决方案，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: FILM: A Fast, Interpretable, and Low-rank Metric Learning Approach for Sentence Matching FILM：一种快速、可解释的低秩度量学习方法，用于句子匹配 Detection of semantic similarity plays a vital role in sentence matching. It requires to learn discriminative representations of natural language. Recently, owing to more and more sophisticated model architecture, impressive progress has been made, along with a time-consuming training process and not-interpretable inference. To alleviate this problem, we explore a metric learning approach, named FILM (Fast, Interpretable, and Low-rank Metric learning) to efficiently find a high discriminative projection of the high-dimensional data. We construct this metric learning problem as a manifold optimization problem and solve it with the Cayley transformation method with the Barzilai-Borwein step size. In experiments, we apply FILM with triplet loss minimization objective to the Quora Challenge and Semantic Textual Similarity (STS) Task. The results demonstrate that the FILM method achieves superior performance as well as the fastest computation speed, which is consistent with our theoretical analysis of time complexity. 语义相似度检测在句子匹配中起着至关重要的作用。它需要学习自然语言的区分性表示。最近，由于模型架构越来越复杂，取得了令人印象深刻的进展，同时伴随着耗时的训练过程和不可解释的推理。为了缓解这个问题，我们探索了一种名为 FILM（快速、可解释和低秩度量学习）的度量学习方法，以有效地找到高维数据的高判别性投影。我们将这个度量学习问题构建为流形优化问题，并使用 Barzilai-Borwein 步长的 Cayley 变换方法来求解。在实验中，我们将具有三重态损失最小化目标的 FILM 应用于 Quora 挑战和语义文本相似性 (STS) 任务。结果表明，FILM方法具有优越的性能以及最快的计算速度，这与我们对时间复杂度的理论分析是一致的。 本文提出FILM方法，通过低秩度量学习提升句子匹配任务的效率与可解释性。 Xiangru Tang,Alan Aw cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Unsupervised Semantic Aggregation and Deformable Template Matching for Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 半监督学习的无监督语义聚合和可变形模板匹配
abstract: Unlabeled data learning has attracted considerable attention recently. However, it is still elusive to extract the expected high-level semantic feature with mere unsupervised learning. In the meantime, semi-supervised learning (SSL) demonstrates a promising future in leveraging few samples. In this paper, we combine both to propose an Unsupervised Semantic Aggregation and Deformable Template Matching (USADTM) framework for SSL, which strives to improve the classification performance with few labeled data and then reduce the cost in data annotating. Specifically, unsupervised semantic aggregation based on Triplet Mutual Information (T-MI) loss is explored to generate semantic labels for unlabeled data. Then the semantic labels are aligned to the actual class by the supervision of labeled data. Furthermore, a feature pool that stores the labeled samples is dynamically updated to assign proxy labels for unlabeled data, which are used as targets for cross-entropy minimization. Extensive experiments and analysis across four standard semi-supervised learning benchmarks validate that USADTM achieves top performance (e.g., 90.46$\%$ accuracy on CIFAR-10 with 40 labels and 95.20$\%$ accuracy with 250 labels). The code is released at https://github.com/taohan10200/USADTM.
summary: Unlabeled data learning has attracted considerable attention recently. However, it is still elusive to extract the expected high-level semantic feature with mere unsupervised learning. In the meantime, semi-supervised learning (SSL) demonstrates a promising future in leveraging few samples. In this paper, we combine both to propose an Unsupervised Semantic Aggregation and Deformable Template Matching (USADTM) framework for SSL, which strives to improve the classification performance with few labeled data and then reduce the cost in data annotating. Specifically, unsupervised semantic aggregation based on Triplet Mutual Information (T-MI) loss is explored to generate semantic labels for unlabeled data. Then the semantic labels are aligned to the actual class by the supervision of labeled data. Furthermore, a feature pool that stores the labeled samples is dynamically updated to assign proxy labels for unlabeled data, which are used as targets for cross-entropy minimization. Extensive experiments and analysis across four standard semi-supervised learning benchmarks validate that USADTM achieves top performance (e.g., 90.46$\%$ accuracy on CIFAR-10 with 40 labels and 95.20$\%$ accuracy with 250 labels). The code is released at https://github.com/taohan10200/USADTM.
abstract_zh: 无标签数据学习最近引起了相当大的关注。然而，仅通过无监督学习来提取预期的高级语义特征仍然难以实现。与此同时，半监督学习（SSL）在利用少量样本方面展现出了广阔的前景。在本文中，我们将两者结合起来，提出了一种用于 SSL 的无监督语义聚合和可变形模板匹配（USADTM）框架，该框架致力于以少量标记数据提高分类性能，然后降低数据注释成本。具体来说，探索基于三元组互信息（T-MI）损失的无监督语义聚合来为未标记数据生成语义标签。然后通过标记数据的监督将语义标签与实际类别对齐。此外，存储标记样本的特征池会动态更新，以为未标记数据分配代理标签，这些代理标签用作交叉熵最小化的目标。对四个标准半监督学习基准的广泛实验和分析验证了 USADTM 实现了最佳性能（例如，在具有 40 个标签的 CIFAR-10 上的准确度为 90.46$\%$，在具有 250 个标签的情况下准确度为 95.20$\%$）。代码发布于https://github.com/taohan10200/USADTM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合无监督语义聚合与可变形模板匹配的半监督学习框架USADTM，旨在利用少量标注数据提升分类性能并降低标注成本。
AI.motivation: 无监督学习难以提取高层语义特征，而半监督学习（SSL）在少量样本下表现优异。现有方法在利用未标注数据时存在语义对齐不足和标注效率低的问题，需探索更有效的SSL框架。
AI.method: 基于三元组互信息（T-MI）损失进行无监督语义聚合生成伪标签，通过标注数据监督对齐语义标签；动态更新标注样本特征池，为未标注数据分配代理标签用于交叉熵最小化。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10等四个半监督基准测试中，USADTM在40个标注样本下达到90.46%准确率，在250个标注样本下达到95.20%准确率，取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: USADTM通过语义聚合与动态特征池机制有效融合标注与未标注数据，显著提升半监督学习效率，为减少人工标注成本提供了新思路。

title: Explaining Neural Matrix Factorization with Gradient Rollback
title_zh: 用梯度回滚解释神经矩阵分解
comment: 35th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2021. Includes Appendix
comments: 35th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2021. Includes Appendix
abstract: Explaining the predictions of neural black-box models is an important problem, especially when such models are used in applications where user trust is crucial. Estimating the influence of training examples on a learned neural model's behavior allows us to identify training examples most responsible for a given prediction and, therefore, to faithfully explain the output of a black-box model. The most generally applicable existing method is based on influence functions, which scale poorly for larger sample sizes and models. We propose gradient rollback, a general approach for influence estimation, applicable to neural models where each parameter update step during gradient descent touches a smaller number of parameters, even if the overall number of parameters is large. Neural matrix factorization models trained with gradient descent are part of this model class. These models are popular and have found a wide range of applications in industry. Especially knowledge graph embedding methods, which belong to this class, are used extensively. We show that gradient rollback is highly efficient at both training and test time. Moreover, we show theoretically that the difference between gradient rollback's influence approximation and the true influence on a model's behavior is smaller than known bounds on the stability of stochastic gradient descent. This establishes that gradient rollback is robustly estimating example influence. We also conduct experiments which show that gradient rollback provides faithful explanations for knowledge base completion and recommender datasets.
summary: Explaining the predictions of neural black-box models is an important problem, especially when such models are used in applications where user trust is crucial. Estimating the influence of training examples on a learned neural model's behavior allows us to identify training examples most responsible for a given prediction and, therefore, to faithfully explain the output of a black-box model. The most generally applicable existing method is based on influence functions, which scale poorly for larger sample sizes and models. We propose gradient rollback, a general approach for influence estimation, applicable to neural models where each parameter update step during gradient descent touches a smaller number of parameters, even if the overall number of parameters is large. Neural matrix factorization models trained with gradient descent are part of this model class. These models are popular and have found a wide range of applications in industry. Especially knowledge graph embedding methods, which belong to this class, are used extensively. We show that gradient rollback is highly efficient at both training and test time. Moreover, we show theoretically that the difference between gradient rollback's influence approximation and the true influence on a model's behavior is smaller than known bounds on the stability of stochastic gradient descent. This establishes that gradient rollback is robustly estimating example influence. We also conduct experiments which show that gradient rollback provides faithful explanations for knowledge base completion and recommender datasets.
abstract_zh: 解释神经黑盒模型的预测是一个重要问题，特别是当此类模型用于用户信任至关重要的应用程序时。估计训练示例对学习的神经模型行为的影响使我们能够识别对给定预测最有影响的训练示例，从而忠实地解释黑盒模型的输出。最普遍适用的现有方法是基于影响函数，该方法对于较大的样本量和模型来说扩展性较差。我们提出梯度回滚，这是一种影响估计的通用方法，适用于梯度下降期间每个参数更新步骤接触较少数量参数的神经模型，即使参数总数很大。使用梯度下降训练的神经矩阵分解模型是该模型类的一部分。这些模型很受欢迎，并在工业中得到了广泛的应用。特别是属于此类的知识图嵌入方法被广泛使用。我们证明梯度回滚在训练和测试时都是非常高效的。此外，我们从理论上证明，梯度回滚的影响近似与对模型行为的真实影响之间的差异小于随机梯度下降稳定性的已知界限。这证明梯度回滚可以稳健地估计示例影响。我们还进行了实验，表明梯度回滚为知识库补全和推荐数据集提供了忠实的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为梯度回滚（Gradient Rollback）的通用方法，用于高效估计神经矩阵分解模型中训练样本对模型预测的影响，从而解释黑箱模型的输出。
AI.motivation: 现有影响函数方法在大规模模型和数据集上计算效率低下，而神经矩阵分解模型（如知识图谱嵌入）在工业界广泛应用，亟需一种可扩展的解释方法。
AI.method: 梯度回滚通过模拟梯度下降过程中参数更新的逆过程，仅关注每次更新涉及的少量参数，从而高效计算样本影响。该方法适用于参数更新局部性强的神经模型。
AI.result: 理论分析表明梯度回滚的影响估计误差小于随机梯度下降的稳定性界限；实验验证其在知识库补全和推荐数据集上能提供可信的解释。
AI.conclusion: 梯度回滚为神经矩阵分解模型提供了高效且理论保证的解释方法，在需要模型可解释性的应用场景中具有重要价值。

Neural matrix factorization models trained with gradient descent are part of this model class. These models are popular and have found a wide range of applications in industry. Especially knowledge graph embedding methods, which belong to this class, are used extensively. We show that gradient rollback is highly efficient at both training and test time. Moreover, we show theoretically that the difference between gradient rollback's influence approximation and the true influence on a model's behavior is smaller than known bounds on the stability of stochastic gradient descent. This establishes that gradient rollback is robustly estimating example influence. We also conduct experiments which show that gradient rollback provides faithful explanations for knowledge base completion and recommender datasets. 解释神经黑盒模型的预测是一个重要问题，特别是当此类模型用于用户信任至关重要的应用程序时。估计训练示例对学习的神经模型行为的影响使我们能够识别对给定预测最有影响的训练示例，从而忠实地解释黑盒模型的输出。最普遍适用的现有方法是基于影响函数，该方法对于较大的样本量和模型来说扩展性较差。我们提出梯度回滚，这是一种影响估计的通用方法，适用于梯度下降期间每个参数更新步骤接触较少数量参数的神经模型，即使参数总数很大。使用梯度下降训练的神经矩阵分解模型是该模型类的一部分。这些模型很受欢迎，并在工业中得到了广泛的应用。特别是属于此类的知识图嵌入方法被广泛使用。我们证明梯度回滚在训练和测试时都是非常高效的。此外，我们从理论上证明，梯度回滚的影响近似与对模型行为的真实影响之间的差异小于随机梯度下降稳定性的已知界限。这证明梯度回滚可以稳健地估计示例影响。我们还进行了实验，表明梯度回滚为知识库补全和推荐数据集提供了忠实的解释。 本文提出了一种名为梯度回滚（Gradient Rollback）的通用方法，用于高效估计神经矩阵分解模型中训练样本对模型预测的影响，从而解释黑箱模型的输出。 Carolin Lawrence,Timo Sztyler,Mathias Niepert cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Automatic Quantification of Settlement Damage using Deep Learning of Satellite Images
title_zh: 使用卫星图像深度学习自动量化沉降损失
abstract: Humanitarian disasters and political violence cause significant damage to our living space. The reparation cost to homes, infrastructure, and the ecosystem is often difficult to quantify in real-time. Real-time quantification is critical to both informing relief operations, but also planning ahead for rebuilding. Here, we use satellite images before and after major crisis around the world to train a robust baseline Residual Network (ResNet) and a disaster quantification Pyramid Scene Parsing Network (PSPNet). ResNet offers robustness to poor image quality and can identify areas of destruction with high accuracy (92\%), whereas PSPNet offers contextualised quantification of built environment damage with good accuracy (84\%). As there are multiple damage dimensions to consider (e.g. economic loss and fatalities), we fit a multi-linear regression model to quantify the overall damage. To validate our combined system of deep learning and regression modeling, we successfully match our prediction to the ongoing recovery in the 2020 Beirut port explosion. These innovations provide a better quantification of overall disaster magnitude and inform intelligent humanitarian systems of unfolding disasters.
summary: Humanitarian disasters and political violence cause significant damage to our living space. The reparation cost to homes, infrastructure, and the ecosystem is often difficult to quantify in real-time. As there are multiple damage dimensions to consider (e.g. economic loss and fatalities), we fit a multi-linear regression model to quantify the overall damage. To validate our combined system of deep learning and regression modeling, we successfully match our prediction to the ongoing recovery in the 2020 Beirut port explosion. These innovations provide a better quantification of overall disaster magnitude and inform intelligent humanitarian systems of unfolding disasters.
abstract_zh: 人道主义灾难和政治暴力对我们的生存空间造成重大破坏。房屋、基础设施和生态系统的修复成本通常难以实时量化。实时量化对于为救援行动提供信息以及提前规划重建都至关重要。在这里，我们使用世界各地重大危机前后的卫星图像来训练强大的基线残差网络（ResNet）和灾难量化金字塔场景解析网络（PSPNet）。 ResNet 对较差的图像质量具有鲁棒性，并且可以高精度 (92\%) 识别破坏区域，而 PSPNet 可以以较高的精度 (84\%) 对建筑环境损坏进行情境化量化。由于需要考虑多个损害维度（​​例如经济损失和死亡人数），我们采用多元线性回归模型来量化总体损害。为了验证我们的深度学习和回归建模组合系统，我们成功地将我们的预测与 2020 年贝鲁特港口爆炸的持续复苏相匹配。这些创新可以更好地量化总体灾害强度，并为智能人道主义系统提供有关正在发生的灾害的信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度学习方法对卫星图像进行自动量化，评估灾害导致的定居点损害。
AI.motivation: 自然灾害和政治暴力造成的损害难以实时量化，而准确的实时评估对救援和重建规划至关重要。
AI.method: 使用危机前后卫星图像训练ResNet和PSPNet模型，结合多线性回归模型综合量化损害程度。
AI.result: ResNet实现92%的高精度破坏区域识别，PSPNet实现84%的建筑环境损害量化，并成功验证2020年贝鲁特港口爆炸事件的恢复情况。
AI.conclusion: 该系统提升了灾害规模的量化能力，为智能人道主义系统提供实时灾害评估支持。
