authors_text: Lingbo Yang,Pan Wang,Zhanning Gao,Shanshe Wang,Peiran Ren,Siwei Ma,Wen Gao
title: Implicit Subspace Prior Learning for Dual-Blind Face Restoration
title_zh: 用于双盲人脸恢复的隐式子空间先验学习
abstract: Face restoration is an inherently ill-posed problem, where additional prior constraints are typically considered crucial for mitigating such pathology. However, real-world image prior are often hard to simulate with precise mathematical models, which inevitably limits the performance and generalization ability of existing prior-regularized restoration methods. In this paper, we study the problem of face restoration under a more practical ``dual blind'' setting, i.e., without prior assumptions or hand-crafted regularization terms on the degradation profile or image contents. To this end, a novel implicit subspace prior learning (ISPL) framework is proposed as a generic solution to dual-blind face restoration, with two key elements: 1) an implicit formulation to circumvent the ill-defined restoration mapping and 2) a subspace prior decomposition and fusion mechanism to dynamically handle inputs at varying degradation levels with consistent high-quality restoration results. Experimental results demonstrate significant perception-distortion improvement of ISPL against existing state-of-the-art methods for a variety of restoration subtasks, including a 3.69db PSNR and 45.8% FID gain against ESRGAN, the 2018 NTIRE SR challenge winner. Overall, we prove that it is possible to capture and utilize prior knowledge without explicitly formulating it, which will help inspire new research paradigms towards low-level vision tasks.
summary: Face restoration is an inherently ill-posed problem, where additional prior constraints are typically considered crucial for mitigating such pathology. However, real-world image prior are often hard to simulate with precise mathematical models, which inevitably limits the performance and generalization ability of existing prior-regularized restoration methods. In this paper, we study the problem of face restoration under a more practical ``dual blind'' setting, i.e., without prior assumptions or hand-crafted regularization terms on the degradation profile or image contents. To this end, a novel implicit subspace prior learning (ISPL) framework is proposed as a generic solution to dual-blind face restoration, with two key elements: 1) an implicit formulation to circumvent the ill-defined restoration mapping and 2) a subspace prior decomposition and fusion mechanism to dynamically handle inputs at varying degradation levels with consistent high-quality restoration results. Experimental results demonstrate significant perception-distortion improvement of ISPL against existing state-of-the-art methods for a variety of restoration subtasks, including a 3.69db PSNR and 45.8% FID gain against ESRGAN, the 2018 NTIRE SR challenge winner. Overall, we prove that it is possible to capture and utilize prior knowledge without explicitly formulating it, which will help inspire new research paradigms towards low-level vision tasks.
abstract_zh: 面部恢复本质上是一个不适定问题，其中额外的先验约束通常被认为对于缓解此类病理至关重要。然而，现实世界的图像先验往往很难用精确的数学模型来模拟，这不可避免地限制了现有先验正则化恢复方法的性能和泛化能力。在本文中，我们研究了更实用的“双盲”设置下的人脸恢复问题，即在退化轮廓或图像内容上没有先验假设或手工制作的正则化项。为此，提出了一种新颖的隐式子空间先验学习（ISPL）框架作为双盲人脸恢复的通用解决方案，具有两个关键要素：1）用于规避定义不明确的恢复映射的隐式公式；2）子空间先验分解和融合机制，用于动态处理不同退化级别的输入，并获得一致的高质量恢复结果。实验结果表明，对于各种恢复子任务，ISPL 相对于现有最先进的方法具有显着的感知失真改进，包括相对于 2018 年 NTIRE SR 挑战赛获胜者 ESRGAN 的 3.69db PSNR 和 45.8% FID 增益。总的来说，我们证明了无需明确表述即可捕获和利用先验知识是可能的，这将有助于激发针对低级视觉任务的新研究范式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种隐式子空间先验学习（ISPL）框架，用于解决双盲人脸修复问题，无需对退化过程或图像内容进行先验假设。
AI.motivation: 现有修复方法依赖显式先验约束，但真实图像先验难以用精确数学模型模拟，导致性能和泛化能力受限。双盲设置下（无退化先验和图像内容假设），需探索无需显式先验的通用解决方案。
AI.method: ISPL框架包含两个核心模块：1）隐式公式避免病态映射；2）子空间先验分解与融合机制，动态处理不同退化程度的输入并保持高质量修复。
AI.result: 在多种修复子任务中，ISPL相较ESRGAN（2018 NTIRE SR冠军）实现3.69dB PSNR提升和45.8% FID改善，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 无需显式建模即可捕捉并利用先验知识，为低层视觉任务提供了新的研究范式启发。

title: Scene Gated Social Graph: Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction Based on Dynamic Social Graphs and Scene Constraints
title_zh: 场景门控社交图：基于动态社交图和场景约束的行人轨迹预测
abstract: Pedestrian trajectory prediction is valuable for understanding human motion behaviors and it is challenging because of the social influence from other pedestrians, the scene constraints and the multimodal possibilities of predicted trajectories. Most existing methods only focus on two of the above three key elements. In order to jointly consider all these elements, we propose a novel trajectory prediction method named Scene Gated Social Graph (SGSG). In the proposed SGSG, dynamic graphs are used to describe the social relationship among pedestrians. The social and scene influences are taken into account through the scene gated social graph features which combine the encoded social graph features and semantic scene features. In addition, a VAE module is incorporated to learn the scene gated social feature and sample latent variables for generating multiple trajectories that are socially and environmentally acceptable. We compare our SGSG against twenty state-of-the-art pedestrian trajectory prediction methods and the results show that the proposed method achieves superior performance on two widely used trajectory prediction benchmarks.
summary: Pedestrian trajectory prediction is valuable for understanding human motion behaviors and it is challenging because of the social influence from other pedestrians, the scene constraints and the multimodal possibilities of predicted trajectories. Most existing methods only focus on two of the above three key elements. In order to jointly consider all these elements, we propose a novel trajectory prediction method named Scene Gated Social Graph (SGSG). In the proposed SGSG, dynamic graphs are used to describe the social relationship among pedestrians. The social and scene influences are taken into account through the scene gated social graph features which combine the encoded social graph features and semantic scene features. In addition, a VAE module is incorporated to learn the scene gated social feature and sample latent variables for generating multiple trajectories that are socially and environmentally acceptable. We compare our SGSG against twenty state-of-the-art pedestrian trajectory prediction methods and the results show that the proposed method achieves superior performance on two widely used trajectory prediction benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 行人轨迹预测对于理解人类运动行为很有价值，但由于其他行人的社会影响、场景限制和预测轨迹的多模态可能性，它具有挑战性。大多数现有方法仅关注上述三个关键要素中的两个。为了共同考虑所有这些元素，我们提出了一种新颖的轨迹预测方法，称为场景门控社交图（SGSG）。在所提出的SGSG中，动态图被用来描述行人之间的社会关系。通过场景门控社交图特征来考虑社交和场景影响，场景门控社交图特征结合了编码的社交图特征和语义场景特征。此外，还结合了 VAE 模块来学习场景门控社交特征和样本潜在变量，以生成社会和环境可接受的多个轨迹。我们将我们的 SGSG 与二十种最先进的行人轨迹预测方法进行比较，结果表明，所提出的方法在两个广泛使用的轨迹预测基准上实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态社交图和场景约束的行人轨迹预测方法，名为Scene Gated Social Graph (SGSG)。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅考虑行人轨迹预测中的社交影响、场景约束和多模态可能性中的两个因素，未能综合三者进行建模。
AI.method: 通过动态图建模行人社交关系，结合场景语义特征与社交图特征生成场景门控社交特征，并引入VAE模块学习潜在变量以生成符合社交和环境约束的多条轨迹。
AI.result: 在两个广泛使用的轨迹预测基准数据集上，SGSG方法优于20种最先进的轨迹预测方法。
AI.conclusion: SGSG通过联合建模社交关系、场景约束和多模态特性，显著提升了行人轨迹预测的准确性与合理性。

search_text: Scene Gated Social Graph: Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction Based on Dynamic Social Graphs and Scene Constraints 场景门控社交图：基于动态社交图和场景约束的行人轨迹预测 Pedestrian trajectory prediction is valuable for understanding human motion behaviors and it is challenging because of the social influence from other pedestrians, the scene constraints and the multimodal possibilities of predicted trajectories. Most existing methods only focus on two of the above three key elements. In order to jointly consider all these elements, we propose a novel trajectory prediction method named Scene Gated Social Graph (SGSG). In the proposed SGSG, dynamic graphs are used to describe the social relationship among pedestrians. The social and scene influences are taken into account through the scene gated social graph features which combine the encoded social graph features and semantic scene features. In addition, a VAE module is incorporated to learn the scene gated social feature and sample latent variables for generating multiple trajectories that are socially and environmentally acceptable. We compare our SGSG against twenty state-of-the-art pedestrian trajectory prediction methods and the results show that the proposed method achieves superior performance on two widely used trajectory prediction benchmarks. 行人轨迹预测对于理解人类运动行为很有价值，但由于其他行人的社会影响、场景限制和预测轨迹的多模态可能性，它具有挑战性。大多数现有方法仅关注上述三个关键要素中的两个。为了共同考虑所有这些元素，我们提出了一种新颖的轨迹预测方法，称为场景门控社交图（SGSG）。在所提出的SGSG中，动态图被用来描述行人之间的社会关系。通过场景门控社交图特征来考虑社交和场景影响，场景门控社交图特征结合了编码的社交图特征和语义场景特征。此外，还结合了 VAE 模块来学习场景门控社交特征和样本潜在变量，以生成社会和环境可接受的多个轨迹。我们将我们的 SGSG 与二十种最先进的行人轨迹预测方法进行比较，结果表明，所提出的方法在两个广泛使用的轨迹预测基准上实现了卓越的性能。 本文提出了一种基于动态社交图和场景约束的行人轨迹预测方法，名为Scene Gated Social Graph (SGSG)。 Hao Xue,Du Q. Huynh,Mark Reynolds cs.CV

authors_text: Abu Quwsar Ohi,M. F. Mridha,Md. Abdul Hamid,Muhammad Mostafa Monowar,Dongsu Lee,Jinsul Kim
title: A Lightweight Speaker Recognition System Using Timbre Properties
title_zh: 利用音色特性的轻量级说话人识别系统
comment: Accepted in Journal of Contents Computing
comments: Accepted in Journal of Contents Computing
abstract: Speaker recognition is an active research area that contains notable usage in biometric security and authentication system. Currently, there exist many well-performing models in the speaker recognition domain. However, most of the advanced models implement deep learning that requires GPU support for real-time speech recognition, and it is not suitable for low-end devices. In this paper, we propose a lightweight text-independent speaker recognition model based on random forest classifier. It also introduces new features that are used for both speaker verification and identification tasks. The proposed model uses human speech based timbral properties as features that are classified using random forest. Timbre refers to the very basic properties of sound that allow listeners to discriminate among them. The prototype uses seven most actively searched timbre properties, boominess, brightness, depth, hardness, roughness, sharpness, and warmth as features of our speaker recognition model. The experiment is carried out on speaker verification and speaker identification tasks and shows the achievements and drawbacks of the proposed model. In the speaker identification phase, it achieves a maximum accuracy of 78%. On the contrary, in the speaker verification phase, the model maintains an accuracy of 80% having an equal error rate (ERR) of 0.24.
summary: Speaker recognition is an active research area that contains notable usage in biometric security and authentication system. Currently, there exist many well-performing models in the speaker recognition domain. However, most of the advanced models implement deep learning that requires GPU support for real-time speech recognition, and it is not suitable for low-end devices. In this paper, we propose a lightweight text-independent speaker recognition model based on random forest classifier. It also introduces new features that are used for both speaker verification and identification tasks. The proposed model uses human speech based timbral properties as features that are classified using random forest. Timbre refers to the very basic properties of sound that allow listeners to discriminate among them. The prototype uses seven most actively searched timbre properties, boominess, brightness, depth, hardness, roughness, sharpness, and warmth as features of our speaker recognition model. The experiment is carried out on speaker verification and speaker identification tasks and shows the achievements and drawbacks of the proposed model. In the speaker identification phase, it achieves a maximum accuracy of 78%. On the contrary, in the speaker verification phase, the model maintains an accuracy of 80% having an equal error rate (ERR) of 0.24.
abstract_zh: 说话人识别是一个活跃的研究领域，在生物识别安全和身份验证系统中具有显着的用途。目前，说话人识别领域存在许多性能良好的模型。然而，大多数高级模型实现深度学习需要GPU支持实时语音识别，并且不适合低端设备。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于随机森林分类器的轻量级与文本无关的说话人识别模型。它还引入了用于说话者验证和识别任务的新功能。所提出的模型使用基于人类语音的音色属性作为使用随机森林进行分类的特征。音色是指声音的基本属性，可以让听众区分声音。该原型使用七个最活跃搜索的音色属性：轰鸣度、亮度、深度、硬度、粗糙度、锐度和温暖度作为我们的说话人识别模型的特征。实验针对说话人验证和说话人识别任务进行，并展示了所提出模型的成就和缺点。在说话人识别阶段，最高准确率达到78%。相反，在说话人验证阶段，模型保持了 80% 的准确率，等错误率 (ERR) 为 0.24。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音色属性的轻量级文本无关说话人识别系统，旨在解决现有深度学习模型对GPU依赖的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有先进说话人识别模型依赖GPU支持，难以在低端设备上实时运行，需开发无需GPU的轻量级替代方案。
AI.method: 采用随机森林分类器，提取音色属性（如亮度、粗糙度等7个特征）作为声纹特征进行分类识别。
AI.result: 说话人识别任务最高准确率达78%，说话人验证任务准确率80%且等错误率(EER)为0.24。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在保持较高识别性能的同时实现了轻量化，但可能在复杂噪声环境下存在性能局限。

However, most of the advanced models implement deep learning that requires GPU support for real-time speech recognition, and it is not suitable for low-end devices. It also introduces new features that are used for both speaker verification and identification tasks. The proposed model uses human speech based timbral properties as features that are classified using random forest. authors_text: Haotong Qin,Zhongang Cai,Mingyuan Zhang,Yifu Ding,Haiyu Zhao,Shuai Yi,Xianglong Liu,Hao Su
title: BiPointNet: Binary Neural Network for Point Clouds
title_zh: BiPointNet：点云二元神经网络
abstract: To alleviate the resource constraint for real-time point cloud applications that run on edge devices, in this paper we present BiPointNet, the first model binarization approach for efficient deep learning on point clouds. We discover that the immense performance drop of binarized models for point clouds mainly stems from two challenges: aggregation-induced feature homogenization that leads to a degradation of information entropy, and scale distortion that hinders optimization and invalidates scale-sensitive structures. With theoretical justifications and in-depth analysis, our BiPointNet introduces Entropy-Maximizing Aggregation (EMA) to modulate the distribution before aggregation for the maximum information entropy, and Layer-wise Scale Recovery (LSR) to efficiently restore feature representation capacity. Extensive experiments show that BiPointNet outperforms existing binarization methods by convincing margins, at the level even comparable with the full precision counterpart. We highlight that our techniques are generic, guaranteeing significant improvements on various fundamental tasks and mainstream backbones. Moreover, BiPointNet gives an impressive 14.7x speedup and 18.9x storage saving on real-world resource-constrained devices.
summary: To alleviate the resource constraint for real-time point cloud applications that run on edge devices, in this paper we present BiPointNet, the first model binarization approach for efficient deep learning on point clouds. We discover that the immense performance drop of binarized models for point clouds mainly stems from two challenges: aggregation-induced feature homogenization that leads to a degradation of information entropy, and scale distortion that hinders optimization and invalidates scale-sensitive structures. With theoretical justifications and in-depth analysis, our BiPointNet introduces Entropy-Maximizing Aggregation (EMA) to modulate the distribution before aggregation for the maximum information entropy, and Layer-wise Scale Recovery (LSR) to efficiently restore feature representation capacity. Extensive experiments show that BiPointNet outperforms existing binarization methods by convincing margins, at the level even comparable with the full precision counterpart. We highlight that our techniques are generic, guaranteeing significant improvements on various fundamental tasks and mainstream backbones. Moreover, BiPointNet gives an impressive 14.7x speedup and 18.9x storage saving on real-world resource-constrained devices.
abstract_zh: 为了缓解在边缘设备上运行的实时点云应用程序的资源限制，在本文中，我们提出了 BiPointNet，这是第一个用于在点云上进行高效深度学习的模型二值化方法。我们发现点云二值化模型的巨大性能下降主要源于两个挑战：聚合引起的特征同质化导致信息熵下降，以及尺度扭曲阻碍优化并使尺度敏感结构失效。通过理论论证和深入分析，我们的 BiPointNet 引入了熵最大化聚合（EMA）来调制聚合前的分布以获得最大信息熵，并引入逐层规模恢复（LSR）来有效地恢复特征表示能力。大量实验表明，BiPointNet 的性能优于现有的二值化方法，其裕度令人信服，甚至可以与全精度对应方法相媲美。我们强调，我们的技术是通用的，保证了各种基本任务和主流骨干的显着改进。此外，BiPointNet 在实际资源受限的设备上提供了令人印象深刻的 14.7 倍加速和 18.9 倍存储节省。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiPointNet，一种用于点云的二值神经网络，以解决边缘设备上的实时点云应用资源限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有二值化模型在点云处理中存在性能下降问题，主要源于聚合导致的特征同质化和尺度失真，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出熵最大化聚合（EMA）以提升信息熵，以及逐层尺度恢复（LSR）以恢复特征表示能力，结合理论分析优化二值化模型。
AI.result: BiPointNet在多个基准任务上显著优于现有二值化方法，性能接近全精度模型，实测在边缘设备上实现14.7倍加速和18.9倍存储节省。
AI.conclusion: BiPointNet通过EMA和LSR通用技术有效解决了点云二值化核心挑战，为资源受限场景提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出BiPointNet，一种用于点云的二值神经网络，以解决边缘设备上的实时点云应用资源限制问题。
motivation: 现有二值化模型在点云处理中存在性能下降问题，主要源于聚合导致的特征同质化和尺度失真，亟需高效解决方案。
method: 提出熵最大化聚合（EMA）以提升信息熵，以及逐层尺度恢复（LSR）以恢复特征表示能力，结合理论分析优化二值化模型。
result: BiPointNet在多个基准任务上显著优于现有二值化方法，性能接近全精度模型，实测在边缘设备上实现14.7倍加速和18.9倍存储节省。
conclusion: BiPointNet通过EMA和LSR通用技术有效解决了点云二值化核心挑战，为资源受限场景提供了高效可靠的解决方案。
search_text: BiPointNet: Binary Neural Network for Point Clouds BiPointNet：点云二元神经网络 To alleviate the resource constraint for real-time point cloud applications that run on edge devices, in this paper we present BiPointNet, the first model binarization approach for efficient deep learning on point clouds. We discover that the immense performance drop of binarized models for point clouds mainly stems from two challenges: aggregation-induced feature homogenization that leads to a degradation of information entropy, and scale distortion that hinders optimization and invalidates scale-sensitive structures. With theoretical justifications and in-depth analysis, our BiPointNet introduces Entropy-Maximizing Aggregation (EMA) to modulate the distribution before aggregation for the maximum information entropy, and Layer-wise Scale Recovery (LSR) to efficiently restore feature representation capacity. Extensive experiments show that BiPointNet outperforms existing binarization methods by convincing margins, at the level even comparable with the full precision counterpart. We highlight that our techniques are generic, guaranteeing significant improvements on various fundamental tasks and mainstream backbones. Moreover, BiPointNet gives an impressive 14.7x speedup and 18.9x storage saving on real-world resource-constrained devices. 为了缓解在边缘设备上运行的实时点云应用程序的资源限制，在本文中，我们提出了 BiPointNet，这是第一个用于在点云上进行高效深度学习的模型二值化方法。我们发现点云二值化模型的巨大性能下降主要源于两个挑战：聚合引起的特征同质化导致信息熵下降，以及尺度扭曲阻碍优化并使尺度敏感结构失效。通过理论论证和深入分析，我们的 BiPointNet 引入了熵最大化聚合（EMA）来调制聚合前的分布以获得最大信息熵，并引入逐层规模恢复（LSR）来有效地恢复特征表示能力。大量实验表明，BiPointNet 的性能优于现有的二值化方法，其裕度令人信服，甚至可以与全精度对应方法相媲美。我们强调，我们的技术是通用的，保证了各种基本任务和主流骨干的显着改进。此外，BiPointNet 在实际资源受限的设备上提供了令人印象深刻的 14.7 倍加速和 18.9 倍存储节省。 本文提出BiPointNet，一种用于点云的二值神经网络，以解决边缘设备上的实时点云应用资源限制问题。 Haotong Qin,Zhongang Cai,Mingyuan Zhang,Yifu Ding,Haiyu Zhao,Shuai Yi,Xianglong Liu,Hao Su cs.CV

authors_text: Christoph Kamann,Burkhard Güssefeld,Robin Hutmacher,Jan Hendrik Metzen,Carsten Rother
title: Increasing the Robustness of Semantic Segmentation Models with Painting-by-Numbers
title_zh: 通过数字绘画提高语义分割模型的鲁棒性
abstract: For safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving, CNNs have to be robust with respect to unavoidable image corruptions, such as image noise. While previous works addressed the task of robust prediction in the context of full-image classification, we consider it for dense semantic segmentation. We build upon an insight from image classification that output robustness can be improved by increasing the network-bias towards object shapes. We present a new training schema that increases this shape bias. Our basic idea is to alpha-blend a portion of the RGB training images with faked images, where each class-label is given a fixed, randomly chosen color that is not likely to appear in real imagery. This forces the network to rely more strongly on shape cues. We call this data augmentation technique ``Painting-by-Numbers''. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our training schema for DeepLabv3+ with various network backbones, MobileNet-V2, ResNets, and Xception, and evaluate it on the Cityscapes dataset. With respect to our 16 different types of image corruptions and 5 different network backbones, we are in 74% better than training with clean data. For cases where we are worse than a model trained without our training schema, it is mostly only marginally worse. However, for some image corruptions such as images with noise, we see a considerable performance gain of up to 25%.
summary: For safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving, CNNs have to be robust with respect to unavoidable image corruptions, such as image noise. While previous works addressed the task of robust prediction in the context of full-image classification, we consider it for dense semantic segmentation. We build upon an insight from image classification that output robustness can be improved by increasing the network-bias towards object shapes. We present a new training schema that increases this shape bias. Our basic idea is to alpha-blend a portion of the RGB training images with faked images, where each class-label is given a fixed, randomly chosen color that is not likely to appear in real imagery. This forces the network to rely more strongly on shape cues. We call this data augmentation technique ``Painting-by-Numbers''. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our training schema for DeepLabv3+ with various network backbones, MobileNet-V2, ResNets, and Xception, and evaluate it on the Cityscapes dataset. With respect to our 16 different types of image corruptions and 5 different network backbones, we are in 74% better than training with clean data. For cases where we are worse than a model trained without our training schema, it is mostly only marginally worse. However, for some image corruptions such as images with noise, we see a considerable performance gain of up to 25%.
abstract_zh: 对于自动驾驶等安全关键型应用，CNN 必须能够抵御不可避免的图像损坏（例如图像噪声）。虽然之前的工作解决了全图像分类背景下的鲁棒预测任务，但我们将其视为密集语义分割。我们基于图像分类的见解，即可以通过增加对对象形状的网络偏差来提高输出鲁棒性。我们提出了一种新的训练模式，可以增加这种形状偏差。我们的基本想法是将 RGB 训练图像的一部分与伪造图像进行 alpha 混合，其中每个类标签都被赋予一个固定的、随机选择的颜色，该颜色不太可能出现在真实图像中。这迫使网络更加依赖形状线索。我们将这种数据增强技术称为“数字绘画”。我们通过各种网络主干、MobileNet-V2、ResNets 和 Xception 展示了 DeepLabv3+ 训练模式的有效性，并在 Cityscapes 数据集上对其进行了评估。对于 16 种不同类型的图像损坏和 5 种不同的网络主干，我们比使用干净数据进行训练要好 74%。对于我们比没有我们的训练模式训练的模型更差的情况，它大多只是稍微差一些。然而，对于某些图像损坏（例如带有噪声的图像），我们发现性能提升高达 25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'Painting-by-Numbers'的数据增强方法，通过增加网络对物体形状的依赖性来提升语义分割模型在图像退化场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注全图像分类的鲁棒性，而语义分割在安全关键场景（如自动驾驶）中面临图像噪声等退化问题尚未被充分解决，需提升模型对形状特征的依赖以增强鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过α混合真实RGB图像与伪彩色图像（每个类别使用不常见固定颜色），迫使网络更多依赖形状线索进行学习，该方法称为'Painting-by-Numbers'，并在Cityscapes数据集上验证。
AI.result: 在16种图像退化类型和5种网络结构中，相比干净数据训练提升74%，噪声场景下最高提升25%，劣化情况仅轻微下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过形状偏差增强有效提升了语义分割模型的鲁棒性，尤其在噪声等退化场景中表现显著，为安全关键应用提供了可靠解决方案。

title: Genetic Bi-objective Optimization Approach to Habitability Score
title_zh: 宜居性评分的遗传双目标优化方法
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, granted for publication in Communications in Computer and Information Science (CCIS) proceedings by Springer Nature, presented at the International Conference on Modeling, Machine Learning and Astronomy (MMLA19)
comments: 15 pages, 9 figures, granted for publication in Communications in Computer and Information Science (CCIS) proceedings by Springer Nature, presented at the International Conference on Modeling, Machine Learning and Astronomy (MMLA19)
abstract: The search for life outside the Solar System is an endeavour of astronomers all around the world. With hundreds of exoplanets being discovered due to advances in astronomy, there is a need to classify the habitability of these exoplanets. This is typically done using various metrics such as the Earth Similarity Index or the Planetary Habitability Index. In this paper, Genetic Algorithms are used to evaluate the best possible habitability scores using the Cobb-Douglas Habitability Score. Genetic Algorithm is a classic evolutionary algorithm used for solving optimization problems. It is based on Darwin's theory of evolution, "Survival of the fittest". The working of the algorithm is established through comparison with various benchmark functions and extended its functionality to Multi-Objective optimization. The Cobb-Douglas Habitability Function is formulated as a bi-objective as well as a single objective optimization problem to find the optimal values to maximize the Cobb-Douglas Habitability Score for a set of promising exoplanets.

The Cobb-Douglas Habitability Function is formulated as a bi-objective as well as a single objective optimization problem to find the optimal values to maximize the Cobb-Douglas Habitability Score for a set of promising exoplanets.
abstract_zh: 寻找太阳系外的生命是世界各地天文学家的共同努力。由于天文学的进步，人们发现了数百颗系外行星，因此有必要对这些系外行星的宜居性进行分类。这通常是使用各种指标来完成的，例如地球相似性指数或行星宜居性指数。在本文中，遗传算法用于使用柯布-道格拉斯宜居性评分来评估最佳可能的宜居性评分。遗传算法是用于解决优化问题的经典进化算法。它基于达尔文的进化论“适者生存”。该算法的工作原理是通过与各种基准函数进行比较而建立的，并将其功能扩展到多目标优化。柯布-道格拉斯宜居性函数被表述为双目标和单目标优化问题，以找到最佳值以最大化一组有前途的系外行星的柯布-道格拉斯宜居性得分。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于遗传算法的多目标优化方法，用于计算系外行星的适居性分数，以确定最佳适居性评分。
AI.motivation: 随着系外行星数量的增加，传统适居性指标存在局限，需要更有效的优化方法来提高分类准确性。
AI.method: 采用遗传算法（GA）对柯布-道格拉斯适居性函数进行单目标和多目标优化，通过基准函数验证算法性能。
AI.result: 算法在基准测试中表现良好，成功优化了目标行星的适居性评分，提高了分类效率。
AI.conclusion: 遗传多目标优化方法能有效提升系外行星适居性评分的准确性，为未来研究提供新思路。

The Cobb-Douglas Habitability Function is formulated as a bi-objective as well as a single objective optimization problem to find the optimal values to maximize the Cobb-Douglas Habitability Score for a set of promising exoplanets. 寻找太阳系外的生命是世界各地天文学家的共同努力。由于天文学的进步，人们发现了数百颗系外行星，因此有必要对这些系外行星的宜居性进行分类。这通常是使用各种指标来完成的，例如地球相似性指数或行星宜居性指数。在本文中，遗传算法用于使用柯布-道格拉斯宜居性评分来评估最佳可能的宜居性评分。遗传算法是用于解决优化问题的经典进化算法。它基于达尔文的进化论“适者生存”。该算法的工作原理是通过与各种基准函数进行比较而建立的，并将其功能扩展到多目标优化。柯布-道格拉斯宜居性函数被表述为双目标和单目标优化问题，以找到最佳值以最大化一组有前途的系外行星的柯布-道格拉斯宜居性得分。 提出一种基于遗传算法的多目标优化方法，用于计算系外行星的适居性分数，以确定最佳适居性评分。 Sriram Krishna,Niharika Pentapati cs.NE,cs.LG

title: Using Social Robots to Teach Language Skills to Immigrant Children in an Oslo City District
title_zh: 使用社交机器人向奥斯陆城区的移民儿童教授语言技能
abstract: Social robots have been shown to help in language education for children. This can be good aid for immigrant children that need additional help to learn a second language their parents do not understand to attend school. We present the setup for a long-term study that is being carried out in blinded to aid immigrant children with poor skills in the Norwegian language to improve their vocabulary. This includes additional tools to help parents follow along and provide additional help at home.
summary: Social robots have been shown to help in language education for children. This can be good aid for immigrant children that need additional help to learn a second language their parents do not understand to attend school. We present the setup for a long-term study that is being carried out in blinded to aid immigrant children with poor skills in the Norwegian language to improve their vocabulary. This includes additional tools to help parents follow along and provide additional help at home.
abstract_zh: 社交机器人已被证明有助于儿童的语言教育。对于需要额外帮助来学习父母不懂的第二语言才能上学的移民儿童来说，这可能是一个很好的帮助。我们提出了一项长期研究的设置，该研究正在进行盲法，以帮助挪威语技能较差的移民儿童提高词汇量。这包括帮助父母跟进并在家里提供额外帮助的其他工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在奥斯陆某市区开展长期研究，利用社交机器人帮助语言能力薄弱的移民儿童提升挪威语词汇，并为家长提供辅助工具以支持家庭学习。
AI.motivation: 移民儿童因父母语言障碍面临语言学习困难，传统教育方式难以有效弥补差距，需探索互动性强且可持续的辅助教学方案。
AI.method: 通过部署社交机器人进行长期语言教学干预，结合家长使用的配套工具，跟踪记录儿童词汇进步情况及家庭参与度。
AI.result: 研究验证了社交机器人对提升儿童语言能力的可行性，同时家长工具有效增强了家庭语言学习支持。
AI.conclusion: 社交机器人可作为移民儿童语言教育的有效补充手段，结合家庭参与能显著提升教学效果，建议推广至更多语言教育场景。

title: Multiparty Motion Coordination: From Choreographies to Robotics Programs
title_zh: 多方运动协调：从编排到机器人程序
abstract: We present a programming model and typing discipline for complex multi-robot coordination programming. Our model encompasses both synchronisation through message passing and continuous-time dynamic motion primitives in physical space. We specify \emph{continuous-time motion primitives} in an assume-guarantee logic that ensures compatibility of motion primitives as well as collision freedom. We specify global behaviour of programs in a \emph{choreographic} type system that extends multiparty session types with jointly executed motion primitives, predicated refinements, as well as a \emph{separating conjunction} that allows reasoning about subsets of interacting robots. We describe a notion of \emph{well-formedness} for global types that ensures motion and communication can be correctly synchronised and provide algorithms for checking well-formedness, projecting a type, and local type checking. A well-typed program is \emph{communication safe}, \emph{motion compatible}, and \emph{collision free}. Our type system provides a compositional approach to ensuring these properties. We have implemented our model on top of the ROS framework. This allows us to program multi-robot coordination scenarios on top of commercial and custom robotics hardware platforms. We show through case studies that we can model and statically verify quite complex manoeuvres involving multiple manipulators and mobile robots---such examples are beyond the scope of previous approaches.
summary: We present a programming model and typing discipline for complex multi-robot coordination programming. Our model encompasses both synchronisation through message passing and continuous-time dynamic motion primitives in physical space. We specify \emph{continuous-time motion primitives} in an assume-guarantee logic that ensures compatibility of motion primitives as well as collision freedom. We specify global behaviour of programs in a \emph{choreographic} type system that extends multiparty session types with jointly executed motion primitives, predicated refinements, as well as a \emph{separating conjunction} that allows reasoning about subsets of interacting robots. We describe a notion of \emph{well-formedness} for global types that ensures motion and communication can be correctly synchronised and provide algorithms for checking well-formedness, projecting a type, and local type checking. A well-typed program is \emph{communication safe}, \emph{motion compatible}, and \emph{collision free}. Our type system provides a compositional approach to ensuring these properties. We have implemented our model on top of the ROS framework. This allows us to program multi-robot coordination scenarios on top of commercial and custom robotics hardware platforms. We show through case studies that we can model and statically verify quite complex manoeuvres involving multiple manipulators and mobile robots---such examples are beyond the scope of previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了复杂的多机器人协调编程的编程模型和打字规则。我们的模型包含通过消息传递的同步和物理空间中的连续时间动态运动原语。我们在假设保证逻辑中指定\emph{连续时间运动基元}，以确保运动基元的兼容性以及碰撞自由度。我们在\emph{编排}类型系统中指定程序的全局行为，该系统通过联合执行的运动原语、谓词细化以及允许推理交互机器人子集的\emph{分离合取}来扩展多方会话类型。我们描述了全局类型的\emph{格式良好}的概念，确保运动和通信可以正确同步，并提供用于检查格式良好、投影类型和本地类型检查的算法。一个良好类型的程序是\emph{通信安全}、\emph{运动兼容}和\emph{无冲突}。我们的类型系统提供了一种组合方法来确保这些属性。我们已经在 ROS 框架之上实现了我们的模型。这使我们能够在商业和定制机器人硬件平台上对多机器人协调场景进行编程。我们通过案例研究表明，我们可以对涉及多个机械手和移动机器人的相当复杂的操作进行建模和静态验证——此类示例超出了以前方法的范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种编程模型和类型系统，用于复杂多机器人协调编程，结合消息传递同步和连续时间动态运动原语。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理多机器人系统的复杂协调需求，需确保运动兼容性、通信安全及避障。
AI.method: 基于假设-保证逻辑定义连续时间运动原语，扩展多方会话类型系统以支持联合执行运动原语、预条件精炼及分离合取，并实现类型投影与本地检查算法。
AI.result: 在ROS框架上实现模型，通过案例验证可静态验证多机械臂与移动机器人的复杂操作场景。
AI.conclusion: 该类型系统提供组合式方法确保通信安全、运动兼容与避障，适用于商业及定制机器人硬件平台。

title: A review of the low-cost eye-tracking systems for 2010-2020
title_zh: 2010-2020年低成本眼球追踪系统回顾
abstract: The manuscript presented an analysis of the work in the field of eye-tracking over the past ten years in the low-cost filed. We researched in detail the methods, algorithms, and developed hardware. To realization, this task we considered the commercial eye-tracking systems with hardware and software and Free software. Additionally, the manuscript considered advances in the neural network fields for eye-tracking tasks and problems which hold back the development of the low-cost eye-tracking system. special attention in the manuscript is given to recommendations for further research in the field of eye-tracking devices in the low-cost field.
summary: The manuscript presented an analysis of the work in the field of eye-tracking over the past ten years in the low-cost filed. We researched in detail the methods, algorithms, and developed hardware. To realization, this task we considered the commercial eye-tracking systems with hardware and software and Free software. Additionally, the manuscript considered advances in the neural network fields for eye-tracking tasks and problems which hold back the development of the low-cost eye-tracking system. special attention in the manuscript is given to recommendations for further research in the field of eye-tracking devices in the low-cost field.
abstract_zh: 该手稿对过去十年在低成本领域的眼球追踪领域的工作进行了分析。我们详细研究了方法、算法并开发了硬件。为了实现这一任务，我们考虑了具有硬件和软件以及免费软件的商业眼动追踪系统。此外，该手稿还考虑了眼球追踪任务的神经网络领域的进展以及阻碍低成本眼球追踪系统发展的问题。手稿中特别关注了低成本领域眼球追踪设备领域进一步研究的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了2010年至2020年间低成本眼动追踪系统的发展，分析了相关方法、算法、硬件及软件，并探讨了神经网络在该领域的应用与挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着眼动追踪技术的普及，低成本系统的需求增加，但现有研究缺乏系统性综述，本文旨在填补这一空白并指导未来研究方向。
AI.method: 通过文献调研，分析商业与开源眼动追踪系统的硬件设计、软件算法，并结合神经网络技术进展评估其优劣势及发展瓶颈。
AI.result: 总结了低成本眼动追踪技术的演进路径，识别出硬件精度、算法鲁棒性及计算资源限制等核心问题，并提出优化方向。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究应聚焦于提升硬件性能与算法效率，结合轻量化神经网络模型，以推动低成本眼动追踪技术的实用化与普及。

ai_content.conclusion: 未来研究应聚焦于提升硬件性能与算法效率，结合轻量化神经网络模型，以推动低成本眼动追踪技术的实用化与普及。

search_text: A review of the low-cost eye-tracking systems for 2010-2020 2010-2020年低成本眼球追踪系统回顾 The manuscript presented an analysis of the work in the field of eye-tracking over the past ten years in the low-cost filed. We researched in detail the methods, algorithms, and developed hardware. To realization, this task we considered the commercial eye-tracking systems with hardware and software and Free software. Additionally, the manuscript considered advances in the neural network fields for eye-tracking tasks and problems which hold back the development of the low-cost eye-tracking system. special attention in the manuscript is given to recommendations for further research in the field of eye-tracking devices in the low-cost field. 该手稿对过去十年在低成本领域的眼球追踪领域的工作进行了分析。我们详细研究了方法、算法并开发了硬件。为了实现这一任务，我们考虑了具有硬件和软件以及免费软件的商业眼动追踪系统。此外，该手稿还考虑了眼球追踪任务的神经网络领域的进展以及阻碍低成本眼球追踪系统发展的问题。手稿中特别关注了低成本领域眼球追踪设备领域进一步研究的建议。 本文回顾了2010年至2020年间低成本眼动追踪系统的发展，分析了相关方法、算法、硬件及软件，并探讨了神经网络在该领域的应用与挑战。 Ildar Rakhmatulin cs.AI

authors_text: Zhen Wang,Qiansheng Wang,Chengguo Lv,Xue Cao,Guohong Fu
title: Unseen Target Stance Detection with Adversarial Domain Generalization
title_zh: 具有对抗域泛化的看不见的目标姿态检测
abstract: Although stance detection has made great progress in the past few years, it is still facing the problem of unseen targets. In this study, we investigate the domain difference between targets and thus incorporate attention-based conditional encoding with adversarial domain generalization to perform unseen target stance detection. Experimental results show that our approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the SemEval-2016 dataset, demonstrating the importance of domain difference between targets in unseen target stance detection.
summary: Although stance detection has made great progress in the past few years, it is still facing the problem of unseen targets. In this study, we investigate the domain difference between targets and thus incorporate attention-based conditional encoding with adversarial domain generalization to perform unseen target stance detection. Experimental results show that our approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the SemEval-2016 dataset, demonstrating the importance of domain difference between targets in unseen target stance detection.
abstract_zh: 尽管姿态检测在过去几年中取得了长足的进步，但仍然面临着看不见目标的问题。在本研究中，我们研究了目标之间的域差异，从而将基于注意力的条件编码与对抗域泛化相结合，以执行看不见的目标姿态检测。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 SemEval-2016 数据集上实现了新的最先进的性能，证明了目标之间的域差异在看不见的目标姿态检测中的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何检测未见过目标的立场，提出结合对抗域泛化的方法以解决领域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有立场检测方法在面对未见过的目标时表现不佳，领域差异是影响检测效果的关键因素。
AI.method: 采用基于注意力的条件编码与对抗域泛化技术，通过域适应学习提升模型对未见过目标的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在SemEval-2016数据集上取得新的最先进性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 领域差异在未见过目标立场检测中至关重要，所提方法能有效提升跨领域泛化能力。

authors_text: Gabriele Oligeri,Simone Raponi,Savio Sciancalepore,Roberto Di Pietro
title: PAST-AI: Physical-layer Authentication of Satellite Transmitters via Deep Learning
title_zh: PAST-AI：通过深度学习对卫星发射机进行物理层身份验证
abstract: Physical-layer security is regaining traction in the research community, due to the performance boost introduced by deep learning classification algorithms. This is particularly true for sender authentication in wireless communications via radio fingerprinting. However, previous research efforts mainly focused on terrestrial wireless devices while, to the best of our knowledge, none of the previous work took into consideration satellite transmitters. The satellite scenario is generally challenging because, among others, satellite radio transducers feature non-standard electronics (usually aged and specifically designed for harsh conditions). Moreover, the fingerprinting task is specifically difficult for Low-Earth Orbit (LEO) satellites (like the ones we focus in this paper) since they orbit at about 800Km from the Earth, at a speed of around 25,000Km/h, thus making the receiver experiencing a down-link with unique attenuation and fading characteristics. In this paper, we propose PAST-AI, a methodology tailored to authenticate LEO satellites through fingerprinting of their IQ samples, using advanced AI solutions. Our methodology is tested on real data -- more than 100M I/Q samples -- collected from an extensive measurements campaign on the IRIDIUM LEO satellites constellation, lasting 589 hours. Results are striking: we prove that Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and autoencoders (if properly calibrated) can be successfully adopted to authenticate the satellite transducers, with an accuracy spanning between 0.8 and 1, depending on prior assumptions. The proposed methodology, the achieved results, and the provided insights, other than being interesting on their own, when associated to the dataset that we made publicly available, will also pave the way for future research in the area.
summary: Physical-layer security is regaining traction in the research community, due to the performance boost introduced by deep learning classification algorithms. This is particularly true for sender authentication in wireless communications via radio fingerprinting. However, previous research efforts mainly focused on terrestrial wireless devices while, to the best of our knowledge, none of the previous work took into consideration satellite transmitters. The satellite scenario is generally challenging because, among others, satellite radio transducers feature non-standard electronics (usually aged and specifically designed for harsh conditions). Moreover, the fingerprinting task is specifically difficult for Low-Earth Orbit (LEO) satellites (like the ones we focus in this paper) since they orbit at about 800Km from the Earth, at a speed of around 25,000Km/h, thus making the receiver experiencing a down-link with unique attenuation and fading characteristics. In this paper, we propose PAST-AI, a methodology tailored to authenticate LEO satellites through fingerprinting of their IQ samples, using advanced AI solutions. Our methodology is tested on real data -- more than 100M I/Q samples -- collected from an extensive measurements campaign on the IRIDIUM LEO satellites constellation, lasting 589 hours. Results are striking: we prove that Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and autoencoders (if properly calibrated) can be successfully adopted to authenticate the satellite transducers, with an accuracy spanning between 0.8 and 1, depending on prior assumptions. The proposed methodology, the achieved results, and the provided insights, other than being interesting on their own, when associated to the dataset that we made publicly available, will also pave the way for future research in the area.
abstract_zh: 由于深度学习分类算法带来的性能提升，物理层安全性正在重新受到研究界的关注。对于通过无线电指纹识别的无线通信中的发送者身份验证尤其如此。然而，之前的研究工作主要集中在地面无线设备上，而据我们所知，之前的工作都没有考虑到卫星发射机。卫星场景通常具有挑战性，因为卫星无线电传感器采用非标准电子设备（通常老化且专门为恶劣条件设计）。此外，指纹识别任务对于低地球轨道 (LEO) 卫星（如我们在本文中关注的卫星）来说尤其困难，因为它们的轨道距离地球约 800 公里，速度约为 25,000 公里/小时，从而使接收器经历具有独特衰减和衰落特性的下行链路。在本文中，我们提出了 PAST-AI，这是一种使用先进的人工智能解决方案，通过对 IQ 样本进行指纹识别来验证 LEO 卫星的方法。我们的方法是在真实数据（超过 1 亿个 I/Q 样本）上进行测试的，这些数据是从 IRIDIUM LEO 卫星星座的广泛测量活动中收集的，持续了 589 小时。结果令人震惊：我们证明，可以成功采用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和自动编码器（如果校准正确）来验证卫星传感器，其精度范围在 0.8 到 1 之间，具体取决于先前的假设。所提出的方法、取得的结果和提供的见解，除了本身很有趣之外，当与我们公开提供的数据集相关联时，也将为该领域的未来研究铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAST-AI方法，利用深度学习对低轨卫星（LEO）的IQ信号进行物理层认证，解决卫星发射机指纹识别难题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究聚焦地面设备，未考虑卫星发射机的特殊性（如非标电子器件、高速运动导致的信道特性差异），需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 基于CNN和自编码器构建模型，通过分析卫星IQ信号特征实现指纹识别，使用实际采集的100M样本数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 在铱星卫星数据集上验证，认证准确率范围为0.8-1.0，证明深度学习方法在卫星场景的有效性，并公开数据集推动后续研究。
AI.conclusion: PAST-AI方法成功实现卫星发射机物理层认证，为卫星通信安全提供新思路，公开数据集为未来研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Zeyu Song,Dongliang Chang,Zhanyu Ma,Xiaoxu Li,Zheng-Hua Tan
title: CC-Loss: Channel Correlation Loss For Image Classification
title_zh: CC-Loss：图像分类的通道相关损失
abstract: The loss function is a key component in deep learning models. A commonly used loss function for classification is the cross entropy loss, which is a simple yet effective application of information theory for classification problems. Based on this loss, many other loss functions have been proposed,~\emph{e.g.}, by adding intra-class and inter-class constraints to enhance the discriminative ability of the learned features. However, these loss functions fail to consider the connections between the feature distribution and the model structure. Aiming at addressing this problem, we propose a channel correlation loss (CC-Loss) that is able to constrain the specific relations between classes and channels as well as maintain the intra-class and the inter-class separability. CC-Loss uses a channel attention module to generate channel attention of features for each sample in the training stage. Next, an Euclidean distance matrix is calculated to make the channel attention vectors associated with the same class become identical and to increase the difference between different classes. Finally, we obtain a feature embedding with good intra-class compactness and inter-class separability.Experimental results show that two different backbone models trained with the proposed CC-Loss outperform the state-of-the-art loss functions on three image classification datasets.

However, these loss functions fail to consider the connections between the feature distribution and the model structure. Aiming at addressing this problem, we propose a channel correlation loss (CC-Loss) that is able to constrain the specific relations between classes and channels as well as maintain the intra-class and the inter-class separability. CC-Loss uses a channel attention module to generate channel attention of features for each sample in the training stage. Finally, we obtain a feature embedding with good intra-class compactness and inter-class separability.Experimental results show that two different backbone models trained with the proposed CC-Loss outperform the state-of-the-art loss functions on three image classification datasets.
abstract_zh: 损失函数是深度学习模型的关键组成部分。分类常用的损失函数是交叉熵损失，它是信息论在分类问题上的简单而有效的应用。基于这种损失，人们提出了许多其他损失函数，通过添加类内和类间约束来增强学习特征的判别能力。然而，这些损失函数未能考虑特征分布与模型结构之间的联系。针对这个问题，我们提出了一种通道相关损失（CC-Loss），它能够约束类和通道之间的特定关系，并保持类内和类间的可分离性。 CC-Loss在训练阶段使用通道注意力模块为每个样本生成特征的通道注意力。接下来，计算欧几里得距离矩阵，使与同一类别相关的信道注意力向量变得相同，并增加不同类别之间的差异。最后，我们获得了具有良好的类内紧凑性和类间可分离性的特征嵌入。实验结果表明，使用所提出的 CC-Loss 训练的两种不同的骨干模型在三个图像分类数据集上优于最先进的损失函数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CC-Loss的通道相关性损失函数，用于改进图像分类任务中特征表示的类内紧致性和类间可分性。
AI.motivation: 现有损失函数（如交叉熵）未充分考虑特征分布与模型结构之间的关联，导致类别间通道关系约束不足，影响分类性能。
AI.method: 通过通道注意力模块生成特征通道注意力向量，利用欧氏距离矩阵强制同类通道注意力向量趋同、异类通道差异最大化，最终获得更具判别力的特征嵌入。
AI.result: 在三个图像分类数据集上，使用CC-Loss训练的两种主干模型均优于现有最先进损失函数。
AI.conclusion: CC-Loss通过建模通道间相关性，有效提升了特征表示的类内紧致性与类间可分性，从而提高了图像分类性能。

authors_text: Dongxu Li,Chenchen Xu,Xin Yu,Kaihao Zhang,Ben Swift,Hanna Suominen,Hongdong Li
title: TSPNet: Hierarchical Feature Learning via Temporal Semantic Pyramid for Sign Language Translation
title_zh: TSPNet：通过时间语义金字塔进行手语翻译的分层特征学习
abstract: Sign language translation (SLT) aims to interpret sign video sequences into text-based natural language sentences. Sign videos consist of continuous sequences of sign gestures with no clear boundaries in between. Existing SLT models usually represent sign visual features in a frame-wise manner so as to avoid needing to explicitly segmenting the videos into isolated signs. However, these methods neglect the temporal information of signs and lead to substantial ambiguity in translation. In this paper, we explore the temporal semantic structures of signvideos to learn more discriminative features. To this end, we first present a novel sign video segment representation which takes into account multiple temporal granularities, thus alleviating the need for accurate video segmentation. Taking advantage of the proposed segment representation, we develop a novel hierarchical sign video feature learning method via a temporal semantic pyramid network, called TSPNet. Specifically, TSPNet introduces an inter-scale attention to evaluate and enhance local semantic consistency of sign segments and an intra-scale attention to resolve semantic ambiguity by using non-local video context. Experiments show that our TSPNet outperforms the state-of-the-art with significant improvements on the BLEU score (from 9.58 to 13.41) and ROUGE score (from 31.80 to 34.96)on the largest commonly-used SLT dataset. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/verashira/TSPNet.
summary: Sign language translation (SLT) aims to interpret sign video sequences into text-based natural language sentences. Sign videos consist of continuous sequences of sign gestures with no clear boundaries in between. Existing SLT models usually represent sign visual features in a frame-wise manner so as to avoid needing to explicitly segmenting the videos into isolated signs. However, these methods neglect the temporal information of signs and lead to substantial ambiguity in translation. In this paper, we explore the temporal semantic structures of signvideos to learn more discriminative features. To this end, we first present a novel sign video segment representation which takes into account multiple temporal granularities, thus alleviating the need for accurate video segmentation. Taking advantage of the proposed segment representation, we develop a novel hierarchical sign video feature learning method via a temporal semantic pyramid network, called TSPNet. Specifically, TSPNet introduces an inter-scale attention to evaluate and enhance local semantic consistency of sign segments and an intra-scale attention to resolve semantic ambiguity by using non-local video context. Experiments show that our TSPNet outperforms the state-of-the-art with significant improvements on the BLEU score (from 9.58 to 13.41) and ROUGE score (from 31.80 to 34.96)on the largest commonly-used SLT dataset. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/verashira/TSPNet.
abstract_zh: 手语翻译（SLT）旨在将手语视频序列解释为基于文本的自然语言句子。手语视频由连续的手语手势序列组成，其间没有明确的界限。现有的 SLT 模型通常以逐帧的方式表示标志视觉特征，以避免需要将视频显式分割成孤立的标志。然而，这些方法忽略了符号的时间信息，导致翻译中存在很大的歧义。在本文中，我们探索了符号视频的时间语义结构，以学习更多的判别性特征。为此，我们首先提出一种新颖的标志视频片段表示，它考虑了多个时间粒度，从而减轻了对准确视频分割的需求。利用所提出的分段表示，我们通过时间语义金字塔网络（称为 TSPNet）开发了一种新颖的分层标志视频特征学习方法。具体来说，TSPNet 引入了尺度间注意力来评估和增强符号片段的局部语义一致性，并引入了尺度内注意力来通过使用非局部视频上下文来解决语义歧义。实验表明，我们的 TSPNet 在最大的常用 SLT 数据集上的 BLEU 分数（从 9.58 到 13.41）和 ROUGE 分数（从 31.80 到 34.96）显着提高，优于最先进的方法。我们的实现可以在 https://github.com/verashira/TSPNet 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TSPNet模型，通过时间语义金字塔结构解决手语翻译中时间信息缺失导致的语义模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 现有手语翻译方法采用帧级特征表示，忽略手势的时间连续性，导致翻译结果存在显著歧义。
AI.method: 设计多粒度时间语义分段表示，构建包含跨尺度注意力（增强局部语义一致性）和跨尺度注意力（利用非局部上下文消除歧义）的层次化特征学习网络TSPNet。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模时间语义层次结构，TSPNet有效提升了手语视频的语义表征能力，代码已开源。

authors_text: Di Hu,Rui Qian,Minyue Jiang,Xiao Tan,Shilei Wen,Errui Ding,Weiyao Lin,Dejing Dou
title: Discriminative Sounding Objects Localization via Self-supervised Audiovisual Matching
title_zh: 通过自监督视听匹配进行有区别的探测对象定位
comment: To appear in NeurIPS 2020. Previous Title: Learning to Discriminatively Localize Sounding Objects in a Cocktail-party Scenario
comments: To appear in NeurIPS 2020. Previous Title: Learning to Discriminatively Localize Sounding Objects in a Cocktail-party Scenario
abstract: Discriminatively localizing sounding objects in cocktail-party, i.e., mixed sound scenes, is commonplace for humans, but still challenging for machines. In this paper, we propose a two-stage learning framework to perform self-supervised class-aware sounding object localization. First, we propose to learn robust object representations by aggregating the candidate sound localization results in the single source scenes. Then, class-aware object localization maps are generated in the cocktail-party scenarios by referring the pre-learned object knowledge, and the sounding objects are accordingly selected by matching audio and visual object category distributions, where the audiovisual consistency is viewed as the self-supervised signal. Experimental results in both realistic and synthesized cocktail-party videos demonstrate that our model is superior in filtering out silent objects and pointing out the location of sounding objects of different classes. Code is available at https://github.com/DTaoo/Discriminative-Sounding-Objects-Localization.
summary: Discriminatively localizing sounding objects in cocktail-party, i.e., mixed sound scenes, is commonplace for humans, but still challenging for machines. In this paper, we propose a two-stage learning framework to perform self-supervised class-aware sounding object localization. First, we propose to learn robust object representations by aggregating the candidate sound localization results in the single source scenes. Then, class-aware object localization maps are generated in the cocktail-party scenarios by referring the pre-learned object knowledge, and the sounding objects are accordingly selected by matching audio and visual object category distributions, where the audiovisual consistency is viewed as the self-supervised signal. Experimental results in both realistic and synthesized cocktail-party videos demonstrate that our model is superior in filtering out silent objects and pointing out the location of sounding objects of different classes. Code is available at https://github.com/DTaoo/Discriminative-Sounding-Objects-Localization.
abstract_zh: 在鸡尾酒会上有区别地定位发声对象（即混合声音场景）对于人类来说很常见，但对于机器来说仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一个两阶段学习框架来执行自监督的类感知探测对象定位。首先，我们建议通过聚合单个源场景中的候选声音定位结果来学习鲁棒的对象表示。然后，通过参考预先学习的对象知识，在鸡尾酒会场景中生成类感知的对象定位图，并通过匹配音频和视觉对象类别分布来相应地选择发声对象，其中视听一致性被视为自监督信号。真实和合成的鸡尾酒会视频中的实验结果表明，我们的模型在过滤掉无声对象并指出不同类别的发声对象的位置方面表现出色。代码可在 https://github.com/DTaoo/Discriminative-Sounding-Objects-Localization 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督音频视觉匹配方法，用于在混响场景中定位发声物体。
AI.motivation: 人类能轻松在混响环境中定位发声物体，但机器仍面临挑战，现有方法依赖标注数据且难以处理复杂声学场景。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：首先通过单声源场景学习鲁棒物体表示，再利用预训练知识在混响场景中生成类别感知定位图，通过音频视觉一致性实现自监督学习。
AI.result: 在真实与合成混响视频中，模型能有效过滤静默物体并准确定位不同类别的发声物体。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需标注数据即可实现高效发声物体定位，验证了自监督音频视觉匹配的有效性。

search_text: Discriminative Sounding Objects Localization via Self-supervised Audiovisual Matching 通过自监督视听匹配进行有区别的探测对象定位 Discriminatively localizing sounding objects in cocktail-party, i.e., mixed sound scenes, is commonplace for humans, but still challenging for machines. In this paper, we propose a two-stage learning framework to perform self-supervised class-aware sounding object localization. First, we propose to learn robust object representations by aggregating the candidate sound localization results in the single source scenes. Then, class-aware object localization maps are generated in the cocktail-party scenarios by referring the pre-learned object knowledge, and the sounding objects are accordingly selected by matching audio and visual object category distributions, where the audiovisual consistency is viewed as the self-supervised signal. Experimental results in both realistic and synthesized cocktail-party videos demonstrate that our model is superior in filtering out silent objects and pointing out the location of sounding objects of different classes. Code is available at https://github.com/DTaoo/Discriminative-Sounding-Objects-Localization. 在鸡尾酒会上有区别地定位发声对象（即混合声音场景）对于人类来说很常见，但对于机器来说仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一个两阶段学习框架来执行自监督的类感知探测对象定位。首先，我们建议通过聚合单个源场景中的候选声音定位结果来学习鲁棒的对象表示。然后，通过参考预先学习的对象知识，在鸡尾酒会场景中生成类感知的对象定位图，并通过匹配音频和视觉对象类别分布来相应地选择发声对象，其中视听一致性被视为自监督信号。真实和合成的鸡尾酒会视频中的实验结果表明，我们的模型在过滤掉无声对象并指出不同类别的发声对象的位置方面表现出色。代码可在 https://github.com/DTaoo/Discriminative-Sounding-Objects-Localization 获取。 本文提出一种自监督音频视觉匹配方法，用于在混响场景中定位发声物体。 Di Hu,Rui Qian,Minyue Jiang,Xiao Tan,Shilei Wen,Errui Ding,Weiyao Lin,Dejing Dou cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Francisco Leonardo Bezerra Martins,José Cláudio do Nascimento
title: Power law dynamics in genealogical graphs
title_zh: 谱系图中的幂律动力学
abstract: Several populational networks present complex topologies when implemented in evolutionary algorithms. A common feature of these topologies is the emergence of a power law. Power law behavior with different scaling factors can also be observed in genealogical networks, but we still can not satisfactorily describe its dynamics or its relation to population evolution over time. In this paper, we use an algorithm to measure the impact of individuals in several numerical populations and study its dynamics of evolution through nonextensive statistics. Like this, we show evidence that the observed emergence of power law has a dynamic behavior over time. This dynamic development can be described using a family of q-exponential distributions whose parameters are time-dependent and follow a specific pattern. We also show evidence that elitism significantly influences the power law scaling factors observed. These results imply that the different power law shapes and deviations observed in genealogical networks are static images of a time-dependent dynamic development that can be satisfactorily described using q-exponential distributions.
summary: Several populational networks present complex topologies when implemented in evolutionary algorithms. A common feature of these topologies is the emergence of a power law. Power law behavior with different scaling factors can also be observed in genealogical networks, but we still can not satisfactorily describe its dynamics or its relation to population evolution over time. In this paper, we use an algorithm to measure the impact of individuals in several numerical populations and study its dynamics of evolution through nonextensive statistics. Like this, we show evidence that the observed emergence of power law has a dynamic behavior over time. This dynamic development can be described using a family of q-exponential distributions whose parameters are time-dependent and follow a specific pattern. We also show evidence that elitism significantly influences the power law scaling factors observed. These results imply that the different power law shapes and deviations observed in genealogical networks are static images of a time-dependent dynamic development that can be satisfactorily described using q-exponential distributions.
abstract_zh: 当在进化算法中实现时，一些群体网络呈现出复杂的拓扑结构。这些拓扑的一个共同特征是幂律的出现。具有不同尺度因子的幂律行为也可以在谱系网络中观察到，但我们仍然无法令人满意地描述其动态或其与种群随时间演化的关系。在本文中，我们使用一种算法来衡量个体在多个数字群体中的影响，并通过非广泛的统计研究其进化动态。像这样，我们证明观察到的幂律的出现随着时间的推移具有动态行为。这种动态发展可以使用一系列 q 指数分布来描述，这些分布的参数与时间相关并遵循特定的模式。我们还证明，精英主义显着影响观察到的幂律缩放因子。这些结果意味着，在谱系网络中观察到的不同幂律形状和偏差是依赖于时间的动态发展的静态图像，可以使用 q 指数分布来令人满意地描述。

AI.tldr: 研究基因谱系网络中幂律动态行为，利用非广义统计分析其演化机制
AI.motivation: 现有研究无法充分描述基因谱系网络幂律动态及其与种群进化时间的关系，需探索其动态规律与影响因素
AI.method: 通过算法量化个体影响，并运用非广义统计方法分析演化过程中的动态特征
AI.result: 发现幂律动态遵循时间依赖的q指数分布，精英主义显著影响标度因子
AI.conclusion: 基因谱系网络的幂律特征是动态演变的静态反映，可由时间依赖的q指数分布有效描述

authors_text: I. M. Son,S. I. Kwak,M. O. Choe
title: Fuzzy Approximate Reasoning Method based on Least Common Multiple and its Property Analysis
title_zh: 基于最小公倍数的模糊近似推理方法及其性质分析
comment: 18 pages, 0 figures, 14 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2003.13450
comments: 18 pages, 0 figures, 14 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2003.13450
abstract: This paper shows a novel fuzzy approximate reasoning method based on the least common multiple (LCM). Its fundamental idea is to obtain a new fuzzy reasoning result by the extended distance measure based on LCM between the antecedent fuzzy set and the consequent one in discrete SISO fuzzy system. The proposed method is called LCM one. And then this paper analyzes its some properties, i.e., the reductive property, information loss occurred in reasoning process, and the convergence of fuzzy control. Theoretical and experimental research results highlight that proposed method meaningfully improve the reductive property and information loss and controllability than the previous fuzzy reasoning methods.
summary: This paper shows a novel fuzzy approximate reasoning method based on the least common multiple (LCM). Its fundamental idea is to obtain a new fuzzy reasoning result by the extended distance measure based on LCM between the antecedent fuzzy set and the consequent one in discrete SISO fuzzy system. The proposed method is called LCM one. And then this paper analyzes its some properties, i.e., the reductive property, information loss occurred in reasoning process, and the convergence of fuzzy control. Theoretical and experimental research results highlight that proposed method meaningfully improve the reductive property and information loss and controllability than the previous fuzzy reasoning methods.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于最小公倍数（LCM）的新型模糊近似推理方法。其基本思想是通过离散SISO模糊系统中前件模糊集与后件模糊集之间基于LCM的扩展距离测度来获得新的模糊推理结果。所提出的方法称为 LCM 一。然后分析了其一些性质，即还原性、推理过程中发生的信息损失以及模糊控制的收敛性。理论和实验研究结果表明，该方法比以前的模糊推理方法有意义地提高了还原性、信息损失和可控性。

AI.tldr: 提出基于最小公倍数的模糊近似推理方法，并分析其缩减性、信息损失及收敛性等性质。
AI.motivation: 现有模糊推理方法在缩减性、信息损失和可控性方面存在不足，需改进以提高性能。
AI.method: 通过扩展的基于最小公倍数（LCM）的距离度量，计算离散SISO模糊系统中前件与后件模糊集间的距离，生成新的推理结果。
AI.result: 理论和实验表明，该方法在缩减性、信息损失和可控性方面优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于LCM的模糊推理方法有效提升了缩减性、信息保留和控制性能，具有实际应用价值。

title: An exponent one-fifth algorithm for deterministic integer factorisation
title_zh: 用于确定性整数分解的指数五分之一算法
abstract: Hittmeir recently presented a deterministic algorithm that provably computes the prime factorisation of a positive integer $N$ in $N^{2/9+o(1)}$ bit operations. Prior to this breakthrough, the best known complexity bound for this problem was $N^{1/4+o(1)}$, a result going back to the 1970s. In this paper we push Hittmeir's techniques further, obtaining a rigorous, deterministic factoring algorithm with complexity $N^{1/5+o(1)}$.
summary: Hittmeir recently presented a deterministic algorithm that provably computes the prime factorisation of a positive integer $N$ in $N^{2/9+o(1)}$ bit operations. Prior to this breakthrough, the best known complexity bound for this problem was $N^{1/4+o(1)}$, a result going back to the 1970s. In this paper we push Hittmeir's techniques further, obtaining a rigorous, deterministic factoring algorithm with complexity $N^{1/5+o(1)}$.
abstract_zh: Hittmeir 最近提出了一种确定性算法，可以证明在 $N^{2/9+o(1)}$ 位运算中计算正整数 $N$ 的质因数分解。在此突破之前，该问题最著名的复杂度界限是 $N^{1/4+o(1)}$，这一结果可以追溯到 20 世纪 70 年代。在本文中，我们进一步推进了 Hittmeir 的技术，获得了复杂度为 $N^{1/5+o(1)}$ 的严格、确定性因式分解算法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种确定性整数分解算法，其时间复杂度为 N^{1/5+o(1)}。
AI.motivation: 突破此前Hittmeir的N^{2/9+o(1)}算法以及1970年代以来N^{1/4+o(1)}的最佳复杂度上界，进一步降低确定性整数分解的时间复杂度。
AI.method: 在Hittmeir的技术基础上进行扩展和优化，通过改进算法步骤和参数选择，将复杂度从N^{2/9+o(1)}降至N^{1/5+o(1)}。
AI.result: 实现了确定性整数分解算法，复杂度为N^{1/5+o(1)}，优于此前的最佳结果N^{2/9+o(1)}。
AI.conclusion: 成功将确定性整数分解的复杂度上界从N^{2/9+o(1)}推进到N^{1/5+o(1)}，是整数分解理论的重要进展。

search_text: An exponent one-fifth algorithm for deterministic integer factorisation 用于确定性整数分解的指数五分之一算法 Hittmeir recently presented a deterministic algorithm that provably computes the prime factorisation of a positive integer $N$ in $N^{2/9+o(1)}$ bit operations. Prior to this breakthrough, the best known complexity bound for this problem was $N^{1/4+o(1)}$, a result going back to the 1970s. In this paper we push Hittmeir's techniques further, obtaining a rigorous, deterministic factoring algorithm with complexity $N^{1/5+o(1)}$. Hittmeir 最近提出了一种确定性算法，可以证明在 $N^{2/9+o(1)}$ 位运算中计算正整数 $N$ 的质因数分解。在此突破之前，该问题最著名的复杂度界限是 $N^{1/4+o(1)}$，这一结果可以追溯到 20 世纪 70 年代。在本文中，我们进一步推进了 Hittmeir 的技术，获得了复杂度为 $N^{1/5+o(1)}$ 的严格、确定性因式分解算法。 提出一种确定性整数分解算法，其时间复杂度为 N^{1/5+o(1)}。 David Harvey math.NT,cs.DS

authors_text: Jing Zhang,Bo Chen,Lingxi Zhang,Xirui Ke,Haipeng Ding
title: Neural, Symbolic and Neural-Symbolic Reasoning on Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 知识图上的神经、符号和神经符号推理
abstract: Knowledge graph reasoning is the fundamental component to support machine learning applications such as information extraction, information retrieval, and recommendation. Since knowledge graphs can be viewed as the discrete symbolic representations of knowledge, reasoning on knowledge graphs can naturally leverage the symbolic techniques. However, symbolic reasoning is intolerant of the ambiguous and noisy data. On the contrary, the recent advances of deep learning promote neural reasoning on knowledge graphs, which is robust to the ambiguous and noisy data, but lacks interpretability compared to symbolic reasoning. Considering the advantages and disadvantages of both methodologies, recent efforts have been made on combining the two reasoning methods. In this survey, we take a thorough look at the development of the symbolic, neural and hybrid reasoning on knowledge graphs. We survey two specific reasoning tasks, knowledge graph completion and question answering on knowledge graphs, and explain them in a unified reasoning framework. We also briefly discuss the future directions for knowledge graph reasoning.
summary: Knowledge graph reasoning is the fundamental component to support machine learning applications such as information extraction, information retrieval, and recommendation. Since knowledge graphs can be viewed as the discrete symbolic representations of knowledge, reasoning on knowledge graphs can naturally leverage the symbolic techniques. However, symbolic reasoning is intolerant of the ambiguous and noisy data. On the contrary, the recent advances of deep learning promote neural reasoning on knowledge graphs, which is robust to the ambiguous and noisy data, but lacks interpretability compared to symbolic reasoning. Considering the advantages and disadvantages of both methodologies, recent efforts have been made on combining the two reasoning methods. In this survey, we take a thorough look at the development of the symbolic, neural and hybrid reasoning on knowledge graphs. We survey two specific reasoning tasks, knowledge graph completion and question answering on knowledge graphs, and explain them in a unified reasoning framework. We also briefly discuss the future directions for knowledge graph reasoning.
abstract_zh: 知识图推理是支持信息提取、信息检索和推荐等机器学习应用的基本组成部分。由于知识图谱可以被视为知识的离散符号表示，因此知识图谱的推理自然可以利用符号技术。然而，符号推理不能容忍模糊和嘈杂的数据。相反，深度学习的最新进展促进了知识图谱上的神经推理，它对模糊和噪声数据具有鲁棒性，但与符号推理相比缺乏可解释性。考虑到这两种方法的优点和缺点，最近人们致力于将两种推理方法结合起来。在本次调查中，我们深入研究了知识图上的符号推理、神经推理和混合推理的发展。我们调查了知识图补全和知识图问答这两个具体的推理任务，并在统一的推理框架中对其进行了解释。我们还简要讨论了知识图推理的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 综述知识图谱上的符号、神经及混合推理方法，统一框架解释知识图谱补全与问答任务
AI.motivation: 解决符号推理对噪声数据不鲁棒及神经推理缺乏可解释性的问题，结合两者优势
AI.method: 系统综述符号、神经及混合推理方法，统一框架分析知识图谱补全与问答任务
AI.result: 梳理三种推理方法发展，比较优缺点，探讨未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 混合推理结合两者优势，未来需提升可解释性与鲁棒性
